Jira in SharePoint: Your single source of truth seamless collaboration across platforms.

Seamlessly integrating Jira and SharePoint with each other simplifies teamwork, optimizes documentation management, and enables real-time collaboration through the SharePoint Connector for Jira.

Key Benefits

Enhance productivity:  Streamline collaboration for your team by providing a centralized platform, eliminating the need to switch between various tools.

Real-time collaboration: Get instant access to the latest changes in an issue or document within the connected platform.

Holistic overview: Fostering collaboration among team members, stakeholders, and relevant parties promotes transparency and ensures access to critical information. It also harnesses the potential for creating stunning dashboards using the SharePoint Connector for Jira.

Scalability: Achieve a unified view and enable centralized reporting by connecting different Jira Sites to a single SharePoint platform.

  • Effortlessly filter Jira issues using your preferred JQL terms or conduct a simple text search, all while enjoying the convenience of the autocomplete function.

  • Select flexibly between a practical 'table view' or a modern 'card view' to tailor your display preferences.

  • Easily navigate to your filtered search results in Jira.

  • Real-time updates with seamless connectivity

Create a single source of truth for your distributed teams and avoid duplicated content. No more need to upload, download, tediously edit and re-upload files. Effortlessly update embedded files with a single click, ensuring your files are consistently up-to-date. Edit embedded files such as Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, and Excel documents directly within Jira Cloud for seamless document management.

Increase your productivity and efficiency by using this app:

Strengthen collaboration by connecting Jira with SharePoint. Setting up the SharePoint Connector for Jira Cloud or Data Center (DC) is a breeze, and you'll find yourself up and running in no time.

Security is our top priority: Our seamless integration of Jira and SharePoint occurs entirely within the browser, guaranteeing the safety and security of your data. We are dedicated to safeguarding your privacy and possess ISO27k and ISO9k1 certifications as evidence of our commitment. We will never collect or store any unnecessary end user data.

title: LinkedIn integration by adenin
shortDescription: Easily display your company's LinkedIn posts within SharePoint and Viva Connections
Description:
Ever thought about making your LinkedIn workflow even more efficient and seamless? Integrate LinkedIn with SharePoint via adenin and sit back as we take your productivity to the next level. With this integration, you can embed LinkedIn company posts right into your SharePoint as a web part, or Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extension (ACE) and enjoy a more unified Microsoft 365 experience.

✅ Display your LinkedIn company posts right within SharePoint with a custom web part

✅ Enjoy a seamless experience within your Microsoft 365 environment

✅ Redefine productivity by viewing and sharing posts from a single place

✅ Make life easier for developers with a platform that's customizable, yet simple to use

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint LinkedIn integration

What data sources are available for LinkedIn?

LinkedIn provides the following data source: Organization News Feed

Is the LinkedIn web part free?

While the web part's use through adenin is available at no initial cost, accessing data from LinkedIn company feeds via adenin may involve usage charges based on your selected plan. For comprehensive pricing details, visit adenin's pricing page.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from LinkedIn) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Who is the LinkedIn integration for?

adenin’s SharePoint connector is a popular choice for Human Resources, Internal Communications, and Marketing teams at small to large organizations. The data sources that are built into LinkedIn (see above) are incredibly simple to integrate into SharePoint and don't require any technical know-how. The adenin platform completely handles authenticating with LinkedIn and then loads your data into an Adaptive Card layout that, in turn, will be embedded into SharePoint.

Do I have to be a developer to use the SharePoint integration with LinkedIn?

No, the integration is designed to help busy managers stay on top of their various workplace applications, where LinkedIn is just one of many examples (see others). As such, we designed many tools that reduce the amount of coding expected of users: Starting with the LinkedIn integration, which you can set up yourself in just a few, completely code-free, steps (see instructions).

Then with the built-in Card designer we automatically generate a layout from your LinkedIn data. You could tweak this further in the low-code designer, either yourself if you have some HTML-related skills, or with a little help from us – just reach out to one of the team.

Lastly, there will be the SharePoint integration which is self-explanatory to install. Just check the installation instructions for more details.

How does adenin ensure my LinkedIn data is safely delivered to SharePoint?

We use the secure OAuth standard which means you authorize adenin accessing your LinkedIn data and in turn authorize us to share this data with SharePoint. Both of these authorizations can be revoked by you at any point through the Linked accounts menu (requires user account). No data is ever stored on adenin servers, instead it is directly sent to the client (in this case SharePoint) who will treat it in accordance with their privacy policy. Please also check out our Privacy Policy for more details.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The LinkedIn integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

✅ Personal dashboard & digital workplace

  • Zendesk – Export and monitor support tickets, see comments on posts and articles

✅ HR & Employee services

  • Workday – Time off balances for your team, Leave calendar, submit new requests

  • BrightHR – Lists of holidays, shifts, sicknesses, HR documents, overtime, vaccinations and expenses
  • Sage Payroll – Recent pay slips

✅ Developer and Design tools, DevOps, REST API

  • Jira – Issues of any type, comments across all projects, custom filters using Jira Query Language (JQL)
  • Atlassian Confluence – Recent updates to pages
  • Github – Open issues from a team, repository or the currently logged in user, commits and pull requests

  • Netlify – Successful and failed deploys
  • Any REST API – Connect to APIs using an API key, token or username and password. Advanced queries with JMESPath
  • Any webhook – Simply catch webhook requests from any application that offers it and automatically collate a list or show the status of the most recent webhook

✅ E-commerce

  • Shopify – Reports such as about abandoned carts, lists of customer contact details, inventories, order or transactions. Lists of current marketing events, discount codes, price rules or products.
  • Stripe – Current charges, disputes, refunds, invoices or customer details

✅ Can't find your app? Not a problem – either check our full App Directory, set up your own connection with our generic API connector, or let us know what integration you'd like to see.

❓Useful resources to get started

👉 Get started with App integrations
👉 See all compatible apps supported by App integrations
👉 See sample output (Adaptive Cards) designed for businesses

Create visually pleasing layouts with ease

The output generated by the web part is in the open-source Adaptive Card format. This means it can be easily modified using a built-in low-code designer. Here are a few examples of what you can build with the App integrations webpart:

  • Lists – collect updates into lists for recent tickets, issues, tasks, events, comments, mentions, notifications, and more
  • Quick summary (ideal for using Viva Connections dashboard as the corporate start page) – Get a bird's eye of the status for different applications. Easily identify if any app has a new update, news item, ticket or issue for the user
  • Knowledge bases & FAQs – Using a built-in natural language processor you can create a list of popular questions and answers that users may want to know. This is ideal for employee self-service improvements, specific policies or frequently recurring inquiries.
  • Charts [coming soon] – Visualize received data, for example a list of tasks or issues, into Gantt charts or pie & bar charts, top-10 tables and word clouds
  • Feed – Create lists with rich media like images, or a gallery of items of your latest news, reviews, statistics, etc.

Main benefits and features

App integrations is a straight-forward service that forwards live data from 3rd party apps into web parts you can easily place anywhere within SharePoint or Viva. But there's a few notable features that help youkeep a bird's eye view of your operations:
  • No coding skills required – The web part automatically analyzes the structure of your applications data to make it into beautiful lists. If you want to refine the layout, just use the built-in, low-code designer
  • Filters – The data that's being received can be further filtered for certain criteria using Microsoft Adaptive Expressions
  • Embed anywhere – Create a company start page by embedding the App integrations web part in other places, such as a chatbots for Microsoft Teams, Slack or Webex Teams; as well as other intranet products, such as Wordpress, Lumapps, Wix or Confluence
  • Personalized & always up-to-date – Users don't need to refresh anything, data is always pulled live from a secure API connection using their personal account credentials
  • Safe and secure – App integrations never saves any data on its servers, all data gets fetched at display time from your source app through the client. Adenin, the company behind App integrations, is GDPR compliant as it never stores or transfers any of the connected apps' data to its servers.
  • Usage logs – Track what users are doing with usage metrics and get a log of API requests along with possible error code scenarios

What data sources are available for Atlassian Confluence?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Who should use the SharePoint Atlassian Confluence integration?

This integration is designed for teams across Customer Service, Finance & Accounting, and Human Resources sectors in organizations of any size, simplifying the integration process without the need for technical expertise.

Is technical expertise required to implement this integration?

No, adenin has crafted this integration to be accessible for busy managers, requiring no coding skills for setup. The platform offers a low-code Card designer for customization, ensuring a straightforward integration process.

How is my Atlassian Confluence data secured with adenin?

Adenin employs secure OAuth standards for all data transactions, ensuring your information is never duplicated on adenin servers. Users have complete authority to revoke data access at any time, maintaining stringent data security and privacy standards.

By leveraging adenin for your Atlassian Confluence and SharePoint integration, you gain a powerful, efficient workspace that centralizes your data access, fostering better decision-making and productivity through an integrated digital workspace.

title: Social Squared Forums
shortDescription: Lightning Tools Social Squared Forums is a Discussion Board tool for SharePoint and Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Social Squared is a feature-rich, modern discussion forum for use within SharePoint or Microsoft Teams.

* Please note that this is a 30-day trial experience of Social Squared for SharePoint Online. Upon successfully purchasing a license key from Lightning Tools, the product license can be applied without reinstalling the application or losing any content. To purchase, or to trial in SharePoint 2019 or SE, please contact sales@lightningtools.com

Social Squared is a SharePoint discussion board application where users can post questions within relevant forums and receive answers to their questions from subject matter experts. The discussions continue to provide answers to commonly asked questions to other employees who may be looking for information. The structure of Social Squared forums means that users can easily find answers to questions through logical forum structures, tags, and built-in search.

Key Features

Structured forum architecture: Site or Team owners create a forum structure of discussion categories, allowing participants to easily navigate to the right place to ask and answer questions.

Works in SharePoint and Microsoft Teams: Separate Social Squared instances can be created in any SharePoint site or Microsoft Teams team. Forum content is stored in SharePoint lists within your SharePoint Online tenant.

Works on mobile devices: Social Squared supports mobile devices via the Microsoft Teams and SharePoint apps.

Moderation: Subject matter experts can be named as Moderators in each forum.

Multiple views: Forum content can be viewed in multiple ways, such as Recent Topics, Favorite Topics, My Posts, etc.

Tagging: Posts can be tagged to provide findability in the Social Squared Tag Cloud view.

Rich Text Editor: Posts can be formatted, and can contain images, video, code, and more.

Customizable: Admins can choose from a multitude of settings to best support your organization’s use case.

Feedback: Site and team members can rate, like, and vote on posts, and they can be awarded badges for their participation.

Notifications: Participants can subscribe to forums or topics, and they can receive notifications via email or within Microsoft Teams.

User-Friendly Interface: Social Squared provides an intuitive user experience for both forum administrators and members.

Social Squared by Lightning Tools is a robust solution for collaboration and knowledge sharing within businesses, non-profits, government organizations, and education!

title: Calendar Rollup
shortDescription: Overlay and color-code multiple calendars on SharePoint or Microsoft Teams in one location
Description:
BoostSolutions' Calendar Rollup, an SPFx web part, combines all your meetings and events into a single calendar display. It integrates SharePoint calendars with Microsoft 365 calendars, including both group and personal calendars.

Whether you're using SharePoint portal or Microsoft Teams, it allows you to view all your events in one location, simplifying the management of group and private calendar events.

The application color-codes calendar events from different sources for easy organization and identification, with a color-coded legend for intuitive distinction of overlaid events.

Events can be viewed by day, week, month or in an agenda format. The agenda view provides a chronological list of events for quick access and review.

For each calendar source on the web part, you can set permissions, make certain events read-only, or restrict specific users from adding, editing, or deleting events.

Key Features:

- Combine or roll-up events from multiple calendar sources in one single calendar view

- Integration with SharePoint calendars, Office 365 group calendars and personal calendars

- Color-code calendar events based on different calendar sources

- Compatible with SharePoint portal and Microsoft Teams

- Display events in various views, including Month, Week, Day or Agenda

- Ability to show a color-coded legend on top of the calendar

- Ability to set a calendar as read-only to prevent editing

- Able to add calendars or lists from cross-sites within a site collection

- Ability to add/edit/delete an event on the web part and save changes back to the source calendar

- Support for more than 10 overlays in one single calendar view

- Display or hide events from different calendar sources

- Auto refresh calendar events based on schedule

- Permission control to manipulate (add/edit/delete) events on the Web Part

- SPFx web part

(Please note that the app is only compatible with the SharePoint Online modern experience.)

Experience the full potential of Calendar Rollup for SharePoint Online with our fully featured 30-day free trial (1 x Site Collection License with unlimited end users).

For more information, visit our dedicated product site:  https://www.boostsolutions.com/calendar-rollup-app-for-office-365.html

To subscribe or learn more, please visit our website at https://www.boostsolutions.com or contact our sales team at sales@boostsolutions.com. 

For any questions or assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team at support@boostsolutions.com.

What data sources are available for Jira?

Jira offers a variety of data sources, including "Filtered Issues," "Issue List (JQL)," and "Open Issues," allowing for a detailed and comprehensive view of your tasks directly within SharePoint.

Is the SharePoint integration free?

While SharePoint serves as a free channel within adenin, integrating Jira data may involve additional charges based on your adenin plan. For detailed pricing information, please refer to adenin's pricing page.

Who benefits from integrating Jira with SharePoint?

This integration is ideal for IT and Customer Service teams in organizations of all sizes, simplifying task management without requiring extensive technical knowledge. adenin facilitates the entire process, from authentication to data presentation in SharePoint.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Jira) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Do I need to be a developer to use this integration?

No, the integration is designed with busy managers in mind, eliminating the need for coding skills. adenin provides an intuitive, low-code Card designer for easy setup and customization, ensuring a smooth integration process.

How is my Jira data secured with adenin?

Adenin uses secure OAuth standards for all data transactions, guaranteeing that your data remains safe and under your control. You can revoke access at any time, with data directly transmitted to SharePoint without being stored on adenin servers.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The Jira integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

title: Docusign for SharePoint
shortDescription: Accelerate business, reduce costs, and enhance employee experiences with Docusign for SharePoint
Description:
Docusign for SharePoint allows users to work faster and smarter by securely sending, signing, and tracking important documents from their SharePoint library.

Automate business processes

Select documents in your SharePoint library for signing or sending, and use Docusign to specify the signing order and workflow to route the documents to the right people in the right order.

Streamline manual tasks

Completed agreements are automatically saved back to SharePoint.

Boost security and compliance

Grant access, manage users, ensure compliance and maintain a centralized and secure location for all agreements across your organization.

Compatibility Information:

- Docusign for Microsoft SharePoint relies on the Docusign service and is designed to work with all Docusign eSignature plans.

- Docusign for Microsoft SharePoint is optimized for multiple users and advanced Docusign features.

Installation Guidelines:

- Docusign for SharePoint is installed at the site level. If you need Docusign for SharePoint installed across multiple sites you will need to install for each site individually or use scripting to automate multi-site deployment

- Docusign for SharePoint requires a tenant admin to grant consent for the following app permissions: read and write items in all site collections, read and write files in all site collections, read all users' full profiles, read directory data, read all applications, read SharePoint and OneDrive tenant settings, sign in and read user profile, have full control of all site collections

- To grant consent to permissions, a tenant admin must click "Grant consent" in the administrative settings page in the Docusign for SharePoint app.

- Docusign for SharePoint must be manually added to any new sites created after installation.

SPFx Components:

- ListViewCommandSet Command Bar: used for configuring Docusign actions on the command bar. The command bar contains actions to Send with Docusign, Sign with Docusign, Send a Template, Log out, and Manage Administrative Settings.

- ListViewCommandSet Context Menu: used for configuring Docusign actions on the context menu once the user clicks on the ellipsis. A text menu option shows on the context menu.

To use Docusign for SharePoint, you must have a valid Docusign eSignature account. To learn more about plans and pricing, visit https://ecom.docusign.com/plans-and-pricing/esignature.

Note: a free 30-day trial account does not support the SharePoint connector

title: Approvals Hub
shortDescription: Approvals Hub streamlines approval workflows in Microsoft 365.
Description:
Approvals Hub is a modern approval management solution for Microsoft 365, designed to streamline processes, enhance customization, and improve collaboration within SharePoint and Teams. Built for seamless integration with Microsoft 365, Approvals Hub ensures security, reliability, and ease of use.

This solution includes Web Part, Full Page, Teams Tab, and Personal App SPFx components, providing flexibility in how approvals are managed across SharePoint and Teams. With automatic Single Sign-On (SSO), high uptime guarantees, and data securely stored within your Microsoft 365 tenant, your organization maintains full control over its information while benefiting from a secure and highly available platform.

Key features

  • Request Templates - allows you to create different request forms (e.g. HR Request, IT Request, Expense Reimbursement Request, etc. )

  • Customizable approval form fields - build approval forms with numerous field types such as Text, Choice, Number, Currency, etc.

  • Role-based access control - allows you to set up the level of access that users have to the Approvals Hub (regular user, manager, admin etc)

  • Flow designer with parallel and mixed approval workflows - allows administrators to design workflows that include parallel approvals and a mix of sequential and simultaneous approval paths.

  • Complex, multi-level conditions on approvals - configure detailed approval conditions that involve multiple levels and thresholds for advanced workflow customization.

  • Central audit log - provides a consolidated view of all changes, actions, and updates across the Approvals Hub for compliance and review purposes.

  • Custom branding - you can custom brand your logo and colors.

  • Delegates - if a Manager is out of the office, Manager or Admin can delegate approval permissions to other users.

  • Assign approval to groups and individual users - flexibility to assign approval tasks either to specific individuals or entire groups for streamlined workflows.

  • Get manager user metadata from Microsoft 365 user profile - retrieves organizational metadata such as the manager's name and department from Microsoft 365 for enhanced approval routing and context.

  • Budgets with start and expiry dates - track and manage budgets with defined start and end dates for better expense control and transparency.

  • Automatic, real-time currency conversions - ensures accurate financial data by converting currencies automatically based on the latest exchange rates.

  • Contextual comments with replies - allows users to add comments directly within the context of a request and reply to existing comments for seamless collaboration and discussion.

  • Ability to create tasks and checklists - enables the creation of tasks or checklists for users or groups, enhancing collaboration

title: OneDrive integration by adenin
shortDescription: Show users recent OneDrive files inside SharePoint or Viva Connections
Description:
Transform your SharePoint and Viva Connections by integrating with OneDrive, thanks to adenin's seamless integration. This powerful synergy allows for direct access to OneDrive files within your SharePoint workspace, marrying the convenience of OneDrive with the collaborative strength of SharePoint.

✅ Access and manage OneDrive files directly within SharePoint

✅ Share and collaborate on OneDrive files within SharePoint

✅ Benefit from full Microsoft 365 integration, enhancing your digital workspace

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint OneDrive integration

What OneDrive data can be accessed through SharePoint?

The integration focuses on "My recent files," allowing users to view files recently interacted with from their OneDrive account directly within SharePoint.

Is there any cost associated with the SharePoint OneDrive integration?

While SharePoint serves as a free channel within adenin, leveraging data from OneDrive through this integration may incur costs based on your adenin plan. For comprehensive details, refer to the pricing page.

Who benefits most from integrating SharePoint with OneDrive?

This integration is ideally suited for Finance & Accounting, Internal Communications, and IT teams within both small and large organizations. It simplifies the incorporation of OneDrive into SharePoint without necessitating any technical expertise, thanks to adenin's complete handling of the authentication process and data loading into an Adaptive Card layout.

Is technical expertise required to use this integration?

No, the setup is designed to be straightforward and accessible, enabling busy managers to integrate and manage their workplace applications effortlessly. With tools like the low-code Adaptive Card designer, the process is made simple, requiring no coding skills for basic setup and customization.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Any app you connect gets represented as an Adaptive Card that you can use directly on your dashboard or embed into one of the supported channels. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Google Calendar) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

How does adenin protect the data shared between OneDrive and SharePoint?

Adenin employs the secure OAuth standard for all data access and sharing processes, ensuring users can control and revoke permissions at any time. This approach guarantees that no data is stored on adenin servers, with all information directly transferred to SharePoint under strict privacy policies. For further assurance, users are encouraged to review adenin's Privacy Policy.

By leveraging adenin for OneDrive and SharePoint integration, you unlock a streamlined, productive, and collaborative workspace environment, making the most of your Microsoft 365 tools without the hassle of app-switching or data silos.

Will this work in SharePoint and Viva Connections?

Yes, the OneDrive integration comes with a Webpart that works on your SharePoint pages, as well as an Adaptive Card available on your Viva Connections dashboard.

title: Employee Directory And Organization Chart
shortDescription: WebParts for Employee Directory with advanced search feature and Organization chart
Description:
Employee directory And Org Chart is a SharePoint Framework(SPFx) solution for SharePoint/Microsoft 365 which has webparts to search for the users and communicate with them. The webparts have modern responsive design so that it fits in any part of the page with any resolution. These webparts inherits the theme of SharePoint site and seamlessly blends in with other contents of the page.

WebParts available: -

. Directory (This webpart displays the users with advanced filter options)

. Directory By Department (This webpart displays the users filtered by the department mentioned in the webpart properties)

. Directory By Location (This webpart displays the users filtered by the location mentioned in the webpart properties)

. Organization Chart (This webpart displays the organization tree)

. Directory Settings (This webpart lets you manage the general settings of the employee directory and organization chart webparts)

Attractive features: -

. Support for SharePoint Webpart, Full-Page webpart components.

. Support for Teams Tab.

. Design which follows the modern UI of SharePoint

. Advanced search feature on employee directory

. All webparts are available as Team channel tab

. Expandable and collapsible organization chart in all directions

. Directory and Organization chart are available as web parts which can be used in modern and classic SharePoint pages

. Employee directory web part has department property so that it can be used to display department specific directory

. Organization chart web part has root user email property so that it can be used to show a subset of the entire organization hierarchy

Notes: -

. This is a 30 days trial version, please reach out to Cloudlas support team for the license.

. Directory uses SharePoint search REST Api feature to display the data. So, there would be some delay for the AD User property changes to reflect in the webparts.

. Organization hierarchy must be defined in the tenant for the organization chart to work.

. Supported browsers are Microsoft Edge, Internet explorer 11 or later, Chrome and Firefox.

title: SharePoint|sapiens Event Management
shortDescription: The all-in-one solution for seamless enrollment and event scheduling on SharePoint & Microsoft 365.
Description:
Say goodbye to your countless Excel files and multiple Microsoft Forms! Streamline your event planning with our Event Management App on SharePoint and Microsoft Teams. Effortlessly create, publish and manage events & handle registration. From flawless Outlook calendar integration to managing enrollments and feedback: our app includes essential features to streamline event management in your organization within Microsoft 365 and Teams.

The app included following key features:

  • Schedule and publish events in no time: Schedule and share events on SharePoint Online and Microsoft Teams with just a few clicks.

  • Use Event templates: Create event templates and schedule events within seconds.

  • Easy enrollment: Attendees can register or have organizers do it for them.

  • Automatic Outlook Calendar Invitation with RSVP status check: Attendees receive email invitations and updates to scheduled events directly in their Outlook calendars.

  • Keep track of enrollments: Check and monitor the status responses of the participants (accepted, declined, ...) at any time in an easy-to-read registration list.

  • Customizable email invitation templates: Configure the style and content of invitations and other email templates to suit your needs.

  • Fully customizable: All lists, views and pages created by the add-in are customizable to suit your specific needs.

Comprehensive Enrollment Management

  • Waiting list: enable a waiting list and allow attendees to register with first-come, first-served automatic registration if an event is full.

  • Enrollment start and deadline: Set enrollment start date and enrollment deadline for each event.

  • Set up recurring Events on SharePoint: Set up events by day, week, or more complex patterns- The app gives you the same options as Outlook.

  • Request information upon enrollment: Create customizable enrollment forms to gather the information you need from the participants (dietary requirements, flight number...).

  • Promote events on your website, intranet, in Teams, Outlook or newsletter.

  • Share public event: Provide a responsive website for external and mobile users to allow them to sign up for your public events. E-mail addresses are verified to make sure you communicate with their owners.

Advanced Calendar & scheduling

  • Meeting room reservation: check availability and book Exchange rooms directly in the app.

  • Time zone: The app is fully compatible with global time zones.

  • User-friendly Calendar View: Show your scheduled events in a Calendar view.

  • Wish list: Let users manage their wish lists & Schedule events people are interested in.

  • Reporting made easy: Use MS Excel and Power Bi to extract and analyze data and create dashboards.

Note: The solution has to be added manually to the site where you want to use Event Management as it will not deploy to the entire tenant. See the installation guide for more details.

The solution contains Webparts, Application Customizers, List View Command Sets, Field Extensions and Form Customizers. The solution automatically configures all of these features for you. However, if you want to change web part settings, add web parts to exising or new pages, etc., feel free to do so.

Visit us on https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/product/event-management/ or contact us support@sharepointsapiens.com for more information and to schedule a live demo today!

title: Time-off Manager 365
shortDescription: Time-off Manager 365 - Smart and efficient way to manage leaves/time off for the Employees
Description:
HR365 Time off Manager is a free, fully featured 14 days trial for one Microsoft 365 tenant. HR365 Time off Manager is free for up to 1 user forever. Microsoft 365 / Office 365 Time off Manager is for unlimited users virtually*

HR365 Time off Manager / Leave Management System which is highly configurable can address any need of the organization be it small or large. It can also easily integrate with your Azure Active Directory / Microsoft 365 users in seconds. HR 365 Time off Manager software does not require additional infrastructure, it works within your Microsoft 365 without any additional Microsoft licensing cost. This Office 365 leave management system gives the experience of the latest UI and best leave management software experience.

You can deploy the solution on the SharePoint site as well as on Teams

Component information: This app is added as webpart of the SharePoint site page

Manage Leave requests

HR365’s Office 365 time off manager is an intuitive UI for managers & HR to manage leaves applied by employees. A multi-level approval feature makes sure all the managers and HR personnel stationed in various places get email ale for the pending leave applications. Organizations may have multiple centers across the country. In addition to having pre-configured holidays specific to particular states, HR also has the option to add, modify, or delete holidays specific to their organization’s needs. The on-cloud solution offers the flexibility to set a work week for a specific employee group and period.

Features:

• Calculate Leaves including weekend/ holiday control

• Create a calendar invite in the approver mailbox

• Customized leave types

• Delegate approvals &

• Submit leaves on behalf of users

• Integrate leaves with Outlook calendar

• Multiple roles

• Customize leave year (Calendar year, fiscal year, etc.)

• Request four hours & two-hour leaves

• Workweek pattern setup for each employee.

• Add Comp Off policy and avail comp Off policy setup

• Comp Off Approval

• History of Comp Off taken

• Single-level and two-level approval based on a selection of approval levels

• Holiday list setup

Detailed leave reports:

• You can generate detailed reports with information such as:

• History of leaves taken

• Eligible leave types allocated for different employee groups

• Eligible leaves already taken by employees

• Your company’s unique leave structure can be configured and stored with special options such as leave accrual or encashment, prefix, suffix, or pro-rata leave allocation. Employees can now be sure of the company’s leave policy through this system and can monitor and request the leave they are allocated.

Mobile access

Access HR365’s Office 365 leave management / Office 365 time off manager on the cloud anywhere, anytime either via your mobile, laptop, or personal computer. You can also rest assured that your employee information is secure and confidential.

Time off manager, leave management system, leave system, time-off manager, leave management software, managing employee time off requests.

Link for the knowledgebase: HR365 Time off Manager

To know more similar products: Apps 365

For more information, please visit our website Time Off Manager Leave Management System, Best HR365 App

title: Lightning Tools DeliverPoint
shortDescription: DeliverPoint is a Permissions Management Tool for Site Owners and SharePoint Administrators
Description:
DeliverPoint helps business users such as site owners and site collection administrators report and manage permissions within the context of SharePoint or Microsoft Teams.

Permission Reports include the ability to see and manage everyone's permissions with a few clicks. The permission reports include users who have received permissions via SharePoint Groups, Active Directory Security Groups, Microsoft 365 Groups and Direct Permissions. Permissions can be bulk managed as users change roles or leave the organization. User-centric reports, Unlicensed User reports, Sharing Links, and Dead Account Reporting are among the many reports that can be used against Hub Sites, Associated Sites, Site Collections, Lists, Libraries, Folders and Items.

DeliverPoint includes support for SharePoint Modern and Classic sites, SharePoint full-page web part, Teams tab, and Teams personal tab components.

SharePoint Framework components included: WebPart

title: Asana integration by adenin
shortDescription: Embed your Asana projects straight into SharePoint pages and Viva Connections dashboard
Description:
Optimize your workflow by integrating Asana with SharePoint through adenin's powerful integration. This seamless connection allows for the direct embedding of Asana tasks into your SharePoint environment, creating a unified workspace where you can manage tasks without switching between applications. adenin simplifies this integration, offering a developer-friendly interface to ensure a smooth and efficient setup.

✅ Integrate Asana tasks directly into SharePoint, providing a centralized view of your projects

✅ Utilize advanced search capabilities within Asana's data to generate dynamic views for your SharePoint web part

✅ Ensure a cohesive workflow across the Microsoft 365 suite, enhancing productivity and collaboration

✅ Turn Viva Connections into a project management superhub by adding Asana cards

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint Asana integration

What data sources are available for Asana?

Asana offers 11 data sources, including "Get a team's projects," "Get a user's favorites," and "Search tasks in a workspace," facilitating a comprehensive access to your Asana tasks directly within SharePoint.

Is the SharePoint integration free?

Yes, SharePoint integration is provided as a free channel within adenin, which integrates various work apps into a personal dashboard. However, using Asana data through adenin may result in usage charges based on your selected plan. For detailed pricing, refer to adenin's pricing page.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Zendesk) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Who benefits from integrating Asana with SharePoint?

This integration is ideal for IT, Marketing, and Sales teams in organizations of any size, streamlining task management without requiring technical expertise. adenin handles all authentication with Asana, embedding data into an Adaptive Card layout within SharePoint.

Is technical knowledge required to set up this integration?

No, the integration is designed to be accessible for busy managers and professionals, enabling straightforward setup without coding. adenin provides a low-code Card designer for further customization, supported by step-by-step instructions for a hassle-free implementation.

How is data security managed between Asana and SharePoint?

adenin uses secure OAuth standards for data access and sharing, allowing users to control and revoke permissions at any time. This ensures data is not stored on adenin servers but securely transmitted to SharePoint, adhering to strict privacy policies.

By leveraging adenin for Asana and SharePoint integration, you gain an efficient, streamlined platform for managing tasks, enhancing team collaboration and productivity within your digital workspace.

title: Channel Conversations Web Part
shortDescription: Embed Microsoft Teams channel conversations in any page.
Description:
Visit 365Apps.io for a 30 day free trial

Contact us: support@365apps.io

  • Keep users informed without having to leave SharePoint

  • Add Teams to your External user sites

  • Conversations look just like they do in Teams

  • Embed conversations on any page

  • Have conversations with external users without them having to switch tenants

  • Enhance your homepage with dynamic content

  • Adds dynamic to homepages or hub landing pages

Features

  • Post and reply directly from SharePoint in interactive mode

  • Read only mode

  • Respects team membership to ensure content isn't shared where it shouldn't be

  • Works in Communication and Team sites.

  • Automatically refreshes

  • Easy to install and configure

  • Add multiple instances to include several channels on a single page

  • SPFX Modern Web Part Using Microsoft Graph API

Configuration Options

  • Team and Channel selection

  • Number of posts to show

  • number of replies to show before collapsing

  • Read only or interactive mode

  • Web part size

  • Web part title

What does the Channel Conversations web part do?

It lets you embed a Microsoft Teams channel conversation in the site page of your choice. Just add the web part, select the team and channel and it shows to all users with access to that team.

What about users that are not members of the team?

Permissions are respected - if a user is not a member of the team then the web part will not show the conversation content.

How do I configure the Channel Conversations web part?

The page author needs to choose the team and one of its channels in the web part property panel. Click on edit web properties and add in information on the team and channel as well as your license key, provided by 365apps.io.

Support

365apps.io include same day email support

Visit 365Apps.io

title: Infowise Ultimate Forms
shortDescription: A complete platform for no-code implementation of business processes in SharePoint.
Description:
Ultimate Forms enables business users, not IT personnel or developers, to create powerful SharePoint applications without custom code.

Ultimate Forms is a wall-to-wall platform delivering new and exciting capabilities for your form, processes and reporting needs, helping you create reliable and easy-to-use solutions. Your business users can deliver powerful solutions quickly, allowing them to stay focused on driving business value. In minutes, you can automate a variety of business processes your organization desperately needs, from simple Vacation Requests or Expense Reports, up to full-featured Help Desk or Project Management solutions. We offer a rich solution catalog to install hundreds of pre-configured solutions for free.

Ultimate Forms saves you time and money and allows you to deliver state-of-the-art business applications without the risks of a software development project. No more budget overruns, elusive deadlines or inflexible specifications. Anyone can become a solutions expert and deliver state-of-the-art application using just the browser, without any technical knowledge or experience.

  • Create advanced, dynamic, smart forms, complete with relational data

  • Configure your business logic and workflow processes without the need for traditional workflow tools

  • Utilize advanced alerts and notifications, complete with conditions and customizable mail templates

  • Automatically import data from emails and line-of-business applications

  • Use a wide selection of additional column types, such as repeating sections, electronic signatures, color choice and many others

  • Print your information in your own format, convert to Word or PDF and email directly from the browser

  • Implement advanced color-coded calendars

  • Color-code your list views and add icons and KPIs

  • Enrich your dashboards with charts and graphs

  • Install our pre-configured business solutions for free

  • Register for training and become productive fast

Solution Components

Infowise Ultimate Forms is an complete integrated platform encompassing a variety of SharePoint components and extensions. It contains components that function as:

  • Web parts - visual elements displayed on site pages. For example, List Search or Rollup components are web parts.

  • Form customizers - allows custom form to be configured for lists. The form component of Ultimate Forms is a form customizer.

  • Listview command set - adds buttons to the list toolbar. You will notice a set of new buttons, such as Design or Print.

  • Field customizers - adds new display functionality for columns. Ultimate Forms provides a set of specialized column types, such Signatures or Document Links. These add new column functionality not found in SharePoint on its own.

  • Application customizers - adds new capabilities to the general user interface of SharePoint. For example, Ultimate Forms adds new visual style classes.

  • Teams tabs - adds new types of tabs to your Teams, such as calendars or rollups

By combining all these components and integrating them with the SharePoint user interface, Ultimate Forms provides a new and upgraded experience.

Instructions

  • To access Ultimate Forms features, click on Design button on any list's toolbar (modern view only).

  • If it's your first time, agree to grant permissions to the app to act on your behalf.

  • On your first run, register for a 30 day trial. Later you will be able to subscribe directly from the app.

  • Your Global Administrator will need to grant the app permissions to access your SharePoint. A special banner within the app will instruct them further.

  • Approve API Access requests under SharePoint Administration. It is needed to access Print, Add Alert and Run Actions toolbar buttons.

Support

Documentation - read how each function works.

Tutorials - step-by-step instructions.

Support - submit a support ticket.

Solution gallery - install a variety of pre-configured business solutions for free. You can also do it directly from the app.

Some of the product features use Microsoft Azure Open AI. Responses provided by the AI engine might be incorrect and should always be verified. For any questions, reach out to our support at support@infowisesolutions.com

About Infowise

Infowise has been a SharePoint expert since 2005. Thousands of organizations worldwide use Ultimate Forms to easily create and maintain a wide variety of business solutions, both in SharePoint Online and on premises.

title: UKG for Viva Connections
shortDescription: The UKG Microsoft Viva Connections integration allows people to stay connected and engaged.

The UKG Microsoft Viva Connections integration allows people to stay connected and encourages engagement by providing the information they need, with a simple click of a button. Employees can easily have conversations with colleagues, stay up to date with tasks, and seamlessly take care of their personal and professional needs by accessing important pay and time information.

appName: Agile Task Board for SharePoint Online
title: Agile Task Board for SharePoint Online
shortDescription: Agile Task Board organizes your agile process without spending a lot of effort.
Description:
The Agile Task Board helps you and your team to get a better overview of your agile project. Convert your physical board into a digital version. You can map your process with features such as columns for status display, any number of swimlanes, metadata-driven coloring of cards, assignment of responsibilities, drag and drop editing, and many other settings. Each Task Board can be instantiated as a Web Part on a SharePoint page or as a SharePointFullPage and can be configured independently. The task information and documents are stored in your SharePoint site, no further service is required. Thus no information and documents leave your organization. Furthermore, you can easily visualize existing task lists in SharePoint with the Agile Task Board.

Core functionalities of the Agile Task Board

Easy configuration

-- Easily customize the appearance of the task board and tasks to your liking via the configuration menu.

Drag & Drop

-- Assign tasks, people, tags and status changes simply by dragging items with the mouse.

Filtering

-- Filter by people, tags or keywords to quickly find tasks. The display is updated directly and without loading time.

Tags

-- Add tags to tasks. These can be used to colorize, filter and group tasks.

Checklists

-- Add a checklist to a task. Entries can be added or checked directly on the task board.

Files and links

-- Attach files and add links to a task. This is then indicated by an icon on the task board.

Swimlanes

-- Manage your tasks in different lines of action by using swimlanes.

Try the Agile Task Board free for 30 days in your own SharePoint Online organization. More information about features and licensing is available on our homepage.

You can use the Agile Task Board for different SharePoint environments and for teams. Please see the different versions in the Office Store or on our distribution project at GitHub.

shortDescription: Efficiently manage employee absences in Microsoft 365 with absentify.
Description:
absentify SharePoint Add-in: Absence management directly in SharePoint

The absentify SharePoint Add-in complements the absentify solutions in Microsoft Teams and Outlook, adding a specialized SharePoint component. This Add-in allows users to integrate the absentify application as a team overview into SharePoint pages for efficient absence management.

  • Integration of absentify application in SharePoint: Embed the absentify team overview directly into your SharePoint pages.

title: Channel Chat Stream for SharePoint
shortDescription: Display Teams channel chat, including images, attachments and replies, directly in SharePoint.
Description:
Channel Chat for SharePoint and Teams

The Updates Stream web part enhances organisational communication by displaying Microsoft Teams channel chat streams directly within SharePoint pages, with the most recent messages at the top.

Key Features

  • Real-time updates – Displays the latest Teams messages like a news feed.

  • Read-only integration – Keeps users informed without replacing Microsoft Teams chat.

  • Ideal for collaboration – Bridges SharePoint collaboration with Teams discussions.

  • Supports Teams-first organisations – Useful for companies that choose Teams over Yammer for broad communications.

What It Offers

This web part seamlessly integrates Microsoft Teams with SharePoint, allowing you to display a selected Team channel's chat stream—including images, replies, and GIFs—directly within SharePoint. It’s designed for organisations that use Teams Channels as their primary internal communication tool instead of Yammer.

Designed with a minimalist and clean aesthetic, this web part blends effortlessly into any SharePoint theme or layout. Flexible configuration options allow you to set a fixed height and limit the number of displayed posts, making it adaptable to various presentation styles. Each post includes a direct link to its thread in Microsoft Teams, ensuring easy access and engagement.

How It Works

  1. Install the SharePoint Framework app package in the global or site collection app store.

  2. Add the web part to any SharePoint page.

  3. Configure by specifying the Microsoft Team ID and selecting the desired channel.

  4. Grant permissions – Requires Microsoft Graph API access to read channel chat and user profiles.

This web part helps reduce context switching by bringing Teams chat into SharePoint, ensuring a seamless communication flow across your organisation.

title: Easy Taxonomy
shortDescription: Simple, intuitive software for developing file plans, creating taxonomies, and engaging stakeholders
Description:
Easy Taxonomy™ for Microsoft 365 is available for free for starters, with full functionality for 2 users/2 file plans.

Easy Taxonomy is an intuitive file classification plan management software hosted on SharePoint that gives you and your team a set of collaboration features to create, update, approve and publish your file classification plan to the entire organization.

Easy Taxonomy allows you to create your file retention schedule and associate it with the file plan and deploy it to the Microsoft 365 Compliance Center. In addition, it allows you to deploy your file plan as a managed metadata in the SharePoint Term Store.

Key features:

  • Upload from Excel; You do not have to start from scratch, Easy Taxonomy™ provides you with the ability to upload your file classification plan from Excel.

  • Bilingual; Easy Taxonomy™ has a bilingual interface (English and French) and allows you to build your file plan in two different languages

  • Role-Based Access; Easy Taxonomy™ role-based access allows you to bring different types of collaborators into the game with different access rights:


    • Readers: these are end-users who only need access to the published version of the file classification Plan, not the draft versions, this is the default access given to any user who has access to the SharePoint site where Easy Taxonomy™ is installed.


    • Reviewers: these are SMEs who have access to review and comment on the draft file classification plan but do not have edit rights.


    • Editors: these are the individuals who hold the pen to the development of the file plan, they have full control, except they cannot add or delete versions of the file plan, and they cannot publish a file plan.


    • Approvers: in addition to all the access right given to the Editors, these individuals can start a new version of the file plan, edit, publish and upload the file plan to the Term Store right from the App.


    • Adminstrators: In addition to manging the Role-Based Access and the App Settings, Admins are able to archive/un-archive a file plan.

  • Version control; Easy Taxonomy™ provides you with a manual version control, where you can manually create a minor or a major version using an excel version or the latest published version, and at any point in time you can restore a previous version.

  • Lifecycle your file plan; Easy Taxonomy™ manages different states of the File Classification plan


    • Draft: visible to Reviewers, and can be edited by the Editors and the Approvers


    • Submitted: Only the Approver who has the right to edit the file plan while it is in this state


    • Published: visible to Readers which is usually everyone in the organization


    • Archived: visible only to Admins.

  • Work offline; You can export the File Classification Plan to Excel, work on it offline and import it back to the app.

  • Develop Microsoft 365 Retention Labels; Easy Taxonomy™ provides you with an improved version of the Microsoft 365 File Plan Management that allows you to build your retention schedule and associate it with the File Plan.

  • Upload to the Term Store; Easy Taxonomy™ integrates with SharePoint Term Store, it allows you to upload the file plan to the SharePoint Term Store right from the App.

New Features' Highlight:

  • Taxonomy Views; Multinational organizations may have a different classification scheme for different business units or locations around the world, whereas the need is to maintain a centralized file classification plan. That's why we created the Taxonomy View feature which allows users to see only a subset of the file plan, while keeping the file plan centralized.

  • Taxonomy Web Service; A new Azure Function is available to deploy to the Azure Customer Portal, the function provides a web service link which when invoked returns the latest published version of the file plan(s) in Json format based on provided parameters. Learn more...

  • Advanced Search; Enterprise level organizations manage huge file plan(s) which are not easy to browse, that's why advanced search function is necessary to easily search the file plan, find and access the items.

  • Custom Attributes; Additional properties may need to be captured for the file plan items. In this release, you can create, use, and reuse custom attributes to capture custom properties in your file plans

Important Notices:

  • The user who installs the application for the first time automatically becomes an administrator with the possibility of assigning the administrator role to other members.

  • In order for Taxonomy™ to be able to manage the term store it is required for the SharePoint administrator to;


    1) Approve the API Access request on the API Access page, Learn more here....


    2) Add the Taxonomy approvers as Term Store administrators on the SharePoint Term Store page, Learn more here....

  • For installation and configuration steps, please follow this link: Easy Taxonomy™

    Installation

The Starter version can be turned into a full version by purchasing a license key, for more details, please visit our product site:

https://www.easytaxonomy.com


For questions please email us at support@easytaxonomy.com.

title: Compliance Tracker 365
shortDescription: Target important content. Track when it's read. Report on who's reading it.
Description:
Compliance Tracker 365 is a Microsoft SharePoint Online application to target and track who has read content.

It allows documents and pages to be targeted to groups of people for reading using simple tags. Content which matches a person’s profile tags is highlighted and the read state of all targeted content is available in configurable compliance reports.

Compliance Tracker 365 can be implemented in any new or existing Microsoft 365 environment to ensure essential information is read on time by the right people. All data is 100% stored in SharePoint Online lists and libraries.

Target - Guarantee that the right people are reading the right content.

Track - Record who and when the content is read.

Report - Generate reports to identify both read compliance and non-compliance.

Compliance Tracker 365 can be used for 30 days with a trial licenses issued within the app. If you would like to continue to use the application after the trial period, purchase a subscription via AppSource.

The Compliance Tracker 365 solution consists of:

  • My Reads web part - displays a list of documents and pages that you need to read

  • Read Profile web part - allows staff to select terms of interest when personal profiles are configured

  • Page Tracker - allow staff to acknowledge when they have read a document or page from an application customizer in the page footer

  • Compliance Tracker 365 lists - 4 SharePoint lists that store the configuration and logs used by Compliance Tracker 365

  • Compliance Tracker 365 list view command set - access the Management page and document information panel, to configuring trackers and view reports, directly from within libraries

  • Compliance Tracker 365 Management - a set of pages for administrators to configure the solution and to access reports

The solution optionally integrates with the PnP Modern Search web parts to show read tags on search results. This requires the installation of two additional apps - PnP Modern Search web part & Compliance Tracker 365 PnP Search Extension. Read how to integrate in our docs site https://docs.compliancetracker365.com/additional-information/pnp-search-integration/.

All Compliance Tracker 365 documentation is available at https://docs.compliancetracker365.com

Latest change log is available at https://docs.compliancetracker365.com/changelog

Note: The solution does not deploy tenant wide. Add it to each site where Compliance Tracker 365 is to be used.

title: Project Works
shortDescription: Project management for SharePoint & Microsoft Teams with Gantt, Planner, time tracking & reports.
Description:
Overview

Project Works is a modern single-page application designed for seamless use in both

SharePoint and Microsoft Teams (as a tab in standard channel). It integrates Microsoft Planner and SharePoint to deliver a unified platform for

managing projects, tasks, time tracking, and team collaboration—all within your Microsoft 365 environment.

Key Features

  • Interactive Gantt Charts: Visualize project timelines and task dependencies using interactive Gantt charts,

    directly connected to Microsoft Planner plans for real-time synchronization.

  • Planner Integration: Access and manage Planner boards within the app. Create, update, and track tasks while

    maintaining context within SharePoint or Teams.

  • Time Tracking: Log and monitor hours spent on tasks and projects. Includes approval workflows and

    exportable reports for productivity analysis.

  • Comprehensive Reporting: Generate detailed reports on project progress, planned vs. actual hours, and more.

  • Advanced Task Management: Create, edit, reorder, and filter tasks; support for buckets, priorities, labels,

    and assignees. Drag-and-drop, resize, and group tasks for flexible project management.

  • Bulk Operations: Import/export tasks via Excel, manual sync, and appearance customization for Gantt charts.

  • Role-Based Permissions: Owners and members have tailored access to settings, approvals, and configuration.

  • Easy Installation & Configuration: Simple deployment in SharePoint Online with step-by-step setup and

    intuitive web part addition.

Integration Highlights

  • Microsoft Planner Integration: Each Gantt chart is mapped to a corresponding Planner plan, ensuring task

    updates are reflected across both tools.

  • SharePoint Compatibility: The app leverages SharePoint for data storage and can be added as a web part to

    any SharePoint page.

  • Teams Support: Add the app as a Teams tab in a standard channel, allowing users to manage projects and tasks without

    leaving the Teams environment.

Installation and Configuration

  • Requires SharePoint Online and admin access for deployment and configuration.

  • Works with the modern team site. Doesn't work with the classic team and communication site.

  • Install via SharePoint’s "Add an App" feature and verify activation in Site Contents.

  • Configure permissions—Site Owner permissions are required to install and configure, but both owners and members

    can access the web part.

  • Add the web part to any SharePoint page, complete setup, and publish the page to start managing tasks and

    projects.

Modules Overview

  • Gantt Charts: Visual timeline of tasks and buckets, with support for day/week views, filters, manual sync,

    Excel import/export, and appearance settings.

  • Planners: Full Microsoft Planner board experience within the app.

  • Manage Hours: Log, view, edit, and export hours. Owners can approve or reject hours with comments.

  • Reporting: Visual and tabular reports on project progress, planned and actual hours, and plan breakdowns.

  • Settings: Owners can configure hour tracking, page appearance, navigation, and module visibility.

Compatibility

  • Compatible with SharePoint Online and Teams (as a tab in a standard channel).

  • Integrates seamlessly with Microsoft Planner for real-time task and schedule synchronization.

  • Supports role-based access for both owners and members.

Summary

Empower your team with a unified project and task management solution that brings together the best of SharePoint,

Teams, and Planner. Visualize, track, and report on your projects with ease—right where your team works.

Getting Started

Follow our Installation Guide for easy setup and configuration.

Support

Need assistance? Visit our Projects Support page for

assistance.

title: Scrive for SharePoint
shortDescription: E-sign documents directly from SharePoint Online - bridge the final gap to 100% paperless operations

Send, sign and archive documents directly from SharePoint Online. Automate your document workflows, improve data quality and deliver a great customer experience.

Drive operational efficiency and eliminate manual steps, including follow-up tasks like: “Did they receive the document? Have they opened it yet? Signed it? Returned it?” Scrive makes it easy to track and monitor the signing process so you can keep your focus where it belongs.

title: Org Chart by Sysdoc

Introducing a user-friendly and visually appealing Org Chart web part for your SharePoint site. This high-performance tool is designed to clearly display your organisation's data, making it easy for your staff and users to understand.

Empower your users to better understand your organisation with the Sysdoc Org Chart!

shortDescription: Make meetings easy and paperless with Board Papers from Pervasent.

Board Papers is perfect for your board, executive, and project meetings. Board members have all the documents for all their meetings on the devices they always have on-hand. Documents for any meeting are never more than two taps or clicks away.

In the app, board members and meeting attendees mark up documents with pen and highlighter tools, add and share notes, and electronically sign pages. Votes are cast with a single click. Participants come to meetings prepared, and that means shorter, more effective meetings.

Board Papers was developed with one of the world’s largest global banks to securely deliver documents for their board meetings. Today, Board Papers is used by large and small organizations in over 30 countries to deliver electronic board books and meeting packs for all types of meetings.

To try out the Board Papers app on your device with some pre-loaded meetings and documents, search for "Board Papers" or "Pervasent" in the Apple, Microsoft or Google Play Stores. After downloading, launch the app and tap the "Demo" button on the first screen.

Pervasent offers a free, no obligation 60-day trial of Board Papers. Install Boards Papers today and contact Pervasent to enable all features and get training, support, and documentation.

Visit Accelerator 365 by Reply for support and more information about Noticeboard and our other apps.

*Claim a free trial with full functionality for 60 days. After 60 days, the Noticeboard trial will expire with instructions for purchasing a licensed version.

Learn how to download your free trial of Noticeboard.

title: Zendesk integration by adenin
shortDescription: Easily show your live Zendesk data inside SharePoint and Viva Connections
Description:
Ever thought about making your Zendesk workflow even more efficient and seamless? Integrate Zendesk with SharePoint via adenin and sit back as we take your productivity to the next level. With this integration, you can embed Zendesk API data right into your SharePoint as a web part, or Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extension (ACE) and enjoy a more unified Microsoft 365 experience.

✅ Display your Zendesk data right within SharePoint with a custom web part

✅ Enjoy a seamless experience within your Microsoft 365 environment

✅ Redefine productivity by viewing and creating tickets from a single place

✅ Make life easier for developers with a platform that's customizable, yet simple to use

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint Zendesk integration

What data sources are available for Zendesk?

Zendesk provides the following 2 data sources: Create Ticket (Create a new ticket for your Zendesk account) and Tickets (See tickets from your Zendesk account)

Is the Zendesk integration free?

Yes, SharePoint is one of the channels built-in into adenin

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Zendesk) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Who is the Zendesk integration for?

adenin’s SharePoint connector is a popular choice for Customer Service, IT and Sales teams at small to large organizations. The data sources that are built into Zendesk (see above) are incredibly simple to integrate into SharePoint and don't require any technical know-how. The adenin platform completely handles authenticating with Zendesk and then loads your data into an Adaptive Card layout that, in turn, will be embedded into SharePoint.

Do I have to be a developer to use the SharePoint integration with Zendesk?

No, the integration is designed to help busy managers stay on top of their various workplace applications, where Zendesk is just one of many examples (see others). As such, we designed many tools that reduce the amount of coding expected of users: Starting with the Zendesk integration, which you can set up yourself in just a few, completely code-free, steps (see instructions).

Then with the built-in Card designer we automatically generate a layout from your Zendesk data. You could tweak this further in the low-code designer, either yourself if you have some HTML-related skills, or with a little help from us – just reach out to one of the team.

Lastly, there will be the SharePoint integration which is self-explanatory to install. Just check the installation instructions for more details.

How does adenin ensure my Zendesk data is safely delivered to SharePoint?

We use the secure OAuth standard which means you authorize adenin accessing your Zendesk data and in turn authorize us to share this data with SharePoint. Both of these authorizations can be revoked by you at any point through the Linked accounts menu (requires user account). No data is ever stored on adenin servers, instead it is directly sent to the client (in this case SharePoint) who will treat it in accordance with their privacy policy. Please also check out our Privacy Policy for more details.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The Zendesk integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

title: Personal dashboard by adenin
shortDescription: Easily monitor & unify data from all your business applications by creating a personalized dashboard
Description:
Easily create an aggregated view of all your external business apps by simply connecting your dashboard to popular applications such as ServiceNow, HubSpot, Salesforce, Jira, Github, Zendesk and many others.

See all compatible apps →

Having one view that’s always in-sync helps employees cut down on time wasted hunting for data and hopping between windows. With a personalized dashboard, users can monitor their work with ease and won’t have to fear missing relevant updates any longer.

Liven up your intranet pages by creating dashboards specific to your team or create a personalized dashboard for the entire organization so all SharePoint users have a single source of truth for their data.

Apps appear on the dashboard in the form of Adaptive Cards which can be quickly customized using the built-in, low code designer that will be familiar to users of adaptivecards.io.

Getting started with Adaptive Cards dashboard:

  1. Add the web part to a SharePoint page

  2. Click to edit it, then select + Add Adaptive Card

  3. Choose your application, data source and authenticate

  4. Watch your new card appear on the dashboard

  5. Optional: Make changes using the Adaptive Card designer

❓Useful resources to get started

👉 Get started with Adaptive Cards dashboard

👉 See all compatible apps

👉 See Adaptive Card samples designed for businesses

👉 Contact the free support for help

Create visually appealing dashboards with ease

The dashboard cards generated by the web part are in the open-source Adaptive Card format. This means they can be easily modified using a built-in low-code designer. Here are a few examples of what you can build with your dashboard:

  • Lists – collect updates into lists for recent tickets, issues, tasks, events, comments, mentions, notifications, and more

  • Database queries – Run statements against SQL, NoSQL, Big Data and API databases and generate tables, KPI (key performance indicators) with trends as well as charts (coming soon)

  • Feeds – Create lists with rich media like images, or a gallery of items of your latest news, reviews, statistics, etc.

  • Digital signage – By using larger headlines, background images and buttons you can create inviting banners to welcome users, advertise benefits or point employees to useful resources

Main benefits and features

Adaptive Cards dashboard lets you sync live data from 3rd party apps into a personalized dashboard that you can easily place on any intranet page as a web part.

✅ No coding skills required – The web part automatically analyzes the structure of your applications’ data and transforms into beautiful lists. Simply refine the layout by using the built-in, low-code designer

✅ Filters – Received data can be further filtered for certain criteria and transformed using Microsoft Adaptive Expressions

✅ Always up to date – Users don’t need to refresh anything, data is always pulled live from an API connection which the administrator originally made when adding a new Adaptive Card

✅ Ready-to-use templates – Make visually stunning designs using one of the free templates specifically designed for businesses

✅ Fully customizable and enterprise-ready – know how to code or work with developers? Fully customize the dashboard theme to use your corporate style guide

✅ Safe and secure – Adaptive Cards dashboard never saves any data on its servers; all data gets fetched at display time from your source app through the client. Adenin, the company behind this web part, is GDPR compliant as it never stores or transfers any of the connected apps’ data to its servers

✅ Easy permissions management – Manage audiences and restrict who can see individual Adaptive Cards

✅ Chatbot channels – Using the open-source Adaptive Card standard means Cards can be queried from chatbot agents available separately for Microsoft Teams & Webex Teams

✅ Fully audited – Track what users are doing with usage metrics and get a log of all API requests along with possible error codes to trace errors

title: AgilePoint Intelligent Process Automation
shortDescription: Rapidly create platform-agnostic forms, workflows, and end-to-end business orchestrations.
Description:
Using AgilePoint's abstraction-enabled codeless composable architecture, businesses can quickly build adaptive process automation applications and end-to-end operational orchestrations that support a wide range of human-to-human, human-to-system, and system-to-system interactions.

The AgilePoint platform lets you easily create, run, and manage digital forms, functional workflows, and end-to-end operational orchestrations through visual composition and configuration. The key features for AgilePoint SharePoint App include:

Delivering the Ultimate Low-Code/No-Code with Abstracted Composability

  • No code generation, no compilation, and no virtual machine needed

  • Future-proof abstracted and platform-agnostic codeless composability

  • Full-stack, metadata IT asset abstraction and model-driven framework

  • Elimination of technical debt

  • Future-proofed agility and resiliency

  • Event-driven architecture
