title: Workspace Management 365
shortDescription: Optimize Your Office Space with Comprehensive SharePoint Workspace Management Software
Description:
Beyond Intranet's SharePoint Workspace Management Software empowers businesses to streamline their office space management and enhance the overall workplace experience for employees. Designed for modern organizations, this solution provides an intuitive interface for effective workspace management, interactive floor planning, and seamless seat booking processes.

Support SPFx component - SharePoint Full Page

Click Here

for product pricing and query

Key Features and Functionalities of Workspace Management 365:

  • Interactive Floor Planning: Visualize and manage office spaces with interactive floor maps, giving employees a clear view of available and occupied seats for a more connected workspace experience.

  • Seat Booking: Flexible seat booking options to meet diverse workplace management needs, enabling both half-day and full-day reservations for improved desk utilization.

  • Seat Availability Configuration: Easily configure seating availability, allowing for specific areas or desks to be marked as available, restricted, or reserved, enhancing office space management and employee convenience.

  • Seat Booking Approval Processes and Workflows: Customizable seat booking workflows with role-based approvers, ensuring an efficient seat reservation experience.

  • Lock/Unlock Seats: Admins can lock or unlock specific seats as needed, supporting temporary seat restrictions and enhanced workplace management.

  • Forceful Seat Vacating: Enforce seat vacating for specific cases where reserved seats need to be vacated, helping maintain workspace discipline and availability.

  • Employee Seat Finder: A user-friendly tool for employees to quickly locate available seats, simplifying the process of finding suitable workspace options.

  • Temporary and Permanent Desk Assignment: Facilitate both temporary and permanent seat assignments, catering to different workspace management requirements and employee preferences.

  • Booking Request Management: Efficiently handle booking requests with streamlined approval processes, allowing admins to review, approve, or deny requests as needed.

  • My Bookings Overview: An organized view of individual bookings for employees to easily track their upcoming reservations.

  • Automated Email Notifications: Keep employees informed with automatic email updates on booking status, cancellations, and reminders, ensuring a smooth workplace experience.

  • Multi-Select & Batch Operations: Enable multi-select and batch operations for admins, simplifying bulk management of seat bookings, approvals, and seat configurations.

  • Role-Based Approver Assignment: Assign approvers based on employee roles, enhancing control and oversight in booking workflows.

Beyond Intranet’s Workspace Management Software is a perfect fit for organizations seeking to elevate their workplace experience, streamline office space management, and optimize seat booking processes. Whether you need an efficient desk booking system or a robust workspace experience solution, this workplace software offers everything to meet your office space management needs.

The Workspace Management 365 application is available for 7-days FREE trial, and you may need to go for In-App Purchase to continue.

Beyond Intranet Advantage:

title: Smarter Navigation
shortDescription: Streamline your SharePoint navigation clearly and intuitively with Smarter Navigation.
Description:
Is your SharePoint navigation actually too complex? Are your users finding what they need?

Unravel the complexity of SharePoint with Smarter Navigation. Designed for intuitive use, our solution brings the simplicity of Windows File Explorer to your SharePoint environment.

KEY BENEFITS:

  • Streamlined Navigation: Seamlessly move through lists, folders, and pages, eliminating time spent on clicking and searching for the right content.

  • Personalized User Experience: Empower users to customize their workspaces with quick-access favorites, making navigation feel personal and efficient.

  • Consistent User Interface: Provide the same navigation experience on team and communication sites, ensuring users feel at home in any SharePoint area.

  • Rapid Content Retrieval: Enhance discoverability with a powerful search function that instantly locates and highlights your folders.

  • Collaborative Enhancement: Foster user adoption with simplified site navigation that makes collaborative efforts more productive and less chaotic.

KEY FEATURES:

  • Dynamic Tree-View Navigation: Easily browse SharePoint’s structure with a responsive tree-view, mirroring a familiar file exploration experience.

  • Advanced Quick Search: Directly find folders with a dedicated search box that reveals and selects your search targets within the navigation pane.

  • Extended Level Navigation: Overcome SharePoint's two-level navigation limit to create intricate, nested structures for complex sites.

  • Favorites Customization: Quickly add lists, folders, or pages to a personal favorites section for one-click access.

  • Flexible Navigation Layouts: Implement both horizontal and vertical navigation on any site type, enhancing layout flexibility.

ABOUT US:

At Smarter Business Solutions, we specialize in cutting through digital clutter to deliver sleek, efficient SharePoint solutions. Smarter Navigation is the culmination of our dedication to making sophisticated technology simple and accessible for every user.

title: Sprocket 365
shortDescription: Powerful Web Parts and tools to build better digital workplaces on SharePoint Online.
Description:
Sprocket 365 is a comprehensive extension for enhancing SharePoint, offering a robust suite of Web Parts, customisable features, and ready-made tools in one package.

It is the essential ingredient for transforming SharePoint Online, providing powerful customisation and an added layer of design flexibility. Unlike traditional intranets-in-a-box, Sprocket 365 doesn’t alter SharePoint's core functionality. Instead, it overlays SharePoint, providing a collection of Web Parts that overcome SharePoint's existing feature limitations - offering quick, cost-effective customisation based on real-world requirements.

Start your free 14-day trial today.

Sprocket 365 extends SharePoint by offering these all-in-one features:

  • 30+ Web Parts: Access a unique and expanding library of Web Parts, helping you bridge the gaps in SharePoint and unlock new design possibilities. Most loved Web Parts include: Popular Web Parts include Accordion, My Apps, Search Box, Embed, People Hub and Calendar.

  • Custom Header: Transform the standard SharePoint header into a more custom navigation experience, complete with branding and theme customisation.

  • Org Chart & Employee Directory: An interactive staff directory and org charts, pulling real-time data from Active Directory (Entra). This feature displays up-to-date employee details, making it easy to track changes and fully integrated with Microsoft Teams.

  • Knowledge Management System: Streamline your knowledge management in SharePoint with our ready-to-use repository. It includes a suite of pre-built tools such as tree hierarchical navigation, read lists, information protection and more.

  • Word Document to Policy Converters: This loved feature enables you to effortlessly convert live Word documents into site pages or PDF format, quickly forming a knowledge base in SharePoint from existing policy documents.

  • Global Alerts: Communicate information across all SharePoint sites effectively. Set expiry dates and determine whether alerts are dismissible.

  • CSS and Styling Overrides: Use custom scripts to add branding and themes through CSS or JavaScript (JS) overrides, adding a touch of personalisation to SharePoint.

  • Analytics: Gain deeper insights into SharePoint effortlessly, with one simple tracking code linking Google Analytics and Azure Application Insights.

Sprocket 365 is the rocket fuel for SharePoint. Explore our full library of Web Parts.

Visit https://sprocket365.com to learn more and try it out for free for 14 days. Get started today!

title: Celebration Hub
shortDescription: Celebration Hub for SharePoint: customizable features, intuitive interface to celebrate milestones
Description:
Our Celebration Hub Web part which can be added to the SharePoint web part page or Full Page simplifies the process, offering customizable features and an intuitive interface to help you foster team spirit and celebrate milestones meaningfully.

This will retrieve user profiles and properties from SharePoint user profiles.

It then meticulously sifts through the data to identify individuals with birthdays or anniversaries occurring today or within the next seven days.

title: Site Analytics by Accelerator 365
shortDescription: Powerful analytics for smarter intranets with our Google Tag Manager and Analytics integration.
Description:
Unlock the full potential of your SharePoint intranet with the Site Analytics application customiser from Accelerator 365. By seamlessly integrating with Google Tag Manager and Analytics, this app provides real-time insights into engagement on your intranet.

Dive deeper than native SharePoint analytics allows, with advanced metrics including most visited pages and sites, user visits by country or city, and average engagement time. Make data-driven decisions to enhance your intranet experience!

Site Analytics offers you the following features:

  • Analyse with Google - Link your SharePoint intranet with Google Tag Manager and Analytics for enhanced insights and a unified dashboard for data analysis.

  • Extensible - Support for multiple tracking codes means you can track various areas of your SharePoint environment, including sites outside of the intranet.

  • Track additional properties - Include extra properties in Google Analytics to track important data, such as certain user profile details to provide valuable insights.

Visit Accelerator 365 by Reply for support and more information about Site Analytics and our other apps.

*Claim a free trial with full functionality for 60 days. After 60 days, the Site Analytics trial will expire with instructions for purchasing a licensed version.

Learn how to download your free trial of Site Analytics.

title: Node Vision - Employee Directory
shortDescription: With Employee Directory any user information within your organization is just one click away.
Description:
The Employee Directory displays information about users in your organisation and allows you to find any user in just a few seconds.

  • Searching and custom filtering

Search for any user in your organization by name, department, job title or other fields. Can't find what you're looking for? Configure your own filters!

  • Fully customizable templates

Decide what information is displayed by changing your user template. Employee Directory comes with a special editor which allows you to show any field from a user profile.

  • Exceptional speed

Employee Directory utilizes SharePoint search therefore, all data is indexed, security trimmed and immediately retrieved.

  • Bulletproof security

Our app is hosted in your SharePoint environment. No data is sent to our servers or shared with any third parties.

  • User photos & Presence Indicator

The user photos are loaded either from SharePoint user profiles or Office 365, whichever is available. It works automatically out of the box. The presence indicator tells you whether a user is available.

  • Multilingual support

Our contact search comes with a translation file which means all labels and messages can be updated by an administrator to any language. Currently, the app comes with the following languages: English, Czech, French, German, Danish, and Spanish.

  • Multiple user views

Search results can be displayed in a user card or table view. The table view can be printed in a customizable template.

  • Auto load on scroll

Allows to load more users when scrolling down.

  • Recently modified documents

The recently modified documents by the user can be displayed and accessed.

Required permissions:

  • Microsoft Graph - Presence.Read.All

The app requires this permission so it can display presence information for other users.

Supported Hosts:

  • Webpart, Full page, Teams Tab and Teams Personal Tab

title: Org Chart by Cloudwell
shortDescription: Explore your organization’s structure effortlessly with our Org Chart for SharePoint and Teams!
Description:
Are you ready to elevate your organizational visibility?

Designed to streamline organizational clarity across industries, our app makes it easy to visualize and navigate your organization structure in SharePoint and Microsoft Teams.

Enhance your intranet experience. Explore, customize, and understand your company structure effortlessly! Do it all with Org Chart by Cloudwell and elevate your cloud. ☁️

You are installing a full-featured 15-day free trial. Contact support to purchase the app from the Details & Support tab above.

As Featured in Microsoft's The Intrazone Podcast 🎙️

Discover Cloudwell's apps, recognized for enhancing SharePoint efficiency, as featured on The Intrazone podcast by Microsoft. Listen to the podcast here.

What can it do?

  • Navigate your organization in SharePoint and Teams: Effortlessly explore your organization's structure, making it easy to connect, collaborate, and stay informed.

  • Modern, simple, and flexible: Built for a modern experience with simple and flexible configuration; use it as a web part or full-page app in SharePoint and as an app in Microsoft Teams.

  • Custom card builder: Easily configure front and back profile card information, allowing users to quickly flip cards for additional details.

  • Advanced configuration: Set app defaults, configure the root user, and specify visualization levels for unmatched flexibility.

  • Export your org chart: Export your org chart to a PDF for easy printing.

  • Instant contact access: Quickly visualize contact information, online status, QR codes, and links to call and chat directly from the org chart.

  • Microsoft Entra ID integration: Seamlessly integrated with Microsoft Entra ID for an accurate and streamlined user visualization experience.

  • Multilingual support: Fully supports 22 languages and works with your regional settings without additional configuration.

Getting Started

Use the app as a web part or full-page app in SharePoint, or as an app in Microsoft Teams.

For a comprehensive experience, we recommend checking out the official documentation. Visit Cloudwell's Org Chart Support Page to access detailed guides and answers to frequently asked questions.

title: SharePoint|sapiens Modern User Interface
shortDescription: Needed to use the SharePoint|sapiens Event- or Employee Training Management app on a modern site.
Description:
This app has to be used in conjunction with our SharePoint|sapiens Event Management app (WA104380834) or SharePoint|sapiens Employee Training Management app (WA104380833).

This app provides an intuitive user interface that allows you to create and manage events, topics, courses and curriculums in SharePoint, enroll users or allow them to enroll themselves and to keep track of all attendees, assignments and achievements.

SharePoint|sapiens Event Management

Get it from the app store at https://appsource.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/WA104380834?tab=Overview

The SharePoint|sapiens Event Management add-in helps you to organize various types of events, enroll users or allow them to enroll themselves and to keep track of all attendees. Participants receive meeting requests and updates via e-mail to make sure they always have the latest information in their Outlook calendar.

Once you have added the SharePoint|sapiens Event Management and the SharePoint|sapiens Modern User Interface to your SharePoint website, click on the Event Management app and click on Prepare this website. Learn more about the installation at https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/event-management-office365/documentation/installation-store/

SharePoint|sapiens Employee Training Management

Get it from the app store at https://appsource.microsoft.com/en-us/product/office/WA104380833?tab=Overview

The SharePoint|sapiens Employee Training Management add-in makes organizing and administrating employee learning and development easy for everyone. From setting up self-paced or instructor-led courses, scheduling training events, managing learners and their assignments and enrollments, to tracking achievements and feedback, everything is covered.

Once you have added the SharePoint|sapiens Employee Training Management and the SharePoint|sapiens Modern User Interface to your SharePoint website, click on the Employee Training Management app and click on Prepare this website. Learn more about the installation at https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/employee-training-management-office365/documentation/installation-store/

The solution contains Webparts, Application Customizers, List View Command Sets, Field Extensions and Form Customizers. The solution automatically configures all of these features for you. However, if you want to change web part settings, add web parts to existing or new pages, etc., feel free to do so.

For more details about the Employee Management app, visit https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/employee-training-management-office365/, request a live demo at https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/employee-training-management-office365/live-demo/ to see it in action or view the user guide at https://www.sharepointsapiens.com/employee-training-management-office365/documentation/user-guide/.

Any other questions?

If you have any questions please email us at support@sharepointsapiens.com.

shortDescription: AQL’s Kudos webpart for your SharePoint intranet to boost user motivation and morale.

Build a positive reinforcement culture and engage your employees through frequent encouragements and motivations. The Kudos webpart is an effective portal for allowing employees from various departments and divisions across the organization to recognize each other through praises, awards, rewards, and by expression of gratitude. AQL’s Kudos webpart for your organizational intranet comes along with exceptional recognition capabilities involving badges and more, as given below:

title: ServiceNow® platform integration by adenin
shortDescription: Easily show your live ServiceNow® data inside SharePoint and Viva dashboard
Description:
Enhance your SharePoint platform by integrating it with the ServiceNow® platform, facilitated by adenin's straightforward integration solution. This powerful integration brings the full suite of ServiceNow® capabilities into your SharePoint environment, enabling a cohesive workflow without the need to alternate between applications. Experience a surge in productivity as you access ServiceNow® records and tasks directly within SharePoint.

Integration Features:

  • Seamless Embedding: Incorporate ServiceNow® platform data as a web part within your SharePoint sites, offering instant access to records and tasks.

  • Unified Search: Effortlessly search across ServiceNow® data from within SharePoint, streamlining your workflow.

  • Microsoft 365 Compatibility: Designed to work flawlessly within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, enhancing your productivity tools.

Integration Benefits:

  • Enhanced Efficiency: Leverage single sign-on capabilities to avoid app-switching, saving time and streamlining operations.

  • Improved Collaboration: Share critical ServiceNow® platform data within SharePoint, fostering better teamwork and decision-making.

  • Tailored Customization: Adapt the integration to meet your organization's unique requirements, supported by a developer-friendly setup.

  • Streamlined Integration: Developers enjoy an easy setup process with extensive API support, simplifying customization and maintenance.

Elevate Your SharePoint with ServiceNow® platform integration:

Begin with adenin today to unlock the combined potential of SharePoint and ServiceNow®, driving forward your organizational efficiency and collaboration.

FAQs about ServiceNow® platform Integration:

What data sources are available for ServiceNow® platform?

ServiceNow® platform integration offers 4 primary data sources, including "Create ServiceNow Incident" and "Query a table," enabling diverse data management directly within SharePoint.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from ServiceNow®) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Is the ServiceNow® platform integration free?

While SharePoint integration is free through adenin, utilizing ServiceNow® data may involve additional costs based on your adenin plan. For detailed pricing, refer to adenin's pricing page.

Who is this integration designed for?

Ideal for IT teams in organizations of all sizes, this integration simplifies ServiceNow® data integration into SharePoint without requiring advanced technical knowledge. adenin fully manages the authentication process, making data embedding straightforward.

Do I need developer skills to use this integration?

No, the integration is designed to be user-friendly, enabling managers to integrate ServiceNow® into SharePoint easily. adenin provides a low-code Card designer for further customization, making the process accessible to all users.

How is my ServiceNow® platform data secured?

Adenin utilizes secure OAuth standards for all data transactions, ensuring your information is safely managed. You can revoke access at any time, maintaining strict data privacy and security standards.

By integrating the ServiceNow® platform with SharePoint through adenin, you're not just streamlining your digital workflow; you're creating a more interconnected, efficient workspace where critical data is readily accessible, enhancing your overall productivity and collaboration.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The ServiceNow® platform integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

title: eShare Trusted Sharing for SharePoint
shortDescription: Allows external file sharing via eShare Trusted Shares to be initiated from within SharePoint.
Description:
The eShare Trusted Sharing for SharePoint application is an extension of the eShare Secure Data Collaboration Platform, which builds upon M365 and provides simple, secure & branded file sharing, data rooms, secure email and content collaboration with external parties. The application uses the List View Command set to add a “Create Trusted Share” button to both the top menu and action menu when a file or folder is selected. This allows eShare Trusted Shares to be created from within SharePoint, leveraging the native SharePoint UX while benefiting from the fine-grained controls, 100% custom branding, recipient link blocking avoidance, and collaboration productivity features that eShare brings to M365.

To use this application, the user must have an eShare subscription, which can be purchased via AppSource and Azure Marketplace. Guidance on installing the app can be found here.

title: Ideation Station
shortDescription: Share and evaluate ideas
Description:
The Ideation Station is a digital solution for a suggestion box, utilizing the SharePoint Framework (SPFx) with an Adaptive Card Extension (ACE) component. People can easily post their ideas and suggestions. Once an idea is is submitted, it can be viewed by everyone else in the workspace. Collegues then have the ability to review the idea both through likes and comments.

All ideas are stored in a SharePoint list, which can only be accessed by those with the necessary permissions. When an idea is being worked on they can change its status in the list to "In development" and then to "Completed" when it's done. This status is visible to everyone in the adaptive card.

This application is available in English and German.

title: DocuKlaud - Modern Document Management
shortDescription: Optimize document processes with custom workflows, version control, and flexible security
Description:
DocuKlaud - Modern Document Management is an advanced solution designed to empower organizations in optimizing their document classification, review, approval, and signing processes through flexible and efficient workflows. With a robust set of features, DocuKlaud offers a comprehensive document management experience, including:

  1. Custom Workflows: Design tailored approval workflows by defining specific stages and determining if approval is required from all participants at each phase or only from the first person to approve or reject.

  2. Electronic Signature: Integrate a signing stage into your workflows, allowing the participation of both internal and external users to your organization.

  3. Document Templates: Create documents from predefined templates that are automatically populated with the information entered upon uploading a document.

  4. Advanced Version Control: Customize versioning nomenclature to clearly and efficiently track document iterations.

  5. Document Coding: Automatically assign a code to all documents based on the hierarchical folder structure.

  6. Detailed Document History: Access a comprehensive history that details previous workflows and the actors involved in each review stage, providing transparency throughout the process.

  7. Expiration Management: Get a panoramic view of documents that are about to expire or have already expired, helping you maintain effective control and take timely action.

  8. Transmittals: Facilitate formal tracking of document delivery to your stakeholders, ensuring smooth and well-documented communication.

  9. Flexible Permission System: Implement a flexible permission system that allows you to set specific authorizations for your folders and maintain rigorous control over information access.

  10. DocuKlaudGPT: Use artificial intelligence to allow users to ask questions and receive answers about document content in formats like docx, PDF (with searchable text), CSV, and txt.

  11. Custom Fields: Incorporate tags and custom fields for document classification, adapting them to your specific requirements.

  12. Bulk Upload: Mass tag your documents and send them to approval workflows efficiently.

  13. Customize Your Corporate Identity: Set up your company logo and colors so that the platform aligns with your brand image.

  14. Optical Character Recognition (OCR): Convert scanned PDF documents into searchable formats, facilitating information search and enabling DocuKlaudGPT to answer questions about the document.

  15. Auditing: We leverage Office 365 Management Activity API to collect detailed event logs related to documents and users in SharePoint. This allows administrators to gain visibility into who accessed, modified, downloaded, or performed specific actions on documents, which is essential for complying with security and auditing regulations.

    This feature is especially useful for organizations that need to comply with security and audit regulations such as GDPR or Data Protection Laws, as it provides a clear traceability of events related to document management. All logs collected are securely managed in accordance with security best practices.

Installation and Configuration

If you need help with the installation process, we offer free support. Request a session at support@docuklaud.com.

Environments

DocuKlaud can be installed as a SharePoint Page, SharePoint Web Part, or a Teams Tab.

Where are documents and data stored?

All document-related information and workflows are stored in lists and libraries on your organization's SharePoint site, ensuring that the data remains within your secure environment. This includes interactions with DocuKlaudGPT.

However, audit logs are securely stored in an external database. This allows you to access them easily and quickly from the DocuKlaud interface.

14-day Free Trial

When installing DocuKlaud, a 14-day free trial subscription is activated. For a commercial version, contact us at sales@docuklaud.com.

Supported Languages

Currently, the application supports the following languages:

  • Spanish

  • Portuguese

  • English

  • German

  • French

appName: Dynamic Forms: a web part for SharePoint
title: Dynamic Forms: a web part for SharePoint
shortDescription: Simplifies form creation, submission, and notifications directly from SharePoint lists.
Description:
Did you know? You can purchase this web part directly from us! Contact us now to learn more and elevate your SharePoint experience.

Introducing Dynamic Forms: a web part for SharePoint, an advanced web part designed to streamline form creation, submission, and notification workflows directly from SharePoint lists. This powerful tool enables organizations to generate fully functional forms based on SharePoint list structures, ensuring compatibility with all available field types. In addition to efficient form rendering, Dynamic Forms automates email notifications, ensuring that designated users are instantly informed whenever a form is submitted.

Streamlined Solution

• Intelligent form rendering directly from SharePoint lists.

• Flexibility to configure up to three category levels (Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3) to determine which form should be rendered.

• Option to configure a single form without categories, for simpler workflows.

• Automated and customizable email notifications, sent as if from the user who submitted the form.

• Easy management of documents attached to forms.

• Supports SharePoint web part and SharePoint full page.

Key Features

Intelligent Form Rendering

Automatically generate forms from any SharePoint list, maintaining full compatibility with all list fields.

Dynamic Category-Based Selection

Configure up to three category levels (Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3) through auxiliary lists, with categories referenced as lookup fields.

Single Form Configuration

Optionally configure a single form without the need for categories.

Customizable Submission Notifications

Define users who should be notified after a form submission, with automatic email alerts sent as if from the user who submitted the form.

Comprehensive Email Notifications

Notification emails include full form details, attachment links, and a direct link to the submitted item for easy review.

Seamless Document Management

Attach supporting documents directly to the form submission for more efficient data management.

Setup Button

Automatically creates all the necessary lists for the correct operation of the web part.

Dynamic Forms: a web part for SharePoint revolutionizes form-based workflows by simplifying data entry, automating notifications, and providing an intuitive category-driven form selection system. This web part enhances productivity and ensures a structured and efficient approach to form submissions within your SharePoint environment.

title: Ichicraft Boards: Your Digital Workplace
shortDescription: Optimize your workday with a personalized workplace, uniting tools in a user-friendly dashboard.
Description:
Ichicraft Boards is a fully personalised digital workplace solution, consolidating all the tools and resources an employee needs during their workday into a single, user-friendly dashboard. Ichicraft Boards improves productivity by helping employees stay organised and well informed.

Board Templates and Personalization

Companies have the option to create board templates that are tailored to specific groups of users, helping them to provide a personalised digital workplace that perfectly aligns with the requirements of each team, department, or user group. From an individual user standpoint, one of the standout features of Ichicraft Boards is the ability to customise the digital workplace to match specific needs and work style. Users have the flexibility to select the most vital tools and resources, crafting a dashboard that suits them best.

Collective Dashboards

Next to personal boards, we've got shared boards, these are collective dashboards crafted for sharing information. Perfect for teams or entire organizations to stay connected and informed.

Apply your Company Branding

With Ichicraft Boards, you can easily apply your branding, creating a unified look that resonates with your organization's values and culture.

 

Extensive Library of Widgets

Our extensive library of widgets provides you with the tools to create a single, all-in-one landing page that streamlines your workflow. Currently we offer widgets in the following categories:

Productivity and Task Management

  • To Do Tasks: Manage your tasks from To Do

  • Planner Tasks: Complete your tasks from Planner

  • Saved for later: Shows the items you've saved for later

  • Azure DevOps: Directly access workitems from Azure DevOps

Communication and Collaboration

  • Inbox: Your e-mail inbox

  • Shared Inbox: Access a shared inbox

  • Microsoft Teams: View and navigate to the Microsoft Teams you've joined

Information Aggregation

  • Upcoming meetings: Your upcoming meetings from Outlook

  • Events: Aggregates all the events from the sites you are following

  • News: View news articles published in SharePoint sites you follow

  • External feed: Add external RSS feeds and combine them in one widget

File and Data Management

  • Files: Access your files from OneDrive, SharePoint, or Microsoft Teams

Application Launchers

  • App Launcher: Launch your favorite applications right from your board

  • Azure Virtual Desktop App Launcher: Launch your favorite virtualized applications right from your board

Personalization and Favorites

  • My favorites: Quickly get to your favorite webpage

  • My followed sites: Directly visit the sites you are following

Data Visualization and Reporting

  • Power BI: Add your favorite PowerBI tiles to your homepage

  • Tableau Reports: View Tableau reports

Miscellaneous

  • Embed: Embed anything as a widget

  • People Search: Search for people you work with

  • Birthdays: Never forget your colleagues' birthdays anymore!

  • World Clocks: World time for cities in all time zones.

Build your own widgets

It doesn’t have to end with the widgets we offer! Why not build your own custom widgets to interact with your line-of-business software to reach the product’s full potential? Through our Yeoman templates you can create a widget in minutes!

Simple Installation and always Up-To-Date

Installing Ichicraft Boards is easy and fast, with a simple installation wizard that gets you up and running in no time. With new features and updates deployed automatically, customers can be sure that they're always using the most up-to-date version of the product. 

Secure and Compliant

In terms of security and compliance, Ichicraft Boards is designed to store and keep client data within the client's tenant, ensuring that it is secure and compliant with most relevant regulations. Additionally, Ichicraft Boards has a multilingual interface, making it accessible to users around the world.

Stay Productive on-the-go with Ichicraft Boards
With Ichicraft Boards, you can take your digital workspace with you wherever you go! It's fully optimized for mobile devices, making it easy to access and use on-the-go. Whether you're on the road or away from your desk, Ichicraft Boards is your trusty companion.

Installing this app in a site collection adds a new web part to the web part gallery. Add it to a Full-width section on your homepage for the best experience!

After installing and configuring Ichicraft Boards, you'll get a 30 day trial period to try out all the features. After that, you need a paid license to continue using Ichicraft Boards. Visit our website ichicraft.com for pricing information or contact us at boards@ichicraft.com for more information.

title: LTAPPS Time Off
shortDescription: An application that allows employees to create and submit requests for time off
Description:
LTAPPS Time Off is a software application that allows employees to create and submit requests for time off from work, and managers to approve or reject them. A leave request app can also track the leave balances, status, and history of each employee, as well as the company holidays and policies.

LTAPPS Time Off app can benefit both employees and managers by simplifying the process of requesting and approving time off, reducing errors and delays, increasing transparency and accountability, and improving employee satisfaction and productivity.

Users can submit the request via desktop, mobile, web app, or platforms such as O365 apps, SharePoint or Microsoft Teams.

Key Features of the App

- Mobile app to apply and approve leaves from anywhere and anytime

- Custom leave approval workflow to define multi-step approval processes with unlimited steps

- Custom form to design the leave request form with unlimited fields

- Approval flow to let managers review, approve, or reject leave requests in a unified view

- Absence calendar to view the leave requests and availability of team members

- Leave entitlement to show the leave types and balances of each employee

- Accrual rules to calculate the leave accruals based on various factors

- Automatic calculation to calculate the number of hours/days off between start and end dates

- Carry forward to bring the remaining days into the next year

- Increase the day-to-allowance days for each month

- Fiscal year to define the fiscal year for the organization

- Delegation to re-assign the task to another

- Submit on behalf to allow the manager, human resources, or administrator to submit the request on behalf of employees

- Add to Outlook to sync the leave request from the app to Microsoft Outlook & Microsoft Teams

- Discussion to communicate between requester & approvers via the message

- Notifications to send alerts and reminders to employees and managers about leave requests and approvals

- Multi Locations to allow the employee uses the app with different countries and different time zones

- Working times to define the types of work such as full-time, part-time,… of each employee

- Integrations to connect the leave request app with other apps via Power Apps

- Attachments to allow employees to upload supporting documents for their leave requests

- Support multi-languages and dark mode

- Retroactive to update the old data

The app supports components

- SharePoint Webpart & Full Page

- Teams Tab & Teams Personal Tab

Videos

- User Guide

- Setup Guide

Links

- The app's info

- Customer Success Stories

- User Guide

- Configuration Guide

- Setup Guide

NOTE

To use the solution add the solution manually to the newly created site.

To approve the API permissions after installing the LTAPPS Time Off solution, open the link to consent the app. Follow the steps in the Configuration Guide.

It doesn't have any custom service to collect any personal information, or anything related to your device when you use any of our apps. shortDescription: Easily embed users Slack content into SharePoint and Viva Connections dashboard
Description:
Unlock the potential of your SharePoint environment by integrating it with Slack through adenin's dynamic platform. This integration allows for the direct embedding of live Slack data into your SharePoint online pages, offering a centralized view of your communications within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Enhance your SharePoint utility by bringing in crucial Slack updates, ensuring you never miss important conversations or data flows.

Integration Highlights:

  • Slack Web Part: Seamlessly integrate live Slack data into SharePoint, customizing the web part to fit the design of your online pages.

  • Live Data Visualization: Stay informed with real-time Slack data updates, ensuring secure and immediate access to your communications.

  • Easy Connectivity: Establish a secure connection to Slack with just a few clicks, enabling a direct feed of data to your browser without storing it on adenin servers.

  • OAuth Security: Utilize secure OAuth protocols for data transmission, giving you full control over your data sharing permissions.

Advantages for Your Workspace:

  • Centralized Data Access: Streamline your workflow by accessing Slack data directly within SharePoint, eliminating the need to switch between apps.

  • Enhanced Productivity: Increase your SharePoint investment returns by integrating Slack data, making vital information more visible and accessible.

  • Personalized Dashboard: Beyond SharePoint, adenin offers a customizable dashboard for monitoring all your apps, including Slack, from a unified platform.

  • Free Plan Availability: Get started with adenin's free forever plan, connecting to Slack and other apps without limits.

About adenin’s SharePoint Channel:

Enhance collaboration within your SharePoint intranet using adenin’s Slack integration web part. Embed your personalized dashboard cards, including Slack data, into SharePoint with interactive elements for a more engaging user experience.

FAQs about SharePoint Slack Integration:

Is the Slack integration free?

Yes, while SharePoint integration is freely available, utilizing Slack data through adenin may incur additional charges based on your chosen plan. Check adenin's pricing page for detailed information.

Who should use the SharePoint Slack integration?

This integration is ideal for teams across various sectors within small to large organizations, simplifying Slack data integration into SharePoint without needing extensive technical knowledge.

Do I need to be a developer to implement this integration?

No, adenin has designed this integration to be user-friendly, enabling busy managers to integrate Slack data into SharePoint effortlessly, with step-by-step guidance and a low-code Card designer for customization.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Slack) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

How is my Slack data secured?

Adenin employs secure OAuth standards to manage your Slack data securely, ensuring it is directly transmitted to SharePoint without being stored on adenin servers. Users can revoke access at any time, maintaining strict data privacy and security standards.

By integrating Slack with SharePoint via adenin, you're not just enhancing your productivity; you're creating a seamless bridge between communication and content management, fostering a more integrated, efficient workplace.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The Slack integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

title: Alert Reminder
shortDescription: Stay on top of item changes and upcoming tasks with customized alert and reminder emails using flows
Description:
BoostSolutions' Alert Reminder for SharePoint Online simplifies your process of creating an alert or reminder flow. With its intuitive, user-friendly interface, creating a flow is accomplished with minimal effort - no coding or programming required. This powerful tool ensures you stay informed about item creations, modifications, deletions, and upcoming tasks, thereby enhancing the efficiency of your task management.

This tool allows you to customize alert and reminder emails with detailed item information, attachments, tables, images, links, and more.

You can also automate reminders about upcoming tasks and deadlines, adjusting the frequency of reminders to suit your needs.

Field-based conditions offer more control over alert dispatches, triggered by changes in column value, status updates, or overdue tasks.

The Alert Reminder supports multiple ways to specify recipients, accommodating SharePoint groups, specific users, or email addresses in a list column.

All item changes, including old and new values, are tracked and prominently highlighted in the email body, enabling quick identification and response to changes.

Utilizing the SharePoint Framework (SPFx) list view command set extension enhances the ease of access to Alert Reminder settings. This convenient feature streamlines the process, enabling swift and efficient interaction with the application's functions.

BoostSolutions' Alert Reminder offers a robust set of features for SharePoint Online:

- Sends email alerts upon item creation, modification, or deletion.

- Automatically sends reminder emails when a task or event is approaching its deadline.

- Customizes email body with a variety of formatting options, including text styles, colors, fonts, hyperlinks, tables, images, attachments, and list columns.

- Sends notification emails at set intervals - by the minute, hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly.

- Establishes conditions to decide the timing and circumstances under which alert or reminder emails should be sent.

- Includes the relevant item information in the body of the alert or reminder emails.

- Highlights the changes made to items in alert emails.

- Customizes the subject, with support for inserting list columns.

- Sends alert or reminder emails for items from a specified list view.

- Specifies 'To', 'CC', and 'BCC' recipients as SharePoint users and groups.

- Specifies 'To', 'CC', and 'BCC' recipients using the SharePoint User or Group columns, and send the emails to the users or groups represented in these columns.

- Sets email addresses columns in a SharePoint Online list as recipients in the 'To', 'CC', and 'BCC' fields.

- Replies on SharePoint Flow, ensuring no data is sent to third-party platform.

Experience the full potential of BoostSolutions’ Alert Reminder for SharePoint Online with our fully featured 30-day free trial.

title: Calendar Plus by Bamboo
shortDescription: Overlay items from multiple lists and calendars containing timelines with color-coding and tooltips.
Description:
Easily view and manage data from multiple calendars and task lists in one central App.

A webpart that combines calendars from SharePoint lists and/or Exchange Calendars into one cental location while maintaining and honoring the original permission settings of each individual calendar.

Intuitive Interface

Quickly jump to dates, add items, print, and toggle SharePoint calendars with a powerful toolbar.

- Color-code events according to list and column values – making the type and source of each item easy to see

- Toggle between Calendar or Gantt view with ease

- Show just the column data you need, with configurable hover-over tooltips

- Show only the data you want with powerful configuration options and a familiar office calendar interface

Unified Calendar

Combines team calendars, holidays, events, and even task lists from across your portal.

- Works with any date-based lists

- Choose from a variety of SharePoint data sources, including office calendars, tasks, or any SharePoint list with date columns

- Combine your calendars and date-based lists into one convenient SharePoint calendar

- Calendar Plus uses Graph API and needs permissions to read and write from Exchange calendars

Perpetual Domain Level Pricing

- Perpetual one time license pricing, with no user limitations, ensures the product will add value for years to come with no complicated subscriptions

- Installation can be at domain level or targeted to specific site collections

- Download provides 30 day free trial

- Perpetual license one time purchase USD$3,995

Support

- License includes 1st year product enhancements and phone/ticket system support (8am 5pm Eastern US)

- Product supports both SharePoint Modern and Classic sites

- Works with SharePoint Online (365)

- Works on Gov Cloud installations

- Optional 2nd year maintenance available at 22% of license price, billed on anniversary of purchase.

Calendar Plus has one component: A webpart.

To ensure a successful product download, please make sure you have the correct permissions to your tenant app catalog. If you try to download the product and receive a page message stating “The App Catalog couldn’t be created” you likely do not have the correct permissions to your site. You will need at least contribute access to this location in order for the product download to work. If you cannot locate or cannot access your tenant app catalog, your SharePoint Administrator should be able to give you access.

About Bamboo

Back in 2001, our company name was inspired by the bamboo plant — strong, flexible and easily adapted for a variety of global solutions. Today, by adding the consulting services of SharePointXperts to the Bamboo family, we have become a global-leading provider of enterprise-class software applications and consulting services designed to extend the native capabilities of Microsoft SharePoint and Microsoft 365. So far, over 8,000 organizations worldwide have chosen to enhance their SharePoint deployment with products, solutions and services from Bamboo.

title: LTAPPS Approval Hub
shortDescription: A software solution that allows users to create, and manage requests from a centralized platform
Description:
LTAPPS Approval Hub is a software solution that allows users to create, manage, and share approval requests from a centralized platform. Approval requests are documents or tasks that require the consent or authorization of one or more approvers before they can be executed or completed. Examples of approval requests include purchase orders, expense reports, leave requests, contracts, invoices, and more.

LTAPPS Approval Hub app can benefit both employees and managers by simplifying the process of requesting and approving the request, reducing errors and delays, increasing transparency and accountability, and improving employee satisfaction and productivity.

Define the sale process to track the activities with the customer from having an appointment to the final settlement

Can use the app via desktop, mobile, web app, or platforms such as O365 apps, SharePoint, or Teams.

Key Features of the App

- Mobile Access: Apply for and approve requests from anywhere, at any time, via the mobile app.

- Custom Approval Workflow: Define multi-step approval processes with unlimited steps to suit your organization's needs.

- Custom Forms: Design request forms with unlimited fields to capture all necessary information.

- Unified Approval Flow: Managers can review, approve, or reject requests within a single, unified view.

- Delegation: Re-assign tasks to another team member to ensure continuity.

- Submit on Behalf: Allow managers, HR, or administrators to submit requests on behalf of employees.

- Outlook Integration: Sync requests from the app directly to Outlook and Teams.

- Discussion Feature: Facilitate communication between requesters and approvers through in-app messaging.

- Notifications: Send alerts and reminders about leave requests and approvals to employees and managers.

- Integrations: Connect the Approval Hub app with other applications via Power Apps for seamless workflows.

- Attachments: Enable employees to upload supporting documents with their requests.

- Multilingual Support: Support multiple languages, making the app accessible to users from diverse linguistic backgrounds.

- Dark Mode: Provide a comfortable and visually appealing interface option for users who prefer a darker screen.

- Retroactive Updates: Allow updates to be made to historical data for accurate record-keeping.

The steps to install the app

- Install the app to SharePoint. Make sure the App Availability is Only Enable this app

- Install the app to Teams or M365 apps. Make sure the App Availability is Enable this app and add it to all sites

Please refer to the Install Guide to learn more details

The app supports components

- SharePoint Webpart & Full Page

- Teams Tab & Teams Personal Tab

Videos

- Overview

- Setup Guide

Links

- The app info

- User Guide

- Configuration Guide

- Install Guide

NOTE

To approve the APIs of the app, open the App Permission Request page to consent to the app

The technical of the app that based on the SharePoint Framework app of Microsoft. All components are deployed and hosted inside of your SharePoint where the app is installed. It doesn't have any custom service to collect any personal information, or anything related to your device when you use any of our apps. We do not connect to any third parties or web services and we do not and will not share any information about you or your use of the app without your written consent.

title: Workday integration by adenin
shortDescription: Web parts and Viva Connections integration for use with the Workday® platform
Description:
Workday® meets SharePoint: The Ultimate Integration. Boost your team's productivity by integrating Workday® with SharePoint. Experience the magic of having all your data in one place with the help of adenin.

Features:

  • Customizable Workday® Web part in SharePoint & Adaptive Card extension for Viva Connections dashboard

  • Seamless Microsoft 365 integration: Get instant access to your Workday® data right within SharePoint using our Web part integration.

  • Developer-friendly: Easily customize the integration to fit your organization's unique needs.

  • Streamlined workflows: Enjoy a seamless connection between Workday® and your Microsoft 365 apps for smooth data sharing and collaboration.

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint Workday® integration

What data sources are available for Workday®?

Workday® offers a variety of data sources, including "Inbox," "Time off plan balances" and "Retrieves a collection of activities for a specific customer." allowing for a detailed and comprehensive view of your Workday® data directly within SharePoint.

Is the SharePoint integration free?

While SharePoint serves as a free channel within adenin, integrating Workday® data may involve additional charges based on your adenin plan. For detailed pricing information, please refer to adenin's pricing page.

Who benefits from integrating Workday® with SharePoint?

This integration is ideal for HR and Finance teams in organizations of all sizes, simplifying employee management without requiring extensive technical knowledge. adenin facilitates the entire process, from authentication to data presentation in SharePoint.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Workday®) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Do I need to be a developer to use this integration?

No, the integration is designed with busy managers in mind, eliminating the need for coding skills. adenin provides an intuitive, low-code Card designer for easy setup and customization, ensuring a smooth integration process.

How is my Workday® data secured with adenin?

Adenin uses secure OAuth standards for all data transactions, guaranteeing that your data remains safe and under your control. You can revoke access at any time, with data directly transmitted to SharePoint without being stored on adenin servers.

By adopting adenin for your SharePoint and Workday® integration, you're equipped to elevate your productivity, ensuring a harmonious, efficient workspace where data accessibility and management are streamlined for your convenience.

title: People Directory by Accelerator 365
shortDescription: Surface user profile data from Microsoft 365 in the form of a directory.
Description:
The People Directory web part surfaces user profile data from Microsoft 365 to form a navigable organizational directory. Finding the right colleague can be a difficult task. The People Directory provides visitors with a multitude of options to locate and connect with contacts at your organization.

Use the traditional A-Z and pagination controls to browse through teammates alphabetically. Alternatively, smart search allows visitors to go beyond just searching for a name – search by department and job title too to discover colleagues from across the business.

People Directory offers you the following features:

  • Layout options - Multiple layout options give editors the flexibility to choose between a Standard, Tabular, and Compact layout to suit your content and page design. Pick between the Standard and Tabular layout for a full view of the People Directory or opt for the sleeker and minimalist form that the Compact layout provides.

  • Searchable - Easily locate colleagues from across your organization with the search bar in People Directory. Smart search allows you to by default search for various user profile properties, such as first name, last name, department, or job title, with results then dynamically displayed directly in the People Directory.

  • Intelligent suggestions - Connect users to relevant colleagues using the Recommended for current user option. This directory option leverages your Microsoft services to intelligently discover and recommend the colleagues they frequently interact with in Teams chat, Outlook email, and more.

  • Filtering - Additional filtering allows editors to refine the People Directory with relevant contacts. Use filtering to narrow contacts displayed to a specific department or filter out service accounts from view.

  • Viva Connections ready - Like all Accelerator apps, People Directory is compatible with Viva Connections. Part of Microsoft’s Viva Employee Experience platform, Viva Connections brings your intranet home page and content into Teams.

  • Responsive - The People Directory is optimally designed for any and all devices, whether your users are accessing SharePoint on desktop browsers or mobile devices. Browse, discover, and connect with colleagues wherever you are.

Visit Accelerator 365 by Reply for support and more information about People Directory and our other apps.

*Claim a free trial with full functionality for 60 days. After 60 days, the People Directory trial will expire with instructions for purchasing a licensed version.

Learn how to download your free trial of People Directory.

*People Directory requires Microsoft Graph API permissions to be approved in the SharePoint Admin Centre.

title: New Hires
shortDescription: The New Hires web part enhances internal communication by sharing updates on recent team additions.
Description:
Welcome New Hires!

The New Hires web part is a useful tool to welcome and introduce the new employees who joined your company recently. It displays a list of new hires with their title, location, and manager. You can also see their start date and a photo if available. The web part uses either an Excel file or a SharePoint list as a source for the new hire data. You can specify which source to use in the web part settings.

How does the New Hires web part work?

The New Hires web part is easy to use and configure. You just need to add the web part to your SharePoint page, and it will automatically pick up the birthday and anniversary dates from a SharePoint List or an Excel file. You can specify the location of the List or Excel file in the settings of the Web Part.

Why is New Hires important in the workplace?

The New Hires web part helps you create a positive and engaging onboarding experience for your new employees. It allows you to recognize their contributions and talents, and connect them with their colleagues and the company culture. Research shows that a good onboarding process can improve employee retention by 82% and productivity by over 70%1. By using the New Hires web part, you can show your new employees that you care about them and that they are part of a great team. 😊

Don’t miss the opportunity to recognize and welcome your teammates. Add New Hires to your SharePoint today and make your workplace a happier and more productive place!

How to configure New Hires?

The "New Hires" web part offers a wide range of configuration choices. Use the property pane to select the displayed name for the web part, as well as the preferred information source:

1) SharePoint List: you can select a custom SharePoint list as the source, the required formatting for the list can be copied from our web site: https://dalikoo.com/sharepoint-list/

2) Excel: you can select a Microsoft Excel sheet as the source. Please use this excel template and add your information (do not change the field names or order): https://www.dalikoo.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Excel-Template.xlsx

Once you add an information source, the New Hires web part can be used in every SharePoint site and page. New Hires will reference the 'anniversary date' information and will list all new hires that have joined the company in the past 20 days.

Any final requirements to consider?

The New Hires web part needs specific API permissions to extract basic information from user profiles.

1) User.Read : This scope is used to request permission to read basic user profile information. It need to display basic user information, such as the user's name and profile picture.

2) User.Read.All : This scope is used when the application requires permission to read user profiles for all users in the organization. All organization members have access to view the web part results for newly hired employees.

3) User.ReadBasic.All : This scope is used to request permission to read basic user profile information for all users in the organization. All organization members have only needs access to basic user information.

The API permission request should take place automatically upon installing the web part in your App Catalog. The permission can be granted by a SharePoint Administrator.

In case of any issues or questions, please contact us at https://dalikoo.com/contact/.

title: SharePoint Audit PRO
shortDescription: Comprehensive auditing solution for SharePoint sites, tracking events, permissions & security
Description:
SharePoint Audit PRO is a comprehensive solution designed to provide detailed and accurate auditing of events occurring on your SharePoint sites. With our tool, you can capture and record all events related to documents, lists, and pages, including views, edits, creations, and deletions.

Key Features

  1. Detailed Event Logging: Capture all events related to documents, lists, and pages on your SharePoint sites.

  2. Permission Auditing: View detailed information on which users and security groups have read, create, edit, and delete permissions on lists and libraries.

  3. Audit Buttons: Quickly access auditing for lists, libraries, and items from SharePoint's native interface.

Benefits

  1. Regulatory Compliance: Meet security and auditing standards, such as GDPR and Data Protection Act.

  2. Visibility and Control: Get a clear view of activities on your SharePoint sites.

  3. Security: Protect your data and documents with advanced auditing.

Installation and Configuration

Need help with installation? We offer free assistance. Request a session at support@klaudxys.com.

Environments

SP Audit PRO can be installed as a SharePoint Web Part, SharePoint Full Page, Teams Tab and ListView Command Set.

It can be installed on a specific site or across the entire tenant.

Where are audit records stored?

All audit records are stored securely in an external database.

Data Retention Policy

After subscription cancellation, we retain audit records for 3 months to ensure continuity and allow data recovery. During this period, customers can request:

  • A copy of audit records.

  • Immediate data deletion, upon formal request.

After 3 months unsubscribe, your records are permanently deleted from our systems.

14-day Free Trial Subscription

When installing SharePoint Audit PRO a 14-day free trial subscription is activated. For any questions, contact us at contact@klaudxys.com.

Supported Languages

The application currently supports the following languages:

  • Spanish

  • English

title: Travels Hub
shortDescription: A comprehensive travel management solution for Microsoft 365.
Description:
Travels Hub is a modern travel request management solution for Microsoft 365, designed to streamline travel management processes, enhance customization, and improve collaboration within SharePoint and Microsoft Teams. Built for seamless integration with Microsoft 365, Travels Hub ensures security, reliability, and ease of use.

This solution includes Web Part, Full Page, Teams Tab, and Personal App SPFx components, providing flexibility in how approvals are managed across SharePoint and Teams. With automatic Single Sign-On (SSO), high uptime guarantees, and data securely stored within your Microsoft 365 tenant, your organization maintains full control over its information while benefiting from a secure and highly available platform.

Key features

  • Travel Calendar - provides a visual representation of travel requests with Month and Timeline views. Users can filter trips by department and quickly access key travel details.

  • Request Templates - allows you to create different travel request forms (e.g. Pre-Travel Requests, Travel Settlements, Mileage Reimbursements,, etc. )

  • Customizable travel form fields - build travel forms with numerous field types such as Text, Choice, Number, Currency, etc.

  • Role-based access control - allows you to set up the level of access that users have to the Travels Hub (regular user, manager, admin etc)

  • Flow designer with parallel and mixed approval workflows - allows administrators to design workflows that include parallel approvals and a mix of sequential and simultaneous approval paths.

  • Complex, multi-level conditions on approvals - configure detailed approval conditions that involve multiple levels and thresholds for advanced workflow customization.

  • Central audit log - provides a consolidated view of all changes, actions, and updates across the Travels Hub for compliance and review purposes.

  • Custom branding - you can custom brand your logo and colors.

  • Delegates - if a Manager is out of the office, Manager or Admin can delegate approval permissions to other users.

  • Assign approval to groups and individual users - flexibility to assign approval tasks either to specific individuals or entire groups for streamlined workflows.

  • Get manager user metadata from Microsoft 365 user profile - retrieves organizational metadata such as the manager's name and department from Microsoft 365 for enhanced approval routing and context.

  • Budgets with start and expiry dates - track and manage budgets with defined start and end dates for better expense control and transparency.

  • Automatic, real-time currency conversions - ensures accurate financial data by converting currencies automatically based on the latest exchange rates.

  • Contextual comments with replies - allows users to add comments directly within the context of a request and reply to existing comments for seamless collaboration and discussion.

  • Ability to create tasks and checklists - enables the creation of tasks or checklists for users or groups, enhancing collaboration


Learn More About Travels Hub

title: Blink View Directory
shortDescription: Makes it a breeze to find your coworkers and connect, like a smart friendly shortcut to your team.
Description:
A Smart Way to Find People and Get Things Done

Imagine having your entire company directory just a click away. Instantly find coworkers, see who's who in the org chart, and start a Microsoft Teams chat without opening five other apps.

There are two types of layout you can switch between of:

  • Details. Search results presented in the table view. Columns which presented in the table and their order can be changed with App settings.

  • Cards. Search results presented with native SharePoint control. Attributes used in the control not configurable.

Theme Variants

You can set a background color for each section on the SharePoint Modern Page. Employee Directory supports this functionality and automatically changes the theme of the web part according to the selected theme variant.

Change of the section background does not affect web parts located in other sections.

Dark Mode

Dark Mode supported on SharePoint Modern Page as well as in Microsoft Teams. The App switches the mode automatically in order to the current environment settings. In the case of the App is running on SharePoint Modern Page, it applied current theme settings.

What data can I access from Microsoft To Do within SharePoint?

Are there any costs associated with integrating Microsoft To Do with SharePoint?

title: Podcasts integration by adenin
shortDescription: Easily share your company's podcast episodes within SharePoint and Viva Connections
Description:
Ever thought about making your podcast workflow even more efficient and seamless? Integrate your podcast RSS feed with SharePoint via adenin and sit back as we take your productivity to the next level. With this integration, you can embed your podcast episodes right into your SharePoint as a web part, or Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extension (ACE) and enjoy a more unified Microsoft 365 experience.

✅ Display your podcast episodes right within SharePoint with a custom web part

✅ Enjoy a seamless experience within your Microsoft 365 environment

✅ Redefine productivity by viewing and sharing episodes from a single place

✅ Make life easier for developers with a platform that's customizable, yet simple to use

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint podcast integration

What data sources are available for podcasts?

Podcasts can be integrated using their RSS feeds, allowing you to display the latest episodes directly within SharePoint.

Is the podcast integration free?

Yes, SharePoint is one of the channels built-in into adenin.

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from podcasts) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →.

Who is the podcast integration for?

adenin’s SharePoint connector is a popular choice for Marketing, Internal Communications, and Media teams at small to large organizations. Integrating your podcast RSS feed into SharePoint is incredibly simple and doesn't require any technical know-how. The adenin platform completely handles the integration and then loads your data into an Adaptive Card layout that, in turn, will be embedded into SharePoint.

Do I have to be a developer to use the SharePoint integration with podcasts?

No, the integration is designed to help busy managers stay on top of their various workplace applications, where podcasts are just one of many examples (see others). As such, we designed many tools that reduce the amount of coding expected of users: Starting with the podcast integration, which you can set up yourself in just a few, completely code-free, steps (see instructions).

Then with the built-in Card designer we automatically generate a layout from your podcast data. You could tweak this further in the low-code designer, either yourself if you have some HTML-related skills, or with a little help from us – just reach out to one of the team.

Lastly, there will be the SharePoint integration which is self-explanatory to install. Just check the installation instructions for more details.

What SPFx components are included in this?

The Zendesk integration includes a SharePoint web part, SharePoint full page and Viva Connections Dashboard card (Adaptive Card Extension).

My Outlook Events - Your Ultimate SharePoint Add-In

Introducing My Outlook Events, the ultimate solution for efficiently managing calendar events and meetings in SharePoint! With two different layouts and responsiveness for various screen sizes, My Outlook Events will transform the way you handle your schedules.

Overview:

My Outlook Events is a powerful SharePoint add-in that seamlessly integrates with your existing calendar system, enabling you to effortlessly visualize, track, and manage all your appointments, events, and meetings for any selected time interval – be it a week, month, or quarter.   • Seamless Integration: Our add-in integrates seamlessly with your existing SharePoint environment, sparing you the need for any complex configurations or additional software installations. Get up and running in no time!

  • Secure and Privacy-Focused: My Outlook Events places utmost importance on data security and privacy. Rest assured that all your calendar events and sensitive information are encrypted and stored securely within your SharePoint environment.

Take Control of Your Schedule Now!

Make the most of your time and enhance your productivity with My Outlook Events. Say goodbye to disorganized calendars and inefficiency, and say hello to seamless scheduling and productivity.

Try My Outlook Events now and unlock the full potential of your SharePoint calendar experience! It's time to take control of your schedule like never before.

Description:
BizPortals Communication Suite

Take a Giant Leap Towards Uninterrupted Internal Communication

Effective internal communication is the cornerstone of operational success. Still, organizations struggle to fill the void created by the silo-centric setup, which hinders collaboration, innovation, and overall productivity.The all-new BizPortals communication suite, utilizing a robust SharePoint SPFx environment, is ready to propel your internal communication strategy forward. With BizPortals, you can easily customize your SharePoint environment with a range of web parts and services, such as

BizPortals Chat, integrated with Microsoft Teams, enables real-time messaging for smooth collaboration. Its 1:1 chats, project-specific channels, and auto-refresh feature help teams discuss tasks, share insights, and seek advice efficiently.

The BizPortals Calendar web part helps teams manage schedules by tracking events, meetings, and deadlines. With multi-calendar support, 60-day access to past or future events, and Outlook integration for quick event details, it enhances teamwork and resource planning.

BizPortals Headliners is a communication tool for sharing timely updates and critical information. It offers customizable layouts and content types, providing a dedicated space for articles, alerts, and notices to keep employees informed and engaged.

BizPortals Spotlight fosters a culture of recognition by showcasing important events, achievements, and contributions. Use it to share success stories, welcome messages, and upcoming events, keeping employees aligned with organizational activities.

9. BizPortals Ask a Guru

BizPortals Ask a Guru promotes collective intelligence and collaboration by enabling employees to seek solutions from designated experts. With role-based query access, status tracking, and email alerts, it provides a secure environment for engaging on complex issues.

10. BizPortals Employee Directory

A dedicated employee directory provides up-to-date colleague information like email, phone, department, title, and location in one place. Interactive layouts, search filters, and customizable fields make it easy to find coworkers and share information globally.

Simplify communication and boost productivity with the BizPortals Communication Suite.

Why Choose BizPortals Communication Suite?

Boost Productivity:

Reduce Complexity:

    • Minimal administrative overhead: Minimize the time and effort required to manage your SharePoint environment.

Experience the Benefits Today! These webparts can be used as SharePoint webparts for adding on a page, or add it in a full page mode, or as a Teams tab.
