title: Lists integration by adenin
shortDescription: Embed your SharePoint Lists and Document Libraries into web parts and Viva Connections Cards
Description:
Streamline your task and document management by integrating SharePoint Lists and document libraries with adenin’s powerful platform. This integration enables you to view and manage all your critical data from a single, unified dashboard. By embedding SharePoint Lists into your other pages and Viva Connections dashboard, you can simplify workflows, improve collaboration, and keep your team aligned—without switching between apps.

adenin provides an intuitive, developer-friendly interface, ensuring a smooth and seamless setup for embedding lists and document libraries directly into SharePoint or Viva Connections dashboards.

  • ✅ Access SharePoint Lists and SharePoint document libraries in one centralized dashboard

  • ✅ Tailor views with advanced filtering options to create dynamic list and document views for your SharePoint web part

  • ✅ Stay aligned with real-time updates, ensuring you’re always working with the latest information

  • ✅ Turn Viva Connections into an information hub by adding adaptive cards that display lists and document updates

Frequently Asked Questions about SharePoint Lists Integration

What can be embedded from this Lists integration?

You can embed Microsoft Lists, SharePoint document libraries, and filtered views of either of those. That's perfect for seeing what the latest issues in your project are or what documents are in a SharePoint site – all without having to leave your SharePoint page or Viva Connections dashboard experience.

Is the integration free?

Yes, the SharePoint Lists and document libraries integration is free with adenin’s platform. However, usage charges may apply based on your adenin plan. For details, please refer to adenin's pricing page.

What is adenin?

adenin is a platform that integrates all your work apps into a personal dashboard or other work applications like intranets and chatbots. While channels such as SharePoint are free to use, accessing and embedding certain data, like Microsoft Lists, may incur usage charges according to your adenin plan. See the pricing page for further details.

Who can benefit from integrating SharePoint lists into other SharePoint pages?

This integration is ideal for teams in IT, Operations, and Project Management, helping organizations manage lists, tasks, and document libraries more efficiently. The platform requires no technical expertise and supports a low-code interface for further customization.

Is technical knowledge required to set up this integration?

No, the integration is designed to be accessible for everyone, offering an easy setup with step-by-step guidance. adenin’s low-code Card designer ensures you can customize your dashboard without coding.

How is data security managed between SharePoint Lists and document libraries?

adenin employs secure OAuth standards to manage data access and sharing, ensuring that your data is not stored on adenin servers but securely transmitted between Microsoft Lists, SharePoint, and adenin. Users have full control over permissions and can revoke access at any time, complying with strict privacy policies.

With adenin’s integration, bring the full power of SharePoint Lists and document libraries into your SharePoint pages, boosting team productivity and creating a more cohesive digital workspace.

title: Sprinklr Advocacy
shortDescription: Keep your employees up-to-date with the latest social advocacy content on their Sharepoint pages.
Description:
Drive employee engagement with your advocacy program by streamlining content discovery and sharing for your advocates with the Sprinklr Advocacy app. Sprinklr advocacy helps top brands leverage the personal connections of their employees or loyal fans to drive authentic organic engagements on social media.

The Sprinklr Advocacy integration with Sharepoint will allow you to embed advocacy content into a web part on a Sharepoint page which increases the reach and discoverability of the content that you create on Sprinklr Advocacy.

With this integration, you can allow users to view and discover advocacy content from your Sharepoint intranet. With this app, you will get two types of web parts:

1. Recommended Content: This contains a consolidated list of featured posts meant to show the posts recommended for sharing.

2. Content Feed: This contains all the posts in the feed meant for users to browse and discover the content of their interest.

These web parts will allow you to display a stream of advocacy content that the user will be able to either view or share on their own social channels through Sprinklr platform.

How it works:

- Log in to your SharePoint instance

- Add one of the two web parts that are part of this app - Recommended Content or Content Feed.

- Click the edit button on the web part and add the feed URL and choose how many cards to show or in how many columns should the content appear.

- Specify the post feed refresh frequency in minutes.

- The social advocacy content will start appearing on the web parts, ready to be shared.

- Web part targeting: You can also define target user groups for web part visibility. You can choose Sharepoint groups, Microsoft 365 groups or Security groups in order to target the web part to specific users. In order to use Microsoft 365 groups or Security groups - you need to approve the following API permissions that the application requires:

1. User.Read.All

2. GroupMember.Read.All

These permissions are required to determine if the signed in user has a membership in any of the chosen Microsoft 365 or Security groups.

**Note: To get the feed URL for Step 3, please reach out to support@sprinklr.com.

Please also note that you must have a Sprinklr Advocacy paid license to use this app. If you are currently not a Sprinklr Advocacy customer, please navigate to https://www.sprinklr.com/demo/ to get a demo of the product. To enable this integration, please reach out to your Sprinklr Success Manager.

shortDescription: Soundbite™ enables next-generation collaboration by transforming internal & external communications.

title: Raytion Search Center for Microsoft Search
shortDescription: Search better, find faster - with the Raytion Search Center for Microsoft Search.
Description:
The Right Search Experience for Microsoft Search

The Raytion Search Center for Microsoft Search is an industry-leading search interface for Microsoft Search. As a

SharePoint native solution, it offers great search experiences and can be seamlessly integrated in all SharePoint sites,

such as your SharePoint Online portals, and of course into Microsoft Teams. It unites an extraordinary user experience

with the strong search capabilities of Microsoft Search. You can use it as your Microsoft 365 powered enterprise search,

as a sound and flexible foundation for news or knowledge management portals or use it in order to solve many more

knowledge retrieval use cases.

The Perfect User Journey

You can easily integrate your enterprise search into your SharePoint Online-based portal or into Microsoft Teams. With

its search as you type, users will receive their recommended links, matching recent documents, results for experts and

colleagues, or project spaces even while entering the search query. Thus, the search as you type significantly

simplifies navigating the digital workplace.

The search result page is the heart of the search application, which can be reached directly from the search as you

type. The Raytion Search Center for Microsoft Search comes with full support of configurable search verticals, result

blocks, filters, and a broad range of search result types in a prominent design. For instance, you can easily configure

an "everything" vertical, one for people and expert results or one for project spaces. The Raytion Search Center is

multilingual and natively supports the SharePoint mobile app as well as an integration as a SharePoint page directly as

a Microsoft Teams app.

Build Your Own Search

Various layout options through seperate webparts for:

  • Search box

  • Verticals

  • Filters and results

Efficient origanization of your search

  • Search box

  • Verticals

  • Access to a broad range of configurable filters

  • Access to a broad range of search result styles with insightful metadata including

    • People & Expert results

    • Recommended links

    • Preview functionality providing insights into SharePoint Online and third-party sources

  • Adaptable sorting options

Support of Advanced Integrations and Configurations

  • Zero query search, powered by the Microsoft Graph

  • Optional deep federation with SharePoint 2013, 2016, 2019 and SharePoint Server Subscription

  • Customizable queries and relevance for a tailored search experience

  • Optimal performance leveraging the Microsoft Search and SharePoint Online search APIs

  • Full compatibility with Raytion's connectors

  • Configuration compatibility with Microsoft's Graph connectors

  • Support of interleaved results between SharePoint Online, Teams documents and Microsoft Graph connectors

  • Search capability through Microsoft Teams and Outlook messages

  • Can easily be configured to run with Microsoft's Graph connectors

  • Viva Topics card

  • New: Advanced filter functionalities: conditional filters, mapping for multiselect filters and custom date intervals

  • New: Result card for SharePoint news articles

  • New: Advanced styling options in searchbox and cards: background colors, outlines and border radius and

Documentation, Trial Licenses and Support

Please contact us here or via email at search@raytion.com to receive your free trial license and installation

assistance.

For more information, please also refer to the product documentation.

title: Site Hub HBM
shortDescription: The Site Hub HBM App shows your users all their sites and teams to which they have permission
Description:
The Site Hub is the "must have" WebPart for every intranet and for every collaboration platform.

This WebPart creates order in your SharePoint portal and brings SharePoint and Microsoft Teams together.

It lists all Groups (Groups, Microsoft Teams) and SharePoint Sites (Sitecollection, Subsites).

The user only needs to have read permissions for this.

Use Cases

  • Your users can quickly navigate through your portal

  • The space-saving alternative to the Microsoft Sites WebPart

  • You can find your associated Groups, Microsoft Teams, Sites, and Site Collections

  • View all sites without display limit like Microsoft WebParts

  • Create landing pages with filters for departments, business lines, projects and sub-projects and wikis

Settings

  • Title changeable

  • Search filter with Keyword Query Language (KQL) from Micrsoft

  • Search for "Managed Crawled Properties" and thus also for "Property Bags"

  • Select the current site, all sites in the tenant, the hub or a specific hub as a search filter

  • Design the web part with various layouts based on the Microsoft theme

Licenses (Free vs. Premium)

You can try out the full scope of the WebPart.
The free version ends as soon as you use the search filter (KQL).

You will receive a message that a premium license is required, but you can evaluate everything at your leisure.

You can obtain a premium license on request via our support form, which is linked in the app.

shortDescription: The virtual whiteboard that connects teams so they can bring their best ideas to life.
Description:
Bring your best ideas to life with Lucidspark. With an infinite canvas and powerful dynamic features, your brainstorming sessions will be anything but boring. Ignite your ideation sessions by encouraging team participation, organizing thoughts and ideas with unique sorting features, and determining the best course of action by voting and weighing possible outcomes. And when it’s time for the next step, it’s easy to develop the workflows and other process documents that will help you turn promising ideas into an amazing reality. Choose from hundreds of templates to guide you in your next collaboration session, or start with a blank canvas and create your own.

The perfect combination of freestyle brainstorming and practical structure allows you to collaborate without chaos. Use Breakout Boards and the chat feature to share feedback with other participants. • Increase alignment within teams and across silos

• Communicate project objectives and responsibilities more effectively

This is collaboration at its finest. Explore the possibilities of Lucidspark.

title: Welcome by Accelerator 365
shortDescription: Give intranet visitors a personal greeting whilst highlighting important call to actions.
Description:
The Welcome web part adds a personal touch to your intranet homepage. Traditional intranet homepages or landing pages have typically struggled to deliver an individual and relevant landing experience.

With Welcome, you can create a personalized experience for the visitor by configuring a bespoke greeting message and sourcing information on their current location, such as the time, date, and weather. Organizations that operate in multiple geographic locations will also find the time zone feature a helpful addition.

Welcome offers you the following features:

  • Personalized greeting - Add a personal touch by configuring a personalized greeting message to welcome users to your SharePoint site. Have your greeting message change throughout the day or choose to override the greeting for a special occasion, for example the festive holiday season.

  • Local information - Localize content in Welcome to build a relevant and unique user experience. Welcome is able to detect the visitor’s location and display the appropriate weather, date, and time for their locale.

  • Call to action - Promote important announcements and company updates using the Slides feature. Slides gives editors the freedom to curate visual call to action links, and advanced controls means that you can also schedule, and audience target individual slides to appear in Welcome.

  • Customizable - Choose between the default layout options, including the all-rounder Featured layout, compact-looking Banner layout, and optimized Search layout. Or make Welcome look and work for you with the option to build a bespoke layout.

  • Viva Connections ready - Like all Accelerator apps, Welcome is compatible with Viva Connections. Part of Microsoft’s Viva Employee Experience platform, Viva Connections brings your intranet home page and content into Teams.

  • Responsive - Welcome is optimally designed for any and all devices, whether your users are accessing SharePoint on desktop browsers or mobile devices. Build a personal and relevant user experience for colleagues whilst spotlighting a key message.

Visit Accelerator 365 by Reply for support and more information about Welcome and our other apps.

title: LTAPPS Timesheet
shortDescription: It is a time tracking app that works with Teams, Outlook, M365 & Sharepoint
Description:
LTAPPS Timesheet is a powerful time-tracking app designed for seamless integration with SharePoint, Microsoft Teams (including mobile), and Microsoft 365 Apps. It provides an efficient solution for tracking and managing work hours, ensuring accurate time management across projects and tasks. Employees and managers can easily monitor regular work hours, overtime, and absences.

KEY FEATURES:

- Submit, Manage & Track Timesheets – Easily log work hours, overtime, and absences.

- Flexible Approval Workflow – Define unlimited approval steps, assign approvers as individuals, multiple users, or SharePoint groups, and set conditional approval forks.

- Customizable Timesheet Forms – Add, edit, or remove fields, and configure visibility based on approval steps.

- Adjust Completed Timesheets – Modify submitted timesheets when necessary.

- Project & Task-Based Tracking – Track time and costs by project, task, or individual.

- Delegation Feature – Assign timesheet approval tasks to another person when unavailable.

- Automated Email Notifications – Get notified upon approval, rejection, or delegation.

- Manager Submission on Behalf of Employees – Allows supervisors to submit timesheets for team members.

- Timesheet Submission Reminders – Automatically notify employees who have not submitted their timesheets.

- Absence & Overtime Management – Track leave balances and overtime hours, with fiscal year support for absences.

- Advanced Reporting & Export – Generate detailed reports by month, week, employee, department, or project, and export them to Excel.

- File Attachments – Attach supporting documents when submitting timesheets.

- Customizable Email Templates – Personalize notification emails.

- Microsoft Product Integration – Seamlessly connect with other Microsoft apps.

- Multi-Language Support – Translation feature for global teams.

- Modern & Mobile-Friendly UI – Accessible across all devices.

LTAPPS Timesheet simplifies time tracking, enhances project management, and optimizes workforce productivity.

The app supports components

- Teams Tab & Teams Personal Tab

Before we continue and configure Encodian Trigr, you must make sure you either have purchased a paid subscription or signed up for a trial. If you need to sign up for a trial please visit: Sign up for a Trigr Trial

  • Create the Encodian Trigr Action

  • Encodian Power Automate Trigger - First to market, Trigr allows users to start Power Automate Flows from any chosen SharePoint site.

  • Trigr Administration - Manage all your Trigr-related Flows with descriptions, run messages, titles and locations from the Encodian administration portal

  • SharePoint Integration - Users access your Flows from their familiar SharePoint Online interface

  • Select Multiple Documents - Enable your users to select one or more documents or list items simultaneously when launching Flows

  • Dynamic Forms - Build and configure dynamic forms to capture additional information from users when starting a Power Automate Flow

  • Usage and Audit History - View real-time usage reports and analytics to see by who, when and where your Flows were activated

Support

If you need assistance or have any questions regarding Encodian Trigr please review the following resources.

  • Encodian Support Portal

  • Contact Customer Support

Package Details

This offer comprises a SharePoint Online SPFX package which contains a list view command set that exposes Encodian Trigr actions to SharePoint document libraries and lists.

The Encodian Trigr SPFX package will request the following rights for accessing Microsoft API's by impersonating the current user. These rights are required for the SPFX command-set to enumerate the current users Active Directory and SharePoint group memberships.

  • Microsoft Graph - Group.Read.All

  • Microsoft Graph - User.Read

  • PDF & PDF/A Support - Easily convert and merge files to PDF or PDF/A format, including applying Optical Character Recognition (OCR) to existing PDF documents

  • Office Formats - Convert Office documents from legacy formats (doc, xls, etc) to newer file formats (docx, pptx, xlsx, etc.)

  • Secure - Password protect and encrypt PDF and Microsoft Word documents

  • Watermarks - Apply a watermark to PDF and Microsoft Word documents using free text or SharePoint metadata

  • Copy Metadata - Set document metadata and the SharePoint content type to be copied from the source file to the newly converted file

  • Copy Permissions - Set document permissions to be copied from the source file to the newly converted file

  • Remove Markup - Set whether tracked changes and document comments should be included or removed upon conversion to PDF format

  • Administration - Set global or site specific configurations covering all conversion features and defaults such as watermark text, colour, etc.

Deployment Steps

Getting started with Encodian Vertr couldn't be easier! You can sign up for a trial here, or install the app from the SharePoint store, or manually download and install the app.

  • Installation

  • Contact Customer Support

Package Details

This offer comprises a SharePoint Online SPFX package which contains a list view command set that exposes Encodian Vertr to SharePoint document libraries.

The Encodian Vertr SPFX package will request the following rights for accessing Microsoft API's by impersonating the current user. These rights are required for the SPFX command-set to access, create and update SharePoint documents and metadata.

shortDescription: Enrich your SharePoint content and captivate your audience with embedded videos and video channels.

Studio helps people and enterprises communicate, collaborate and learn with online video. Designed for end-to-end workflows, it allows anyone to easily create, edit and publish online videos anywhere, anytime and on any device.

Using the power of video, you can add value to your written content and teach, train and communicate more naturally in an engaging manner. Videos are managed in one platform, making sure that your content and confidential information, including personal data, is controlled according to all relevant rules and regulations.

Benefits

One tool fits all

Equipped with an intuitive design, Studio enables transparent internal communication, illustrative remote training, quick news updates, and much more.

  • Management and team leading

  • Onboarding and training

  • Updates and crisis communication

  • Customer support and engagement

Secure by design

  • GDPR compliance

Effortless video management

Dream Broker Studio makes it easy to manage your online video presence. With easy-to-use management tools and abundant visual and audio resources, you will be fully in control of your internal and external branding.

  • VideoHub for channel management

  • Access management

  • Integration tools

  • Shareable visual and audio resources

Work from wherever you are

With Dream Broker Studio, you will be able to communicate from at your desk or on the road, wherever you are. All you need is a smart device with a camera, and you and your team are good to go.

Learn more and book a demo with us today: https://dreambroker.com/product-studio/ or contact us for support: https://dreambroker.com/contact-us/. If you are already a customer of Dream Broker Studio, please reach to your contact person to enable SharePoint integration.

title: eShare Trusted Sharing
shortDescription: Allows external file sharing via eShare Trusted Shares to be created & managed within Microsoft 365.
Description:
The eShare Trusted Sharing application is an extension of the eShare Secure Data Collaboration Platform, which provides simple, secure & branded file sharing, data rooms, secure email and content collaboration with external parties. The application allows eShare Trusted Shares to be created from within Microsoft 365, including Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive and Outlook. In doing so it allows users to initiate their external file sharing and content collaborations with external parties using the familiar UI of Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive and Outlook, while also allowing users to benefit from the fine-grained controls, 100% custom branding, recipient link blocking avoidance, and collaboration productivity features that eShare uniquely brings to Microsoft 365.

In all cases shared files are always and only stored with Microsoft 365 and recipients do not require guest accounts to access shared files. Org-defined sharing policies, incorporating over 30 optional controls and mapped to your sensitivity labels and DLP templates, provides security and governance teams with full visibility and control over all external sharing. Organizations turn to eShare when external file sharing from Microsoft 365 natively is disallowed due to a lack of sharing governance and recipient data access and usage controls.

To use this application, the user must have an eShare subscription, which can be purchased via AppSource and Azure Marketplace. Guidance on installing the app can be found here.

title: Easy custom approval flows
shortDescription: A feature-rich task and process management solution integrated with all SharePoint lists.
Description:
Easy Custom Approval Flows

"Easy Custom Approval Flows" is an innovative SharePoint Online solution that

streamlines document approval processes and enhances task tracking by leveraging

a comprehensive suite of SPFx components. This solution package includes:

  • Web Part

  • Full Page

  • Teams Tab & Personal App

  • ListViewCommandSet

  • Form Customizer

These components work together to provide a seamless, integrated experience across

SharePoint and Microsoft Teams.

Approval Flows Component

The Approval Flows component automates document approval workflows,

ensuring smooth and secure transitions through customizable workflow stages.

Key features include:

  • Custom Workflow Setup: Create and configure approval flows with flexible,

    granular permissions. This ensures that only authorized users can access or modify

    documents at each stage of the process.

  • Real-Time Updates: With the integrated Form Customizer, users can take

    immediate action (Approve, Reject, or Save) on workflow tasks. Changes are instantly

    reflected in the workflow diagram and task tracking interfaces.

  • Integrated Interfaces:

    • ListViewCommandSet: Adds custom command actions to SharePoint lists for

      streamlined workflow management.

    • Web Part: Displays workflows directly on SharePoint pages for quick access

      and improved visibility.

    • Full Page: Offers a dedicated, centralized interface for managing workflows.

    • Teams Tab & Personal App: Extends the functionality into Microsoft Teams,

      allowing users to access and manage approval flows directly from their Teams workspace.

Flow Tasks Views Component

The Flow Tasks Views component enhances productivity by providing robust tools

to monitor and visualize task progress within SharePoint. Its key features include:

  • Multiple Visualization Options: Users can choose from Gantt chart, calendar, or list

    views to see tasks in the format that best suits their needs.

  • Customizable Filters: Filter tasks by group or priority, ensuring that the most

    critical workflows receive the necessary attention.

  • Integrated Management:

    • Web Part: Display task tracking views directly on SharePoint pages.

    • Full Page: Consolidate all task tracking data into a single, in-depth interface.

    • Teams Tab & Personal App: Access task tracking and management tools directly

      within Microsoft Teams, fostering real-time collaboration and consistent workflow oversight.

Key Benefits

  • Simplified Workflow Setup: Easily configure and manage approval flows with flexible

    customization options.

  • Enhanced Security: Granular permissions ensure robust document security throughout the

    approval process.

  • Real-Time Collaboration: Instant updates and integrated communication chains keep teams

    aligned and informed.

  • Seamless Integration: With components designed for SharePoint and Microsoft Teams (via

    Teams Tab & Personal App), users enjoy a consistent experience across platforms.

  • Comprehensive Task Visualization: Choose from multiple views to effectively manage and

    prioritize tasks.

Once you purchase a subscription, "Easy Custom Approval Flows" is instantly activated, making all these

SPFx components available to every user within your SharePoint environment and Microsoft Teams—

ensuring a streamlined, efficient workflow management experience.

Keep Track of All Company and Team Events!

Main Features:

title: BizPortals Quality Incident Suite
shortDescription: Features forms and a structured multi-flow workflow for accountability and compliance.
Description:
BizPortals Quality Incident Suite

Streamline Incident Management

A cornerstone of our robust SharePoint-based Quality Management System (QMS), the Incident Management Suite is designed for efficiency and compliance. It offers a structured workflow with four distinct stages:

title: CardioLog Analytics SaaS
shortDescription: Unlock Actionable Insights Across SharePoint & Microsoft 365.
Description:
CardioLog Analytics

CardioLog Analytics provides in-depth, actionable reporting for SharePoint and Microsoft 365 apps such as Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Viva Engage, empowering organizations to optimize usability, collaboration, engagement, and productivity within their digital workspaces.

Built specifically for SharePoint and Microsoft 365, supporting all versions of SharePoint (both on-premise and online), CardioLog Analytics offers organizations intelligent data insights to drive better decision-making, improve user experiences, and boost overall business performance.

Available as an On-premises or SaaS solution powered by Power BI, CardioLog Analytics enables companies to slice and dice data by user attributes like department, location, and role, as well as content type and metadata, giving organizations full visibility into their digital environments.

With hundreds of enterprise, SMB, and government customers and millions of monitored users, CardioLog Analytics has been a trusted leader in SharePoint analytics since 2005, delivering vital insights to help businesses thrive in the modern workplace.

Key Features:

  • Comprehensive SharePoint & Microsoft 365 Reporting

    Gain visibility into user behavior, content engagement, and platform performance to drive data-backed decisions across SharePoint, Teams, Viva Engage, and more.

  • Tailored Insights for Business Impact

    Slice and dice analytics data by user and content attributes to uncover actionable insights, optimize workflows, and improve productivity.

  • Boost User Engagement & Adoption

    Identify inactive users, trending content, and top contributors, and drive engagement with targeted campaigns.

  • Power BI-powered Dashboards

    Leverage fully customizable dashboards that provide actionable insights in a visually intuitive format, empowering stakeholders to make strategic decisions.

  • Enterprise-grade Security & Compliance

    Built on Microsoft Azure, CardioLog Analytics ensures top-level data privacy and GDPR compliance, delivering secure analytics to organizations worldwide.

  • The solution as a Application Customizer capability.

What You Can Learn with CardioLog Analytics:

  • Which sites, pages, and documents are viewed the most

  • Which users and groups have low engagement and require training

  • Which search phrases are trending

  • What content is underutilized

  • Who the top contributors are

  • How much time users spend in the portal

  • What the common navigation paths are

  • Which pages have slow load times

  • And more...

Getting Started

To use this app, an active CardioLog Analytics subscription is required. Don’t have a subscription? Start your free trial here or request a personal demo to explore how CardioLog Analytics can transform your SharePoint and Microsoft 365 environments.

For any questions, feel free to contact us.

Note:

Data refreshes once a day, and new content will appear in reports within 24 hours of configuration in CardioLog Analytics SaaS.

title: Todoist integration by adenin
shortDescription: Easily show your live Todoist data inside SharePoint and Viva Connections
Description:
Ever thought about making your Todoist workflow even more efficient and seamless? Integrate Todoist with SharePoint via adenin and sit back as we take your productivity to the next level. With this integration, you can embed Todoist API data right into your SharePoint as a web part, or Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extension (ACE) and enjoy a more unified Microsoft 365 experience.

✅ Display your Todoist data right within SharePoint with a custom web part

✅ Enjoy a seamless experience within your Microsoft 365 environment

✅ Redefine productivity by viewing and managing tasks from a single place

✅ Make life easier for developers with a platform that's customizable, yet simple to use

Frequently asked questions about SharePoint Todoist integration

What data sources are available for Todoist?

Todoist provides the following data sources: Tasks (See tasks from your Todoist account) and Create Task (Create a new task in your Todoist account)

Is the Todoist integration free?

Yes, SharePoint is one of the channels built-in into adenin

What is adenin?

Adenin is a platform that integrates all kinds of work apps into a personal dashboard as well as your other work applications, such as intranets or chatbots. Bear in mind that, even though channels such as SharePoint are free, the use of adenin (including using data from Todoist) incurs usage charges according to your plan. See the pricing page for details →

Who is the Todoist integration for?

adenin’s SharePoint connector is a popular choice for Project Managers, Developers and Teams that rely on task management tools. The data sources that are built into Todoist (see above) are incredibly simple to integrate into SharePoint and don't require any technical know-how. The adenin platform completely handles authenticating with Todoist and then loads your data into an Adaptive Card layout that, in turn, will be embedded into SharePoint.

Do I have to be a developer to use the SharePoint integration with Todoist?

No, the integration is designed to help busy professionals stay on top of their various workplace applications, where Todoist is just one of many examples (see others). As such, we designed many tools that reduce the amount of coding expected of users: Starting with the Todoist integration, which you can set up yourself in just a few, completely code-free, steps (see instructions).

Then with the built-in Card designer we automatically generate a layout from your Todoist data. You could tweak this further in the low-code designer, either yourself if you have some HTML-related skills, or with a little help from us – just reach out to one of the team.

Lastly, there will be the SharePoint integration which is self-explanatory to install. Just check the installation instructions for more details.

How does adenin ensure my Todoist data is safely delivered to SharePoint?

We use the secure OAuth standard which means you authorize adenin accessing your Todoist data and in turn authorize us to share this data with SharePoint. Both of these authorizations can be revoked by you at any point through the Linked accounts menu (requires user account). No data is ever stored on adenin servers, instead it is directly sent to the client (in this case SharePoint) who will treat it in accordance with their privacy policy. Please also check out our Privacy Policy for more details.

title: Helpdesk Works
shortDescription: Helpdesk is a tool for Teams and SharePoint to manage, assign, filter, and export support requests.
Description:
Overview

Helpdesk Works is a SharePoint Framework (SPFx) tool designed for seamless use in both SharePoint and Microsoft Teams to streamline the management of support requests.

It allows users to submit issues, assign responsibilities, apply filters, and generate Excel reports for efficient tracking and analysis.

Key Features

  • Centralized Ticket Management: Submit, track, and resolve support requests with an intuitive, user-friendly interface accessible in SharePoint and Teams.

  • Automated Workflows: Streamline ticket assignments, notifications, and escalations to ensure timely resolution and reduce manual effort.

  • Custom Categories & Permissions: Define custom ticket categories and subcategories. Fine-tune access with role-based, row-level, and item-level permissions.

  • Real - Time Analytics & Reporting: Visualize trends, monitor team performance, and export detailed reports for actionable insights.

  • Seamless Microsoft 365 Integration: Leverages SharePoint for secure data storage and integrates with Outlook for email notifications and Teams collaboration.

  • Bulk Operations & Data Export: Filter, search, and export ticket data to Excel for in-depth analysis and compliance.

  • Flexible Deployment: Easily add as a web part to any SharePoint page or as a Teams tab, supporting multiple sites and channels.

  • Comprehensive Admin Tools: Manage settings, categories, and user permissions with a robust admin dashboard.

Integration Highlights

  • SharePoint Online Compatibility: Installs as a web part on modern SharePoint team sites for seamless access and management.

  • Teams Support: Add Chandra Helpdesk as a tab in Teams, enabling users to submit and track requests without leaving their collaboration environment.

  • Outlook Integration: Automated email notifications keep users and support staff informed of ticket updates and resolutions.

Installation and Configuration

  • Requires SharePoint Online and admin access for deployment and setup.

  • Install via SharePoint's “Add an App” feature and activate in Site Contents.

  • Configure permissions—Site Owner rights are required for installation and configuration, but both owners and members can access the helpdesk.

  • Add the web part to any SharePoint page or Teams channel, complete the setup, and start managing support requests immediately.

Modules Overview

  • Ticket Dashboard: View, filter, and manage all support requests with visual status indicators.

  • Request Submission: Users can submit new tickets with detailed descriptions, attachments, and CCs.

  • Analytics & Reporting: Access visual charts and exportable reports on ticket volume.

  • Admin Controls: Configure categories, and customize helpdesk settings from a centralized dashboard.

Compatibility

  • Compatible with SharePoint Online and Microsoft Teams(as a tab in standard channels).

  • Integrates with Microsoft 365 services for authentication and notifications.

  • Supports role - based access for both owners(admins) and members(end users).

Summary

Empower your organization with a unified helpdesk solution that brings together the best of SharePoint, Teams, and Microsoft 365.

Centralize support requests, automate workflows, and gain actionable insights—all within your existing collaboration tools.

Getting Started

Follow our Installation Guide for easy setup and configuration.

Support

Need help? Visit our Helpdesk Support page for assistance.

title: inPerson
shortDescription: inPerson helps you manage your flexible office hours and look up your team members' current location
Description:
What inPerson does

inPerson helps you manage your company's flexible office hours.

First, register floor plans and tag each space as shared or designated. Shared spaces are self-service that users can book, while designated spaces are assigned by the admins.

Users can then leverage the floor plans to:

  • Book office space and set Outlook reminders.

  • Check occupancy to make decisions about being present in the office on a given day.

  • Look up their team members' current location.

The value proposition

The inPerson app is entirely built on Microsoft 365.

  • Security: data is stored in Microsoft 365, with access restricted to team members.

  • Users can easily extend the app with their own customizations, such as list views, Power Automate workflows, or Power BI reports.

  • No proprietary format. Users can bring their own floor plans in accessible SVG format, for example built with Visio.

Installation

Install inPerson from Microsoft AppSource to the SharePoint App Catalog. Then you’ll be able to sync with Teams and add the app as a tab in a Microsoft Teams team.

Usage

The first time you open the inPerson app, under Settings click on “Initialize Data Store”. The app will set up the Lists and the library needed to store the data. This will take a minute and only needs to be done once for each Microsoft Teams team.

You can then start registering buildings, adding floor plans, and flagging each space as shared or designated. Users will use the interface to book spaces, get information about building occupancy, and find their teammates.

title: Lightning Tools Data Viewer
shortDescription: The Data Viewer enables users to build data views and charts on SharePoint and External Content.
Description:
Business users of Microsoft SharePoint or Microsoft Teams will be able to build data views and charts on SharePoint list content, Azure SQL Database tables and views, Excel workbooks, OData services, Connected Web Parts and external data.

Data views provide your data within a SharePoint list type view that contains features such as column grouping, conditional formatting, aggregate functions and data formatting. If you prefer, data can be displayed in the format of a chart such as a Pie, Bar, Column, Line or Surface area chart.

Without code, users can style the data view and chart views for display within a SharePoint page or Microsoft Teams tab.

SharePoint Framework components included: WebPart, AdaptiveCardExtension

title: Zynyo Sign for SharePoint Online
shortDescription: Send documents from your SharePoint environment for a legally valid digital signature.
Description:
With the integration of ZYNYO into SharePoint, you can have all documents signed digitally (internally and externally) easily and legally. Digitally signing via ZYNYO is easy to use and provides the highest degree of legal validity. Characteristics ZYNYO platform:

- Versatility of signing options (mouse or 2FA)

- Online identification through bank (e.g. iDIN), passport app or eID (electronic identity)

- Fully Dutch platform and helpdesk

User friendly

Because all your (email) contacts are recognized by the ZYNYO app, you can quickly and easily send your documents from your own environment. You can also track the status of your signing request and get a notification when the signed document arrives in your Sharepoint environment.

Reliable & Secure

ZYNYO's signing platform is extremely secure and is trusted by municipalities, notaries, banks, hospitals and insurers.

The ZYNYO app also offers the possibility of online identification, where KYC obligations can be met easily and efficiently (no more risk with a paper copy or scan of an ID document).

ZYNYO's platform complies with Dutch and European (eIDAS) legislation and the highest privacy (AVG) and security requirements. All levels of digital signing, ordinary, advanced and qualified, are available within ZYNYO's Signing Service. For all documents, ZYNYO has the right solution.

Signing process

ZYNYO's SharePoint App makes it easy to send documents from SharePoint for signing. Select a document, enter the signatories and choose a means for the signer to sign (e.g. mouse scribble, SMS, BankID or eID) to send the signing request. After sending the signing request, the signers receive an email with a link to a secure environment where these documents can be read and then digitally signed. No special app or software is needed and it can be done on any device (mobile, tablet, laptop or other device). The provider of the document is kept informed of the status and completion of the signing. After signing, the document, with a Deed of Signature, is stored in the same SharePoint folder. The Deed of Signature contains the audit trail where all actions and key attributes of the signers are recorded (name, date received/signed and authentication means). The signers automatically receive the signed document via email.

More information

For more information on digital signing via SharePoint, check out our webinar at: https://youtu.be/jV8TeHs-sHk

This integration is a List View Command Set that adds commands for signing documents and viewing sign requests to each document library.

shortDescription: An online PDF markup tool that can update files in SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, and OneDrive.
Description:
The PDF88 for SharePoint, Microsoft Teams and OneDrive allows you to open PDF files within the browser to annotate, draw, highlight, add text or images, and apply stamps and signatures. After your revisions are completed, you can download the file or save back a layered PDF to SharePoint for future editing.

The PDF Editor is easily installed and available in the context menu in all SharePoint document libraries. For Microsoft Teams the PDF Editor can be installed as a MS Teams Tab, allowing you access to PDF files within that team and also within your OneDrive.

After download and installation you will need to register with us for a subscription license. The PDF Editor is FREE to try, with unlimited usage in the first 7 days. After the trial period you can continue to use it FREE for 1 user / 1 tenant with up to 10 saves per month. Paid versions are available which allow unlimited tenants / users / saves per month for a user fee.

title: Modern Data Visualizer
shortDescription: Create highly flexible and personalized SharePoint data viewing and filtering experiences in minutes
Description:
The 'Modern Data Visualizer' solution is a set of SharePoint Online modern Web Parts allowing SharePoint super users, webmasters and developers to create highly flexible and personalized data viewing and filtering experiences in minutes! It is the enhanced product version of the well known "PnP Modern Search" open-source solution that we also originally created.

What's included?

The solution offers the following Web Parts:

  • Data Visualizer: Retrieve and display data from multiple sources using customizable templates (cards, list, carousel, people, etc.). Can be used alone in a page.

  • Data Filters: Filter data source results using mutliple formats (taxonomy, date range, combo box, check box, etc.).

  • Data Verticals: Browse data as verticals (i.e categories)

  • Search box: Search for data source results using free query text and/or suggestions.

By getting this solution, you also benefit from an advanced extensibility model allowing SharePoint Framework developers to customize the solution according to their requirements if default features don't do the job.

The supported extensions are:

  • Custom data sources.

  • Custom layouts.

  • Custom web components.

  • Custom suggestions providers.

  • Custom Handlebars customization (helpers, partials, etc.).

What can I do with it?

As this solution is truly a swiss army knife, it can be used for many purposes and for multiple projects in your organization. This goes from building a complete custom search center with connected Web Parts to a simple static set of links with custom HTML displayed on a page. Any data coming from a supported data source can be displayed the way you want in a SharePoint modern page.

Supported browsers

Here is the list of supported browsers:

  • Chrome

  • Firefox

  • Edge

  • Edge Chromium

  • Brave

  • Safari

Documentation

A complete documentation can be found online. We also provide tutorials and how-tos video tutorials to accomplish common scenarios.

Issues, questions, feedback?

For any issue, question or feedback, please use the official GitHub repository. We will be happy to help you!

title: SharedMailboxCalendarWebPart
shortDescription: Present a shared mailbox calendar like "outlook calendar" on a sharepoint page.
Description:
With this solution you can easily display the calendar from a shared mailbox in SharePoint.

It is suitable for all those who want to record appointments in Outlook and make them available to a larger target group.

The webpart offers monthly, weekly and daily views and supports navigation in the calendar.

If required, a color can be defined for each category. If no categeory is selected, the defined background color is used.

The day view can be limited by setting the from and to time.

Requests and ideas for further development are welcome via info@flowsoft.ch.

title: RePoint Panorama
shortDescription: RePoint Panorama let you search in Employees, Groups and Microsoft Teams with an all-in-one solution
Description:
RePoint Panorama is a powerful module that enables you to search across the whole organization on Employees, Groups and Teams. It can be customized so that the employees have the suitable restrictions.

3-in-1

With Panorama you get 3 products in one solution. By an easy and user-friendly configuration of Panorama, you can integrate the WebPart in your SharePoint and fulfill 3 needs in one.

1. Search Employees

RePoint Panorama can, among other things, be used to search for employees in the company and view relevant data about the employee. The solution is based on Office 365 technology, and retrieves its information from Azure Active Directory. If some users are not created in Active Directory, data can be retrieved via a simple list. With a single click, the employee's Delve page opens, with all the information we know from Delve (email, phone number, organization, etc.).

2. Search Office 365 Groups

With search in Office Groups, you get a simple and user-friendly search function that can be used to search in, for example, the company's projects as well as other solutions based on Groups. If you do not remember the exact name of the group you are looking for, related titles will appear.

3. Search Microsoft Teams

From a central location on the intranet, you can easily search for the Microsoft Teams you are a member of, and with a single click access your work areas. This feature ties SharePoint and Microsoft Teams together.

This feature also includes a fully customized Organizational Chart.

As something new, the employee search can now be used to show the organization chart for the employee in question. The module can be used to display organization charts from the CEO level, or an excerpt from the underlying department.

Continues updates

As for all the RePoint products, RePoint Panorama is constantly under development and with an active subscription, you are automatically guaranteed access to all new functions.

Fully functional 30-days trial

When accessing RePoint Panorama for the first time, a fully functional 30-days trial will automatically be created for you. To purchase the unlimited Add-in, please contact extri:co (info@extrico.dk / +45 96 26 87 00)

How to add this app

The easiest way to get this app is by accessing the store through the app catalog and add the app from there (make sure you're the site collection administrator of the app catalog).

If you try to add the app through a normal site collection you will have to request the app. This way the site collection app administrator receives an email from where he can click a link to approve the request before the app can be used.

If you for some reason do not get an email about the request, you can go into the app catalog site and there you will find the app request ready to be approved.

For more information see this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tDR5BX1QY0Q

title: MeetingRoomMap WebParts
shortDescription: Show locations on your own floorplans.
Description:
A collection of web parts for displaying locations on custom maps/floorplans.

As an administrator, upload images of company floor plans and map meeting rooms and users (from meeting rooms and users defined in Azure AD), or other custom category locations to these floorplans. The web parts then enable all users in the company to search for and view mapped locations on the uploaded floorplans. There is a separate web part for each location type:

  • MRM Colleague (search and display the location of other users)

title: Limeade for Viva Connections
shortDescription: Limeade  surfaces in-the-moment well-being content and activities for Viva Connections.
Description:
Activation of Limeade for Viva Connections requires a subscription to Limeade Well-Being. To learn more about Limeade and Limeade Well-Being visit www.limeade.com

Harness the power of Limeade Well-Being to boost discovery, registration and participation for an integrated user experience that connects, aligns and inspires collaboration within Microsoft Viva Connections.

  • Expand listening and care where employees spend their time.

  • Deliver intuitive and intelligent well-being experiences throughout the day.

  • Drive benefits discovery, registration, participation and positive well-being outcomes.

  • Infuse in-the-moment tranquility and energy–nudges of encouragement when they’re needed.

Limeade for Viva Connections offers Limeade customers access to 8 adaptive cards that drive awareness and participation within their well-being, engagement and inclusion programs and initiatives.

  1. Limeade Program Card: Provide simple, all-in-one access to well-being programs and initiatives.

  2. Limeade My Well-being Card: Nudge employees to take a well-being assessment that delivers personalized results and activities to support their well-being journey.

  3. Limeade Featured Activity Card: Highlight featured activities to promote awareness and participation within targeted well-being initiatives and activities.

  4. Limeade My Activities Card: Connect employees to personalized well-being activity plans with the Viva dashboard.

  5. Limeade Listening Card: Amplify employee listening initiatives with customizable weekly pulses, engagement or inclusion surveys and integrated tools for providing feedback and navigating company resources.

  6. Limeade Discover Activities Card: Guide employees through the discovery of well-being activities to inspire personal growth and learning.

  7. Limeade Steps Card: Promote physical health and fitness with nudges to get moving and easy access to viewing steps, calories burned and distance traveled.

  8. Limeade Resources Card: Leverage Limeade app extensions to connect employees to company resources such as benefits wallets, HR policies and more.

Technical Requirements:

  • App requires a Limeade product Subscription to properly function

title: CharterDesk
shortDescription: CharterDesk is a meeting room & desk booking tool to assist employees in finding & reserving space
Description:
CharterDesk is a meeting room & desk booking tool to assist employees in finding & reserving bookable office space whether in Microsoft Teams or SharePoint. CharterDesk allows you to create unique floor plans by uploading your own floor layout. Using the map editor you can draw and create reservable spaces on your floor plan.

Employees can quickly browse available spaces within your office's floor plan and easily create reservations for that space on a give date / time. Employees can manage all their office space reservations from the home page of your SharePoint site or from with their Microsoft Teams site. CharterDesk will send emails and create calendar events when users make reservations within the system.

CharterDesk is available for free to try. The free version allows 1 floor plan with 3 desks or seats. The paid versions allow for unlimited floors with 25 desks / seats for floor.

We recommend reviewing the knowledge base for instructional videos on setup and configuration. Any issues you can reach out through the chat window on the website. Leave us your email there with a message and we will get back to you.

title: Ordinics AI
shortDescription: SharePoint add-on that helps users to specify and use keywords across documents.
Description:
The Ordinics AI is a SharePoint add-in that helps users to specify and use keywords across documents in your organization.

The extension is designed to work on a document library. You will interact with the extension through its buttons, hooked into the command bar of a certain list or the context menu of selected items.

The Ordinics AI has two main features:

Keywords:

Keywords are certain words that appear multiple times throughout a file and have a certain relevance (prepositions, though appearing often, are not of particular importance, thus usually they aren’t keywords). The Ordinics AI can automatically identify keywords in your documents and allow users to manage them and add them to the term store on SharePoint site.

Summaries:

Summaries represent a group of sentences that were deemed of particular importance from the original file, such as those that contain keywords. Those sentences are stored in separate files, in separate document libraries.

Supported countries:

Ordinics AI is available in all markets.

Supported languages:

Czech, English

title: QuickApps-qChartView
shortDescription: Leverage 30+ chart types to visualize and display your data on BI and dashboard
Description:
Easily create visually compelling SharePoint charts and dashboards that include dynamic filtering, drill-down reporting, and a rich user experience. Given that there is no native chart web part in SharePoint, qChartView charting solutions are ideal for BI and dashboard scenarios. qChartView offers an amazing user experience and further adds value to application development.

Salient Features:

• Users can aggregate chart data from across multiple SharePoint lists, sites, site collections, and web applications

• Customize chart elements such as fonts, labels, backgrounds, canvas, logos, tooltips, and much more to create a rich user experience

• Supports point-and-click code-free configuration of chart elements

• 30 plus chart types including scatter, donut, pie, and line to satisfy a wide range of visual, BI, and dashboard requirements

Use Cases:

• Can be used to visualize Sales data such as the revenue generated, opportunities, leads, revenue by zone or quarter, and more in the form of charts. Enables the stakeholders to view and analyze the data at a glance.

• Can be used by Finance departments to provide metrics, KPIs, forecasts, and other critical information that can aid decision-making and help to create an effective course of action.

• Can be used by HR professionals to make workplace decisions, explain quantitative trends to non-technical audiences, and engage and persuade others about their messages.

The solution package contains SPFx webpart component.

The solution has to be added manually to any new site as it will not deploy to the complete tenant.

title: Konsolute Onboard
shortDescription: Onboard on your new hire the right way by uniquely tailoring their onboarding!
Description:
Onboard is a revolutionary new hire onboarding platform built for organisations consuming Microsoft 365. Onboard allows you to define your organisation’s onboarding experience and further refine this by allowing hiring managers and departments to create specific onboarding experiences. Onboard's easy, intuitive and highly configurable interface allows new hires to go through your organisation’s introductory videos, policies and procedures, links, recommended communities (Microsoft Teams, Yammer and SharePoint) based upon your skills and interests.


  • Welcome Onboard - Onboard enables you to customise your onboarding experience by tailoring your processes around your new hire. Ensure that your new hire understand your corporation's vision and you and your new hire remain compliant by adhering to regulatory requirements by completing mandatory training and compliance videos, links and documents.
  • Discover your organisation - Onboard mitigates these woes by enabling you, as an organisation, to introduce your new hire to the relevant people and communities (Yammer, SharePoint and Microsoft Teams). Hiring departments, can further suggest communities that new hire should join. Hiring managers can refine this by suggesting their own communities. Onboard intelligently recommends and suggest communities based your profile information such as role, skills, interests and their location.
  • Built for your Microsoft 365 - Onboard is built from the ground up specifically for the Microsoft 365 platform. It leverages features such as SharePoint, Yammer, Microsoft Teams and Delve to provide your organisation and new hires with a seamless integrated experience.
  • Unified onboarding experience - You're hiring managers are most likely going to have a better understand of your new hire's role. Onboard enables your hiring managers to further enhance the your new hire onboarding experience by tailoring it to the role they'll be performing. Utilise your hiring managers knowledge and expertise to suggest, recommend and introduce your new hire to the organisation.
  • Intelligent Recommendation & Suggestion of Communities - An organisation with a thriving community can consist of thousands of communities created within Yammer, SharePoint and Microsoft Teams. Discovering these communities can either be by pot luck or through the knowledge of your colleagues. Onboard enables your organisation, hiring business unit/department as well as the hiring manager to recommend and suggest communities. Onboard also uses your information within Delve such as your skills and interests to further enhance the recommended communities. Onboard currently supports Microsoft Teams, Yammer and SharePoint sites.


This application requires Azure Active Directory admin permissions initially, so that we can install and setup the necessary components on your tenancy.

title: Zignals DWP
shortDescription: Your workplace of the future - Take collaboration in your company to the next level!
Description:
What is Zignals DWP?

Take collaboration in your company to the next level with the Zignals Digital Workplace (DWP)! Are you introducing Microsoft 365 or searching for ways to improve user experience?

With Zignals DWP you can address the following challenges in your organization:

No central point of entry?

Where in the digital workplace should employees start their day, if they have no central overview?

Information overflow

Employees get huge amounts of information from various sources every day. How should they prioritize what's important?

User adoption

What can be done to lower entry barriers and help employees adopt new technologies and tools?

Change management

The digital workplace is growing rapidly. How can employees be helped to cope with the changes?

With our digital workplace portal, users are offered a central point of entry, with a clear overview. Users get a portal which is easy to use and are taken by the hand when changes are rolled out.

The digital workplace consists of the five different WebParts...

- My Meetings

- My Tasks

- My Apps

- My Documents

- My Teamwork

...which serves as the users' overview of their digital workplace.

Installation

When installing the Zignals DWP, you will be presented with an easy to use installation wizard. The wizard will help you setup everything you need! A simple SharePoint list for your apps and a page will of the Zignals WebParts.

The installed version can be used on a production environment, however you will need to contact us to activate your license. If you do not purchase a license, users will be presented with a dialog upon opening the page with the WebParts.

You can find a guide here on how to use the Zignals DWP!

title: Solu 365 Portfolio
shortDescription: Browse, search and manage Microsoft 365 Groups and Microsoft Teams in your tenant.
Description:
Solu 365 Portfolio is an app (SPFx Web Part) that you can add to modern SharePoint Site Pages. For example, you may use Solu 365 Portfolio to provide a helicopter view of all your Microsoft 365 Groups and Microsoft Teams to your intranet users.

Solu 365 Portfolio gives your a visibility, but not necessarily access to, all Microsoft 365 Groups.

The app has two tabs, one for My Groups and one for All Groups. In all Groups you can request the Group's owners to invite you in ones you are not already a member of.

As an owner of a Group, you can manage its members, either in Microsoft Teams or in Outlook. As an owner you can also archive or delete a Group with one click, from one place - the Solu 365 Portfolio.

By making your Groups discoverable and letting non-members request to join them, you will create a culture of open and effective collaboration. For help and tips on how to configure Solu 365 Portfolio, please contact us at info@soludigital.fi.

title: SigningCloud Document Signing
shortDescription: Get work done with ease on SigningCloud and sign anytime, anywhere safely!
Description: SigningCloud is a seamless and affordable document review and digital signing solution for all types of organisations and business. In addition to heightened measures of security-embedded features such as Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), multi-layered encryption and more, the SigningCloud platform is also supported by a number of local Certificate Authorities(CAs), with plans to include more universal CAs in the future – enabling the platform to be a globally-trusted one. SigningCloud is also integrated with Alfresco Software and Microsoft SharePoint and can be integrated with your current mobile applications upon request. With SigningCloud, secure online signing is ensured – meaning that the documents on the platform can never be fraudulently-modified, amended or tampered with. In addition, SigningCloud offers its users an UNLIMITED documents and signers feature, allowing users to upload, review send and sign countless of documents to as many signers as they wish, provided that each signer is an account holder of the platform. Thanks to SigningCloud, businesses and individual users no longer need to rely on printing, scanning or faxing their important documents – nor will they need to waste precious time and resources chasing after signees for signatures. SigningCloud’s attractive packages and plans are carefully curated with businesses and enterprises in mind, with specially added-features that will be advantageous to anyone in the corporate world. Users can also opt to customise a package that will be tailor-made to suit their every need and want. Review, send and sign documents online quickly, seamlessly and safely with a convenient and hassle-free way of digital signing that you can trust. Sign with confidence, sign with SigningCloud.

title: Moveworks on Viva
shortDescription: Moveworks is the AI platform that powers the best places to work.
Description:
Moveworks is the AI platform that powers the best places to work.

Today, employees deal with endless distractions: they wait days to get IT support, search through dozens of systems to find the new HR policy, and don’t learn about critical changes until it’s too late. Moveworks lets them focus on what really matters. Our AI platform gives employees support in seconds, just by asking for what they need, and enables leaders to prevent problems in advance. With Moveworks, companies like Hearst, DocuSign, and Broadcom make work magic.

*This app requires an existing purchase agreement and configuration by Moveworks.

To become a Moveworks customer, request a demo at moveworks.com/request-demo.

How it works:

Moveworks intercepts IT, HR, finance, legal, and facilities issues — no matter where employees ask for help. Our platform then uses natural language understanding (NLU), conversational AI, and probabilistic machine learning to resolve those issues, right on Microsoft Teams.

Key features:

Here are just a few of the ways our customers use Moveworks:

- Scaling IT support without adding headcount by automatically provisioning software, troubleshooting IT issues, resetting passwords, unlocking accounts, updating email group updates, and automating the ticket lifecycle.

- Making the employee life cycle easy for HR teams by managing new hire onboarding, offering payroll and tax information, and answering routine HR questions.

- Ensuring compliance with finance policies by answering questions about expenses and compensation.

- Streamlining work from anywhere by handling building access requests, providing office maps, and allowing employees to order new hardware.

- Increasing engagement with employee comms by sending targeted messages through Teams, including software migration alerts, system outages, open enrollment, and training reminders.

About Moveworks:

Founded in 2016, Moveworks has raised $315 million in funding, at a valuation of $2.1 billion. We’ve been named to the Forbes AI 50 list for three consecutive years, while earning recognition as the Best Chatbot Solution at the 2021 AI Breakthrough Awards.

Requested API Permissions:

User.Read, user_impersonation - These permissions allow Moveworks to authenticate and authorize users.

Installation Instructions:

1. Install the application via the SharePoint admin site.

2. Go here to consent to the requested API permissions: https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/adminconsent?client_id=45635da8-7a7e-41bb-abfa-085c7502c497&redirect_uri=https://www.moveworks.com/viva-installed

3. Navigate to the SharePoint admin site's API permissions page and approve both requested permissions.

4. You will now be able to add the Viva tile to your dashboard.

5. Finally, request a demo at https://www.moveworks.com/request-demo to become a customer.

title: Mesh
shortDescription: Join immersive spaces with the tools you use every day, Microsoft Teams.
Description:
We are bringing the power of Microsoft Mesh right into the flow of work – making it easier for Teams users to transform any meeting into a 3D experience. Make any meeting immersive by simply changing your View.
Immersive spaces in Teams enable collaboration for all your meeting attendees, even if some of them join from outside the immersive space. If you join from a standard 2D Teams meeting experience, you can see, hear, and interact with your colleagues in an immersive space. Immersive spaces in Teams will be available initially with PC or Meta Quest VR devices.

title: Q&A
shortDescription: Questions and answers for structured meetings​
Description: The Q&A app is a robust solution for structured scenarios that organizers can customize with just a few clicks. You can add open or moderated Q&A, mark the best answer for a question, filter responses, enable replies, and more. This Q&A experience is powered by Microsoft Yammer and customized for Microsoft Teams.​

title: Defender Experts
shortDescription: Communicate efficiently with Defender Experts
Description:
Enhance your cybersecurity with Defender Experts, offering top-tier managed hunting, detection, and response services. This application seamlessly integrates with the Microsoft 365 Defender suite, ensuring comprehensive protection for your digital environment. With our app, you'll receive instant notifications and have direct communication with our expert team, enabling efficient management of critical security incidents. 

When installed in Microsoft Teams, the app can access and read all team messages, and is capable of responding to any post where it is mentioned. Elevate your security strategy with Defender Experts – your proactive defense against cyber threats. 

Get started with Defender Experts at https://aka.ms/DefenderExpertsforXDR. For information on how to use Defender Experts, please visit https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/security/defender/defender-experts-for-hunting?view=o365-worldwide.

In order to use this app, you need to have an active Defender Experts account.

title: Whiteboard
shortDescription: Use Microsoft Whiteboard to collaborate, visualize ideas, and work creatively in Microsoft Teams
Description:
The Microsoft Whiteboard app in Teams brings the power of digital whiteboards to supercharge visual collaboration in one seamless experience right within Teams.

 Use Whiteboard across your entire Teams workspace
* Easily access all your whiteboards in one single place inside Teams
* Prepare a whiteboard in advance for your next meeting to brainstorm, plan or co-create express ideas naturally with your team together in real time
* Add a whiteboard as a tab to your favorite chat/channel to continue collaboration with your team asynchronously

title: Copilot for Sales
shortDescription: Microsoft 365 Copilot for Sales reimagines the way sellers work.
Description:
Microsoft 365 Copilot for Sales is an AI assistant designed for sellers to maximize productivity and close more deals. It brings next-generation AI and sales insights from their CRM platform into the Microsoft 365 productivity tools that they use daily like Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and Microsoft Word. Sellers will be able to work more efficiently and improve customer experiences with email assistance, personalized sales content creation, AI-generated insights, and recommendations for next steps. Sales managers can empower their teams with AI-powered manager insights and collaboration tools.  Copilot for Sales can also be customized according to your business needs. Copilot for Sales integrates seamlessly with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales and Salesforce Sales Cloud, and can be configured to connect to other sales solutions.

A Microsoft 365 Global Administrator is required to install and set up Copilot for Sales. Copilot for Sales may be subject to an additional free or paid license. For more details, please access the Copilot for Sales website or contact your Microsoft representative. 

Copilot for Sales allows administrators and users to access content and share data outside of Microsoft 365, including with third-party customer relationship management (CRM) services. Such data sharing is subject to Microsoft and applicable third-party CRM terms and conditions. Data sharing is not enabled until administrators and users in your organization consent to connect their Microsoft work or school account with their CRM account. 

Copilot for Sales for Microsoft Teams will have permission to participate in Teams meetings and collect Teams meetings data such as meeting recordings and transcripts. 

**Note:** when the app is deployed by an administrators, the app will have permission to automatically review email and appointment recipient lists when sending emails or creating/modifying appointments. This allows support for key actions such as displaying a banner to add new contacts to the CRM system and updating the Copilot for Sales side panel with relevant CRM information for those contacts.

Discover more with these helpful links:

- [Explore what's possible with Copilot for Sales](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?linkid=2259005)
- Check out our [FAQ](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?linkid=2258498)

title: Dynamics 365
shortDescription: Search, connect, and update Dynamics 365 records in Microsoft Teams
Description:
Switching between business apps and collaboration apps to share data, documents, and records can impede the flow of work, slowing progress on activities ranging from sales deals to customer support cases. The Dynamics 365 app for Microsoft Teams extends the ability for anyone in an organization to view and collaborate on Dynamics 365 records from within Teams. 

 Features: 
� Share documents between a connected Microsoft Teams channel and your customer engagement apps record 
� Collaborate with other team members by adding a customer engagement app record or view as a tab to a channel in Microsoft Teams and adding recommended members 
� Chat with your team members side-by-side in the app tab 
� Search and share Dynamics 365 records as information cards in chats (production ready preview) 
� Update Dynamics 365 records from within chats (production ready preview)  
� Add chat messages to Dynamics 365 as notes or tasks (production ready preview) 
� View and update Dynamics 365 records before, during, and after meetings right from Teams (preview) 
� Notes and tasks added during meetings sync back to Dynamics 365 automatically (preview)

title: Connections
shortDescription: Access personalized tools, news, and resources.
Description: Connections streamlines your daily work by making it easy to access tools, apps, and resources while keeping you updated on organizational news, people, and places.

title: ENGAGE TAG
shortDescription: 「タグ」でつながる、認め合う
Keywords: ['コラボレーション', '人事', 'エンゲージメント']
Description:
ENGAGE TAGは、あなたが持っているスキルや知識をタグとして登録し、
そのタグから社員同士の認め合いやつながりを生み出す、新しい社内コミュニケーションツールです。
───────────────────────────────────────
【ENGAGE TAGが導入されたらできること】
◆スキルにより人材を可視化
* 社員のスキルを「テクニカル(技術)」「ヒューマン（人柄）」「コンセプチュアル（思考）」と３つのカテゴリーで分類。ポートフォリオで可視化できます。

◆最適なスキルを相手に提案
* 他人へのスキル提案が可能です。スキルの交換は「認め合いの文化」を醸成し、さらに管理者の評価の妥当性や透明化に寄与。結果、組織のエンゲージメント向上の強力なエンジンとなります。

◆目的に応じた柔軟な検索
* タグの検索は、複数のスキルの掛け合わせでも可能。さらに、ネットワーク機能を使えば、検索結果の相手と関連するメンバーを探すこともできます。

◆人と人のつながりを可視化
* ネットワーク表示を使えば視覚的につながりを可視化。必要な人材の把握はもちろん、人材ネットワークの状態なども素早く把握できます。

トライアル、ご利用にあたり事前のお申し込みが必要となります。

title: UiPath Notifications
shortDescription: Unleash the power of RPA by automating with UiPath
Description:
UiPath brings the power of API automation to its well reputed robotic process automation (RPA) software suite. Now, you can build seamless RPA workflows and automate across your organization with the help of API + UI automation.

UiPath Notifications allow users to receive notifications/updates from the automations built using UiPath platform capabilities by integrating any of the enterprise & productivity applications available in UiPath's Integration Service

You can seamlessly accomplish the below tasks by using the UiPath Notifications:
- Send text messages to channels on behalf of a user or bot
- Send adaptive cards to channels on behalf of a user or bot
- Read the info about the users, channels and your workspace etc.
For example, 
- When an opportunity is closed-won in a CRM tool, send a message to the Sales team channel for review and create Sales order in an ERP tool

Pre-requisites/Limitations:
- User must have a valid UiPath account in order to use this app
- Configure the respective notification settings in your UiPath account to receive system/account updates. Refer https://docs.uipath.com/automation-cloud/automation-cloud/latest/admin-guide/managing-notifications for more details

For more details on Microsoft Teams in UiPath's Integration Service, refer https://docs.uipath.com/activities/other/latest/integration-service/uipath-microsoft-teams-about
