title: Zapier
shortDescription: Connect your apps and automate workflows.
Description:
Zapier is an automation platform that supports thousands of the most popular apps. In just a few minutes, you can set up automated workflows (called _Zaps_) that connect Teams with the other apps you use most. You can automatically create new channels, invite users to channels, post messages from other systems into Teams and much more—no manual work or coding required.

**Some things you can do with Zapier + Microsoft Teams**
- Create automations right within Teams
- Automatically send updates to specific channels based off events in other apps
- Create new channels, set up their tabs, and invite users to join them
- Get notified when you’re mentioned or receive a chat message

**How to get started**
- [Sign up for Zapier](https://zapier.com/sign-up/?utm_source=partner_msft-teams_signup&utm_medium=embed_app_directory_listing&utm_campaign=partner_msft-teams). (Zapier has a free forever plan. Paid plans scale with usage.)
- Check out Zapier's [Getting Started Guide](https://zapier.com/learn/getting-started-guide/what-is-zapier/?utm_source=partner_msft-teams_learn_more&utm_medium=embed_app_directory_listing&utm_campaign=partner_msft-teams).
- Need more info? Check out the Zapier [website](https://zapier.com/apps/microsoft-teams/integrations/?utm_source=partner_msft-teams_integrations&utm_medium=embed_app_directory_listing&utm_campaign=partner_msft-teams).

**What people are saying about Zapier**
"I would go as far to say that it has increased my personal efficiency by more than 400 percent." —Garrett Grohman, Indiegogo
"Zapier helps us to work faster and smarter by removing manual processes. We can now focus on adding a personal touch to our work." —Olivia Jardine, Meister
"Zapier probably saves me about 10 hours a week, when it comes to running our design operations. If I tap into my math skills, I do believe it’s 25 percent more productive!" —Lindsey Redinger, InVision

title: Guul
shortDescription: Interactive Online Social Games: Transform Your Workday with Guul
Description:
Start your day with a cup of coffee, log into your virtual workspace, and instead of diving straight into emails, why not start with a little fun? Guul adds a touch of joy to your workday.
☀️A Morning of Focus
It’s 9 AM, and before your first meeting, you take a few minutes to play Find the Word. It’s a quick brain teaser that helps you wake up and get your mind in gear. By the time you’re done, you’re ready to tackle the day.
🔨❄️Breaking the Ice in Meetings
Your team has a new member joining today, so why not break the ice with a game during the meeting? With Guul, you can easily add a fun activity to make everyone feel welcome and relaxed.
⚽️Predict the Outcome
As you check your channels, you notice there’s a big Champions League match today. You hop into the Predictor Games channel to make your guess. It’s a fun way to add some excitement to your day and something to look forward to.
🥪Lunchtime Fun
Lunchtime rolls around, and you and a colleague can’t decide what to eat. Instead of debating, you settle it with a quick game of Rock Paper Scissors. It’s a lighthearted way to make decisions and adds a bit of fun to your break.
💪Afternoon Engagement
Later in the day, your team comes together for a project. To keep things lively, you suggest a round of Match & Pass. It’s a great way to connect with your colleagues and keep the energy up.
🛠️Managing the Fun
The Admin Panel is your go-to tool. You can set gaming hours, manage players, and track how much time your team spends on Guul. It’s all about finding the right balance between work and play.
🏆End the Day with a Smile
As the workday ends, you check the leaderboard. Whether you’re on top or not, the day feels fulfilling, filled with work and a bit of play. You log off, looking forward to tomorrow.

Why Guul?
Guul isn’t just for games—it’s for bringing teams closer together. Whether it’s a quick game to break the ice or a group challenge to build engagement, Guul makes every workday more vibrant and connected.
With Guul, you have access to a wide variety of games tailored to different moods and moments:
2-Player Games offer a perfect way to challenge a colleague in a strategic duel:
🎲 Backgammon, ♟️ Chess, 🏅 Checkers, ⚔️ Draughts, 🍀 Four in a Row, 🚀 Battleship, 💣 Minesweeper, 👀 Blob Wars, 9️⃣ Nine Men’s Morris
Group Games are ideal for getting everyone involved and fostering team spirit:
🔄Match & Pass, 🀄Okey/Rummikub
Predictor Games add an extra layer of excitement, letting you guess the outcomes of major events:
⚽ Football Events: Champions League, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Ligue 1, and Bundesliga etc., Olympics 📽️ Oscars, 🎤 Eurovision Song Contest
Quick Games are perfect for those brief moments when you need a fun distraction or a quick decision-maker:
⭕ ❌ Tic-Tac-Toe, ✂️ Rock Paper Scissors, 🎲 Dice, 🪙 Heads & Tails
And the best part? Guul is FREE for up to 10 monthly active users per workspace. Need more? You can easily upgrade by contacting our support team at [support@guul.games](mailto:support@guul.games). If you encounter any objectionable content or discrepancies while using our app, please also report them directly to our support team by emailing [support@guul.games](mailto:support@guul.games). We are committed to ensuring a safe and enjoyable gaming experience for all users.
Watch our [video tutorial](https://www.youtube.com/embed/_VmIrSUnKaE?cc_load_policy=1&cc_lang_pref=en) on how to install Guul in your Microsoft Teams workspace for easy setup. 
Explore our [Help Center](https://help.guul.games/integrations-microsoft-teams) for tips and guides on using Guul: https://help.guul.games/
Bring the spirit of play to your workspace with Guul and transform your team's virtual experience today!

title: Voiceitt Captions
shortDescription: Voiceitt Captions links your Voiceitt account to Microsoft Teams meetings
Description:
Link your Voiceitt account to Microsoft Teams meetings for real-time Voiceitt Captions. Voiceitt is personalized automatic speech recognition (ASR) subscription-based software for non-standard speakers. During Teams calls, people with speech disabilities, Deaf individuals with nonstandard speech, or people with accented English can communicate and be understood. Voiceitt ensures everyone can follow along and participate effectively by providing captions alongside the spoken conversation. For more information, visit www.voiceitt.com/teams.

Sign-up for a Voiceitt Account:

Sign up today to trial Voiceitt free for 30 days. In order to use Voiceitt Captions, you need to have an active Voiceitt account.

Contact

Voiceitt’s customer success team is ready to help. Email Voiceitt at support@voiceitt.com with any questions.

Getting Started:

  1. Using your paid Microsoft 365 account, download the Microsoft Teams app and enter the email associated with your Microsoft account.
  2. The host can add Voiceitt Captions to a Teams meeting, or anyone can add Voiceitt Captions while a meeting is happening.
    1. To add Voiceitt before the meeting, schedule a new meeting in the calendar. Then go to Apps, search for Voiceitt, and select “Add.” Then click “Add to a meeting,” choose the desired meeting from the dropdown menu, and select the “Set-up” button in the bottom right corner. You’ll now be prompted to sign in to your Voiceitt account or continue as a guest to view someone else’s Voiceitt captions.
    2. To add Voiceitt Captions during a meeting, join the meeting, then click the Apps icon in the meeting toolbar. Search for and add Voiceitt Captions. You’ll now see the Voiceitt Captions icon added to the toolbar. Select and choose to either log in to have your speech added to Voiceitt Captions or join as a guest to view someone else’s Voiceitt captions.
  3. All meeting participants must click on the Voiceitt Captions icon to use or view Voiceitt Captions.
  4. Remember, to use Voiceitt Captions, you must have an active Voiceitt account. Visit Voiceitt today to start a free 30-day trial.
  5. Once Voiceitt Captions is added, and the subscriber is logged in, their Voiceitt Captions will appear on the right side of the screen. Multiple Voiceitt subscribers can log in during a meeting. It will not caption a guest's speech. Enable the Teams captions built for standard English speech to see guest captions.

Key Features:

  • View your Voiceitt transcripts directly within Microsoft Teams.
  • Multiple Voiceitt customers can utilize Voiceitt captions simultaneously during a Teams call.
  • Use Voiceitt captions as a host or a participant in a Teams meeting.
  • Voiceitt account required: Sign up for a free trial today at web.voiceitt.com.
  • Login to your Voiceitt account within Teams.
  • Add Voiceitt to the approved organizations in your Teams settings.
  • Voiceitt for Teams will work for paid Teams accounts only.
  • All participants of the meeting can view the Voiceitt Captions sidebar.
  • All captions will now be in the Voiceitt Captions sidebar and will not interfere with the standard captions from the Microsoft Teams call.
  • Note: Voiceitt captions are not yet accessible to Braille output.

For Information on Voiceitt’s Privacy and Terms of Service

title: AutoQL
shortDescription: Get instant insights and make data-driven decisions with data on demand.
Description:
Designed for business users, AutoQL is a self-service analytics app that makes accessing and exploring data simple, fast, and intuitive. Ask questions in your own words, get answers instantly. Share visualizations and insights, collaborate with your peers, and make data-driven decisions with confidence, all from Microsoft Teams.

With Acrobat Sign, recipients can complete and sign documents via any browser or mobile device - anytime, anywhere, with no account needed. Or, get signatures live in a Teams meeting with Live Sign.

- Manage your documents including check status, send reminders, and view details for completed documents.
- Sign documents that are waiting for you.
- Access is easy with single sign-on (SSO).
**Key features only available with Adobe Acrobat Sign for Teams**
- Support your customers when they need it most and get agreements signed faster with Live Sign in a Teams meeting.
- Get status in real-time with actionable notifications in your activity feed. Get notified when documents are ready for you to sign and complete the document in a single step. Get notified when documents are completed and view details. All directly in the activity feed.

title: Adobe Acrobat
shortDescription: Gain insights, edit, convert, and collaborate on PDFs in Microsoft Teams
Description:
With Adobe Acrobat, you can now increase productivity with generative AI and collaborate on and make changes to your PDFs right from within Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 (Office).
 For instance, the PDFs from your Microsoft Teams Chats, OneDrive etc. are now centrally available to open directly within the Teams environment to analyze and surface insights, and  make changes like organizing pages, compressing, converting to other formats, protecting, and more! You can collaborate with others in your Teams Channel and collect feedback in a single PDF so reviewers can see each other’s comments and it is easier to reconcile feedback and get things done. Notifications keep you informed when others take action on shared documents.
 Tenant admins can set Adobe Acrobat app as the default PDF viewer in Teams by setting a policy on Teams Admin Center to install the app on user's client. Instructions on how to do this are available [here](https://www.adobe.com/go/acroteams_fh_help).
**Free-to-use features:**
- High quality viewing — Acrobat lets you open high-fidelity PDFs directly within Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 (Office), for a satisfying and seamless work experience.
- Streamline PDF review - Collect channel members’ feedback in a single PDF directly in Teams instead of gathering and reconciling feedback via multiple attachments. This feature requires users to have an Adobe account.*
- Keep reviewers informed — Reviewers get notified when others reply to their comments. 
- Secure collaboration — Collaborate securely with trusted members and retain the ability to store document versions in Microsoft SharePoint or OneDrive.**
**Premium features (require Acrobat subscription):**
- If you do not have an existing Acrobat subscription, subscribe now to unlock these features right within Acrobat in Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 (Office).
 - Convert PDFs to Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, or Image
 - Combine multiple documents and file types into one PDF file
 - Delete, rotate, extract, insert or reorder pages of a PDF
 - Reduce the size of your PDF for easier sharing
 - Add a password to protect your PDF.
**Acrobat AI Assistant features which requires [AI Assistant add-on]( https://www.adobe.com/acrobat/generative-ai-pdf.html#compare-plans):**
 AI Assistant for Adobe Acrobat is a conversational feature that lets you interact with your documents to get quick answers to questions based on your PDF   content in a comprehensive and informative way.
 - Insights you can trust – AI Assistant looks only at the documents you tell it to. And by generating verifiable insights with attributions back to the source, you can be assured you’re accessing credible information.
 - Writing made easy – Empower your team to rapidly create high-quality professional content for emails, blogs, presentations, research summaries, and more. Use the responses AI Assistant generated from your documents to get the write-up you need and produce your deliverables in less time.
 - Enhanced meeting transcript support – Whether you are leading a meeting, participating, or missed it altogether, enhanced meeting transcript support will help you stay in the know and turn meeting insights into takeaway actions. Automatically generate meeting summaries from transcripts to understand main topics, key points, and action items.
** Commenting currently is not supported on the mobile experience.
** Learn more about security for Acrobat [here](https://www.adobe.com/content/dam/cc/en/trust-center/ungated/whitepapers/doc-cloud/acrobat-dc-security-overview-ue.pdf).
** AI Assistant is currently available in English only.
 The app utilizes the 'onMessageAttachmentsChanged' launch event to improve email collaboration. Specifically, it detects when a PDF is attached to an email and prompts users to convert the PDF into a shareable Adobe Document Cloud public link.

title: Taskize
shortDescription: Reach your colleagues on Microsoft Teams to resolve queries in Taskize.
Description:
Taskize enables your colleagues to remain on their platform of choice whilst still sharing one synchronised view of the issue and the progress toward resolution.

When an agent on Taskize needs help from a colleague who uses Microsoft Teams but is not a Taskize user, they invite that colleague’s business unit into a Taskize Bubble, and the conversation is posted to that business unit’s Teams channel. The conversation appears in a separate, dedicated card that contains all relevant information about the query in a structured workflow, separate from any other conversations in the same channel.

Messages are automatically exchanged back and forth while the conversation participants remain on different platforms. Updates to the Taskize Bubble are dynamically reflected in the Teams card, and vice versa, so all participants are kept up to date with the status of the query and there is one central version of the truth.

Finally, as the query is initiated in Taskize, all of the interactions are captured for Taskize auditing and reporting, allowing you to better understand your business and gather meaningful insights.

To use the Taskize app, your organisation must have an active Taskize account. If you don't have an account, see [How to register for Taskize](https://www.taskize.com/join-the-network/).

shortDescription: An automated employee engagement app to deliver notifications in real-time.
Description:
**Description:**

The companion app to the XOPS Control Center, XOPS Sidekick gives your employees contextual notifications through Microsoft Teams channels from the XOPS platform delivering Autonomous IT. Your Sidekick gives you a heads-up on what you need to pay attention to and takes care of the rest.

**Features:**

- Receive notifications on various process statuses and results to have visibility on successful or failed data uploads, exports, error logging, and more.

- Check on the status of service requests

- Facilitate automated flows for runbooks

In order to use this app, your company administrator needs to have XperiencOps provide authorization against a runbook license that uses Microsoft Teams notifications. Please contact your XperiencOps Customer Support Manager for any assistance. For any other issues, please visit our support page at [https://www.xops.io/support](https://www.xops.io/support)

title: OLi Wellness
shortDescription: OLi gives you wellness reminders to keep you fresh and focused.
Description: A digital assistant (OLi) which presents personalized wellness reminders during your workday to keep you invigorated and focused. OLi suggests activities such as drinking water, stretching, and breathing exercises that can be done within 2 to 5 mins. [Click here](https://support.dataken.ai) to get help.

title: Read AI
shortDescription: AI-generated meeting summaries and transcripts from Read AI
Description:
Live AI-generated meeting notes, transcription, engagement scores, talk time, and coaching tips from Read AI in a Microsoft Teams App.  During and after the meeting, receive comprehensive insights and analytics that includes:  

- *Full Transcript + Summary*: View the full transcript with key moments highlighted and summarized based on content, engagement, and sentiment.  
- *Meeting Summary*: AI-generated overview of the meeting
- *Pre-Read*:  With recurring meetings, before the meeting starts see a summary of the past meeting, key questions that mattered to participants, and action items that include named owners.
- *AI Coaching*: Recommendations just for you to improve pacing, use of fewer filler words, and less interruptions
- *Quick Links to Reports*: Shortcuts to review AI-generated meeting reports across meetings, emails, and messages.

In order to use the full features of the app, [create a free account](https://app.read.ai/analytics/signup), view detailed reports, customize settings, or learn more visit [https://read.ai](https://read.ai) and sign-in using Microsoft.

Contact support@read.ai or visit [https://support.read.ai](https://support.read.ai/hc/en-us/requests/new) to report objectionable content.

title: TINYpulse
shortDescription: An employee engagement and feedback solution to enhance culture and performance.
Keywords: ['Increase communication and transparency', 'Improve and measure your culture', 'Reduce your company turnover']
Description:
TINYpulse by WebMD Health Services is a leading employee engagement and feedback solution, empowering companies around the world to measure and improve company culture, increase employee retention, and enhance performance by promoting better communication, transparency, and recognition in the workplace.

"We use TINYpulse to make sure we're getting the real-time feedback we need to foster a great culture." -Kipp Bodnar, CMO of HubSpot.

TINYpulse helps leaders:
- Discover their organizations' real drivers of engagement and gain data-driven insights and recommended actions to help avoid wasted investment.
- Access science-backed reports and dashboards that measure and illustrate how employees are feeling and areas for leaders to improve.
- Motivate your teams by providing a channel for employee recognition and anonymous suggestions.
- Improve the overall employee experience, productivity, and retention in their organization.

*The TINYpulse Microsoft Teams integration is free to install. Seamlessly embed engagement directly into the Teams workflow for enhanced collaboration.

**To use the TINYpulse app in Teams, users must first be added to a TINYpulse account by their organization's administrator.

To learn more about TINYpulse, visit: https://www.webmdhealthservices.com/wellness-corporate-solutions-webmd-health-services/engagement-feedback/.

title: Leave Tracker
shortDescription: Introducing the Leave Tracker App: Revolutionizing Employee Leave Management
Description:
Are you exhausted from manually managing employee vacation and sick leave requests? Struggling to stay informed about who's off and when? Our Leave Tracker App is here to rescue you!
Seamlessly integrated with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365 and Outlook. This app enables you to swiftly manage leave requests, approve or deny them, and stay updated on employee availability. With real-time updates, you'll always know who's around and who's not.
Discover the standout features of the Leave Tracker App that set it apart:
* Intuitive Interface: Designed with users in mind, our app streamlines the process for employees to request time off and managers to approve or reject requests.
* Tailored Leave Options: Select from various leave types created such as vacation, sick leave, annual leave, and more, to cater to your organization's specific requirements.
* Hassle-free Integration & Setup: Enjoy a smooth experience with easy integration into Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365 and Outlook.
* Leave Approval: Empower managers to approve or reject leave requests with a few clicks.
* Leave Configuration: Customize and create leave types according to your organization's policies and requirements.
* Location Configuration: Configure leave policies based on the location(s) of your organization. Hence, you can manage which location is entitled to certain leaves and allotted days.
Embrace the future of leave management with our Leave Tracker App. Experience how it simplifies HR processes and boosts efficiency.

Please note: To use the application, your organization must have active users within your Microsoft 365 tenant. Please get in touch with our support team at [be@relianceinfosystems.com](mailto:be@relianceinfosystems.com?subject=Configuration%20Needed%20for%20the%20Leave%20Tracker%20App) for more details.

title: Groopit
shortDescription: Share real-time data and insights
Description:
Groopit simplifies how employees share and use human intelligence – competitive intel, product feedback, sales insights, voice of the customer quotes, and more. It’s an entirely new category of enterprise SaaS called Crowdsolving.

Employees share insights with a few quick taps by typing @groopit in the Microsoft Teams search box in any Teams channel or conversation. Groopit aggregates, analyzes, and delivers structured data to a Microsoft Teams hub channel where it can be consumed through live feeds and views, empowering everyone with real-time data to make better, faster decisions.

Outsmart competitors. Deliver outstanding products. Accelerate revenue growth. Reduce inbound call volume. Reduce quality issues. Remove sales inefficiencies. Eliminate process delays. Fix d-sat drivers. Now you can solve complex problems with real-time data from frontline employees.

CAPABILITIES
* Transforms decisions with high-quality, quantitative data from employees.
* Simplifies sharing to 3 taps and less than 1 minute with @groopit.
* Allows employees to share in any Teams channel; no behavior change required.
* Simultaneously adds data to Salesforce if associated with an account or opportunity.
* Aggregates data shared across Teams channels, so patterns and anomalies are visible.
* Empowers everyone to view, search, question, send, and use data to inform decisions.
* Integrates data into Power BI, Tableau, and other enterprise systems.
* Offers advanced privacy, security, and HIPAA-enabled data protection.

The Groopit App for Teams includes 30 customizable Data Sharing Workflows or create one from scratch. It's the ultimate way to get people sharing data in real-time, right from Microsoft Teams.

In order to install the Groopit App for Teams, you must have an existing Groopit subscription. To learn more and get started visit [groopit.co/products/groopitforteams/](https://groopit.co/products/groopitforteams/).

title: Howspace
shortDescription: Collaborate, facilitate, and co-create at scale with Howspace & Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Howspace's collaboration design and facilitation platform extends the power and possibilities of Microsoft Teams. Howspace provides pre-meeting, in-meeting, and post-meeting experiences directly within the Teams environment to ensure context and lasting impact long after a meeting ends.

*Benefits of the Howspace app in Microsoft Teams*
- Enable collaboration, co-creation, and sense-making at large scale
- Open a Howspace workspace during any Microsoft Teams meeting to let your teams co-create, brainstorm, plan, and arrive at decisions that drive impact
- Record the process of group-led decision-making with polls, voting, and chat threads to contribute to in the backdrop of a real-time Teams meeting
- Quickly gather insights and arrive at informed decisions by tapping into the collective intelligence of large groups with advanced AI functionalities
- Built-in SSO for a secure, seamless login experience that is controlled by your IT department and keeps your workspaces safely within company hands

*Use Cases with Howspace & Microsoft Teams*
- Facilitated large-scale meetings within Teams, with pre-work and ongoing collaboration and impact on Howspace
- Interactive presentations with powerful engagement and collaboration features
- Virtual and hybrid events, trainings, workshops

*Availability*
Howspace for Microsoft Teams is included in most Howspace annual plans. Contact us at [support@howspace.com](mailto:support@howspace.com) to learn more about connecting Howspace and Microsoft Teams. You can also get started with Howspace by [opening a free account here](https://www.howspace.com/start-free-trial).

*AI-generated content*
We employ automated safeguards to prevent the generation of inappropriate content by AI, in addition to granting users manual oversight prior to content publication. Should these measures be insufficient, users are encouraged to report any problematic AI-generated content to [support@howspace.com](mailto:support@howspace.com).

title: Efecte Service Management
shortDescription: Receive notifications upon new tickets in Efecte Service Management (ESM)
Description: Efecte Service Management App enhances your team’s collaboration to support customers and other teams, by notifying users whenever new ticket has been assigned to your team. With the App, you can integrate your Efecte Service Management (ESM) seamlessly to Microsoft Teams and notify support group’s members, whenever a new ticket has been created to the support group in ESM. You can also create new tickets and comment existing tickets with this app. This gives support personnel better visibility on their ticket queue, and they can act on new tickets faster. App uses ESM listeners to send notifications to Microsoft Teams. Please note, setting up listeners in ESM requires admin permissions and sending listener should be configured to each template, from which notifications to Microsoft Teams should be send. In order to be able to use this application, you must have an active license for Efecte Service Management (ESM). Please contact Efecte Sales at [https://www.efecte.com/contact-us](https://www.efecte.com/contact-us) for more details. Limited non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable, limited right and license granted for this application is valid only during the applicable subscription period set forth in the Order, unless renewed and is limited to the Customer's internal business operations and internal business purposes only.

title: Huddo Boards
shortDescription: Task management tool enhances team efficiency.
Description:
**Huddo Boards embeds fully into Microsoft 365 enabling collaborative task management directly in Microsoft Teams.**

**Get more done, together, with Huddo Boards**

Huddo Boards is your visual and collaborative project task management app. Add your tasks to a Board, assign members, add comments and descriptions, files and more. The flexibility of Huddo Boards enables you to connect internal employees and external collaborators across multiple providers, and with four main project views, and countless integrations and automations, it centralises collaboration in Microsoft 365 whilst enabling individual personal preferences.

**Why Choose Huddo Boards for Microsoft 365:**

- Get all the features of Microsoft Planner, as well as unique features like Task Dependencies, Recent Updates, creating non-colour labels, archiving Boards, and more...
- Use Huddo Boards directly in Microsoft Teams and go beyond just displaying notifications, and manage your tasks and update your projects directly in a Teams channel tab.
- Manage projects your way. Exploit 4 main project views; Kanban, Timeline (Gantt), MindMap (brainstorm), and Activity (list).

**Features and Benefits**

- **Visualise tasks your way**: Switch between Kanban, Gantt, brainstorm and list views to better manage project stages and processes, and aggregate views to better plan team resources.
- **Centralise collaboration**: Add descriptions, files, links, comments, @mention collaborators, and see live updates of your projects to focus your workforce.
- **On time and on budget**: Set due dates, reassign tasks assignments, add dependencies, enable notifications, and combine tasks from multiple projects to keep on track.
- **Organise and prioritise**: Add labels, create private cards, hide completed tasks, and filter tasks to better visualise projects and keep your digital workplace tidy.
- **Repeatable projects**: Use templates, roles, rescheduling, Zapier and Power Automate to take care of repetitive tasks and free more time for completing your todos.

**Availability**

You can start using Boards for free, right now, just click the button above to add the app to Teams.

Many great features require a subscription, but they are available to you to try out for a limited time.

Some features may require your Microsoft 365 Administrator to provide consent for Boards to access data.

For more help, [contact us](https://www.huddo.com/contact).

title: Vizerto
shortDescription: Ask me any question and Vizerto is here to help
Description:
Vizerto is an enterprise expertise multiplier used by B2B organizations to scale and multiply expertise of its sellers, specialists, customer success teams and partners across geographies, roles and business functions. By multiplying expertise, B2B organizations become highly responsive to their customers, and individuals team members become efficient and productive.
Vizerto is powered by four key pillars a) GenAI technology, b) Dynamic Expert Routing, c) Collaboration Platform integrations, and d) dynamic knowledge capture to offers quick and accurate answers to business, product and technical questions  specific to the each organization’s context.

Key Features:

GenAI-powered responses and answers to seeker questions, specific to the organization's context.

Seamless integration with Collaboration platforms like Microsoft Teams to reduce switching across applications.

Organization’s named Subject Matter Expert network to provide verification and answers to questions where Seekers are not satisfied with the response.

Capture of dynamic knowledge to complement packaged content.

Business Insights into the organization's knowledge needs around product, training, process, and enablement.

Target Audience:

Vizerto caters to global B2B customers who have a complex global operating model and a sophisticated product portfolio, seeking to streamline sales processes, enhance customer interactions, and drive greater knowledge sharing across functions, roles, and geographies.

Unique Value Proposition:

Vizerto sets itself apart by blending dynamic knowledge capture with seamless integration inside collaboration platforms like Teams and connecting with experts to ensure answers are supported by credible sources at all times.

Customer Stories:

Vizerto has successfully addressed use cases across Sales, Pre-Sales, Partner, Professional Services, and Customer Success teams by amplifying knowledge and driving greater reuse of both dynamic and static knowledge.

Requirements to engage inside Microsoft Teams

To utilize Vizerto in Microsoft Teams, users need an active B2B organization-assigned Microsoft Teams account and active Vizerto deployment inside the B2B organization, tied to a specific function/business group supported by a subscription license for Vizerto use. To get started or to report any objectionable content generated by AI, email us on support@digitalmain.com or schedule a demo using the link : [Click for demo](https://vizerto.com/demo)

title: Journal Pro
shortDescription: Create Beautiful Professional Journals for Documentation and Reflection
Keywords: ['Timeline documentation logbook minutes', 'diary habit project change planner viva', 'reflection daily mood goal mental notes']
Description:
**Welcome to Journal Pro for Microsoft Teams, where documentation meets reflection and seamless collaboration!**
Empower yourself or your team to streamline project documentation, personal reflection, and milestone tracking using our intuitive, beautifully designed journal interface.

**Features:**
* **Instant & Easy Setup:** Get started immediately—no sign-up required.
* **Personal or Shared Journals:** Create private journals or collaborate with your team across chats & channels.
*  **Various Use Cases:** Use Journal Pro for Project Documentation, Logbook, Changelog, Personal Diary, Career Planner, Meeting Minutes, Goal Tracker, Notebook and much more.
* **Timeline View:** Visualize your progress and documentation in a clear, elegant timeline format.
* **Reflection Mode:** Enable reflection mode with personalized guided questions to inspire business insights.
* **Customizable:** Personalize your journals with unique backgrounds, labels, and icons.
* **Intelligent Reminders:** Set up daily, weekly, quarterly, or annual reminders in Teams to encourage consistent journaling habits.
* **Entry Types:** Define multiple entry types with custom icons to suit your journaling needs.
* **Smart Filters:** Easily find what matters with filters for entry types, labels, and dates.
* **Image Attachments:** Enrich your journal entries by adding image attachments.
* **Multiple Journals per Channel:** Manage multiple journals in a single channel or across Teams.

Enjoy our free version, which offers unlimited journals with limited entries. Upgrade to our premium version for unrestricted usage and exclusive features.

For assistance with setup and more information on premium features, please visit our [website](https://journal-pro.com) or reach out to us via our [contact form](https://journal-pro.com/?page=contact).

title: Alleo
shortDescription: Alleo is a digital workspace for visual collaboration.
Description:
Alleo is designed for organizations and teams of all sizes who are looking to enhance their virtual collaboration experience within Microsoft Teams. Alleo is ideal for business leaders, project managers, educators, and remote teams who need a dynamic and interactive collaboration platform seamlessly integrated into their Teams workflow.

Alleo brings the power of an infinite collaborative canvas into Microsoft Teams, allowing you to seamlessly integrate your Alleo boards into Teams calls and tabs. With just a few clicks, Alleo board owners can add their boards to any Teams call or Team, inviting all participants into a shared, interactive space without leaving the Teams environment. This ensures a smooth, immersive experience for all users, enabling real-time collaboration, brainstorming, and visual storytelling—all within Microsoft Teams.

**Key Features**
- Alleo boards embedded in the Teams tabs and calling experience.
- Effortless real-time collaboration directly within the Teams environment.
- Supports rich media, sticky notes, text, and interactive elements on the Alleo canvas.

**Prerequisites/Requirements**
- An active Alleo user account is required to create and manage boards.
- The Alleo app must be installed in the Microsoft Teams workspace to add boards to calls or Microsoft Teams tabs.
- Your admin may need to enable the Alleo app for your Microsoft Teams account.

**Supported Microsoft Integrations**
- Alleo in Microsoft Teams (desktop and web versions)
- Alleo - Microsoft OneDrive files provider
- Alleo - Microsoft authentication provider

**Limitations/Conditions**
- Advanced features and integrations may require higher-tier Alleo plans.

Take your Microsoft Teams collaboration to the next level with Alleo, where your ideas, content, and conversations come to life in one interactive space.

For more information or assistance, please visit our [Contact Us page](https://www.withalleo.com/contact/). We're here to help!

title: SigBee Check-in
shortDescription: Quickly check in with SigBee to provide a daily pulse to your team and manager.
Description: SigBee Check-in for Microsoft Teams is an easy-to-use chatbot that allows you to complete your check-in without leaving your daily workspace communication platform. Using an intuitive numbered-scale answer system and plain-text journal entries, provide your manager and organization with a high-value daily pulse that takes 2 minutes or less. Benefits of checking in include: i. Moment of intention or reflection during your workday. ii. Increase the connection between yourself and your work team. iii. Give your manager what they need to best support you, day-in and day-out. SigBee Check-in for Microsoft Teams is a chatbot-style interaction. SigBee Check-in for Microsoft Teams requires an existing enterprise subscription and collaboration with our Customer Success team to enable. Reach out to support@sigbee.com to get started, or with any other questions!

Combine letters to guess the word blanks—collaboratively, competitively, or just on your own. title: Mail Signature

Description:
**Mail Signature Application** integrates seamlessly with **Microsoft 365** and **Microsoft Teams**, enhancing your company's communication by automatically incorporating personal company information into your mail signatures.

- **Automated Signature Creation**: Automatically pulls information from Microsoft 365 to populate your mail signatures.
- **Flexible Formats**: Export signatures in png, jpeg, or html formats.
- **Company-Wide Use**: Available for every member within the company to maintain a unified brand identity.

Description:
Babbels, the connection between your organization and your customers 

Looking for accessible and efficient customer contact? Integrate WhatsApp Business directly into Microsoft Teams with Babbels to streamline communication across your organization!

Your organization reaches customers via WhatsApp, used by 99% of all Dutch people. However, standard WhatsApp isn’t permitted for business use, and WhatsApp Business has limitations, like a 5-user limit and no individualized handling. Moreover, alternative WhatsApp services are often costly.

title: ask.it
shortDescription: Encourage meeting participation and capture key feedback using ask.it.
Description:
It has become increasingly commonplace to co-ordinate meetings over Microsoft Teams and this is providing participants with a convenient platform to more easily communicate, discuss and keep up-to-date on topics across and outwith an organisation.

It can be difficult however (and near impossible in very large groups), to ensure meetings are kept engaging for all attendees and that there are suitable opportunities to share any feedback and opinions.

**ask.it** is a solution which enables Meeting Owners to:
 - Easily and effectively capture anonymous feedback from attendees during Teams meetings, creating a safe space to share honestly.
 - Use the **ask.it** meeting bot to prompt attendees to submit comments, provide feedback or use emoticons to respond to any questions.
 - Share anonymous responses to enable discussion with the meeting group.
 - Revisit responses to past questions using the **ask.it** dashboard.

To begin using **ask.it**, simply download and 'Add to a Meeting'. For any questions and to get in touch with our team, please contact us at [info@flyte.cloud](info@flyte.cloud).

title: CloudCan GPT
shortDescription: CloudCan GPT 4 Application is a CloudCan Product and provides your AI assistant
Description:
CloudCan GPT Application is a versatile tool designed by CloudCan to enhance productivity within corporate environments. By leveraging the capabilities of AI through a chatbot interface, it introduces a flexible solution to meet both general and specific organizational needs.

Here's a breakdown of what CloudCan GPT offers:

**Key Features:**
- **Dual Modes:** The application operates in two main modes, "Classic AI" for standard inquiries and a "Corporate Segmentation" for more specialized, company-specific questions. This ensures that users can navigate easily between general information searches and more focused, internal queries.
- **Integration with Microsoft Teams:** Accessibility is streamlined through integration with Microsoft Teams, requiring just a Microsoft 365 account. This makes the application readily available to a wide range of corporate companies, facilitating easy adoption across various departments.
- **Target Audience:** It caters primarily to company employees across all departments, making it a versatile tool for a broad audience within an organization.
- **Secure Document Handling:** In the corporate mode, documents can be uploaded in collaboration with CloudCan that remain exclusive to their company, emphasizing the application's commitment to security and privacy.
- **HR and Production Department Utility:** HR departments can utilize it as a Q&A module for frequently asked questions, while production departments can leverage it for maintaining product quality standards, showcasing its versatility.

**Advanced Features:**

- Active chatbot features for dynamic interaction. 

**Technological Advancements:**
- **Latest AI Version:** Utilizing the most recent advancements in AI technology to ensure smarter and more efficient responses.
- **Enhanced Memory Capacity:** A significant upgrade to a 64,000-word short-term memory from the standard 8,000, enhancing its ability to handle complex and lengthy conversations.

- **Multilingual Support:** Works across 25 languages, including but not limited to French, German, and Spanish, ensuring wide-ranging accessibility.

**Conclusion:**
CloudCan GPT Application stands out as a sophisticated AI-powered tool designed to streamline operations and enhance productivity within corporate settings. Its integration into Microsoft Teams, coupled with its advanced features and technological capabilities, positions it as a highly valuable asset for companies looking to leverage AI for various departmental needs. title: NTTPCサポートAI
shortDescription: AIを通じたコミュニケーション窓口や情報の提供
Description:
NTTPCサポートAIはNTTPCコミュニケーションズ（NTTPC）のAIチャットボットサービスです。
本アプリでは、一般的な事項に関するAIへの相談や会話を行うことができるほか、AIから定期的にイベントや連絡先の確認などの通知を受け取ったり、お困りごとのヒアリングを受けることができます。

- ユーザーの入力に対して回答を生成すること

title: Standup and PTO tracker | Sup
shortDescription: Standup bot for keeping your team on track during daily async standup meetings
Description:
[The complete standup bot](https://supbot.com/?ref=teams) for keeping your team on track during daily async standup meetings. 🚀

Sup can facilitate a standup meeting, retrospective meeting, or other meetings asynchronously for your team using either a chat-based interface or a dialogue window.

**Features** 🔥

📝 Conduct Daily Standups
🏖️ Track Holiday
📋 Run Quick surveys & polls
😎 Monitor Team’s Mood.

With a number of features available on the Sup, remote working only gets smoother. Let's have a look:

1. 🤝 **Conduct standups & follow-ups**: Sup provides team standup updates. You can see how everything works with direct questions and answers. Asynchronous standups and multiple follow-ups are a click away.

2. 🏖️ **Vacation Tracker**: Request, approve, view, and manage vacations with Sup. Holiday tracking is easy with regular updates and a dashboard of employee leaves analytics.

3. 📋 **Create surveys & polls**: Remote working can become a lot easier when you can make quick decisions based on surveys and quick polls. Make it simple for your team to voice their opinions.

4. 👻 **Track team mood**: Sup? Is that what you want to ask your team? Using mood tracking, understand your team's emotions. To gauge team morale, use it with a follow-up like standups. The anonymity of responses allows for honest answers.

Trusted by small and big-leaguers like Iterable, Adobe, PWC, Stripe, MailChimp, Starbucks, Mixpanel, Dell, Warner Bros, and more.

Try us; our core features will remain **free forever**.

title: Interprefy-Translation
shortDescription: Add simultaneous language interpretation to any meeting or event
Description:
With Interprefy, you can add real-time language interpretation from professional conference interpreters to your Microsoft Teams meetings.
Connect people in their own language by utilizing Interprefy's powerful combination of cloud-based remote simultaneous interpretation technology, unmatched language talent and professional services.
Benefit from Interprefy's unparalleled experience from delivering over 30,000 multilingual events for organizations of all shapes and sizes.
With the Interprefy add-on for Microsoft Teams you can:+ Make your meetings truly multilingual by adding professional human interpreters+ Make your meetings more inclusive and accessible+ Join the meeting in a language you're comfortable in+ Seamlessly integrate Interprefy into Microsoft Teams
If you are not an existing Interprefy client, or you work with one of our partner Language Service Providers, please send us an email to [teams@interprefy.com](mailto:teams@interprefy.com) and we will set up your account accordingly.
**Pre-requisites**+ The meeting organizer needs to book their Interprefy event with Interprefy in advance of the meeting. Contact us at [https://www.interprefy.com/contact-us](https://www.interprefy.com/contact-us)
**Limitations**+ Interprefy Add-on is not available on Mobile and Surface Hub devices+ Closing the Interprefy app from inside the Microsoft Teams meeting will stop interpretation

shortDescription: Office2SharePoint for Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft Office

All this, you get directly in your Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft Office at the tip of your hand. Combined with a Bot you will be able to get information on demand. Simply type “Help” or “Hi o2s” and I will help you getting exactly the file you are looking from SharePoint, Microsoft Teams or OneDrive.

title: Raygun
shortDescription: Receive actionable error and performance alerts in Microsoft Teams.
Description:

Build a world-class issue resolution workflow that combines the powerful diagnostics surfaced in Raygun with the convenience of designated Microsoft Teams channels. 

Use Raygun for Microsoft Teams to:

* ⚡ Quickly identify and manage errors and performance regressions before your customers notice
* 👥 Keep your whole team looped in about new issues to ensure the right people are working on a fix
* 🔎 Receive custom alerts tailored to your needs so nothing falls through the cracks

Raygun gives you the ability to detect, diagnose, and resolve issues quickly to ensure you’re delivering flawless digital experiences for your customers.

Raygun works with all major programming languages and frameworks. Thousands of development teams worldwide trust Raygun to offer unrivaled insight into the health of their software, delivering lightning-fast and error-free experiences for millions of customers, every day. 

A Raygun account is required to use Raygun for Microsoft Teams. Not a Raygun customer? No problem; Raygun is free to try, with no credit-card required – take your [free 14-day trial](https://app.raygun.com/signup) to get started today.

Read Raygun’s [documentation](https://raygun.com/documentation/product-guides/integrations/microsoft-teams-plan-integration/#microsoft-teams-for-alerting) for more information. For feedback or support, please contact support@raygun.com.

title: Inperly
shortDescription: Verify identity and sign electronically
Description:
We transfer classic customer service from the office or bank branch to the digital world.

You need to confirm the identity of your interlocutor? Nothing easier. You will verify it based on identity documents from 200 countries around the world and facial biometrics. You want to verify the identity of many people? No problem, all people will do it in a few moments, and only the host will see personal data.

Just confirming your identity is not enough and you need to sign the document electronically?

You can do this within teams or send a link from Inperly to any email address. The user will be able to:
- read the contract
- if he or she has a long-term qualified signature, sign the document (works with mSzafir, SimplySign, eDO App)
- If he or she does not have an electronic signature, we will issue it on the fly based on identity document and facial biometrics, or by confirming his identity in electronic banking.

The signed document will automatically return to the sender and the signer.

If you want to sign the document yourself, you can do it in several ways
- from the Teams channel
- from files
- from the dashboard

Thanks to the dashboard, you can view the statistics of signed files, or verify whether the sent document is already signed.

We currently work with the following providers:
- IDnow (identity verification, issuing a qualified signature and signing)
- eDO App (identity verification and advanced or qualified signature)
- mSzafir (issue of a qualified signature and signing)
- SimplySign (qualified signature signing)

For more information, please visit www.inperly.com

title: HubSpot
shortDescription: Notifications for Microsoft Teams with HubSpot
Description: This bot is automatically added upon installation of Microsoft Teams with HubSpot, it cannot be used without it being installed from HubSpot. The bot sends notifications from HubSpot to the user's personal chat. All the settings that can be done are managed through HubSpot. Notifications for Microsoft Teams with HubSpot allows users to get notified in Microsoft Teams when a user starts a chat conversation and replies directly in your inbox so you can follow up right away and provide an excellent customer experience. title: Callgoose SQIBS
shortDescription: Automation, Real-time Incident Management and Incident Response platform.

Essential tool for your Intranet, Digital Workplace or collaborative platform, the unified directory saves you time on a daily basis and allows your employees to discover themselves in new ways, by cross-researching and dynamically exploring the organization chart.

 [Create Account](https://admin.colligo365.com/login/signin?requestFrom=trial&requestProduct=ccm) | [Contact Us](mailto:Sales@Colligo.com)

shortDescription: Beekast is a collaborative platform to speed up your meetings.

- Want to make decisions? Use Beekast to share the progress and organize the next steps as a team. Align all your participants and determine the next steps with the taken actions and decisions.

Apono allows end users like developers to request, approve and gain access with Microsoft Teams. This offers a frictionless, streamlined access management experienced natively in the organization's ChatOps tool.

1. Create a request
2. Follow the status of the request in the Teams app
3. Use access details after requests are granted

Sign up to Apono here: https://app.apono.io/account/sign-up

title: Trivia Games and Watercooler
shortDescription: Challenge your teammates with Trivia & bond with them over quick work breaks.
Description:
**With Trivia, spark conversations, bond over social breaks and bring camaraderie & fun to your Microsoft Teams!** 

**Instant Quizzes, Unpopular Opinions, Pictionary, and Virtual Water Cooler. All in one place.** 

Bring camaraderie, collaboration, and connection amongst your people. Play Trivia, spark conversations, and bond over social breaks at work. 

Long story short, you can use Trivia for:

 - 🎯 Employee Engagement 

 - 🙋 Employee Onboarding/Icebreakers 

 - 💪 Virtual Team Building 

Now the longer version… What makes Trivia unique? 🎁 

 - **✌️ Catch up with your team over Quizzes, icebreakers, and Pictionary** 

   - Trivia provides a quick 5-minute break to your regular workday. And everything happens in real-time, meaning your team gets together to play it! In fact, Trivia is more about casual banter, friendly conversations, and discussions it brings to your table. Well, that's the whole point of playing it, isn’t it? 

   - List of features in Trivia: 

     - 🎉 Instant Quizzes 

     - ⚒️ Customizable Quizzes 

     - 🆚 True or False 

     - 🎬 Image Quizzes 

     - 📈 Unpopular Opinions 

     - 📊 Customizable Polls

title: FlatFrog Board
shortDescription: FlatFrog Board, the online collaborative whiteboard platform for hybrid teams.
Description:
Hybrid collaboration made easy

As your team continues to work from the office and home, grow your productivity in a hybrid mode. Team members participate on the hybrid whiteboard as though all are in the same room. 

* Intuitive interface, no training required  
* Real-time collaboration – Everyone can contribute with real-time annotations, drawings, images and notes.   
* Customize your project with ease - Use the built-in templates or incorporate your own templates. 
* Whiteboard access before and after the meeting – You or your team can prepare or improve the whiteboard before, during and after the meeting.  
* Collaborate effectively from anywhere - Whether at home on your laptop or in the office meeting room, everyone participates on the hybrid whiteboard as though they are in the same room. 

**Use FlatFrog Board across your entire Microsoft Teams workspace**

* Teams meetings integration 
* Teams calendar integration 
* Tab with embedded boards 
 
**FlatFrog Board for Teams meetings integration**

Open a new or existing FlatFrog board during any Microsoft Teams meeting. Use for real-time Whiteboarding, Kanban, Workshop or anything in between. FlatFrog Board is ideal for hybrid teams that are collaborating from different physical locations.   

**FlatFrog Board for Teams calendar integration**

Embed a FlatFrog Board into any Microsoft Teams calendar invite and give access to your collaborators before or after the meeting. 

**Custom FlatFrog Board tab**

Insert any FlatFrog Board as a new tab in Microsoft Teams, and your participants can make updates, draw, add sticky notes and jointly collaborate.

**Links to FlatFrog Board**

[Sign up to FlatFrog Board](https://flatfrogboard.com)
[Learn more about FlatFrog Board](https://help.flatfrog.com/en/knowledge)
[Contact us for support](https://help.flatfrog.com/en/knowledge/kb-tickets/new)

title: GoWorks
shortDescription: 기업의 똑똑한 의사결정을 위한 올인원 솔루션 “GoWorks Pro 전자결재”
Description:
**This application is available in Korean.**

고우아이티의 GoWorks 서비스는 Microsoft 365와 통합되어 기업의 업무환경에 최적화된 의사결정을 지원하고 커뮤니케이션 기능을 제공하는 전자결재 서비스입니다. Microsoft 365의 핵심 서비스인 Microsoft Teams 서비스와의 통합 기능을 강화하여 웹 브라우저와 더불어 PC와 모바일 환경에서 모두 편리하게 사용 가능합니다. 고우아이티는 2012년 최초로 Office 365에서 동작하는 버전의 그룹웨어를 출시하였고 이후 2015년 GoWorks 로 서비스 명칭 변경 후 고객의 피드백을 적극 반영하며 지속적인 기능 업데이트를 제공하여 현재의 GoWorks Pro에 이르고 있습니다. 
또한 전담 기술지원팀을 운영하여 체계적인 절차를 통해 서비스 사용 중 발생할 수 있는 오류 해결을 위한 양질의 기술지원 서비스를 제공하고 있습니다. 

**[ 주요 기능 소개 ]**   

- **Microsoft Teams 통합 :** Microsoft Teams와 통합되어 PC와 모바일 전자결재를 모두 지원하며, 웹 브라우저를 통해서도 GoWorks를 사용할 수 있습니다. 

- **Microsoft 365와 통합된 전자결재 알림 제공(Teams, 이메일) :** 주 업무 공간인 이메일과 Teams에서 전자결재 관련 공지, 진행상황에 대한 알림 기능을 제공합니다.   

- **세련되고 편리한 UI/UX :** 최근 게시, 결재현황, 조직도로 구성된 홈 화면을 통해 공지사항, 휴가현황 등 다양한 정보를 한 눈에 파악 가능하며 신속한 업무 진행을 지원합니다.   

- **유연한 휴가관리 지원 :** 법령과 사내 운영 규칙에 따라 달라지는 기업별 휴가 기준을 전자결재에 반영할 수 있도록 유연한 휴가관리 기능을 제공합니다.   

- **철저한 문서보안을 통해 안전한 자산보호 :** 기업내 각종 문서들을 통합적으로 관리하고 접근 권한을 제어함으로써 기업의 소중한 정보 자산을 안전하게 보호할 수 있습니다.   

- **ERP 등 기업내 유관 시스템과 유연한 연동 제공 :** 다양한 유관 시스템과 연동하여 편의성을 높였습니다.   

이 응용프로그램은 간단한 기본 정보(회사명, 신청자 이름, 신청자 이메일)입력을 통해 체험해 보실 수 있습니다.   

문의하기 : [https://cloud.gowit.co.kr/tech-support/](https://cloud.gowit.co.kr/tech-support/)

title: CorporateFitness.app
shortDescription: Connected and engaging step and fitness challenges to boost team well-being.
Description:
Create your connected step or fitness challenge. Connect with all popular fitness trackers, or use our app to track an activity or your daily steps.

Get started and launch your first challenge within a few minutes!
1. Click "Add to a team" to add us to a Microsoft Teams channel. Alternatively, click the little arrow next to that button and select "Add to a chat" to add to a chat
2. Create a challenge using our 5-step wizard and publish your event when all is ready to go
3. Add your users to the challenge. They will receive a personal invite to join the challenge and download our iOS or Android app

Microsoft Teams integration is available as part of Free (up to 5 users) and Pro plans (unlimited users).

Have questions or want to learn more? [Drop us a line](mailto:hello@corporatefitness.app) or visit [our website](https://corporatefitness.app)

Key Features

⌚ Integrations with all popular apps and trackers
Connect your Garmin, Polar, Suunto, COROS, Fitbit, Strava, MapMyRun, or other GPS app or tracker to automatically sync your activities.

Don't have a GPS tracker? No worries! Either use the integrated tracker in our iOS or Android app, or do manual entry.

🏆 Leaderboards
The searchable and customizable leaderboards show the real-time progress of each challenge. As organizer you are in control of the formatting of each leaderboard.

Leaderboards are available in real-time from within Teams!

🌍 Virtual Map
Show the progress of all participants on a virtual course map where participants move from start to finish based on their real-time progress.

📢 Event Feed
Check the progress and latest updates on the event feed. Updates can be sent as push notifications to ensure all participants of the event are aware of the latest updates. The feed can display updates, photos, selfies, results, and other relevant information during the event.

👟 Step Tracking
Use our app to automatically sync your daily steps to any step challenges you participate in! Once step tracking is enabled it will work in the background (without impacting the battery life!) and the app will regularly sync your progress in the background. Keep those steps coming!

Alternatively, connect a Garmin, Fitbit, or Apple Watch for automatic step syncing using your favorite device!

🏃‍♀️ Activity Tracking
You can track any distance-based or time-based activity using the app. Use the integrated GPS tracker to accurately track your runs, walks, and rides.

🛠 Event Dashboard
As event organizer you can use our powerful self-service dashboard to quickly create a new challenge or view the progress of your challenges. Use the wizard to launch your own challenge within a few minutes!

title: 偉盟警示通知
shortDescription: 偉盟警示通知是一款專為接收即時警示訊息的應用程式
Description:
**This app is only available in the Chinese language.**

---

# 偉盟警示通知

偉盟警示通知是一款專為接收即時警示訊息的應用程式。在個人或群組聊天室中，透過簡單的設定流程，即可快速接收關鍵通知，確保重要資訊不錯過。

---

## **主要功能與優勢**

- **即時通知**：即時將重要訊息推送至您指定的聊天室，讓您快速掌握最新動態。 
- **簡單整合**：透過對話框中的指令操作完成通知來源的關聯，無需繁瑣操作。  
- **使用便利**：安裝後即可運作，適合快速部署並投入使用。

---

## **如何開始使用？**

0. 本系統需搭配偉盟訊息通知系統，如未訂閱請先連絡我們
1. **安裝應用程式**：在 Microsoft Teams 中搜尋並安裝「偉盟警示通知」  
2. **添加 Bot 至聊天室**：選擇需要接收通知的個人或群組聊天室，並將「偉盟警示通知」的 Bot 添加至該聊天室。
3. **輸入"綁定"進行與偉盟訊息通知系統的關聯**： 
        - 群組對話中標註[偉盟警示通知]輸入"綁定"，輸入訂閱ID以及名稱，系統確認無誤後即可綁定成功。
        - 綁定成功後，於[偉盟訊息通知系統]選擇並關聯通知來源，完成後即可開始接收訊息。

---

## **相關說明**

請參考以下說明文件：  
[「偉盟警示通知說明頁面」](https://wellannotifycenter.azurewebsites.net/DirectionsAndInstructions)

---

如需更多資訊或技術支援，請隨時聯絡我們的專業支援團隊。
📧 Email: louies@wellan.com.tw
我們將竭誠為您解答並協助完成部署！

title: Laduma
shortDescription: Unlimited whiteboard, document, and application sharing for Microsoft Teams
Description:
The Laduma for Microsoft Teams Application transforms your meetings into fully multi-dimensional experiences. Unlock unlimited whiteboarding, document sharing and use of third-party applications in every Microsoft Teams meeting.
Simply download the application to access Laduma from within Microsoft Teams. Once installed, click the Laduma button at the top of the Microsoft Teams interface to open Laduma and login to your meeting. With login complete, the Laduma control panel will open to the left of the Microsoft Teams interface. From here you can begin sharing documents, screens, whiteboards, and other applications to supercharge your Microsoft Teams meeting experience.  

About Laduma
The Laduma platform transforms physical spaces into digital meeting rooms where people can meet, collaborate, and present better. Laduma brings co-located, distributed and hybrid teams together and empowers them to interact as if they were in the same room. Recapture the dynamism of in-person interaction to build better meetings, improve people performance, and drive better business outcomes.

Put People at the Heart of the Meeting Experience
•	Interact with colleagues as if you shared the same room – wherever you are.
•	Liberate co-located colleagues from laptops with large format interactive displays.

Make Meetings from Home More Productive
•	Add multiple laptop, mobile, tablet devices and displays to meetings to expand your workspace.
•	Intuitively contribute to whiteboard sessions remotely using touchscreen devices. 
•	Drive remote engagement by empowering workspace customisation.

Unleash the Potential of Existing Tools
•	Transform traditional meeting rooms into digitally enabled or immersive spaces.
•	Knit existing infrastructure, systems, and devices into an integrated meeting ecosystem.

Easily Share What’s Important
•	Share unlimited documents, data, and applications in meetings.
•	Instantly deploy whiteboards within Microsoft Teams to brainstorm or illustrate your point.
•	Leverage multiple devices, wall-mounted or full-wall immersive displays to give visibility to what matters. 

You will require a licence to access the platform and use the full features of the Laduma for Microsoft Teams application. 
To learn more about Laduma and how it could work for your organisation, contact us at [marketing@laduma.com](MAILTO:marketing@laduma.com).

title: Wirespeed
shortDescription: Interact with your users to investigate security detections
Description:
Wirespeed integrates with Microsoft Teams to ask your users security questions about their activity and verify the actions were intended. An active Wirespeed subscription is required to use this integration. If you would like to sign up, please go to https://wirespeed.co/pricing.

For more information, please go to https://docs.wirespeed.co.

title: Copilot for Service
shortDescription: Copilot for Service modernizes service solutions in agent's flow of work.
Description:
Copilot for Service synthesizes vast amounts of data already available from trusted knowledge sources to enhance customer experiences and boost agent productivity. Without costly rip and replace efforts, Copilot for Service provides flexibility to quickly begin realizing the benefits of bringing data from existing investments in CRM and contact center solutions such as Salesforce. And since Copilot for Microsoft 365 is included in Copilot for Service license, agents are equipped more broadly with productivity enhancements in their flow of work across the tools agents already use every day, such as Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft Teams. 
 
 A Microsoft 365 Global Administrator is required to install and set up Copilot for Service. Copilot for Service also requires a paid license in order to access the app capabilities. For more details, please visit the Copilot for Service website or contact your Microsoft representative. 
 
 Copilot for Service allows administrators and users to access content and share data outside of Microsoft 365, including with third-party customer relationship management (CRM) services. Such data sharing is subject to Microsoft and applicable third-party CRM terms and conditions. Data sharing is not enabled until administrators and users in your organization consent to connect their Microsoft work or school account with their CRM account. 
 
 Copilot for Service for Microsoft Teams will have permission to participate in Teams meetings and collect Teams meetings data such as meeting recordings and transcripts. [Click here](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2259507) for more information to get started with Copilot for Service.

title: Expense Claim
shortDescription: Expense Claim App: Making Expense Management Simple and Efficient
Description:
Simplify and streamline the management of employee expenses with the revolutionary Expense Claim App, seamlessly integrated with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, and Outlook.
 Say goodbye to the tedious task of manual expense tracking, as our app ensures accountability and empowers employees to effortlessly claim their expenses. Discover the all-in-one solution that offers the following game-changing features: 
* Record or Request for Expense: real-time. Are you requesting an expense from your workplace? Submit your request with just a few taps on your phone or desktop. 
* Claim Expenses: Reimbursements have never been easier! The Expense Claim App's robust expense claim functionality enables users to submit their claims instantly. The process is so straightforward, it makes claiming expenses a breeze. 
* Comprehensive List of Expenses: Our application provides a comprehensive list of all your expenses. This all-encompassing record not only helps you manage your financial resources more effectively but also gives you a clear picture of your spending habits. You can sort, filter, and view your expenses by categories, date ranges, and more. This level of detail is sure to help you make more informed decisions about your spending. 
* Approve Expenses: Are you an approver in your organization's finance department? If so, our application will take the workload off your shoulders. The Approve Expenses feature simplifies the approval process, allowing you to manage and approve expenses with ease. This ensures quicker reimbursements and happier employees. 
* Configure Currency, Personnel, and Category: Whether you're dealing with foreign currencies, our application has got you covered. You can easily configure the app to deal with multiple currencies, ensuring your expenses are accurately recorded no matter where you are. Moreover, you can categorize your expenses - be it personal or work-related - giving you more control over your finances. 
The Expense Claim App is more than just a finance tool. It's an all-in-one solution designed to simplify expense management, providing you with more time and resources to focus on what truly matters. With the Expense Claim App, experience the power of effortless expense tracking and management at your fingertips. 

Please note: To use the application, your organization must have active users within your Microsoft 365 tenant and an Azure AD app registration would also be needed. Please get in touch with our support team at [be@relianceinfosystems.com](mailto:be@relianceinfosystems.com?subject=Configuration%20Needed%20for%20the%Expense%Claim%20App) for more details.

title: Humantelligence for Teams
shortDescription: Smarter Collaboration for Better Performance
Description:
Humantelligence ("HT") helps teams connect, communicate, and collaborate more effectively. Our solution provides personalized insights directly into Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365 and Outlook, now enhanced with AI-powered coaching.

**Key Features:**
- Personalized communication tips in emails, chats, and meetings
- AI-powered HT Coach for on-demand guidance
- Comprehensive, 12-minute personality assessment
- Team balance and diversity insights for leaders

With Humantelligence, leaders can create more balanced & diverse project teams, reduce friction between team members, and improve productivity. Our AI-enhanced solution helps clients improve team effectiveness and employee engagement while maximizing investment in their current communication technologies.

**New: HT Coach**
Leveraging ChatGPT integration, the HT Coach feature provides:
- Personalized answers to questions on topics like effective communication, conflict resolution, and leadership
- AI-generated insights based on users’ personality profiles
- Seamless integration with the Humantelligence user experience

**More Effective Collaboration**
The way we work has changed. Distributed teams along with generational differences and diverse personalities make collaboration, connection & communication more difficult. Humantelligence makes it easier.

Our solution empowers employees with tools for more effective collaboration:
- Surface communication and collaboration tips within email, chat, and meetings
- Access AI-powered coaching for real-time guidance on interpersonal challenges
- Foster a human-centered employee experience and improve engagement
- Create an equal playing field for remote employees

**Better Inclusion & Belonging**
Encourage more inclusive communication & belonging during meetings by:
- Building a safe space for connecting and celebrating differences
- Providing AI-assisted insights on inclusive communication strategies
- Empowering employees with a better understanding of themselves and others
- Putting collaboration insights and AI coaching at their fingertips

To use this Add-in, you need an active Humantelligence account. Learn more at [humantelligence.com](https://www.humantelligence.com) or contact us at [support@humantelligence.com](mailto:support@humantelligence.com).

title: Perfect Wiki
shortDescription: Build and organize your knowledge base of company resources
Description: Do you know that you can store all your company SOPs, tutorials, and user guides right inside Microsoft Teams? Perfect Wiki is an intuitive and detail-oriented knowledge database that lets you store and edit your SOPs, user guides, HR practices, onboarding flows, and more—right inside your Microsoft Teams/Outlook/Microsoft 365. Our mission is one of simplicity—we want you to have the versatility of a third party knowledge management tool, while sparing you the headache of switching between workspaces. Want to know if Perfect Wiki is right for your team? Want a personalized step-by-step tutorial on the features and installation process? [Book a live video consultation with us today!](https://perfectwiki.com/book/) Perfect Wiki works with Microsoft 365 Copilot. Example prompt: "Find Perfect Wiki pages that has 'onboarding' word".  Perfect Wiki uses AI to generate content, if you need more information about our AI model, come across any objectionable AI-generated content, or have any questions at all, please reach out to us at [hello@perfectwiki.com](mailto:hello@perfectwiki.com)

shortDescription: Streamline workflows with intelligent task prioritization and collaboration.

Description: Priority Matrix Government helps your team focus on high-impact work. Manage personal tasks, balance workloads, and set team priorities easily. Based on time-tested methodology, Priority Matrix Gov is the leading Eisenhower matrix solution for teams that get things done. In the 1-on-1 view, see your shared emails, events, files, and tasks all in one place. Deep links keep you in Microsoft Teams, so you never have to open an external app. You'll only get alerts for big updates. Use the agenda view, calendar, Gantt charts, and chat commands to stay organized. It works great with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Contact us Help Getting started In order to use this app, you need to have an active Priority Matrix Government account.

title: Beekeeper Connector
shortDescription: Connect desk and frontline workforce by bridging Microsoft Teams and Beekeeper.
Description:
Beekeeper’s mobile platform is the single point of contact for your frontline workforce. With all communications and tools in one place, Beekeeper empowers frontline employees to be more agile, more productive, and create a safer workplace. Beekeeper's secure platform offers an employee experience tailored to frontline workers at the scale you need.

With Beekeeper’s Microsoft Teams integration, you can connect your desk and frontline workforce using the communication tools they already know and love.

Amplify Teams announcements by sharing them with your frontline workforce in a Beekeeper Stream of your choice. Comments and likes will be shared across platforms.

Capture employee feedback and suggestions from frontline workers by automatically sending Beekeeper form submissions to a dedicated Teams channel.

Now, you can easily share content between Teams and Beekeeper and maximize your investment in employee communication across your desk and non-desk workforces.

Don't have Beekeeper yet? Get started [here](https://www.beekeeper.io).

title: TeamOne
shortDescription: A Collaborative Whiteboard for creating engaging and effective meetings.
Description:
With TeamOne, share an infinite board with meeting participants for live collaboration during a conference call. You can allow meeting participants to either contribute to the board or simply view the board contents.
Facilitate online meetings with TeamOne integrated in Microsoft Teams:
1. Prepare meeting materials
2. Generate ideas and plans during a meeting
3. Review meetings notes
TeamOne enables users to collaborate in real time.
1. Edit boards live
2. Save changes automatically
3. Synchronize boards for all users instantly
With TeamOne's visualization and collaboration tools, users will be empowered to share their thoughts and strategies, as well as collect feedback. Learn more about TeamOne in [our help docs](https://myviewboard.com/kb/en_US/getting-started-with-teamone/what-is-teamone-page)
**Visualization tools**
- Build diagrams like flowcharts and mind maps with pen, shape, line, and text tools.
- Annotate various file types like PDF, PPT, and DOC using a connected Microsoft OneDrive (for Business) or a local drive.
- Search images, icons, and GIPHY animations for more creative options to collaborate or make a meeting fun.
**Facilitation tools**
Presenters can use a laser pointer to draw an audience's attention to key parts of a presentation. Leave comments for other board users to review asynchronously. You can also initiate a vote to let collaborators decide on the best ideas and plans.
**Collaboration tools**
Add sticky notes to share and review feedback. These tools work seamlessly in in-person and hybrid meetings.
**Availability**
TeamOne is available to all users of Microsoft Teams after first creating an account. If it's your first time using TeamOne, sign up with a single sign-on (SSO) or by setting up an account with a password. Once you've made your account, have full access to the TeamOne app within Microsoft Teams.
**Sign Up Flow for TeamOne**
1. Start Teams app. Click [**Sign In**](https://teamone.viewsonic.com/signin?utm_source=MicrosoftTeams&utm_medium=integration&utm_campaign=teamone-signin_WS-SEG_global_&utm_term=TeamOne&utm_content=Link_application_overview). 
2. Don’t have an account yet? Click [**Sign Up**](https://teamone.viewsonic.com/signup?utm_source=MicrosoftTeams&utm_medium=integration&utm_campaign=20240509_teamone-signup_WS-SEG_global_&utm_term=TeamOne&utm_content=Link_application_overview).
3. Fill in the required field and click **Sign Up**.
 4. An Email will be sent to verify the email address. 
5. Follow the Email’s instruction and click **Activate**. 
[Read More](https://teamone.viewsonic.com/teamsapp/desc)
TeamOne is continuing to develop even more fun and powerful features, so expect more collaboration enhancement in future releases!

title: CallRail
shortDescription: Monitor your call and form tracking campaigns from CallRail.
Description:
CallRail gives users the power to discover which ads, keywords, and campaigns bring valuable leads to their business, but monitoring every inbound call, text, and form submission can be overwhelming.

The CallRail app is a powerful new tool for CallRail users that makes monitoring and adjusting your call and form tracking more convenient than ever.

	• Great for users in charge of multiple accounts
	• Get daily performance summaries 
	• Receive alerts when something needs your attention
	• See real-time notification for inbound calls, texts, and form submissions. 
	• Respond to texts directly.

In order to use this app, users must have an active CallRail account. You can create a CallRail account with a free 14-day trial at https://www.callrail.com/signup. Learn more about CallRail at https://www.callrail.com.

title: Summarize by Moodbit
shortDescription: The ultimate AI meeting summary tool designed specifically for teams
Description:
This innovative meeting notes app harnesses advanced AI technology to automatically generate accurate meeting summaries, detailed transcription summaries, and actionable insights with just a few taps.

Moodbit's Summarize makes it effortless to summarize meetings of any size. Whether you’re attending the meeting live or catching up later, our smart solution turns real-time Microsoft Teams transcriptions into clear, concise meeting notes and highlights. Enjoy features such as:

• Instant AI Meeting Summaries in Microsoft Teams – get the complete Microsoft Teams meeting summary you need without manual note-taking.
• AI-Powered Sentiment Analysis in Teams – understand team dynamics via microsoft teams sentiment analysis that detects positive, neutral, or negative tones within your meetings.
• Automated Task Recommendations – receive ai meeting summary app insights and suggested tasks to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

With Moodbit’s Summarize, you can generate meeting insights using AI to streamline your workflow and improve productivity. Fully integrated with Microsoft Teams, there’s no need for additional software or complex setups—just download from the Microsoft Teams store and start transforming your meetings into valuable, searchable data.

Ideal for SMEs and large organizations alike, ensuring you capture every critical detail with clarity and intelligence. It’s the perfect solution if you’re searching for an ai summary meeting teams solution or a comprehensive Microsoft Teams transcription summary tool, Moodbit's Summarize empowers your team to achieve more.

Ready to elevate your meeting productivity? Download Moodbit's Summarize today from the Microsoft Teams store. For more information or support, visit our [website](https://mymoodbit.com/gpt) or contact our customer support at [support@mymoodbit.com](mailto:support@mymoodbit.com). Experience the future of automated, AI-powered meeting processing and never miss a beat during your team discussions again!
