title: PepTalk
shortDescription: This app provides access to 100+ learning sessions to be watched with your team.
Description:
PepTalk makes learning people love with real-world experts from the worlds of business, sport, arts, media, adventure. Our topics are programmed monthly to make sure they are fresh & relevant to the needs of your people.
The PepTalk App provides access to 100+ sessions that can be watched together with your team on Microsoft Teams. Using the PepTalk App is simple, you just need to launch the app from your meeting, add the session that you want to watch to your playlist and then click on Watch together.
To access the content, you need to have an active PepTalk membership. If you still don't have a PepTalk membership you can get yours on https://www.getapeptalk.com/.

title: cAPPisco
shortDescription: Provide live simultaneous interpretation by professional interpreters
Description:
cAPPisco is a listening app you can add to your Microsoft Teams meetings to provide live simultaneous interpretation by professional conference interpreters and/or sign language interpreters in a wide variety of languages. It is a user-friendly application that gives all participants of a multilingual meeting the opportunity to participate in the language of his/her choice. cAPPisco offers the interpreters a professional virtual interpreting environment and the listeners an extremely user-friendly listening app, where you can listen to the language channel (spoken and sign languages) of your choice with excellent sound quality. It is an innovative application developed for and by interpreters to make your multilingual meetings effective, inclusive, comfortable and sustainable. Let all language barriers disappear with this interpreting and customer-friendly online solution for 'live' simultaneous interpretation. 
 **Working method** 
 As a meeting organiser you request an interpreting session with the desired configuration (time, languages, title, logo) in advance from cAPPisco at [https://cappisco.com/en/tailor-made-options/](https://cappisco.com/en/tailor-made-options/). Or as a meeting organiser you have a MY cAPPisco Plan and therefore your own cAPPisco account. Do this before adding this to the specific Teams meeting. 
 **Advantages** 
 When you open the cAPPisco listening app in Microsoft Teams, you will be able to select the language of your choice. You can also listen to the original again at any time. Our app will automatically switch to the original speaker if no interpretation is needed for you selected language. 
 **Restrictions** 
 cAPPisco app for Microsoft Teams is not available on Mobile and Surface Hub devices. When you switch to other features (chat, participants list, etc.) in the sidepanel of the Microsoft Teams interface, this will interrupt the simultaneous translation. However, you can easily go back to the language interpretation feature by clicking on the cAPPisco logo again.

title: CoreEngage | Altigen
shortDescription: CoreEngage Omni-Channel Contact Center for Microsoft Teams
Description:
CoreEngage from Altigen is a Contact Center and Social Media Center for Microsoft Teams.  Ensure efficient operations, superior customer service, and employee productivity - all within Microsoft Teams.

CoreEnage native applications include:

Agents
CoreEngage Agents can manage customer interactions across multiple channels such as voice, chat, and social messaging. Benefits include:
· Access to omni-channel communication including voice, webchat, WhatsApp, and social media.
· Integration with CRM systems for real-time customer information.
· Intelligent call routing ensures that the right agent receives the right conversation.
· Ability to handle multiple interactions simultaneously through Microsoft Teams.
· Instant insights into call status, interaction history, and customer profiles for better service

Supervisors
Supervisors in CoreEngage oversee the performance of agents and ensure smooth contact center operations, including the ability to monitor real-time activity and intervene when necessary
· Live monitoring of queues and agent performance, including calls in progress, wait times, and abandoned calls.
· Override agent status and assign specific tasks or calls to agents.
· Detailed reporting on agent activity, performance, and customer satisfaction metrics.
· Queue management for distributing workload and optimizing service efficiency.
· Insights into agent skill sets for assigning complex tasks to the right personnel.

Administrator
Administrators have the highest level of control over the CoreEngage platform, managing configurations, integrations, and system-wide settings.
· Full control over user roles, permissions, and access to specific functions in the platform.
· Set up and configure communication channels, including webchat, WhatsApp, and voice services.
· Integrate with CRM systems and third-party apps for seamless data flow.
· Customize workflows and automation to streamline business processes.
· Full access to data privacy and security settings to ensure GDPR compliance.

In order to use this app. Users must have an active account, for more information on activating CoreEngage, please contact: [coreengage@altigen.com](mailto:coreengage@altigen.com).

shortDescription: A file explorer for structured access to documents & files by Solutions2Share
Description:
*File Manager – More Structure and Quick Access for Documents & Files in Microsoft Teams* 


 File Manager is a fully functional file explorer for Microsoft Teams, offering quicker access to files in different teams, permission management, an ordered folder structure and integrated document previews.


*Quick Access*

No need to change teams before you can access the files. Simply open File Manager and access all folders of all teams in just one view.


*Permissions for documents*

Control permissions and access, share individual documents or even entire folders and keep track of confidential data.


*Ordered Folder Structure*

Work with a familiar user interface and your familiar folder structures. Display them fully integrated in Microsoft Teams.


*Preview & Metadata*

View document previews of Microsoft file types as well as PDFs fully integrated in Microsoft Teams and enrich documents with your metadata.


*Document Management for Microsoft Teams*

Bring the full power of SharePoint document management directly to Teams. Explore document libraries and folder structures, create custom views, share documents both internally and externally directly from Teams. Assign tasks, notes, or metadata to documents and get a quick document preview.


*Features*

File Explorer with 
- Tree view navigation
- Folder navigation
- Metadata preview
- Permission overview
- External sharing
- Document preview



*Get started right away*

You do not need to handle any installation process. Simply add File Manager via the Teams app store and get started in just one minute!


Respective users must have a valid account in order to access the File Manager application.
If you need an active File Manager account, please [contact us](mailto:sales@solutions2share.com) to get a license for the File Manager application

title: SmartDA
shortDescription: SmartDA 透過 HR 對話機器人提供的對話式 AI 支援，協助您的員工發揮真正的潛力。
Description: 借助 SmartDA，為員工提供 Teams 渠道的無縫搜索體驗。SmartDA 利用您的知識庫、常見問題解答和指南無縫回答員工查詢。SmartDA 直接由 Intumit 的 SmartRobot NLU 平台支援，可以簡化繁瑣的內容並加速服務交付，使其成為可延伸的解決方案，藉由員工的查詢問題，SmartDA 實時提供回覆，透過上下文的語意理解，還可以不斷地精進 SmartDA 回覆的品質，並建立客戶自有的 SmartDA 人物風格設定。SmartDA 可用於 HR 的多種用途，從入職、培訓、回覆薪資問題及福利等。從新人入職開始，以自助式的方式註冊公司內部系統，並引導入職培訓，SmartDA 可以回覆公司內部的常見問題和政策，也包含薪資、福利及承保對象、保費和其他相關訊息。確認同事之間的時間表，更可以透過自然語言對話的方式，完成會議室申請及請假申請，若您想了解更多有關 SmartDA 的應用與合作，歡迎來信 sales@intumit.com 與我們聯絡。

title: My AskAI
shortDescription: Your customer support team's AI assistant, trained on all your help docs.
Description:
My AskAI is your support team's own AI assistant, giving them instant, accurate, answers to questions about your business or product, trained on all your company’s knowledge base and website.

You can use My AskAI within Teams as an individual, to privately get answers to your questions. Or you can collaborate within a channel and get answers to questions so the rest of your team can see them as well.

To use this app, you must have an active account with My AskAI. Please sign up following the steps below.

-------

To get started:

1. Please go to https://myaskai.com/ to create your account and add your content (<10 mins)

2. Within your My AskAI dashboard, open 'Chatbot setup > Integrations' and click on the Team logo to get your AI assistant's ID and API Key

3. Install My AskAI within your Teams workspace/account (as an admin)

4. Within Teams, select the 'Connect My AskAI' button and input your ID and API Key

-------

How do I ask a question within Teams?

To ask questions (or follow up questions) to your AskAI within Teams, simply add My AskAI to a channel and then @My AskAI followed by your question.

Or you can start a new Chat with My AskAI and ask a question privately.

For example, if you'd uploaded documents about your onboaring process, you might ask: '@My AskAI what's our onboarding process?'

All responses are generated by AI. Please email team@myaskai.com to report inappropriate content.

-------

How to add or manage content for my AI assistant?

Content can only be added on https://myaskai.com/ within your account.

-------

What type of content can I add to My AskAI?

Within My AskAI, you'll be able to add your entire company website, connect your knowledge base sources or upload files directly.

-------

Can I use my AI assistant outside of Teams?

Yes, you can supercharge your customer support by adding your AI assistant to your site, as well as Teams, to answer customer questions directly. This must be setup and managed within your My AskAI dashboard.

-------

How do I disconnect my AI assistant from Teams?

Please type @My AskAI and select 'Disconnect'

title: Relate
shortDescription: Bring sales discipline to meetings : feedback, product research and fulfilment.
Description:
Bring the sales discipline to your meeting using Relate across the experience, from agenda setting through feedback and on to fulfilment. Use the app through your meeting to stick to your customers' agenda. Give them a safe space to add to the agenda and share reactions, comments and reviews in private with you. Give your customers a place to conduct what they need in order to make a purchasing decision without having to leave the meeting. Research your product, book a follow up meeting, answer custom questions and search for ways to buy your product all while staying in the meeting. Meanwhile the app is collating timely and objective feedback for you to share with your colleagues after the meeting. 

In order to use this app. Users must have an active Relate account, please contact our support team for more details at meetings@trustrelate.com or visit us today at https://www.trustrelate.com

title: Coordiru
shortDescription: 新しいAIキャラクターをMicrosoft Teamsに入れることで、チームの透明性を高め、コミュニケーションを効率化・高品質化することができます。
Description:
Coordiruはメンバー間の繋がりをコーディネートし、社内コミュニケーションを加速するAIキャラクターです。マネジメントの負担や、HRの負荷を大きく軽減することができます。  
具体的には下記のような機能が実装されており、個別にオン・オフの設定も可能です。
- 呼び出し  
  自身が参加していないスレッドで、事前に登録しておいたキーワードが登場すると、メンションとDMで呼び出しをしてくれる機能です。これにより情報へのアクセスコストが減らせるだけでなく、チームメンバーが何に興味があるかがわかることで、今後のコミュニケーションに際して、そのメンバーを会話に最初から追加するなどの対応ができるようになります。
- トレンドウォッチャー  
  所定の期間（例えば、1週間など）の間に、Coordiruが参加しているチームで多く登場したキーワードをランキング形式で集計することが可能です。
- 画伯  
  AIによる自動生成の絵を作成することができます。これにより、アイディエーションに際して、意見がより出やすい環境を作ることなどもできます。
- 雑談  
  DMで直接Coordiruと会話をすることができます。雑談の応答は、最先端のAI会話生成モデルにより作成されており、感情を持っているかのような自然な会話を楽しむことができます。
- 隠れ蓑  
  ユーザーがCoordiruとして発話をすることができます。これにより、例えば経費精算のリマインドなど、人が行うと少しストレスを感じるような連絡でも、キャラクターから行うことで、ポストをする人も読む人も、ストレスが軽減されます。
- 翻訳  
  自動で入力された言語を識別し、事前に設定しておいた言語に翻訳ができます。例えば、事前に英語・中国語・日本語を登録していた場合、日本語で入力されたポストを、自動的に英語と中国語に翻訳を行ってくれます。  
  なお翻訳にあたっては、外部サービスであるDeepLを使用しています。

またチームごとに個別にCoordiruを導入することができるため、例えば機密情報などを扱うチームなどにはCoordiruを入れないように設定することも可能です。

shortDescription: Enjoy 1-minute mindfulness sessions designed specifically for your busy team
Description: Take a short break together to recharge and refocus. Enjoy a 1-minute mindfulness session designed specifically for your busy team – it's a simple way to reduce stress and improve focus during your meetings. This app requires a one-time access key per organization. If you do not have a key, please contact [support@rethinkcare.com](mailto:support@rethinkcare.com) to get access for your organization.

shortDescription: Runbear connects your LLM app with Microsoft Teams with ease
Description:
This no-code tool effortlessly integrates your LLM apps with Microsoft Teams, allowing you to query your LLM apps just by mentioning them during your team discussions. Enhance your productivity and focus on what truly matters. Summarize entire posts or share news URLs along with their summaries - all by simply mentioning Runbear! shortDescription: Create beautiful shared agile boards with lists, tasks and checklists
Description:
Welcome to Kanban Task Board for Microsoft Teams, where agile project management meets seamless collaboration!
Empower your teams to streamline task and workflow management using our intuitive, easy-to-use board interface.
**Features:**
* **Instant Setup:** Start using the app immediately - no sign-up required.
* **Share Tasks Anywhere:** Easily share task lists in channels or chats.
* **Drag and Drop:** Organize and prioritize tasks efficiently with drag-and-drop functionality.
* **Directory Integration:** Assign tasks directly to team members from your Microsoft Teams directory.
* **Customizable Colors and Settings:** Personalize your boards with unique background colors, icons, and more.
* **Personalized Smart Filtering:** Tailor your task view with intelligent filters, allowing you to customize and focus on the tasks most relevant to you.
* **Detailed Checklists:** Add in-depth checklists to tasks for better tracking and organization.
* **Multiple Boards per Channel:** Create and manage several boards within each channel to handle different projects efficiently.
* **Custom Task Labels:** Improve task organization with customizable labels.
* **Visual Enhancements:** Add cover images to tasks for better context.
* **External Collaboration:** Invite external collaborators to your boards for seamless cross-organization teamwork.
Enjoy our free version, which offers unlimited boards with limited lists and tasks. Upgrade to our premium version for extra features and unrestricted usage.
For assistance with setup and more information on premium features, please visit our [website](https://kanban-taskboard.com/) or reach out to us via our [contact form](https://kanban-taskboard.com/?page=contact).

The platform uses machine learning to infer and learn your data, proactively identify data issues, assess its impact, and notify those who need to know.

Monte Carlo integrates directly within Microsoft Teams so anomaly detections can be sent to any public channel in your workspace for quick triaging and collaboration.

title: Popwork
shortDescription: Popwork is the smart assistant for team leaders.
Description:
With Popwork, you can turn 1-to-1 meetings into meaningful conversations, visualize key insights about your team, and keep track of objectives and priorities. All your key Popwork updates are gathered in one place.

Get notified on Microsoft Teams when:
- You’re invited to prepare for a 1-to-1 meeting
- You receive answers in preparation for a meeting
- Someone shares feedback with you
- New comments are added by your team

To start using the Popwork app for Microsoft Teams, please create an account by signing up here: [app.pop.work/sign-up](https://app.pop.work/sign-up).

If you have any questions or need assistance, visit our [help center](https://help.pop.work/) or contact us directly at [support@pop.work](mailto:support@pop.work).

title: Stancer
shortDescription: Get paid by sending a payment link directly into your conversation.
Description:
With Stancer, develop your business online in a secure way.
No commitment, no subscription, no hidden costs.

**Get paid with Stancer, directly in Microsoft Teams.**
Stancer provides omnichannel payment solutions for retailers and independents.
With the Stancer module, you can get paid remotely by sending a payment link directly into your Microsoft Teams conversation. 

**Follow your activity**
Manage and control your business from a Dashboard. This unique dashboard gives you a consolidated view of your transactions

**Guarantee the security of your payments and your data**
Secure transactions enhance your reputation and help your business grow. This is why our payment link service is based on robust encoding protocols to ensure the protection of our customer's sensitive information. Your data and that of your customers are strictly hosted in Europe and subject to the strictest standards of data protection & preservation.

**Develop your online business, at lower cost**
- A simple, affordable offer:
We have designed our solution to be as accessible as possible so that every company can get the most out of it and grow serenely. Discover our pricing:
[https://www.stancer.com/en/pricing/](https://stancer.com/en/pricing/)

Benefit from a lower-cost online payment solution, with no subscription and no commitment. You are free to suspend or terminate the offer at any time, at no cost.

To use this application, you need an active Stancer account. This application only supports Microsoft Teams, and not Outlook nor Microsoft 365. It is also only available for payment usage from European clients.

You have any questions about Stancer? See our dedicated support page in our [documentation](https://docs.stancer.com/en/Support.html)

title: WorkHub BRAVO
shortDescription: Give peer-to-peer rewards easily with Microsoft Teams integration with BRAVO.
Description:
Employee to employee recognition is now faster and easier by integrating BRAVO with Microsoft Teams.

Employee engagement done right! That is our motto at BRAVO. Create a culture of recognition and appreciation in your organization by giving redeemable BRAVO points to peers.

Microsoft Teams integration with our BRAVO platform lets you easily award points to peers and team mates without leaving Teams.

Help
- Add to channel
  - You can recognize from any Microsoft Teams channel.
  - Type @ and select Add bots. Now, select WorkHub BRAVO. 
- Recognize
  - Type @ and select WorkHub BRAVO.
  - Select Recognize.
  - To complete the recognition, award points and type user's name who you are recognizing.
  - Optionally add a BRAVO card. 

_You must have an existing account on WorkHub BRAVO to recognize._

To learn more about BRAVO, please visit [our website](http://getbravo.io/overview).

shortDescription: High-level project plans, gantt charts and roadmaps. Easy.
Description:
Create your high-level project plan as gantt chart and keep your plans in-sync across Microsoft Teams and PowerPoint.

**Key Benefits:**
- 60 seconds from installation to your first gantt chart.
- Keep your project plan(s) in sync across all your environments.
- Share web links to your plans to your stakeholders, so they can track the current progress at all times.

**Features:**
- **Gantt Charts**: Create gantt charts to visualize your high level projectplan, timeline, schedule or roadmap directly in Microsoft Teams, PowerPoint and Excel.

title: Sketchboard
shortDescription: Online whiteboard for team diagramming
Description:
Sketchboard is an online whiteboard for teams to diagram together at the same time. Create your virtual whiteboard directly on Microsoft Teams through the Sketchboard app. Speed up your ideation process, improve your communication and boost your creativity through visual collaboration. 

**Sketchboard for Microsoft Teams channels and chats**

Add your Sketchboard boards as a tab directly on any of your Microsoft Teams channels and chats. Create a new board from scratch or open one of your existing boards to continue from where you left. 

**Sketchboard for Microsoft Teams meetings**

Embed a new or existing Sketchboard board during your Microsoft Teams meetings for a smooth collaboration experience. 

Take your Microsoft Teams experience to the next level by enabling Sketchboard app. Make visual collaboration effortless on Sketchboard’s infinite canvas by having your team create collaborative diagrams such as

- Mind Maps
- Sticky Notes
- Flowcharts and process maps
- UML diagrams like use case, sequence diagrams, and state diagrams

Sketchboard allows you to focus on what is important for you with carefully designed features such as:

- Intuitive and easy to use interface on the infinite canvas
- Flexible visual styles to customise your diagrams
- Collaboration features such as comment shapes for feedback
- The dark mode that follows your Microsoft Teams' theme changes
- Embedded icon & shapes gallery with more than 400+ options available

**Availability**

Sketchboard is available on all Sketchboard plans for Microsoft Teams. Sign up on Sketchboard to use the app. You may need to ask the Admin of your Microsoft Teams account to enable the Sketchboard app if it is not visible. There may be advanced Sketchboard features that are only available in paid plans.

[Help](https://sketchboard.io/help) | [Contact](https://sketchboard.io/contact)

title: Arrangr
shortDescription: Schedule meetings without wasting time - whether virtual or in-person
Description:
Arrangr takes the hassle and confusion out of arranging all the details for a meeting (date, time, conference or video call info, location, agenda, etc.) By bringing all the components you need into a single clean and intuitive process, we help you eliminate the back and forth, miscommunications, and juggling between different apps.

Whether setting up a quick Zoom call, Uberconference or just finding a time and place to meet for coffee, Arrangr is simple and fast to use no matter the number of participants. Our proactive, flexible 1-on-1 invitations let you suggest multiple times or time ranges, places or call methods and lets your recipient accept the best option with a single click, all while making sure you don’t double-book. Arrangr’s group event polls smoothly funnel you to the best options for scheduling those impossible-to-coordinate group meetings. Arrangr’s app for Microsoft Teams lets you easily send Arrangr invites right from within Teams. You can also easily feed your Arrangr events and invitations right into any Teams channel you choose!

With Arrangr you can:
- Integrate with multiple calendars, including your Outlook calendar
- Integrate with your favorite conferencing providers, including Microsoft Teams
- Send proactive, flexible 1:1 meeting invitations, suggesting multiple times and places or call methods, without leaving Teams
- Create polls to find the best time to meet, sharing with teammates as well as those outside your team
- Easily access your Arrangr scheduling pages and share their links within Teams
- Seamlessly share invites created on Arrangr into your Teams channels and chats

Arrangr has built-in support for a number of conference and video call platforms, but also lets you customize the call details to support any platform of your choosing. Our built-in options include:
- Microsoft Teams
- Zoom
- Google Meet
- GoToMeeting
- FreeConferenceCall.com
- UberConference
- Phone

We also make it easy to arrange in-person meetings, even letting you search for convenient restaurants and cafes right within our app!

For the best experience, it is strongly recommended that you create an Arrangr account and are signed into it while using Arrangr’s app in Microsoft Teams, however you do also have the option to create and send invites as a “guest” without signing in to an Arrangr account.

To get started creating an Arrangr account, visit [https://arrangr.com/sign_up](https://arrangr.com/sign_up)

*In a future release, we plan to add the ability to receive
  notifications via the Teams bot, for events such as received invites, invites accepted, pre-meeting reminders, etc.

Data teams can focus on deep work, not on answering easy questions about dashboards.

title: Vendor Onboarding
shortDescription: Make Microsoft Teams your task management hub for vendor onboarding
Description:
Looking for a solution to seamlessly mange your Vendor onboarding process? 
Autopilot for Microsoft Teams takes over the onboarding of your vendors. With an at-a-glance dashboard, Autopilot shows you an instant view of the onboarding process and progress. Check the status, monitor compliance, and communicate with your vendors via email or even SMS. Imagine…
No more sending documents, having vendors print them, sign them, scan them, and return them.
No more having to track the messages, follow up, or resend.
No more having to audit and double-check that you have received all the necessary compliance and onboarding documents.
Clear dashboard accessible from within Teams
 
With Autopilot, you will get the immediate advantages:

- Generate more accurate reporting 


And your vendors will see the difference as well:

- Provided digital signatures for fast and efficient turnaround

Description:

Speed and automation

title: Ruxie
shortDescription: Ruxie enables you to receive notifications and communicate with the Expel team.
Description:
Meet Ruxie. 

Expel wants you to focus on what matters, and we’re in the business of making space so you can do more of what you love. Whether it’s automating investigative tasks, prioritizing and enriching alerts, adding business context, preparing alerts for further (I.e. human) investigation, or communicating with customers around investigations and remediation actions, Ruxie is always at the ready. 

With Ruxie, we combine the technology of intelligent automation with the capabilities of our analyst team in order to provide you with the most informed and comprehensive detection and response strategy.

Interested in hearing from Ruxie? Just sign up for a service subscription at Expel.com. Any questions? Contact sales@expel.com.

Stay informed with relevant notifications and communicate with the Expel team via the Ruxie Microsoft Teams app.  

More questions and/or help with Ruxie? Contact your engagement manager at em@expel.com.

title: Priority Matrix
shortDescription: Focus on high-impact tasks. Do the work that matters.
Description: Priority Matrix helps your team focus on high-impact work to boost productivity. Manage personal tasks, balance workloads, and set team priorities easily. Deep links keep you in Microsoft Teams, so you never have to open an external app. You'll only get alerts for big updates. Use the agenda view, calendar, Gantt charts, and chat commands to stay organized. It works great with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365, and you can also use it in Microsoft 365 Copilot, to easily search and summarize tasks with AI. For example: "What are my overdue Priority Matrix tasks?" or "Show me Priority Matrix tasks modified last week". Contact us Help Getting started In order to use this app, you need to have an active Priority Matrix account.

title: Interactio
shortDescription: Enable simultaneous interpretation with Interactio in your meetings.
Description:
**What we offer**

With our Interactio integration, you will activate remote simultaneous interpretation in Microsoft Teams meetings. Add our Interaction, and you will:
- Gain from our team of skilled interpreters to create a multilingual and inclusive space for your meeting.

- Organize your events through our panel to book interpreters and make your schedule run smoothly. 

**How it works** 

The Interactio integration works on both Windows and macOS desktop clients. 

**Pre-requisites**

Meeting organizers need an active Interactio account. Contact us at sales@interactio.io to set up your account now.

**Limitations**
- Our integration is currently available only on Windows and macOS desktop clients.

- Closing the Interactio app (side panel) while the meeting is still running will interrupt the interpretation on MS Teams.

**Who we are**

Interactio is among the leading multilingual meeting solutions. Since its launch in 2014, more than 26,000 events have used our interpretation and streaming services. Interactio provides a secure and high-quality solution for over 2,000 remote and hybrid meetings every month. Some of our happy clients include the European Parliament, European Commission, United Nations, US Department of State, TEDx, Microsoft, Amazon, Google, Mary Kay, Mastercard, Bayer Pharmaceuticals, International Team for Implantology, Lush, J. P. Morgan, Scout24, Dani Johnson, Brian Tracy, and others. Interactio remains the best-rated RSI solution in the industry, with a Trustpilot score of 4.7 and a record of 120,000 attendees supported simultaneously.

 **What is SkillScape?** 
 SkillScape is a virtual assistant that that helps organizations improve employees’ engagement in a hybrid working environment by creating meaningful people connections based on skills and career development ambitions.
 Anyone can submit a collaboration initiative through a SkillScape request form. From looking for a mentor or a job shadowing opportunity to finding subject matter experts to help out on a client project, SkillScape automatically matches people to requests through its skills-based ML model.

 **Key Benefits** 
 - Elevated internal networking 
 - Enhanced employee autonomy 
 - Accelerated career development 
 - Increased employee engagement

 **Have any questions?**
The Friendly Flows team is excited to meet you and learn more about your business processes. Don't hesitate to get in contact if you have any questions or want to request a demo.

shortDescription: Bring Whole Brain® collaboration to your teams
Description:
Stop & Think is a brand new way for your Thinkers to experience individual and team HBDI® profiles from any device (phone, tablet, desktop) in the Microsoft Teams app. Get team-based guidance on communication, decision-making, and problem solving customized to the individual's and/or team's profile.

**Why Stop & Think:**
- Provides real-time application tools for teams to use in meetings and other workplace scenarios
- Creates “stop & think” moments with built-in solutions and strategies
- Puts Whole Brain® Thinking at your customers' fingertips, when you're already working with your teams

**Use Stop & Think Across Entire Microsoft Teams Workspace:**
- Stop & Think tab within channels
- Stop & Think tab with chat
- Teams Meetings integration
- Personal app

**Make Thinking Diversity Actionable:**
Effective collaboration for both individuals and teams, without having to leave Microsoft Teams. Directly translate thinking diversity into action.
Stop & Think has full range of Whole Brain® Thinking common use cases for teams & individuals:
- Finding effective approaches to work with your team
- Improving team productivity and leveraging team's talents & interests
- Collaborating better under pressure
- Planning & running effective meetings
- Getting unstuck with another and much more.

**About Herrmann International:**
Herrmann has helped the most admired organizations around the world decode and harness their cognitive diversity for over 40 years. Our thinking insight SaaS platform makes it easier for managers and teams to communicate, collaborate and solve problems more effectively using our proprietary Whole Brain® Thinking methodologies.

**Note:** To use this app, you must have an account with Herrmann International. Additionally, this app requires administrator consent. Contact us at [Herrmann](https://www.thinkherrmann.com/stopandthinkformicrosoftteams).

title: Videodolmetschen by LingaTel
shortDescription: Mit LingaTel spontan Dolmetscher/in für Sprachen zur Besprechung zuschalten.
Description:
LingaTel gehört seit über 10 Jahren zu den führenden Anbietern für virtuelles Dolmetschen im deutschsprachigen Raum. Aktuell stehen fast 700 Dolmetschende per Telefon, Video und jetzt auch per Microsoft Teams App zur Verfügung.

Mit der LingaTel App für Microsoft Teams ist es möglich, jederzeit spontan Dolmetschende für 25 Sprachen zuzuschalten und Sprachbarrieren genau dann zu überwinden, wenn sie entstehen.

Terminvereinbarungen, Medienbrüche, Wartezeiten, Leerläufe und lange Mindestbuchungszeiträume waren gestern. Mit der LingaTel Teams App entscheiden, wann die Sprachmittlung starten soll und wann Sie keine Unterstützung mehr benötigen. Die dolmetschende Person steht unmittelbar zur Verfügung, die Abrechnung erfolgt minutengenau.

LingaTel setzt ausschließlich „echte Menschen“ ein und arbeitet ausdrücklich nicht mit KI basierter Übersetzung. So ist sichergestellt, dass neben der sprachlichen Kompetenz jederzeit auch die soziale- und interkulturelle Kompetenz der Dolmetschenden zu einem erfolgreichen Gesprächsverlauf beitragen können. LingaTel arbeitet ausschließlich mit professionellen, erfahrenen und qualifizierten Dolmetschenden, die vertraglich zur Verschwiegenheit und zur Einhaltung der geltenden Datenschutz-Standards verpflichtet sind. LingaTel ist als Anbieter zertifiziert gemäß ISO27001(Informationssicherheit) und ISO9001 (Qualitätsmanagement).

Ihre Vorteile auf einen Blick:

  • ISO zertifizierte Prozesse

  • Hohes Datenschutzniveau

  • Spontane Verfügbarkeit (Keine Terminbuchung erforderlich!)

  • Qualifizierte Dolmetschende

  • Große Sprachenauswahl

  • Minutengenaue Abrechnung

  • Transparentes Reporting

  • Verbrauchsabhängige Abrechnung, keine monatliche Grundgebühr

Um den Dienst nutzen zu können benötigen Sie Zugangsdaten von LingaTel, die bei der Installation der App einmalig eingegeben werden müssen. Zum Abschluss einer entsprechenden Vereinbarung mit LingaTel.

https://www.lingatel.de/kontakt/

This app is only available in German

title: Myfone
shortDescription: Håndter dine telefonopkald i Teams, og få overblik over dine kolleger
Description:
Med omstillingsbordet Myfone kan virksomhedens medarbejdere styre deres daglige telefoni. Du kan foretage og besvare kald, lave en omstilling eller viderestilling, og se, om dine kolleger er ledige til at modtage dit opkald.
Ved hjælp af ringeprofiler, kan du også styre, hvordan dine indgående og udgående opkald skal opføre sig, når du er på arbejde, sidder i møde eller har fri. Profilerne kan for eksempel sørge for, at du ikke bliver forstyrret i et møde, og at du ikke får et arbejdsrelateret opkald, når du har fri. Du kan selv skifte mellem profilerne eller lade dem styre af dine arbejdstider og begivenheder i din kalender.
Bemærk, at denne app ikke er tilgængelig for uafhængige brugere, da den er en del af et telefonsystem til virksomheder. Din virksomhed skal have en PBX med erhvervstelefoni fra Flexfone og du skal have en aktiv Myfone-bruger for at kunne benytte denne app. For tilmelding og konfiguration af app’en kontakt din IT-administrator eller læs mere på www.flexfone.dk.

title: EmAlerts
shortDescription: EmAlerts - Emergency Notifications, Critical Alerts and Two-way Communication
Description:
EmAlerts is a preferred application for enterprise users to receive critical alerts instantly sent by your organization using EmReach’s EMNS (Emergency and Mass Notification System). EmReach’s EMNS helps organizations globally to ensure the safety of their people and the continuity of their business during crisis and emergency situations.

In times of crisis, organizations need the capability to reach large and dispersed groups quickly with important and timely information in the least possible time and seek feedback. Organizations need to ensure that their people, critical infrastructure, and assets are protected and secure. It also allows you to respond to a message and your organization administrator.

An EmAlerts account is required to complete this integration. For questions or assistance, you may contact your administrator.

Never miss out on any important information from your organization. For more information click [here](https://www.emreach.com/).

title: emSigner
shortDescription: Digitally Sign Documents on the Go. From anywhere, anytime!
Keywords: ['Digital Signature Automation', 'Digital Prpcess Transformation', 'Paperless Workflow Automation Solution']
Description: emSigner, eMudhra’s digital signature based paperless office solution, enables Microsoft Teams’ customers to quickly automate document signing using globally accepted, legally valid signatures – eSignatures, Digital Signatures Certificates or eSign. All that the Microsoft Teams’ customers have to do to sign the document is simply upload the document using the available options, select the signature and sign the document. Since there will be no lag in signing and approval process, emSigner takes the complexity out of moving documents seamlessly between departments, customers, partners, suppliers, and employees.

title: PlanningPoker.live
shortDescription: Run SCRUM planning meetings with ease inside Microsoft Teams!
Description:
To get started, install this app in Teams and create a new planning session. A free PlanningPoker.live account will automatically be created for you. You can also use your Google account or e-mail address to sign in to an existing account with us.

This app is free to use with monthly free credits. If you require more credits, you can learn more about our packages at [https://planningpoker.live/pricing](https://planningpoker.live/pricing).

Main features:

*   Create voting rooms and collaborate with colleagues
*   Find consensus and discuss edge cases
*   Connect to JIRA & Linear
*   Customize card sets, save results

Planning projects is difficult, especially when you are working remotely. During a planning meeting, teams estimate projects/cards while sitting around a table and showing hands-on the count of three. This worked well before the pandemic, but it's not so efficient in the remote world. This app moves the planning meeting into your Teams window, allowing you to vote and find consensus easily.

This app allows users to use AI to summarize their planning meetings. The AI will analyze the results of each voting round and give a useful summary that can then be copied and shared with the team. If the AI generated content is inappropriate, please let us know at [info@planningpoker.live](mailto:info@planningpoker.live).

title: DocketAI
shortDescription: DocketAI is your AI Sales Engineer for Microsoft Teams
Description:
DocketAI is your personal AI Sales Engineer and empowers AEs to win more. DocketAI on Microsoft Teams allows your sales team to generate answers by leveraging AI and your company’s internal knowledge from sources such as Teams, call recordings, Sharepoint, Google Drive, and other third-party integrations. Docket unifies your company’s sales data with genAI, gathering insights from all your structured and unstructured knowledge sources to boost your sales productivity and win rates.

What you can do with DocketAI:

* 📈 Instant Answers - Get AI-powered instant answers that leverage your structured and unstructured knowledge sources. No more going through 10 different conversations and tools to get the answers you are looking for.   
* 📜 Personalized solutions - Dive deep into customer queries and get tailored responses from DocketAI that focus on and solve problems faced by your customers.   
* 📋 Improve win rates by 10% - Automate your sales engineering overhead, and respond on time to your customers, in just 3 seconds, and improve win rates.   
* 🔍 Help DocketAI learn from your teams' conversation - DocketAI and Teams integration allows it to learn from your conversations on Teams. You decide which thread, channel, and people DocketAI can learn from with a simple on-off toggle. 

Please note: 
* To use this app, you need to have an active Docket account, please contact our [support team](mailto:support@docketai.com) for more details.   
 * DocketAI doesn’t train on your company’s data and your data is deleted once you terminate your account on DocketAI.  
* You can read more about our AI policies [here](https://www.docketai.com/terms-and-conditions).  
* If you have any complaints regarding the AI reported content, write to [support@docketai.com](mailto:support@docketai.com). 

**What people are saying about Docket**

**I wish I had Docket years ago -** It's very simple, tribal knowledge is incredibly valuable but can be very hard to track especially when you have a team that is changing every quarter or half year. With remote work that makes things even more difficult. Docket makes it so that tribal knowledge is easily accessible and doesn't eat up the majority of my day as a sales leader like it used to. - Paul @ ZoomInfo

**"Empowering Teams with Instant Knowledge" -** Product marketing teams are constantly being riddled with questions about competitors, the market, product features, and available assets. It is VERY time-consuming and distracting to address all of these questions ad hoc \- especially as they are often posed with urgency, while the conversation with a customer is taking place. DocketAI solves this problem in a way that is intuitive and familiar \- conversationally and on demand. -  Ruth Zive, CMO, Liveperson

Have Questions or Feedback?

Email us at [support@docketai.com](mailto:support@docketai.com)

If you need to log into your DocketAI account, [click here](http://app.docketai.com). 

For more detailed information, visit [Help Documentation](https://help.docketai.com/en/articles/9891784-how-to-connect-and-use-the-docket-app-in-microsoft-teams).

title: Water Cooler Trivia
shortDescription: Build team culture, one trivia contest at a time.
Description:
Water Cooler Trivia makes the work week more fun with weekly trivia contests that the whole office can participate in. The conversations sparked by trivia bring people together. It's a low-maintenance virtual team building activity for remote teams.

How it works
- One trivia contest per week, with 10 free-response questions.
- Contest reminders sent via Microsoft Teams in a channel as well as DM'ed to participants.
- Results sent via Microsoft Teams: not just the winner, but the funniest answers too!
- Celebrate the winners and discuss the results directly in Microsoft Teams.
- Repeat the following week.

Why’s it good
- You can customize the categories and difficulty for your office. We've seen categories like Coffee, Finance, Boston, or True Crime.
- More than 50% of participants have gotten to know a coworker through the weekly trivia contests.
- Learn who's a secret bookworm and who knows everything about current events.
- Spark conversations and competition with coworkers and friends, i.e. talk about something more interesting than the weather and weekend plans
- You can track the leaderboard over time, including "category champs" in Pop Culture, Science, and more.

Signing up
- By installing the Water Cooler Trivia app into your Microsoft Teams account, you are kickstarting a free four-week trial (no credit card, no commitment). 
- Once the trial expires we’ll work with you to keep the trivia fun rolling. 
- Prices are about ~$1 per participant per month; keyword = participants, we won't charge for the whole payroll unless they're participating.
- You can learn more at watercoolertrivia.com/pricing

Questions or help? Head to our [help page](https://watercoolertrivia.com/help) or email collin@watercoolertrivia.com

title: Feeder
shortDescription: Get news updates from RSS feeds and other digital sources
Description:
Optimize how you work with news, RSS feeds and other digital sources with [Feeder](https://feeder.co).

With Feeder you can follow and consume RSS feeds and many other digital sources in one place. Makes it possible for anyone on your team to setup their own monitoring solution and quickly share news to relevant channels.

- Supports RSS, Atom, JSON feeds
- Supports tracking website changes
- Supports following newsletters
- Keeps track of what you've read and not
- Organize your content with folders and collections
- Automatically post news to team channels with Feeder Professional

Each user gets their own tab to follow their own news. They set it up individually using RSS feeds, Feeder's library of thousands of popular sources, or other digital sources. 

Our messaging extensions makes it easy and quick to find and share relevant posts in a handy card.

Feeder requires a [Feeder](https://feeder.co) account, but you can seamlessly create one within Microsoft Teams. If you already have a Feeder account you can also sign in with that, simply make sure that your Feeder account e-mail is the same as your Teams login e-mail.

To enable the Feeder integration for several team members, a Feeder Professional license is necessary. Remember, at least one license is mandatory for the team's administrator. This means when planning your purchase, consider the administrator's license in addition to the licenses for other team members. The team administrator has full access to all the feature.

To get in touch with our support you can email [support@feeder.co](mailto:support@feeder.co) and we'll respond as soon as we can.

Content is sourced from external websites, and may occasionally be inappropriate in nature. Please report inappropriate content to the publisher by e-mailing [support@feeder.co](mailto:support@feeder.co) or visiting our Help site: [https://feeder.co/help](https://feeder.co/help).

shortDescription: Work better together with Stormboard for Microsoft Teams
Description:
Stormboard is an all-in-one digital workspace where high-performing teams hold meetings, monitor projects, and get work done every day no matter where they are located — down the hall, in a different building, or somewhere else in the world!

Streamline your collaboration and stay up-to-date on all of the activity happening in your Storms (what we call your digital workspace) by integrating your Stormboard account with your daily workflow in Teams. 

Adding Stormboard to Microsoft Teams allows you to provide quick access to your Storms or share a Storm without ever leaving the application. You are also able to add existing Storms, or create new ones right in your Teams workspace. Anyone with access to the channel will be able to view the Storm, add new content, or check in on progress ensuring that planning sessions, agile sprints, daily status updates, and more run seamlessly.

Missed a meeting? No problem! Stay up-to-date on everything that is happing in your Storms — like new content, comments, assignments, and users. These notifications show up in Teams as a conversation with the Stormboard Bot.

For more information, send us a message at https://stormboard.com/contact-us or by email at support@stormboard.com

A Stormboard account is required in order to add Storms to a Microsoft Teams Meeting or Channel. You do not need an account to participate in a Storm in a Teams Meeting or Channel that was added by a team member.

title: Beep
shortDescription: Beep offers clinicians a better alternative to pagers and bleeps
Description:
Beep provides a better experience than pagers. Beep does this by replicating what pagers are good at on the Microsoft Teams platform. What are pagers good at? They allow a person to hold a role whilst they hold the pager. If the cardiologist on call is #1234, then everyone knows if they page 1234, it will be responded to by an on call cardiologist. They don't need to consult a diary or a rota to see who is on call at that time. Paging 1234 is enough.

 Beep replicates this functionality using Microsoft Teams' tags. Importantly Beep allows you to send a message to a tag in another team. So, if you're in the A&E team, but not the Cardiology team,Beep allows you to beep the cardiologist on call. 
 Hospitals have used pagers in hospitals for the last 40 years!  The pagers are small radio devices allowing the clinician to receive simple text notifications, often just a four digit extension to be called back on a regular phone. They predate mobile phones and unlike modern mobiles they are typically shared devices, with the pager being passed between colleagues, depending on who is on call. The use of pagers is called ‘paging’. 
 Beep improves on paging in two ways:

  It's 'fire and forget'. Rather than paging 1234 and waiting for the on call cardiologist to call you back, you can send a full request to the cardiologist and track it through to completion.

 With paging, you page them, wait, page again, wait. They call you back. Then they page you. Finally you talk and only then can you discuss the case in hand. This is very inefficient.

 It brings the communication inside Microsoft Teams, improving information governance and clinical oversight.
 
 **IMPORTANT:** 
 Beep is a chargeable service and you must be a Medxnote customer to use the service. Contact [niall.rafferty@medxnote.com](mailto:niall.rafferty@medxnote.com) to organize a demo. In order to use this app. Users must have an active Beep, please contact niall.rafferty@medxnote.com for more details.

title: Pydo
shortDescription: Implementa con Pydo la comunicación interna de tu empresa en Microsoft Teams
Description:
Mantén a tu equipo informado y conectado con Pydo, la herramienta definitiva de comunicación interna para Microsoft Teams.

**¿Qué es Pydo?**
Pydo es una aplicación diseñada para que los mensajes clave de tu empresa lleguen directamente a los chats de Microsoft Teams. Con esta herramienta, te aseguras de que toda tu organización esté al tanto de cualquier información esencial en tiempo real. Gracias a su sistema de notificaciones push, la comunicación interna se vuelve inmediata, efectiva y sin distracciones.

**Funciones Clave de Pydo para Microsoft Teams**

**1. Comunicación Interna y Engagement**
- Envía comunicados directamente a los chats de Microsoft Teams.
- Asegura que tus mensajes no pasen desapercibidos gracias a las **notificaciones push**.
- Edita y actualiza comunicados una vez enviados.
- Asegura que cada empleado reciba y lea los mensajes importantes, eliminando la dependencia de los emails.
- Mantén a todo el equipo informado sobre cambios y novedades.
- **Elige dónde publicar:** Decide si tu contenido aparecerá en **Equipos de Teams** o directamente en los **chats personales** gracias a las listas de difusión.

**2. Gestión de Contenidos y Automatización**
- **Programación de Mensajes:** Automatiza comunicados para que se envíen en el momento adecuado.
- **Ayuda con IA:** Genera textos de alta calidad con Inteligencia Artificial integrada (GPT-4).
- **Planificación:** Organiza tus publicaciones de manera clara y eficiente con un calendario intuitivo.

**3. Gestiona tus campañas de Comunicación Interna en Microsoft Teams**
- **Campañas:** Agrupa tus comunicados en campañas para una comunicación interna más estructurada en Microsoft Teams.
- **Plantillas:** Diseña tus propias campañas desde cero o aprovecha las plantillas predefinidas que Pydo te ofrece para comenzar rápidamente.
- **Reutiliza y optimiza tu trabajo:** Duplica contenidos para ahorrar tiempo y crear nuevas iniciativas basadas en tus estrategias previas.

**Encuestas y Clima Laboral**
- Crea encuestas en Microsoft Teams con Pydo para medir el clima organizacional y recoger opiniones del equipo.
- Encuestas según tus necesidades: anónimas o nominales.
- Analiza los resultados con gráficos interactivos y exporta los datos para un análisis más profundo.

**Organización de Eventos**
- Comparte eventos con toda la información clave y notifica directamente a los asistentes.
- Gestiona inscripciones de manera sencilla.
- Obtén un listado detallado de asistentes.

**Análisis de Resultados**
- Revisa comentarios y reacciones de los empleados para entender el impacto de tus mensajes.
- Métricas avanzadas para evaluar la efectividad de tus campañas.
- Analiza el sentimiento detrás de los comentarios para ajustar tu estrategia de comunicación.

**Beneficios de Usar Pydo**
- **Comunicación Instantánea:** Tus mensajes llegan al instante.
- **Mayor Compromiso:** Mantén a tu equipo involucrado.
- **Optimización:** Automatiza tareas repetitivas y enfócate en lo que importa.
- **Adaptabilidad:** Compatible exclusivamente con Microsoft Teams, garantizando integración perfecta.

**Transforma la Comunicación Interna en Microsoft Teams con Pydo**
Con Pydo, la comunicación en tu organización nunca volverá a ser un problema. Notifica, informa y conecta con tu equipo de forma eficaz.

**Limitaciones**
- **Idioma:** Esta aplicación está disponible únicamente en español.
- **Compatibilidad de la Plataforma:** Pydo está diseñado para su uso en Microsoft Teams, y no es compatible con otras plataformas de colaboración.
- **Requisitos de Integración:** Para utilizar Pydo completamente, los usuarios deben tener cuentas activas en Microsoft Teams.

**Contacto**
Si tienes cualquier pregunta o necesitas ayuda con nuestra app Pydo, envíanos un correo electrónico a **pydo@pydo.ai**

También puedes consultar más información en [Pydo.ai](https://www.pydo.ai/#FAQ_Pydo).

title: Zonka Feedback
shortDescription: Survey & Feedback Software for Microsoft Teams to send survey and get alerts.
Description:
Measure real-time feedback, conduct daily stand ups, check ins and pulse surveys in Microsoft Teams. Notify teams with incoming customer feedback to take necessary action and close the feedback loop. With Zonka Feedback and Microsoft Teams integration, you can create and customize surveys, take feedback and analyze survey responses right within Microsoft Teams.
**Send Surveys in Microsoft Teams**  
Choose surveys created in the Zonka Feedback platform and distribute them to teams, channels or people
**Answer Surveys in Microsoft Teams**  
Team members can click on the survey link and take surveys. (opens survey in browser)
**Setup New or Low Survey Alerts**  
Automate sending notifications for new survey responses or low survey responses to relevant people or channels or teams in Microsoft Teams.
**Configure Workflows**  
Configure condition-based workflows to trigger alerts for survey responses to people or channels or teams in Microsoft Teams.
**Close the Feedback Loop**  
With real-time alerts to the right stakeholders, you can ensure that action is taken to resolve any issues and improve employee and customer experience.
You would need to have an active Zonka Feedback account, in any paid plan. If you're new to Zonka Feedback, sign up from [here](https://www.zonkafeedback.com/free-trial-signup)  
If you have any questions about how to use Zonka Feedback and Microsoft Teams, please reach out to us at [hello@zonkafeedback.com](mailto:email:hello@zonkafeedback.com)

title: ITP Assistant
shortDescription: Streamline IT communication, troubleshoot issues, manage your tenant seamlessly
Description:
The **ITP Assistant** is a centralized platform designed to facilitate seamless interaction between customer users and IT Partner. It serves as a hub for accessing communication channels and apps/ services developed by IT Partner. Here's an overview of its key components:

Communication Channels:
- IT Helpdesk Portal: get assistance with software, hardware, or account-related matters,
- Email Us: send an email to IT Partner,
- Call Us: contact IT Partner support by call,
- Request a Call Back: submit your request to specify the issue, and an IT Partner specialist will reach out to you promptly,
- Schedule a Meeting: arrange virtual meetings with IT Partner specialists,

Apps:
- Tenant Optimizer is designed for users who seek detailed analytics about their tenant's state. Whether you're aiming to enhance tenant management efficiency, reduce licensing costs, or boost your company's effectiveness in digital transformation, this tool provides valuable insights. Leveraging best practices, Microsoft policies, and IT Partner's extensive market experience, it offers recommendations tailored to your organization. From license optimization to strategic decision-making, Tenant Optimizer empowers you to navigate the complexities of tenant management with confidence. [Read more](https://o365hq.com/tools/tenant-optimizer)
- Tenant Pre-Migration Assistant is designed for users who are planning to migrate their tenant. Whether you're moving to a new cloud environment or transitioning between platforms, our service provides valuable insights into the approximate cost of your migration project. By analyzing factors such as data volume, application complexity, and infrastructure requirements, we offer an estimate that helps you make informed decisions and budget effectively for a successful migration. [Read more](https://o365hq.com/tools/tenant-pre-migration-assistant)
- License Assistant is designed for users who want to efficiently select the most suitable product based on their needs without spending time on internal approvals within the company. Whether you're exploring Microsoft licenses, cloud subscriptions, or software bundles, our tool streamlines the decision-making process. Also use History Feed feature to view and/or export the history of all request’s performance. Say goodbye to lengthy deliberations and hello to informed decisions with License Assistant! [Read more](https://o365hq.com/tools/license-assistant)
- License Comparison tool caters to users who are keen on understanding the intricacies of Microsoft products. Whether you're curious about service offerings, feature sets, or licensing details, this tool provides comprehensive insights. Additionally, it serves as a valuable resource for those who wish to compare different Microsoft products side by side. Explore the nuances and make informed decisions based on your organization's needs. [Read more](https://o365hq.com/tools/license-comparison)

With easy navigation and all-in-one convenience, ITP Assistant simplifies communication channels with IT Partner specialists, license tracking and tenant management tasks. Stay organized, compliant, and focused on your business goals effortlessly.

Beneficiary:

Any tenant user (provided that Global Admins have granted the necessary permissions for the service usage).

Get started with just these steps:

- Find 'ITP Assistant' app in the Teams Apps store,
- Add the app to your Teams application,
- Grant required permissions (if you don't have Global Admin role assigned, please contact your IT dept. specialists).

The list of required permissions:
- Read directory data,
- Send a teamwork activity to any user,
- Sign in and read user profile,
- Read all users' full profiles.

Please [**contact our support team**](mailto:%20support@o365hq.com) for assistance.

The app is compatible with Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft365.

title: CultureNext
shortDescription: Recognize, reward and celebrate coworkers, conveniently within Microsoft Teams.
Description:
The CultureNext employee recognition app makes it easy to recognize, reward and celebrate your coworkers wherever you are, right inside of your Microsoft Teams chat. 

To send recognition through Teams, look for the CultureNext icon in the messaging extension area of your chat. This can be found by clicking the (…) menu below the ‘Type a new message’ field. After completing the authentication process, you will be able to access your recognition programs, enabling you to send a recognition to any eligible user in your chat window.

 CultureNext® is brought to you by Maritz Motivation. A person will not be able to participate within the CultureNext app if their organization does not have a partnership with Maritz Motivation and CultureNext. In order to use this application the user must have an active CultureNext account. Users/Participants must know their organization’s CultureNext employee recognition URL to access the CultureNext employee app. Users can find this by reaching out their HR department or by looking at the URL when accessing the CultureNext employee recognition via the web.

title: WorkplaceBuddy
shortDescription: WorkplaceBuddy: work better with Microsoft 365
Description:
Hey there! At WorkplaceBuddy, we take your personal learning and skill development to heart. Whether you are new to Microsoft 365 or you are an expert, we think we can help you! The WorkplaceBuddy experience exists of:

- **An interview**: during this interview we get to know you better and this helps us understand what you want to learn and in what pace you want to learn at.

- **Personal learning journey**: based on the interview the best matching learnings are collected and your learning journey starts right away!
- **Start adventures and earn badges**: there are different adventures which you can start, during these adventures you will get a tour through exciting features of Microsoft 365. Upon finishing specific tasks, you will also receive badges for your hard work!
- **Ask questions**: feel free to ask WorkplaceBuddy questions, the chatbot will give you directly an answer and otherwise our team will follow up on your question (as long as your question is about Microsoft 365)!

All in all, WorkplaceBuddy helps you collaborate better in your modern workplace, save time, stay up-to-date and succeed with joy everywhere.

**Go ahead and try the WorkplaceBuddy Light experience**, and if it's to your liking, it would be awesome if you upgrade to our Premium product! In the Premium product you get access to more learning content, more chatbot adventures, cooler badges, you can see your organizations' insights and analytics and you can make adjustments to the chatbot and the learnings!

WorkplaceBuddy is the ideal solution to improve Microsoft 365 adoption and help colleagues learn about Microsoft Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, OneDrive and all the other Microsoft Office products. We help workplace, HR, IT managers and Microsoft Partners to decrease support tickets and build productivity.

In the app you can login with your Microsoft account, should you have any problems signing up feel free to reach out to [support@workplacebuddy.com](mailto:support@workplacebuddy.com).

title: AMN Interpreting
shortDescription: Access interpretation services in telehealth settings with AMN Interpreting
Description:
You can connect instantly with AMN Healthcare Language Services interpreters in 40 languages over video and more than 200 languages over the phone using the AMN Interpreting application within Microsoft Teams.

We are committed to enabling Visual Connections and Vital Conversations to increase health literacy and improve health outcomes across the full continuum of care.

Leveraging our video remote interpretation platform, we connect patients and providers to qualified medical interpreters over a secure, HIPAA-compliant platform. Cost-effective and convenient, our application offers caregivers a way to provide qualified medical interpretation for patients who are Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and Limited English Proficient.

When you utilize the AMN Interpreting application within Teams, you will have the quality interpretation you have come to expect, paired with the convenience of hosting your telehealth meeting on the platform you prefer. You will be able to connect with a video interpreter simply by clicking a button within your Teams meeting. For additional languages, you can copy the provided phone number into the Participants list and a spoken language interpreter will join the meeting.

To be fully functional, this application requires a contract for service and an onboarding process must be completed within your Teams tenant. If you don’t have a service contract yet or you need assistance with the onboarding process, simply click the support link below to get set up. This application is only available for use within the United States.

Features include:

- No need to leave your meeting or share a meeting link in order to request an interpreter
- Full session history available inside of Teams
- Access to over 40 video interpreting languages
- Access to more than 200 audio interpreting languages
- Access to qualified medical interpretation through a secure, HIPAA-compliant platform
- Full control of when you admit the interpreter into the meeting
- Full control to disconnect the interpreter when you are finished without ending your meeting

If you need to sign up for service or need support click [here](https://www.stratusvideo.com/support/) to be directed to our support page.

title: Hoylu
shortDescription: Collaboration software and workspaces for distributed teams.
Description:
Online Whiteboards have become a great collaboration solution but fall short when it comes to complex project management. Hoylu introduces the Adaptive Workspace, giving teams the power to plan, build, and engage — so they get things done, no matter the industry, department, or time zone.
Hoylu is an easy-to-use, cloud-based, project management and whiteboarding tool that enables distributed teams to plan and visualize projects. Our Adaptive Workspaces take the complexity out of complex projects.

More than your average collaboration tool, Hoylu’s Workspaces adapt to whatever way you work. We have modules and templates for Pull Planning, Kanban, PI Planning, Brainstorming, Retrospective, Value Propositions, SWOT Analysis, Supply Chain, and more.
We offer simplicity from end to end.
- Deployment: Manage your work quickly and easily on a public or private cloud
- Access: Collaborate on workspaces from anywhere, on any device
- Permissions: Share anything with anyone, while controlling exactly who sees what
- Reporting: Know where every project stands in real-time and the reasons why

Hoylu — Complex Projects, Simplified.

In order to use this app, you need a Hoylu account. Please signup for free at [app.hoylu.com](https://app.hoylu.com).

Note: The number of workspaces is limited for free user accounts.

title: 123 Notetaker AI
shortDescription: AI Notes & Transcription easily shared in your Microsoft Teams meetings.
Description:
Automatically transcribe and summarize key points and action items from your Microsoft Teams meetings.
 
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Trusted by 50,000+ organizations
 
 
 
**Features:**
😃 Integrates directly into your Teams client
📝 Automatic high quality AI transcriptions
🙋‍♀️ 24 hour support team is here to help
 
 
 
**How does it work?**
1. 123 Notetaker is added to the Apps section of your Teams client. Simply click Apps and then 123 Notetaker in any Teams Meeting.
 
2. Once 123 Notetaker App is opened, the notetaker will automatically join your meeting. **Make sure to allow Notetaker in from the waiting lobby.** Notetaker may take up to a minute to join the meeting and begin transcribing. 
 
3. Optionally share 123 Notetaker with your Teams participants. Participants can click the 123 Notetaker button at the top of their meeting.
 
123 Notetaker has a free plan, with upgraded plans available.
 
123 Notetaker uses AI to transcribe and create meeting notes. AI can make mistakes. [Report inappropriate content](https://blueskyapps.org/contact). AI meeting Notes are emailed after the meeting ends and can accessed anytime in your [BlueSky Account](https://blueskyapps.org/users/me/account). Meeting transcriptions appear in real-time in the Teams App Sidebar.
 
[Sign Up](https://blueskyapps.org/users/sign_up) | [Get Started](https://blueskyapps.org) | [Contact](https://blueskyapps.org/contact) | [Help](https://help.blueskyapps.org)
 
Try it free today!

title: TaskHuman
shortDescription: TaskHuman — Instant 1:1 Global Coaching with 1200 skills & 1800 coaches
Description: TaskHuman is a global coaching platform offering on-demand 1:1 video calling in over 1,200 skills and 1,800 coaches. The TaskHuman platform supports employees as they grow and adapt both personally and professionally. Topics are offered in a wide range of well-being categories, spanning from Physical Fitness, Healthy Eating & Food Choices, Mental & Emotional Support, Spiritual Practice & Guidance, Financial Literacy & Coaching, as well as Leadership Development, Sales Performance, DEIB support, and more. Access to a content library on the above topics is also available to TaskHuman users. While TaskHuman is available to download for all individuals, TaskHuman is also offered as a well-being and professional development benefit to companies, in which case, prepaid access to TaskHuman is provided to users on behalf of their organization. In such cases, Group Coaching Sessions are offered to corporate users. Download TaskHuman on Microsoft Teams, iOS or Android stores. Sign up from our login screen or email ask@taskhuman.com for support.

title: Bright Breaks
shortDescription: Take well-being breaks together in Microsoft Teams meetings with Bright Breaks.
Description:
Bring wellness breaks into your organization members’ daily routines with Bright Breaks. Prioritize team well-being by choosing from a library of short pre-recorded videos to guide your meeting attendees through stretching, moving, meditation and breathing exercises.

The Bright Breaks application for Microsoft Teams is just one feature of a robust wellness platform for companies, educational institutions and other types of organizations that value the well-being of their people.

Subscribe to Bright Breaks and enable your colleagues to:

- Develop personal wellness habits by engaging in short yet impactful breaks guided by live and on-demand content 1 to 30 minutes in length
- Build relationships with vetted wellness educators specialized in fitness, yoga, meditation, nutrition, mental health, finance and more.
- Keep self-care practices top-of-mind with breaks accessible directly in your meetings

97% of those who use Bright Breaks regularly report an improvement in their well-being, 87% report they cope better with stress and 77% report feeling more productive. Invite your organization to incorporate fitness, stretching, learning, meditation, nutrition, and more into their daily lives by subscribing to Bright Breaks and see **real, measurable results**.

Bright Breaks requires a subscription. Get started and subscribe by visiting [https://brightbreaks.com](https://brightbreaks.com)

title: Arnica
shortDescription: Put your software supply chain security on autopilot
Description:
Arnica proactively protects your software supply chain by automating the day-to-day security operations and empowering developers to own security without incurring risks or compromising velocity.

Arnica continuously enforces behavior-based access control complemented by self-service access management across your development ecosystem, detects and mitigates hardcoded secrets before they reach production code, and identifies abnormal code and developer behavior.

**Self-service access management**
* Automate access management to least-privilege while empowering developers to access any asset at any time at the speed they need it.

**Run CODEOWNERS on autopilot**
* Automatically configure CODEOWNERS files based on historical behavior of pull request approvals. Arnica creates a pull request with all changes and enables automated permission grants to specified paths in the CODEOWNERS files.

**Developer & code anomaly detection**
* Enforce zero-trust developer security by detecting and preventing any anomalous code from being pushed to production.

**Prevent hardcoded secrets**
* Identify and eliminate validated secrets in code before secrets end up in production.

The Arnica Microsoft Teams app is built for use with the Arnica platform.

New to Arnica? [Sign up for free](https://app.arnica.io/).

**More Information**

[Learn about Arnica](https://www.arnica.io/) | [Teams Integration](https://www.arnica.io/integration/chat) | [Help Documentation](https://help.arnica.io/en/articles/6634363-arnica-chat-integration)

title: PinPoints - Tags & Notes
shortDescription: PinPoint Microsoft Teams Meetings.
Description:
What is PinPoints?
*	PinPoints is a useful and simple tool for Microsoft Teams that helps you create personal Tags and Notes for Microsoft Teams Meetings, so you can easily find them later.
*	Just create a PinPoint for a meeting – tag it or keep a note – and find it later using your personal PinPoints tab.
*	The first 20 Monthly Active Users are free for every organization, so you can start using PinPoints right away.
How can I use PinPoints?
*	As soon as you add PinPoints to a meeting you have available up to five tags (max. 10 characters each) and three notes (max. 70 characters each). 
*	To search all your PinPoints, select the PinPoints personal tab on Microsoft Teams app side bar and just start typing the keyword you are looking for.
*	Click on a PinPoint will take you directly to the relevant meeting.
For Whom is PinPoints for?
*	PinPoints is designed for all Microsoft Teams users who are seeking an easy way to categorize and easily find Microsoft Teams Meetings.
How can I get PinPoints?
*	PinPoints is a subscription-based Software as a Service (SaaS), that is licensed per user. You can purchase PinPoints user licenses directly through Microsoft Teams or via Azure Marketplace.
*	In case you would like further guidance or info please reach out to us at [support@dataflows.gr](mailto:support@dataflows.gr)

title: Remind
shortDescription: Reminders for Microsoft Teams
Description:
Never forget a thing. Remind yourself or your team members of important meetings, to-do items or even birthdays. Set **personal reminders**, **group chat reminders** or **channel reminders**. You can even set **recurring reminders** (e.g. a team meeting every Monday at 9am)!

**Add the reminders tab to chats or channels**
Manage all reminders for a chat or channel in the Reminders tab. Easily set complex reminders for yourself or others using the powerful scheduling interface. You can even add this tab to Outlook or Microsoft 365 so that you can set a reminder for yourself without switching to Microsoft Teams!

**Set a reminder**
Chat with the bot directly or @ mention it in a chat or channel. Simply use the pattern "[what]" [when] to set a reminder, e.g.
- "Send newsletter" in 20 minutes
- "Call Jennie" at 3:45pm
- "Send report" at 13:15
- "Send annual report" on Aug 15
- "Discuss current revenue numbers" on 13 March at 9am

In a chat or channel simply @ mention the bot to set a reminder for everyone to see:
- @Remind "Server maintenance" on Mar 31 at 8pm
- @Remind myself "check this again" on Monday at 9am

Time zones are also supported, e.g.
- "Standup meeting" at 3:30pm IST
- "Conf call" on 13 February at 10am GMT

**Set recurring reminders**
Here are some ways to format the [when] portion of a recurring reminder for yourself, a group chat or a channel:

- "attend the team meeting" every Tuesday at 11:00
- "daily standup meeting" every weekday at 10am IST
- "turn in expense reports" on the 25th day of every month
- "turn in all reports" on the last day of every month
- "update server" every Monday, Wednesday, Saturday at 10am

For more reminder examples please visit [https://teamsreminder.app](https://teamsreminder.app)

**Set a reminder from a message**
You can set a reminder for yourself from any Teams message. Remind will send you a reminder about the message at the time of your choosing and no one else in your team will be able to see it.
1. Click the ⋯ icon while hovering over a message
2. Select More actions > Remind me about this
3. Choose a timeframe from the list or select Custom to set your own

Use the "list" command to view your current reminders and mark them as complete or simply delete them. Click a reminder to jump back to the conversation.

After setting a reminder the bot will confirm date and time back to you using your current device time.

For more details about how to use this bot and to see all supported date and time formats please visit [https://teamsreminder.app](https://teamsreminder.app).  For any questions or feedback, please get in touch at [https://teamsreminder.app/#contact](https://teamsreminder.app/#contact).

shortDescription: Empower your team and delight your customers with a seamless support experience.
Description:
**HelpDesk+** is a powerful integration between Microsoft Teams and Jira Service Management (JSM) that bridges the gap between your internal tools and your customer communication platform.


**Here's how HelpDesk+ benefits your team:**
* **Effortless Support Requests**: Customers can easily submit requests directly in Teams, eliminating the need to switch between applications.
* **Streamlined Request Management**: Agents can manage and respond to requests without leaving the Teams interface, improving efficiency and reducing context switching.
* **Improved Customer Satisfaction**: Two-way conversation sync keeps everyone in the loop, leading to faster resolution times and happier customers.
* **Increased Agent Productivity**: Agents can quickly create requests from direct messages, train users effectively, collaborate with other teams, and focus on resolving issues without distractions.
* **Enhanced Performance**: Response times and service level agreement (SLA) completion rates improve with features like auto-create, auto-respond, and smart search settings.
* **Real-time Visibility**: Monitor service desk queues and track progress directly within Teams, ensuring clear visibility and control.

**HelpDesk+ is the perfect solution for organizations looking to**:
* Improve communication and collaboration between support teams and customers.
* Increase agent productivity and efficiency.
* Enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.

**HelpDesk+** is the most robust integration between Jira Service Management (JSM) and Microsoft Teams. Enterprise-ready, with support for Jira Cloud and Data Center, HelpDesk+ empowers teams to meet customers where they already work: in Teams. Ready to take your support experience to the next level?
