title: Ask1up
shortDescription: 1up's Q&A Bot for Microsoft Teams
Description:
1up's integration for Microsoft Teams provides real-time, AI-powered answers to your questions about the competition. This automated Q&A experience allows you to save time by quickly delivering intel to sales teams and handling common customer objections.

**Get Started**
To get started, please visit [https://1up.ai/microsoft-teams-integration](https://1up.ai/microsoft-teams-integration/)

**What You'll Need**
- A 1up account. If your organization doesn't have one, you can sign up for free.
- A Microsoft Teams chat where you want to use 1up. For example, a Sales Enablement or Competition channel.
- Admin privileges in Teams. You may need your Help Desk or IT Admin to approve the 1up integration for Teams.

**How the 1up Integration for Teams Works**
- 1up's integration with Teams automatically answers questions by referencing the information stored in your 1up Knowledge Base. This includes information 1up gathers from the Internet as well as documents you upload/connect to 1up. When @Ask1up is entered into a chat that has been integrated with 1up, and is followed by a question or request, 1up will return the most relevant AI-generated response.
- If no good answer is available, 1up will save the unanswered question to the Knowledge Base tab of the relevant company's dashboard in the 1up web app. If you provide an answer to that question in the web app, 1up will reference it when similar questions are asked in the future from anywhere, including Teams.

**Support**
- For any issues with this app, please contact 1up by emailing support@1up.ai.
- Note Regarding Inappropriate Content: 1up's content is sourced from external websites and, though rare, may occasionally be inappropriate in nature. Please report inappropriate content to 1up by emailing [support@1up.ai](mailto:support@1up.ai).

**Contact Us**
If you have any questions, you can contact us at [support@1up.ai](mailto:support@1up.ai).

title: Employee Lookup
shortDescription: View everyone in your organization, filter by department and search by name
Description:
As your organization grow in size and scales across different regions, it becomes hard to keep track of all employees. The distance and connection between your employees grow wider. The Employee Lookup application -- seamlessly integrated with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365 and Outlook -- brings all employees within your organization together by making them aware of each other.
It makes it possible for your employees to see all members at a glance, it allows them to see all departments within the organization, they get to know when departments increase, and gives them the ability to check out all the employees in a particular department.
They can also search by employee name, see results of all profiles that match their search and click to view more details about a particular employee.

How the application is laid out:
* When you open up the app, you would see a dropdown, a search box and a list of all employees within your organization on the left section. And on the right section, details about yourself.
* With the dropdown, you can filter down the employee listing based on departments available within your organization.
* A search can also be made by entering an alphabet(s) or a name to search for employees by name. Corresponding results of employees with the name or whose name contains the sequence of alphabets comes up.
* When you click on an employee's profile card, the details of the employee gets displayed on the right section of the screen.
* Select see more to view more details and report structure.
* The Manage Information tab enables the admins to manage users' information and also trigger an email notification to users with incomplete profiles to update their profiles.
* The Manage Admin tab allows the super admin (the user that installs the app) to create and manage admins. 

Please note: To use the application, your organization must have active users within your Microsoft 365 tenant. Please get in touch with our support team at [be@relianceinfosystems.com](mailto:be@relianceinfosystems.com?subject=Support%20Needed%20for%20the%20Employee%20Lookup%20Application) for more details.

title: YakChat
shortDescription: SMS-enable Microsoft Teams to reach your customers and remote workers"
Description: YakChat® SMS-enables Microsoft Teams for fast, compelling conversations. Connect instantly with your clients and co-workers anywhere in the world. You can add YakChat to your Microsoft Teams platform in minutes, so you’ll be up, running, & texting in no time. What’s more, your contacts won’t need to download an additional app to receive and reply to your messages. They can simply respond in the same quick-and-easy manner they do with family and friends. shortDescription: Easily create smart budget & expense trackers
Keywords: ['expense, cost, sheet, spending, ticket', 'project, balance, planner, finance, SAP', 'workflow, workday plan, dashboard, excel']
Description:
Welcome to Budget Tracker for Microsoft Teams, your ultimate tool to easily create and manage your project budgets and expenses with your team.
Keep an eye on your ongoing spending and budget consumption and use it as an overview for your management reviews.
**Features:**
* **Personal or Shared Budget Trackers:** Use a Budget Tracker for yourself or effortlessly share it in channels or chats.
* **Easy Setup:** Get started immediately with no account required.
* **Expense Management:** Easily add your project spending and attach it to one or multiple relevant budgets. Set an expense status, such as for future expenses, to plan accordingly.
* **File Upload & Links:** Attach receipts, documents, or links directly to your expenses for better record-keeping.
* **Forecast:** Predict future expenses with a simple and accurate linear forecast.
* **Dashboard Overview:** Customize your dashboard to view the most relevant figures at a glance and in diagrams. Use it in project meetings or management reviews.
* **Export:** Export your expenses anytime for further analysis.
* **Customization:** Tailor your budget tracker with individual preferences, over 100 local currencies, and more.
* **Smart Filters & Sorting:** Focus on what truly matters with intelligent filters and sorting options.
* **Multiple Trackers:** Create multiple budget trackers per channel to manage various projects.
Enjoy our service, designed to make your financial management more efficient and collaborative. It can be used free of charge up to a limited number of expenses. For assistance with setup and more information on premium features, please visit our [website](https://budget-tracker.pro/) or reach out to us via our [contact form](https://budget-tracker.pro/?page=contact)

title: EnterpriseGPT by CogniSwitch
shortDescription: GPT for the enterprise on Microsoft Teams - Powered by CogniSwitch
Description:
Introducing Enterprise GPT from CogniSwitch for Microsoft Teams, your gateway to harnessing the power of GPT within your enterprise. In today's fast-paced business landscape, access to precise and relevant information is paramount for success. Enterprise GPT, seamlessly integrated into the Microsoft Teams environment, empowers your organization to leverage the full potential of Generative AI tailored to your enterprise's needs.  
  
**Key Features**: 
1. AI-Powered Enterprise Insights: Enterprise GPT leverages the unmatched capabilities of Generative AI to provide intelligent and reliable insights and responses, tailored to your enterprise's unique context.  
2. CogniSwitch Knowledge Graph: Underpinning Enterprise GPT is CogniSwitch's technology, which transforms your data into an interactive knowledge graph. This visual representation enhances comprehension and facilitates cross-referencing from various data sources.  
3. Contextual Precision: Enterprise GPT ensures that responses are contextually accurate and highly relevant to your enterprise or team's specific requirements, enhancing decision-making and problem-solving.  
4. Human-AI Collaboration: Recognizing the value of human expertise, Enterprise GPT seamlessly integrates humans in the loop, allowing experts to validate responses and bridge knowledge gaps.  
  
**How It Works**  
Seamless Integration: Easily incorporate EnterpriseGPT into your Microsoft Teams environment, making it accessible to your entire organization or to specific teams  
GPT-Driven Insights: Harness the power of Azure’s Open AI to provide your teams with quick, accurate, and context-aware responses.  
Easy Upload of Knowledge: EnterpriseGPT lets you upload your information easily from sources such as links, files, documents, PDFs and other systems as well.  
Knowledge Graph Mapping: CogniSwitch transforms your data into a dynamic knowledge graph, enabling intuitive exploration and discovery.  
Human Validation: Maintain control and quality by allowing experts to verify responses and contribute their insights.  
  
**Why Choose Enterprise GPT from CogniSwitch?**  
CogniSwitch brings to the enterprise the true power of reliable, Generative AI. Built on Azure infrastructure and using Azure’s Open AI, it ensures that your information stays within your organization and eliminates the haze and hallucination that is commonly associated with Open AI’s ChatGPT.  
  
CogniSwitch further helps ground LLMs in knowledge specific to the enterprise thereby increasing the contextual accuracy of generated responses. Additionally, having a human in the loop ensures quality control by enabling experts to verify the responses generated and also filling in the gaps where information is not present.  
  
EnterpriseGPT also enables cross collaboration of teams by facilitating the sharing of knowledge amongst teams across the organization. Streamlining the insights captured through the knowledge graph also works towards improving the efficiency of information sharing.  
  
Empower your teams with EnterpriseGPT and CogniSwitch. Elevate your enterprise's decision-making capabilities with a faster, reliable, contextual and secure Generative AI. Discover the transformative power of Enterprise GPT on Microsoft Teams today and unlock the full potential of Generative AI within your enterprise.  
  
For more details about CogniSwitch and its Generative AI applications for the enterprise visit: [CogniSwitch.ai](https://cogniswitch.ai)  
For help with issues using EnterpriseGPT or CogniSwitch, reach out to [support@cogniswitch.ai](mailto:support@cogniswitch.ai)

title: KUDO
shortDescription: Add live interpretation to any Microsoft Teams meeting or webinar with KUDO
Description:
Make your Microsoft Teams meetings accessible in any language – in real time – with KUDO. With one click, you can activate KUDO’s integrated language selector on your MS Teams interface, allowing all participants of the meeting to speak and listen in the language of their choice through translated audio and captions that appear on screen. The result? More inclusive, productive, and globally-reaching communication between international employees, partners, and clients.

**To power your multilingual meeting, KUDO offers two solutions:**

1. A Patented, market-leading AI Speech Translator (available 24/7 on-demand).
2. An award-winning marketplace of 12,000 remote professional language interpreters.

**With the KUDO App on Microsoft Teams, you can:**

- Activate audio and caption translation in 200+ spoken and sign languages on MS Teams
- Streamline logistics with on-demand booking of professional interpreters
- Make your meetings more inclusive and accessible for the Hard of Hearing community
- Access the meeting from the KUDO App (i.O.S and Android)
- Record and download meetings and events in multiple languages

**How to get set up:**

- To access live speech translation on Microsoft Teams, please [set up a KUDO account](https://kudoway.com/contact).
- Please note that you have the option to report objectionable content generated by KUDO AI at any point by [contacting our Support Team](https://support.kudoway.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?_gl=1*iab51a*_up*MQ..*_ga*NDg0NDYwNDI3LjE3MDA0OTY2OTU.*_ga_WWDCBQJ9T2*MTcwMDQ5NjY5NC4xLjAuMTcwMDQ5NjY5NC4wLjAuMA..) to log the issue.

shortDescription: Find a good internet connection in important video calls.

If you are connected to a router that has Domos network x-ray installed, you will also get access to more in-depth network diagnostics. These diagnostics will explain what the problem is (your device being too far away from Wi-Fi, rush-hour traffic in your area, disturbance from neighbouring networks, disturbances from your own network, etc.) and tell you how to solve it. Domos network x-ray is currently only available through a closed beta-testing at a few European broadband providers, but will be publicly available in both Europe and US within the next 12 months. When available in different regions it will be announced here. Please [contact us](https://domos.ai/contact) if you have any questions.

title: SmartWork
shortDescription: SmartWork是一個能回答Microsoft 365相關問題的對話機器人
Description: SmartWork是一個提供企業用戶使用的內部對話機器人服務。若你的企業已有授權使用它，在登入企業帳號之後，你就可以在Teams上使用對話的方式詢問它Microsoft 365的問題，包含如何操作、疑難排解等。SmartWork建立在Microsoft對話AI技術和Microsoft Graph API的基礎上，擁有上下文推理、自動學習、推薦和預測分析，能協助企業內部用戶能更快且精準的了解問題並給予問題的回答。 SmartWork也可以串接企業中常用的內部管理系統，提供專屬於內部部門系統的對話服務，讓企業內部員工可以透過跟SmartWork對話就能完成工作日常中的大小事，例如：串接人力資源系統協助差勤上下班打卡核對，IT技術部門支援解決簡單電腦或網路問題，知識管理系統協助員工查詢內部文件與資料等。若您想了解更多有關SmartWork的應用與合作，歡迎來信 sales@intumit.com 與我們聯絡。

title: Appspace
shortDescription: Access Appspace to reserve spaces, view news, manage visitors, and post content.
Description:
Add Appspace functionality, including the news feed, quick posts, room booking, desk reservation, floorplans, maps, visitor management, and links to third-party apps, plus push content to individual teams and conversations, all from desktop or mobile.

With Appspace, you now have a central hub for all your workplace communications and management needs. Employees can view the latest updates in the news feed, make and manage workplace reservations, find colleagues on floorplans, and even check-in to their room or desk.

For administrators, you can manage visitors by accessing your visitor dashboard. You also have access to your concierge dashboard to manage reservations for rooms, desks, and other resources.

Employees are notified immediately when their visitor has arrived, they receive activity notifications for workspace or room reservations, and get alerted for company broadcasts.

What's New - Appspace for Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365

- You can now access Appspace directly from Outlook and the Microsoft 365 Portal.
- We have also moved all notifications to the Activity Feed so now you have a fully embedded experience.

Appspace enables you to:

- View your company news feed
- Quickly post new content to the Appspace app or digital signage
- Make and manage workplace reservations for rooms and desks
- Explore maps and floorplans
- Find colleagues who are in the office
- Manage visitors through the visitor dashboard
- Manage reservations through the concierge dashboard

How It Works

1. Create an Appspace account; get started for free here: https://info.appspace.com/signup.
2. Install the Appspace App within Microsoft Teams (this may require IT approval).
3. Link Microsoft Teams with your Appspace account and your chosen channels.
4. Pin the Appspace App to the nav bar for quick access.
5. Publish updates to your Appspace channel and see them in Microsoft Teams.

The Appspace for Microsoft Teams add-in requires an active Appspace subscription. For more details or assistance setting up Appspace with Microsoft Teams, please reach out to your Appspace account team: https://www.appspace.com/support/

title: SylloTips
shortDescription: Expert-guided AI assistants for efficient knowledge transfer
Description:
**SylloTips: Free up your time, let AI take care of it.**

SylloTips is an AI-powered platform seamlessly integrated with **Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365**. It empowers your organization to capture, automate, and reuse undocumented knowledge, ensuring your team has instant access to expert-validated answers wherever they work within the Microsoft ecosystem. By combining AI with human expertise, SylloTips helps your employees work more efficiently and effectively across all supported platforms.

Key Benefits

- **Save Time and Boost Productivity**: Provide instant answers to your team directly within Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365, reducing search time and streamlining workflows.
- **Preserve Critical Knowledge**: Capture valuable institutional knowledge and ensure it’s accessible to everyone, even when key employees leave, across all Microsoft 365 applications.
- **Reduce Support Requests**: Automate common queries to decrease first-tier support requests by up to 75%, allowing teams to focus on higher-value tasks.

Core Features

- **Instant Knowledge Access**: Get quick, validated responses directly within Microsoft Teams, with additional access through Outlook and Microsoft 365 for reading responses and documents.
- **Human-in-the-Loop AI**: Expert oversight ensures the accuracy and reliability of answers, combining AI efficiency with human expertise.
- **Support Automation**: Automatically resolve routine queries and free up support teams for complex issues across all supported platforms.

How It Works

SylloTips leverages your organization's existing knowledge bases and documents to provide accurate answers to your team's questions. Users can ask questions directly within Microsoft Teams and get immediate, expert-validated responses. While Outlook and Microsoft 365 integrations allow users to view answers and manage documents, login functionality is supported exclusively through Microsoft Teams.

Usage of AI

- SylloTips AI will only answer based on knowledge bases uploaded or provided by your organization.
- SylloTips does not use AI to train on your data, ensuring your information remains secure and confidential.
- SylloTips includes a direct reporting feature through an Intercom chat. In case of any doubt or issue to report, developers and customer support operators will promptly address every question and remove inappropriate content.

To get support, if you need information on any objectionable AI-generated content, contact us at [syllotips.com/contact-us](https://www.syllotips.com/contact-us), an operator will be quickly in contact with you.

Login Support

- **Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365**: Full login functionality, including silent login, is supported for seamless access without additional sign-ins.  

Get Started

Ready to transform the way your team accesses knowledge? **Contact us today** at [syllotips.com](http://www.syllotips.com) to start using SylloTips across Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. For any assistance or inquiries, please contact our support team at [syllotips.com/contact-us](https://www.syllotips.com/contact-us), and an operator will promptly get in touch with you.

Prerequisites

- A valid Microsoft 365 account is required to use SylloTips.
- Users must log in via Microsoft Teams to access SylloTips' full features. 


Privacy and Security

We are committed to protecting your organization's data. SylloTips does not store or use your data for AI training purposes. All information remains within your control, and we adhere to strict privacy standards.

**Empower your team with instant access to knowledge. Try SylloTips today through Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365!**

title: Ad Assistant by Clever Ads
shortDescription: Ads Manager, Reports & Alerts for Google, Microsoft, Meta, Twitter & TikTok Ads
Description:
Tool to increase the performance of advertising campaigns: monitor the effectiveness of ads, optimize on the go, and streamline reporting.

Ad Assistant by Clever Ads helps agencies control & optimize clients’ advertising campaigns in Google, Microsoft, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and TikTok ads like never before.

To monitor the performance of ad campaigns, you spend a lot of time on the computer, jumping from one platform to another. And the more clients you have, the more time and attention it takes.

If you’re outside the office, on vacation, or simply away from the computer, it’s difficult to stay on top of all your ad campaigns.

Missing an important detail could affect their performance, resulting in clients who are dissatisfied and who may start looking for better services.

We help you increase the performance of your clients' ad campaigns on the go.

QUICKLY MONITOR THE EFFECTIVENESS OF ADS WHEREVER YOU ARE.
Create alerts for specific metrics as well as any errors or anomalies. Get instant notifications when a metric reaches predetermined values or something important happens to your campaigns and accounts need attention.

OPTIMIZE YOUR CLIENTS' CAMPAIGNS ON THE GO
Our app gives you everything you need to optimize your clients' campaigns, including trend metrics, custom alerts, and anomalies.

RECEIVE SMART REPORTS TO TRACK YOUR CAMPAIGNS
Create personalized reports by selecting your preferred metrics and share them with anyone, with zero time spent.
Get insights on campaign performance.


More than 1 million users worldwide trust Clever Ads to grow their businesses.


Be one step ahead of your competitors with Ad Assistant for agencies.


For any questions or concerns contact our team of tech developers at *assistant@cleverads.com*

title: Akouo Captions
shortDescription: Seamless bi-directional, real-time multilingual captions.
Description:
Unlock the power of multilingual captions directly in your Microsoft Teams meetings and events with Akouo AI Captions. Enhance inclusivity and collaboration with real-time translated captions. Make your Teams meetings multilingual with the click of a button.

- **Multilingual Captions:** Akouo AI Captions enables you to display captions in multiple languages simultaneously during your Microsoft Teams meetings and events. Break down language barriers and ensure every participant can follow along in their preferred language.
- **Real-time Accuracy:** Powered by advanced artificial intelligence and machine learning models, Akouo AI Captions delivers accurate and real-time captions for your meetings. It captures spoken words and instantly converts them into text, ensuring clear and precise captions for all participants.
- **Seamless Integration:** Akouo AI Captions seamlessly integrates into the Microsoft Teams platform, allowing you to access and enable multilingual captions directly within your Teams meetings and events. No need for additional installations or external tools.
- **Akouo Universal Access:** Allows you to add users that do not have a Microsoft office or Teams account to join your Teams meeting via a web-browser on any device with full meeting functionalities and captions integration.
- **100% Microsoft Technologies:** Rest assured knowing that Akouo AI Captions leverages 100% Microsoft technologies, ensuring a secure and reliable captioning solution. It aligns with Microsoft and GDPR standards for data privacy and compliance.
- **Effortless Management:** Easily manage and control captions within Microsoft Teams. Start, stop, and adjust the captions on the fly, ensuring a smooth and uninterrupted meeting experience for all attendees.
- **Supported Languages:** Arabic (UAE), Arabic (Saudi Arabia), Danish (Denmark), German (Germany), English (Australia), English (Canada), English (United Kingdom), English (India), English (New Zealand), English (United States), Spanish (Spain), Spanish (Mexico), Finnish (Finland), French (France), French (Canada), Hindi (India), Italian (Italy), Japanese (Japan), Korean (South Korea), Norwegian (Norway), Dutch (Belgium), Dutch (Netherlands), Polish (Poland), Portuguese (Brazil), Portuguese (Portugal), Russian (Russia), Swedish (Sweden), Chinese Simplified, Chinese Traditional, Chinese (Literary), Chinese (Taiwan), Chinese (China), Chinese (Hong Kong), Czech (Czech Republic), Turkish (Turkey), Vietnamese (Vietnam), Thai (Thailand), Hebrew (Israel), Welsh (United Kingdom), Ukrainian (Ukraine), Greek (Greece), Hungarian (Hungary), Romanian (Romania), Slovak (Slovakia)
- **Recommended devices:** Microsoft Teams desktop and mobile app.
- **Limitations:** 
  - Safari browser on iOS.
  - During a meeting, the Akouo AI Captions side panel must remain open to read captions.
- **Support:** Contact us at [https://www.akouo.io/resources/categories/akouo-multilingual-captions](https://www.akouo.io/resources/categories/akouo-multilingual-captions).

title: Panopto
shortDescription: Send Microsoft Teams meeting recordings to Panopto and view Panopto content
Description:
The Panopto integration allows you to save your Microsoft Teams meeting into Panopto, and also allows you to easily search, share, and view your Panopto videos without leaving Microsoft Teams, Outlook, or Microsoft 365.
Microsoft Teams meeting recordings in Panopto are easy to centralize, manage, and share along with your other video assets stored there. Panopto automatically creates a visual index of every meeting and enables accessibility features such as human-verified closed captioning.
Panopto optionally provides AI generated captions, summaries, and key points for customers with Access AI enabled. Utilize Microsoft's AI companion Copilot to search for Panopto videos, generate summaries, action points, or follow-up tasks from meeting recordings. Should any objectionable content arise, it can be reported by sending a message to [support@panopto.com](mailto:support@panopto.com) for review and action.
Additionally, you may now access your favorite Panopto features without leaving Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365:
1. Browse and search your entire Panopto video library via the Panopto Home tab.
2. Create a new channel tab mapped to a Panopto folder.
3. Search and share your Panopto video from a Teams chat, channel, Outlook message, or Microsoft 365 post.
4. Select and present your Panopto video in a scheduled meeting.
5. Receive notifications when a new Panopto video is ready to view.
6. Search and discover relevant Panopto videos with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
 If you do not have a Panopto site, visit [here](https://www.panopto.com) to learn more.

title: GoSearch
shortDescription: Enterprise Search powered by AI
Description:
From the makers of GoLinks, GoSearch unifies all your company resources, apps, and data with generative AI-powered enterprise search.
Find internal knowledge no matter where it lives. GoSearch supports 100+ data connectors, with real-time app indexing to keep information current. Search documents, tasks, people data, and more.
Enterprise ChatGPT built into GoSearch lets you initiate a two-way conversation with our AI assistant and receive personalized insights and resource recommendations. It’s the combined power of your company knowledge and AI.
With the GoSearch browser extension, open a new tab and quickly launch a search, an upcoming meeting, or a pinned resource. See company announcements and answers in your browser, creating a single source of truth.
Add GoSearch to Microsoft Teams to search for apps and resources from your team’s primary communication channel.
• Unify company knowledge across 100+ app integrations
• Search docs, notes, tasks, files, and people data
• Initiate a chat or query to receive personalized AI recommendations
 In order to use this app, you need to have an active GoSearch account. To get started please sign up at https://www.gosearch.ai/signup
If AI-generated content is inappropriate, please visit this link https://www.gosearch.ai/technical to Report it

title: Sharpen Notes
shortDescription: Unlock hybrid meeting collaboration with Sharpen Notes
Description:
**Sharpen Notes creates interactive collaborative notes directly in a Microsoft Teams Meetings, delivering:**
- Greater team collaboration
- Effective knowledge capture
- Easy knowledge sharing
- Increased productivity
With hybrid working being the new norm and over 80% of people spending up to a third of the workweek in meetings, Sharpen Notes’ digital collaborative platform is a must-have in today’s corporate and learning environments.
**How does it work?**
Rather than meeting notes being taken in isolation, Sharpen Notes enables attendees to:
- Create **“super notes”**; time-stamped to key moments of the meeting
- Enrich these notes by adding attachments, comments and tags
- See notes taken by others
- Share your notes, or keep them private
- Assign action items: To-Do’s, Questions and deadlines
All in real-time, live in a meeting.
**What happens after a meeting?**
All notes are automatically stored in your Teams Personal App in the Sharpen Notes app.
The notes are accessible for all invitees to refer back to at any time; negating the need for meeting minutes.
All Sharpen Notes are still live, which means they are:
- **Searchable:** effortlessly search for keywords across everyone’s notes
- **Filterable:** filter by To-Do, Question and other tags and filters
- **Actionable:** quickly identify To-Do items
- **Secure:** no more losing notes, ever again
- **Active:** new notes can be added after the meeting
**Sharpen Notes: welcome to the future of note-taking.**
**What industries or specialists would use it?**
Sharpen Notes is designed for anyone taking notes in a Teams Meeting.
This includes industries such as head offices, insurance, finance, education, banking, law, HR and project management to name a few and for any collaborative and productivity requirements.

title: To-do Checklist for Team
shortDescription: Use checklists for ToDo, QA, DoD, in Microsoft Teams channels, chats & meetings.
Description:
To-do Checklist for Team by HeroCoders empowers you to create checklists in your Microsoft Teams channels, chats and meetings. It's an ideal solution for To Do lists, QA, Acceptance Criteria, Definition of Done, Agile processes, or any business workflow. 

Complex processes can be broken down into do-able steps and features like user assignments and due dates mean the whole team can instantly see what needs to be done. 

With a full audit history, Checklists also improve accountability, making it a great tool for QA and compliance. 

Save time and standardize processes by saving a Checklist as a template to be used again and again. 

**How to Create a Checklist in Teams** 

To-do Checklist for Team by HeroCoders lets you [add checklists anywhere](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/start-using-checklists) in a few simple clicks: 
* Add a checklists to any channel so the whole team can see what needs to be done.
* Capture ad-hoc plans by adding checklists to chats.
* Post a checklist as an agenda for an upcoming meeting.
* Note action items of meetings in progress. 

**Use Checklists on Teams to Create a Hyper-Organized Workflow** 

Rich checklist features keep everyone on track: 
* Create as many checklists as need.
* Give checklists [descriptive names](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-options#ChecklistOptions-RenameaChecklist), add [separators/headings](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-items#ChecklistItems-AddingSeparators) for additional structure.
* [Drag and drop checklist items](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-items#ChecklistItems-ReorderingChecklistItems) so your priority tasks are at the top of the list; [Hide completed items](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-options#ChecklistOptions-HideCompletedItemsonaChecklist) to stay focused on what needs to be done.
* [Assign checklist items](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-items#ChecklistItems-AssigningChecklistItems) to a team member(s) so it’s clear who’s responsible for what.
* Don’t lose track of time. Add color-coded [deadlines](https://herocoders.atlassian.net/wiki/pages/resumedraft.action?draftId=4244701208) to checklist items.
* [Highlight](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-items#ChecklistItems-EditingChecklistItems) specific checklist items for special attention. 

**Improve Collaboration & Tracking Using Checklists on Teams**
* Keep an eye on advancement with the Progress Bar.
* Accommodate over-achievers by [toggling all checklist items in one click](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-options#ChecklistOptions-ToggleAllItemsonaChecklist).
* Ensure accountability with an [audit history](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-items#ChecklistItems-SeeingtheChecklistItemHistory) of who created and completed checklist items. 

**Enjoy Time Savings and Standardization with Checklist Templates** 

* Got a daily, weekly or monthly to do list? Create a reusable [checklist template](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/checklist-templates) for recurring tasks.
* Use templates to in meetings for agendas.
* Use checklist templates to ensure standardization (DoD, QA, etc.). 

**Your Easy-to-use Microsoft Teams Checklist**

* Enjoy a simple, intuitive UI.
* No additional user account required – simply login to your Microsoft account and get started. 

**To-Do Checklist for Team App Capabilities** 

 **Data Access:** 
When To-Do Checklist for Team by HeroCoders is used, it can:
* Send data over the Internet.
* Access personal information users add to checklists. The app may send this data to a third-party service. Other items in your mailbox can’t be read or modified. 

**Security:**
* HeroCoders is PII-safe, GDPR compliant and SOC2 Type I certified. See our [Trust Center](https://trust.herocoders.com/) for more information.

**Support:**
* [Documentation](https://docs.herocoders.com/cft/)
* [Help Center](https://herocoders.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/7/group/12)

title: Darktrace Communicator
shortDescription: Work alongside Darktrace with bidirectional communication and data export
Keywords: ['Secure Communication Channel', 'Cybersecurity Incident Management', 'Cybersecurity Incident Response']
Description:
Darktrace Communicator is a bot aimed at existing Darktrace customers and is designed to work alongside your Darktrace DETECT and HEAL deployments.

The bot allows bidirectional communication and data export from Darktrace DETECT and HEAL into Microsoft Teams - this allows users without direct access to Darktrace to collaborate on incidents through Teams Group Chats.

# Not currently a customer?
This app is built to work with a Darktrace deployment, therefore you would need a valid Darktrace DETECT and HEAL license. You can sign up for a Demo and Trial on the [Darktrace website](https://darktrace.com).

# How to get started?
If you are a Darktrace customer and are looking for some help with setup, it's always a good idea to visit the [Darktrace Customer Portal](https://customerportal.darktrace.com) for documentation or contact your Darktrace representative for assistance getting set up.

To get up and running quickly, you can:
* Make sure you have consented to the app permissions in the [Teams Admin Center](https://admin.teams.microsoft.com)
* Log in to your Darktrace deployment, navigate to System Config > Modules
* Locate "Darktrace Communicator" configuration tile and click on it
* Enter Team and Tenant IDs that you wish to use Darktrace Communicator with and hit "Synchronize"

Once set up you should be able to open any Darktrace Incident from the threat tray, navigate to communications centre and select "Teams" as the communications method.

# Bot capabilities
* Organize Teams chats using the Darktrace platform
* Upload incident reports from Darktrace to chat participants
* Notify users of Darktrace incidents
* Forward messages to Darktrace by tagging the bot

title: MindMeister - Mind Mapping
shortDescription: Create mind maps to brainstorm and plan with your collaborators in real-time
Description:
Your team is all in one place… let’s make collaboration beautiful! Share your maps to Microsoft Teams meetings for efficient, visual meeting management. Thanks to real-time ideation, digital mind maps get the best out of your team. It’s easy to get started: MindMeister for Microsoft Teams brings the power of mind mapping to any chat or channel. Use the tab to document your team meetings, share ideas with colleagues, and get creative with MindMeister. 

Features:
[#LI] Share mind maps in Microsoft Teams meetings to present your ideas[/#LI]
[#LI] Create mind maps inside your channels[/#LI]
[#LI] Work on maps in real-time, straight from Teams[/#LI]
[#LI] Use mind maps to prepare meetings and take minutes collaboratively[/#LI]

title: Tonkean
shortDescription: Tonkean - A.I. powered management platform
Description:
Tonkean is a revolutionary orchestration platform for business operations. Use Tonkean to automate and orchestrate end-to-end business processes by building custom business logic without any code. Create a seamless employee experience that requires no change management, since processes are built around the tools your organization already uses, such as Microsoft Teams. 
The Tonkean Bot intelligently integrates with Microsoft Teams to proactively seek updates or request approvals from team members and displays process data in live business reports surfacing critical information across all the tools you use in a single consolidated view. 
By connecting key data with the context only your team can provide, Tonkean ends micromanagement and enables teams to focus on doing great work.


- No change management required. Process interactions happen within Microsoft Teams or email.
- No need to replace your current stack. Tonkean connects with thousands of applications and uses custom connections to integrate with internal systems.
- Agile process building. Tonkean provides a flexible no-code builder empowering business users to quickly iterate and maintain ever-changing organizational processes, whilst providing IT with governance over enterprise assets.
- Intelligent human coordination. Tonkean is continuously in the background and alerts key members at critical points in the process flow  for decisions and approvals ensuring humans are kept in the loop.
- Single consolidated view into live information across multiple integrated systems providing full insight into your business processes.
 In order to use this app users must have an active Tonkean account. For more details [request an account ↗](https://tonkean.com/get-started/) and get started. [Learn more at Tonkean ↗](https://www.tonkean.com)

title: ArcGIS
shortDescription: Explore a trending world of maps and data
Description:
Maximize collaboration with powerful mapping and spatial analytics software. ArcGIS for Teams allows you to access ready-to-use datasets including demographics, psychographic and business data, live feeds like traffic and weather, places, movement data, and high-quality imagery in Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Share the latest maps that are trending globally, or find hyper-local applications created by your local governments. 

Discover geospatial applications that use data visualization tools to see unique patterns and relationships. Using data-driven visualizations, you can create rich interactive 2D and 3D maps. Use ArcGIS for Teams with Microsoft 365 Copilot to seamlessly search for ArcGIS content. These tools work both client-side for highly interactive user experiences, and server-side to help you scale with large amounts of data. 

Log in to your ArcGIS account and gain access to private content across your organization in a centralized application, in addition to millions of public maps and applications. 

**Here's what this app can do:**  
*  Use the chat bot to access the world’s foremost collection of geospatial data. 
*   Collaborate at the speed you need by sharing ready-to-use maps and authoritative data via message extensions. 
*  Keep your tactical teams organized by managing your ArcGIS content, maps and apps in one central location. 
*  Share interactive maps and apps privately with your groups or publicly with everyone. 
*  Send messages and notifications to teams in a channel. 
*  Use an ArcGIS account to access private content. 

**What's new - ArcGIS for Teams now works with Microsoft 365 Copilot** 
* Copilot now comes with an ArcGIS agent for Microsoft Copilot which enables you to search for public content in ArcGIS. 
* When signed in to ArcGIS, you can access a wide array of public and private content, including specific items from your repositories.
* Results returned get further refined as you continue searching with more focused keywords, for example, Search for education maps in ArcGIS.
* You can access the search results in ArcGIS for Teams when prompted via Microsoft Teams Copilot. 

**About Esri** 
Esri, the global market leader in geographic information system (GIS) software, location intelligence, and mapping, helps customers unlock the full potential of data to improve operational and business results. Founded in 1969 in Redlands, California, USA, Esri software is deployed in more than 350,000 organizations globally and in over 200,000 institutions in the Americas, Asia and the Pacific, Europe, Africa, and the Middle East, including Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, nonprofits, and universities. Esri has regional offices, international distributors, and partners providing local support in over 100 countries on six continents. With its pioneering commitment to geospatial information technology, Esri engineers the most innovative solutions for digital transformation, the Internet of Things (IoT), and advanced analytics. Visit us at [**esri.com**](https://www.esri.com/).

title: Natterhub
shortDescription: Online safety hub for students to learn how to be safe, kind and savvy online.
Description:
An immersive **online safety and media literacy hub** for teaching students aged 5-11 years through Microsoft Teams. Providing classrooms with a library of interactive, engaging lessons and activities, the app offers a fun space for students to practice the skills needed to be **safe and savvy online**.

# Building Digital Skills:

Because Natterhub safely mimics platforms used outside of the classroom, it offers impactful and relevant experiences to teach kids about being on screens. With schemes of work for each year group for K-6, the Natterhub bank of 350+ interactive resources teach students critical thinking skills and build digital resilience so they can safely navigate the internet.

With online vulnerability at an all time high, Natterhub is a whole school solution that addresses online risks and harms in an age-appropriate way. Animated lessons, teacher-led lessons, interactive polls and quizzes all form the immersive experience for students whilst enabling you to weave online safety and media literacy across your timetable. 

Student progress is assessed and tracked with an easy-to-use badge system. Students have the freedom to practice positive digital communication and further develop key soft skills in a safe space.

# Two styles of lessons: 

Teacher-led lessons have been created for whole-class or group teaching, with teacher notes to guide you towards quality online safety discussions. Visual lessons include a safe class chat feed to nurture typing skills too. All lessons finish with a fun assessment quiz.

Animated Natterled lessons are ideal for individualised learning in the classroom or at home, with students guided through a series of interactive slides and activities. These can be posted as an assignment within your Team where teachers have the option to provide feedback too.

Topics covered are global issues affecting children. Designed and built in the UK, Natterhub content is relevant for schools in all english speaking countries/territories facing online vulnerability. Currently helping teachers in over 60 countries including USA, UK, Australia, New Zealand, Africa, China, UAE and more.

Natterhub provides Teams users with a comprehensive online safety and media literacy solution for K-6 / Primary.

*In order to use this app, users must have an active Natterhub account. When you install the app for the first time, an account will be created for you.*

**For more information, please visit natterhub.com or drop us a line at [info@natterhub.com](mailto:info@natterhub.com) as we’d love to hear from you.**

title: Onluyen
shortDescription: Onluyen là ứng dụng hỗ trợ học sinh và giáo viên từ lớp 1 đến lớp 12
Description:
Onluyen là một giải pháp cá nhân hóa học tập cho học sinh Việt Nam hàng đầu hiện nay. 
Onluyen.vn được thiết kế và xây dựng bởi đội ngũ chuyên gia giáo dục phổ thông dày dạn kinh nghiệm, cùng với ngân hàng kiến thức, câu hỏi và các bài kiểm tra đồ sộ, đã được tư vấn chuẩn hóa bởi Viện khoa học Giáo dục và các chuyên gia đến từ các trường đại học hàng đầu như Đại học Sư phạm, Đại học Giáo dục, Đại học Hà Nội vv. Hệ thống nội dung bao phủ tất cả các môn học tại các bậc Phổ thông Cơ sở và Trung học Phổ thông.

Với tài khoản học sinh:

- Các bài luyện tập được sắp xếp theo từng đơn vị kiến thức, giúp học sinh củng cố ngay sau khi học xong.
- Học sinh chủ động sắp xếp tiến độ học tập phù hợp.
- Mỗi câu hỏi trong ngân hàng đề được đi kèm với tóm tắt kiến thức liên quan, video bài giảng, các câu hỏi khó có video chữa bài.
- Câu hỏi được sắp xếp thông minh từ dễ đến khó, phù hợp với trình độ của mỗi học sinh.

Với tài khoản giáo viên:
- Onluyen hỗ trợ giáo viên trong việc giao bài tập về nhà nhanh chóng và hiệu quả.
- Giáo viên có thể nắm được tiến độ hoàn thành bài tập của từng học sinh.
- Giáo viên cũng có thể tạo những bài kiểm tra định kỳ, bài thi giữa kỳ và gửi cho từng lớp, vào khoảng thời gian định sẵn

 Ghi chú: 
Các tính năng của Onluyen trên Teams sẽ được phát triển thêm trong tương lai.

title: Brochesia
shortDescription: Brochesia is the software solution that allows free your hands.
Description:
Brochesia is the app that makes the work of operators from the field smarter.	
Thanks to the use of Augmented Reality, our solution connects you with people geographically widespread and allow you to share live content and information, using Smart Glasses or smartphone and tablet devices. Sharing skills, expertise and solutions between on-site workers, expert tutors and trainers has never been easier!
Through Brochesia, anyone can activate an audio-video streaming session and share their point of view on the surrounding environment with the remote operator, overlaying the acquired information from the field thanks to the use of Augmented Reality. Collaborate with your colleague and customers during your daily maintenance activity, inspections or to solve a technical problem is now quicker and more effective, always saving your on-site travel time. 
Working with your hands free is now possible! With a total freedom of movement you will be able to perform a given task or execute an interactive workflow diagram, visualize instructions, easily generate report, record your working session, and describe your experience with pictures, video streaming, live drawing, instant chat and many other smart features. Brochesia is the best idea to boost your remote support, co-working or training sessions and it is suitable for many different product sectors. This application is also compatible with the most appreciated and common Smart Glasses on the market as well as Android smartphones and tablets.	

Furthermore, all the contents created with the Brochesia app can be uploaded and stored within the fully integrated Brochesia Cloud.

To use the Brochesia app you need to activate an account.

Please follow these steps:
-	Download the Brochesia app;
-	Once downloaded, contact us at info@brochesia.com, indicating your name, surname and email address;
-	We will promptly enable an account on our Web Portal to communicate and interact through this app;
-	Finally, you will receive an e-mail with all the necessary further instructions.
Once the setup is completed, you will discover all the benefits in the different use case scenarios!
Let Augmented Reality lift your life with Brochesia
Visit www.brochesia.com to find out more

title: Atom
shortDescription: A conversational ITSM with GenAI assistant, modern AI helpdesk & AI workflows.
Description:
Atomicwork is a modern IT service desk that offers hassle-free experiences to your end users as well as your HR and IT teams by streamlining requests, incidents and assets.

🤖 Federate your knowledge sources with Atom so employees can ask questions and get instant answers (for example: “I need to reset my password”) or raise requests directly from Microsoft Teams.

🎟 Manage requests, service requests, incidents and assets from the Atomicwork platform. Set up service catalogs for every department and streamline requests even as they come in.

🔐 We take data security seriously which is why we’re compliant with global privacy and security standards like SOC2 Type 2 (and 1), ISO 27001, GDPR, CCPA, and CSA Star Level 1.

**This app requires an existing purchase agreement and configuration by Atomicwork.**

Request a demo of Atomicwork to get started:

Log in to your existing Atomicwork account:

title: CelebrateDroid
shortDescription: Boost joy & recognition in Teams! 🎉 Celebrate every milestone together.
Description:
Introducing **CelebrateDroid**, the ultimate celebration assistant! 🥳 Whether it's a birthday or a work anniversary, CelebrateDroid ensures no special day goes unnoticed in your workplace.

Key Features:

• **Birthday and Work Anniversary Messages**: Automatically send celebration messages, making every team member feel valued and recognized on their special day.
• **Opt-Out Option**: CelebrateDroid respects everyone's preferences, offering an easy opt-out for those who prefer to keep their dates private or not to be celebrated.
• **Weekend Management**: Birthdays on weekends? No problem! Choose to celebrate on the upcoming Monday or the preceding Friday, ensuring no one is left out.
• **Upcoming Events List**: Stay in the loop with CelebrateDroid's event calendar. See who's next in line for a celebration or search for specific dates.
• **Auto-Collection of Dates**: Say goodbye to manual tracking. CelebrateDroid gently reaches out to team members, collecting birth and anniversary dates effortlessly.
• **Channel Celebrations**: CelebrateDroid fits right into any channel, keeping the spirit of celebration alive everywhere.
• **Buddies Reminders**: Get advanced reminders for upcoming birthdays and anniversaries, giving you ample time to plan or team up for surprises.
• **Security and Data Privacy**: CelebrateDroid is designed with your team's privacy in mind. It does not store any personal data and allows users to opt out of entering birth years, ensuring a secure environment for everyone.

**CelebrateDroid** is not just a bot; it's your team's celebration companion, designed to foster a culture of recognition and joy. By automating the little things, it lets you focus on what truly matters — building meaningful connections and celebrating each other's milestones. Add CelebrateDroid to your team today and start spreading the cheer!

Explore all our products and services by visiting our [homepage](https://celebratedroid.com). If you have any questions or require further assistance, please feel free to [contact us](https://celebratedroid.com/#support). We're here to help!

title: SmartGift for Business
shortDescription: Celebrate employees and teams with thoughtful, empowering gifts.
Description:
With SmartGift® for Business, anyone can create and send multi-item gift collections from which recipients can choose their favorite. It’s a great way to send multiple gifts to multiple people, all with different tastes – all at once, all in the same app. 
After you have downloaded the SmartGift® for Business app, you can:

• Send group gifts directly from your calendar in just 2 clicks.

• Customize and save gifting preferences (including payment method, gift collection, and message) to expedite future gift sends. 

• Send recipients gift collections with a personalized message, from which they can choose their favorite item.

• Offer treats, chocolates, bouquets, plants, and even customized company swag.

• Pay by credit card, or from your 1-800-Flowers.com Business account 

• Use the SmartGift® for Business app tabs to send gifts associated with calendar events (and to set gifting preferences), or use the app to send gifts directly in a chat or channel message extension

In order to use this app, you need to have an active SmartGift for Business account.

 Click [here to sign up and get started.](https://1800flowers.smartgift.com/dashboard/sign-up) If you have any questions, feel free to [contact us](https://www.1800flowers.com/contact-us) anytime. 

 This bot is only available for us in U.S. and Canada.

By using SmartGift for Business, you agree to the 1-800-Flowers.com, Inc. [privacy notice](https://www.1800flowers.com/About-Us-Privacy-Policy) and [terms of use](https://www.1800flowers.com/About-Us-Terms-of-Use). 
By continuing, you understand and agree that the contents of this chat may be recorded by us or by third parties working with us, and used as described in the aforementioned privacy notice. If you do not agree, please do not use our chat feature.

title: ComplianceCow
shortDescription: ComplianceCow Connector for Microsoft Teams
Description:
Manage enterprise security risk and compliance through Microsoft Teams
Security GRC is a team sport. ComplianceCow is a SaaS platform that allows you to collaborate security controls across your different teams through Microsoft Teams. 

>  Think of us as Security GRC meets Policy Engine delivered over Microsoft Teams! 

We have too much us to say about us. We have done our best to keep things simple. If you don't have time to read through our user guide, simply try us out. Tell us what you like about us and what we can do better. From the bot, say 'feedback'

What can you do with ComplianceCow on Microsoft Teams?
+ Deploy standard or custom security assessments and templates
    + You can use our existing templates for PCI-DSS, FedRamp, NIST and many more
    + You can download, customize and build your own security assessment templates
    + You can configure default checklists, notes, weights and priority 
    + Assign controls and checklists for one or more users
    We have an interesting concept of a multi-party assignment. Check it out
+  Manage risk data and control evidences in a single pane of glass
    + Collect risk data and evidences. We separate the evidence data from the metadata (for example, sort order). This allows us to do some pretty cool things such as linking and associating multiple evidence records
    + Assign evidences to one or more users
    + Version control risk data
+ Nested, weighted average score of your security controls
+ Standard and custom reports. For example, you can report on your PCI-DSS in the ROC format out of the box

shortDescription: Achieve Full Control between Salesforce and Microsoft Teams with Centro
Description:
Surround your customer with the team with data and actions. This is the Salesforce and Microsoft Teams integration you've been waiting for. Centro saves you hours, increases customer satisfaction, and gives comfort that everything is tied to Salesforce. Keep everything Centro-lized. Linked Salesforce records to discover, organize, and engage Microsoft Teams inside Salesforce.

title: GoLinks
shortDescription: GoLinks are intuitive, easy-to-remember short links, shared by teams.
Description:
GoLinks, known as go links, golinks, go/links, or go-links, are intuitive, easy-to-remember short links, shared by teams. It transforms long, ugly URLs into human-readable go links that can be used directly in browsers, emails, chats, and in conversation. 

Send a message to your team containing one or multiple go links and the app will send a clickable card for each go link with its description, making it easy to get everyone on the same page. Use them around the workplace to effectively and efficiently access and share work information and resources at scale. 

No payment is needed to get started using GoLinks! Just connect the Microsoft Teams app and create a free account at [https://www.golinks.io](https://www.golinks.io). Once your accounts are linked, your go links will begin resolving right away when you use them in any of your team's public channels. 

If you have any questions, please contact us at [https://www.golinks.io/contact.php](https://www.golinks.io/contact.php).

title: Solo
shortDescription: Virtual care platform with configurable services and patient workflows.
Description: Combine the Solo virtual care platform with Microsoft Teams for your organization.  **Using Solo, you and your team can:**  - **View your patient queue.** The queue is shared among all practitioners in the same service.  - **View your clinical services.** You can view all services within your organization you are a member of. A service link can be shared with patients enabling them to request an appointment.  - **View your patients.** You may view the list of people who have appointments in services where you practice. You can click on a patient to see their previous and upcoming Solo visits, as well as schedule new appointments.  - **View encounters.** You may also view the list of completed telehealth appointments.  - **View care locations.** This is the list of telehealth devices you can connect to. Teladoc devices include the Vita, Vantage, Vici, Lite and Mini. Only devices enabled for your organization and available to you will be shown. Using care locations is an optional part of Solo.  - **Schedule and start an appointment.** Appointments can be scheduled by the patient or by the care team. To schedule an appointment, you can start by selecting either a service or a patient. Once the patient is checked into the appointment you can click the patient in the queue to join the visit in Solo.  - **See the patient profile during the appointment.** Click the Solo app on the top right of the in-session appointment to see the patient profile.  - **Use native Teams notifications.** In the settings section of your Solo profile you may enable Solo to send native Teams notifications when patients have arrived.  **If you have the practice admin role you can also:**  - **Create clinical services.** Services are typically based on specialty and define the patient and provider populations that will be working together.  - **Configure service options including intake.** Set options such as clinic hours, visit windows, appointment parameters and patient and clinician appointment notifications.  **Your patients will:**  - **Click a link to request an appointment.** If you have shared a general visit request link for your service, patients will be able to click the link to request and register for an appointment. Patients will receive a visit link via SMS or email.  - **Join an appointment.** At the time of their appointment your patients will use the link they received to check in and start their virtual appointment from their device via a web-based patient experience, powered by Teams interoperability, built specifically for the telehealth workflow. Downloading Teams is not required.  To have access to Solo, users must have active Solo accounts from their organization and their virtual care practice must be configured for use with Teams.  Solo includes the ability to text an invitation to patients. This Solo Teams app is available in the U.S. and is not compatible with international phone numbers.  If your hospital or health system is interested in getting started with the Solo virtual care platform you can click [here](https://teladochealth.com/contact/) to contact Teladoc Health.

title: Stadium
shortDescription: Recognize employees, clients, and more with customizable programs
Description:
Recognition just got more rewarding. Stadium Recognition helps you recognize employees, clients, and customers within seconds of a post. Recognize company-wide, worldwide, and channel-wide.


Stadium Recognition Highlights:

📣 Don't just stop at peer-to-peer recognition. Recognize anyone, from employees to customers. Everyone deserves a shoutout!

🎁 Send kudos to anyone. Kudos can be redeemed for items in our catalog.

✏️ Completely customizable—customize your frequency and currency.

💬 Get social!


Stadium Recognition is here to help you keep recognition a priority. Our programs are free to set up, with no monthly contracts or annual fees, because you can't put a price on true appreciation.


Whether you're recognizing someone for a milestone or thanking them for a job well done, we believe that recognition is a continuous and group effort. Our programs are incredibly versatile—use them to promote employee appreciation, acknowledge clients, streamline HR initiatives, and more.

title: GeoGuessr
shortDescription: Get dropped anywhere and figure out where you and your teammates are!
Description:
In this multiplayer game, everyone is placed in a random location on Google Street View, and the challenge is to guess where you are. The closer your guess is, the more points you earn. It's a simple and engaging way to add some fun to your meetings — no accounts or logins necessary!

Whether you're a fan of geography or just looking for a fun challenge, this game is perfect for exploring new places with your team. The multiplayer gameplay makes it social and adds extra excitement to your meetings.
Key Features:
  • Integrated into Teams: Play GeoGuessr without leaving Microsoft Teams, making it easy to launch in meetings or group activities.
  • No Login Required: All players, including the host, can join as guests, ensuring quick access to the game without account creation or sign-in.
  • Multiplayer Challenge: Compete with your colleagues to guess locations across the globe. Points are awarded based on how close your guess is to the actual spot on the map.
How It Works:
  • The host launches a 5-round GeoGuessr challenge directly within a Teams meeting.
  • Participants are shown Street View locations from around the world.
  • Each player submits their guess on the map, and scores are awarded based on accuracy.
  • After 5 rounds, the player with the highest score wins.
This app is ideal for enhancing team collaboration, sparking competition, and adding fun to meetings. It is designed to get everyone involved and engaged without a complicated setup.

For help or support, get in touch with us at geoguessr.com/support/faq

title: Straker Translate
shortDescription: Enjoy a seamless translation experience with Straker Translate.
Description:
Whether you're responding to a chat in a different language or need to translate a document, we make it easy without ever needing to leave Microsoft Teams. With fast and accurate translations, your global team can focus on having better collaboration. Key Features:
  • Instant Translation Workflow: Just drag and drop your files for translation in over 100+ languages.
  • AI Quality Evaluation: Get assessment of the overall translation quality with the option for human review.
  • Seamless Integration:Easily connect your Straker Verify account to manage translations directly within Teams
About Straker

  • We utilize the full extent of generative AI combined with the world's best language experts to provide fast and accurate translations.
  • Our AI verification ecosystem allows us to create localized content for global markets, ensuring we deliver higher translation support for businesses and their customers in any language.
  • Founded in 1999 in New Zealand, Straker has grown into a leading provider of AI-driven content automation, verification, and translation services. With over two decades, Straker combines technical innovation and linguistic expertise while delivering effortless accuracy through cost-effective and scalable translation solutions to global clients.
Contact Us

  • Stay updated with the latest from Straker by visiting straker.ai
  • Connect with us on LinkedIn
  • If you need more information, come across any objectionable AI-generated content, or have any questions at all, please reach out to us at app.support@strakergroup.com

title: incident.io
shortDescription: Declare and manage incidents with incident.io
Description: *Manage incidents at scale, without leaving Microsoft Teams.* With a beautifully simple interface and powerful workflow automation, incident.io ensures entire organizations can seamlessly collaborate and manage incidents using Microsoft Teams for communication. You'll need an existing incident.io account to use this app: sign up, and get help, at [incident.io](https://incident.io).

title: Vani
shortDescription: Create, meet, and work together on an infinite canvas
Description:
Vani is where teammates can come together to brainstorm ideas, plan strategies, and work on mockups, over a shared infinite canvas.

When you start using Vani with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, or Microsoft 365, teammates can work on mock-ups and mood boards, map flows and diagrams, come up with roadmaps, and review stuff together in real time without having to switch between apps.

**Boost teamwork with Vani on Microsoft Teams:**

- **Add Vani as a personal tab**: Manage your team in Vani and access all your Spaces directly from Teams by adding Vani as a personal tab.
- **Access Spaces from your channels and chat**: Add Spaces from Vani as tabs in your channels and chats to collaborate effortlessly with your teammates.
- **Meet and work in the same place**: Bring Spaces from Vani into Meetings to brainstorm and work together in real time.
- **Get notifications from Vani right within Teams**: Stay updated on all the important activity from Vani with the Vani notifications bot. Reply to comments, manage teammate requests, and more directly with actionable notifications.
- **Streamline communication with message extensions**: Pick and share Spaces instantly with your teammates using message extensions, without needing to leave the conversation.

**Do your best creative work. Together**.
Whether you're a marketing team crafting your next campaign, a product team preparing for a launch, or a design studio creating your next big idea, Vani simplifies cross-functional teamwork and helps you go faster from idea to finished product.

**Jumpstart projects with ready-made templates**
Get your team started on common product development processes, marketing exercises, checklists, and process flowcharts with templates designed to get your creative juices flowing.

**Visualize your ideas with ease**
Use diagrams, mind maps, wireframes, and storyboards, and seamlessly embed documents, spreadsheets, images, and videos from various platforms to see the bigger picture.

**Create presentations with Flow**
Organize your work and stitch together sections of the infinite canvas to make presentations that your team can explore at their convenience.

**Work like it's play**
Follow each other's live cursors, drop comments, and react with emojis on the fly—it's like being in the same room, but better.

**Note:**
To use this application, an active Vani account is required. [Click here](https://app.vanihq.com) to get started with Vani.
To learn more about how Vani works, check out our [user guide](https://www.vanihq.com/help).

Description: OnePlan offers a strategic portfolio, resource and work management solution that fits the needs of every department in the organization. Optimize your portfolio, financials and resources enterprise wide. Connect OnePlan with Microsoft Project, Project for the web, Office 365 Planner, Azure DevOps, Jira, and more for a complete view into all work across the enterprise.

title: Hybrid streamliner
shortDescription: Upgrade hybrid working: more efficiency, teamwork, engagement and satisfaction.
Description:
**Are you a professional organization seeking to enhance hybrid working in terms of collaboration, productivity, work-life balance, cost savings, and employer branding? Then Hybrid Streamliner is made for you! Collaboratively discuss and decide on hybrid working arrangements with your team, gaining insights and clarity on improvements and implementation.**

_Join companies such as Ricardo, ASR, Exact, and Voestalpine in optimizing hybrid work through collaborative efforts that enable and acknowledge feedback from every team member on relevant topics._

Team managers get insights into their own current style, the best style to effectively manage hybrid teams, and how to best handle each team member based on their persona. Based on joint discussions with the team, team managers use templates like the hybrid working framework, to enter which activities will be done where, how often and by who.

Team members are solicited for feedback on the presented issues, and together, they make informed decisions to define the final arrangements. This process not only enhances clarity but also ensures robust support for future hybrid working arrangements.

**KEY FEATURES**

- Interactive section on Leading hybrid teams
- Five interactive sections with important topics related to hybrid working, to discuss and decide on, with your team
- Simply activate possible arrangements, by switching toggles (optionally add explanation)
- Tools/Templates (hybrid working framework, coaching plan, team member and team manager personas)
- Auto-generated policy based on activated arrangements (in manager's version of the app)
- Included: (video) support with one of our hybrid experts (4 credits for 4 x 15 min support; extra support available for $25/15 minutes)


**KEY BENEFITS**

- Engaged and recognized team members when deciding on future hybrid working arrangements
- Improved efficiency and productivity through reconsideration of processes and meetings
- Better work-life balance (more clarity, flexibility, autonomy, and freedom).
- Saved costs (ft² and travel expenses)
- More effective and contemporary leadership
- Attractive employership


**About Ditox**

Hybrid Streamliner is a project of Ditox B.V. based in the Netherlands. Ditox helps organizations all over the world with all aspects of hybrid working, from mobility budget programs, square footage calculations, and team arrangements to setting up a corporate vision and strategy for hybrid working. Ditox has over 20 years of experience with hybrid working and has worked for leading companies like Microsoft, Exact software, Jabra, ABN Amro, and, ASR insurances. We know what makes taking on hybrid working professionally, a success.

Any questions, please contact Product owner Bob Lei at [bob.lei@ditox.nl](mailto:bob.lei@ditox.nl) or +31 6 2907 6947 directly (to avoid unanswered calls please send a SMS with a short introduction first). We'll get back at you asap.

To access all the features/content of the app, you need to have an active subscription.

title: Eusoft Rdp Manager
shortDescription: Eusoft.Lab RDP Manager is an Eusoft's app for testing reports visualization.
Description:
What is Eusoft.Lab RDP Manager?

This application has been developed to allow users of Eusoft.Lab LIMS to access some features of the LIMS itself, also from Microsoft Teams.

The purpose of Eusoft.Lab RDP Manager is to give access to test reports to LIMS users tool used most during their working hours without having to access another application.

What Is a LIMS?

A LIMS is a laboratory management system that allows you to manage the process flows of a testing and quality control laboratory, from the sampling to the test report.

Eusoft.Lab RDP Manager is the app developed by Eusoft for testing reports viewing (RDP) of samples processed by external testing labs.

Eusoft.Lab RDP Manager main functions

The app allows all Eusoft.Lab LIMS users to access the sample display page and search for samples by acceptance, category, acceptance date, validation date and digital signature.

In addition to viewing the samples, you can download the relevant test reports (RDP) in .pdf format and send a notification (optional) to another Microsoft Teams user by typing her email address.

In order to use this app, your organization needs to have an active Eusoft.Lab account.

For support request please contact us on https://www.eusoft.co.uk/eusoft-lab-rdp-manager-user-guide/

title: Whiteboard by Frameable
shortDescription: Frameable Whiteboard is the intuitive whiteboard built for Microsoft Teams
Description: Frameable Whiteboard makes remote meetings better. Give your team the power to share their thoughts in writing and see what everyone else is thinking in realtime to increase engagement and reach those aha! moments faster. Create, share, and edit boards together right inside your Microsoft Teams calls. Once you install the app, opening a whiteboard will automatically bring everyone in the call into the shared board where they can begin working together immediately. After the call, find your boards in your Frameable Whiteboard account via the sidebar in Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 or at [https://whiteboard.frameable.com](https://whiteboard.frameable.com) to continue editing any time, anywhere. No separate signup or setup required. Contact us for assistance or to send feedback at [support@frameable.com](mailto:support@frameable.com).

title: Donut
shortDescription: Make strategic connections to achieve common goals and better outcomes
Description:
Effective collaboration is the key to great work, and the foundation for achieving common goals with better outcomes. Donut makes strategic connections within organizations that boost productivity, build trust, and increase morale.

Donut has made over 15 million connections for 20,000+ enterprises (including Okta and Netflix) within and across departments, office locations, and continents.

**Types of Intros your company can make with Donut for Microsoft Teams**
*New hire networks* – Create a Team just for new joiners to help them build valuable networks that allow them to learn faster, find project sponsors, and reduce time to peak productivity.

*Cross-department connections* – Add Donut to a Team with colleagues from different parts of the organization. Cross-departmental conversations make projects move effectively and efficiently.

*Relationships with leadership* – Add leaders to Teams with direct reports to help build relationships that achieve goals and spread company values.

*Social programs* – Use Donut Intros to help colleagues form lasting relationships that build loyalty through social programs like coffee meetups, and support other initiatives like employee resource groups.

**How Donut for Microsoft Teams works**
It’s simple!
- Add Donut to the Team with the colleagues you'd like to Intro.
- Donut will pair everyone in the Team and send them a message prompting them to connect: they can open a chat or video call right in Teams, or find a time to meet using the Teams calendar.
- If colleagues need to make changes, they can snooze or opt out within Teams.

Have a feature request, feedback, or questions? [We’d love to hear from you via email](mailto:support@donut.ai), or [visit our help center](https://help.donut.ai/en/collections/5834322-donut-for-microsoft-teams-beta).

title: Boostlingo AI Pro
shortDescription: Effortlessly convert spoken words into written text with live captioning.
Description:
Boostlingo AI Pro delivers high-quality translations using AI captioning to expand communication, offering dependable speech-to-text to support diverse communities. Convert words into written text with live captioning during events, meetings, or conferences to improve communication among all participants no matter what language they speak. Boostlingo AI Pro delivers precise real-time translated captions, allowing users to follow along in their preferred language. By installing this app, you gain immediate access to multilingual captions directly into your Microsoft Teams meetings. You can set it up directly in-app and determine what languages and how many languages you want to translate and caption in real-time.
Click here for support and get started: [https://support.ai-pro.boostlingo.com/hc/en-us/sections/19089346077595-MS-Teams](https://support.ai-pro.boostlingo.com/hc/en-us/sections/19089346077595-MS-Teams)

title: DeskBooking
shortDescription: Find faster and easier!
Description:
At DeskNow, we make it possible for your customers and employees to search their workstations easily and flexibly, and without double-occupancy!

But not only simple workplaces can be offered via our platform... The same applies to meeting and conference rooms as well as private offices and hot desks. title: Applauz
shortDescription: Applauz helps you engage, recognize, and reward your best employees.
Description:
Receive Applauz Newsfeed notifications directly in your Microsoft Teams channel and never miss a beat! Integrating Applauz with Microsoft Teams lets you stay current on day-to-day company events and activities by providing you with timely in-channel updates.
When you integrate Applauz with your Microsoft teams account, you’ll be informed of workplace activities such as posts, polls, recognitions, birthdays, and work anniversaries — notifications from Applauz will conveniently show up on your Microsoft Teams channel in real-time.
Never miss an opportunity to support your company culture and recognize your employees!
With the newly updated integration, you’ll now see full Newsfeed posts and recognition messages instantly on Microsoft Teams. 
To add our connector to the channel of your choice, log into your Applauz account and locate your Applauz REST API key, found under Program>Integrations.
Receive alerts on your Microsoft Teams Channel of the newest posts and polls made on the Applauz Newsfeed. If you do not have an account yet, get started now by registering for a free one at: https://www.applauz.me/.
To learn more about Applauz, or if you need help with the integration, contact us at: https://www.applauz.me/en/contact-us.
Applauz helps companies make work a happier place by providing a friendly and safe space for employees to connect and engage with each other -no matter where they might be working from.
The Newsfeed is a social and collaborative online space where anyone in your organization can easily communicate important company announcements, culture events, activities, and much more! It’s where company culture-building and employee engagement happen every day!
Employees can add their unique personalities to a post with emojis, GIFs, images, and video. Applauz Newsfeed lets anyone in your company publicly “recognize” each other for their achievements. This fosters collaboration, promotes teamwork, and ultimately cultivates meaningful professional relationships.
Peer-to-Peer recognition helps managers spot great work being done “behind the scenes” that would otherwise sometimes go unnoticed. Help shine a light on individual employee contributions, talents and skills. Make teams feel proud and supported. Employee recognition starts here!
Integrating Applauz into your Microsoft Teams Channel helps keep everyone feeling motivated by promoting recognition no matter where they’re working from!
