title: Pyn
shortDescription: Pyn allows HR teams to send timely and hyper-personalized content to your team
Description:
Pyn automates your HR communications in Microsoft Teams

**What Pyn does**

Pyn helps companies improve their employee experience with personal and relevant messaging to their employees. With Pyn, you can automatically send your employees helpful messages on Microsoft Teams at key moments - from their first day on the job, to a promotion, to their last day - and everything in between.

**How it works**

Changes in your company's HRIS are monitored by Pyn, which trigger a Teams message to an employee, their manager, or other relevant team members. For example, an employee was promoted to manager - Pyn detects the change and automatically sends scheduled communications to the new manager and their manager as well.

Messages sent to employees can include or exclude certain content based on their location, department, employment status, and other data variables.

Timing of outgoing messages can be based on the employee's location. When your employees receive communication in their flow of work at the right time (no more 3am notifications!) they’re more likely to absorb the information.

**How to use this bot**

To use Pyn for Microsoft Teams, you first need an active account with Pyn. You can set this up at [our website](https://www.pynhq.com/), or [contact our support team](mailto:support@pynhq.com).

For further help and assistance in setting up this app, please visit our [help center](https://intercom.help/pyn/en/articles/9621229-using-pyn-with-microsoft-teams).

title: Alertable
shortDescription: Receive workplace and public emergency alerts
Description:
Stay aware and plan ahead with Alertable for Microsoft Teams. Alertable keeps you informed of emergencies and general, daily events in your community and workplace.

Severe weather and other disastrous events and hazards threaten our safety in Canada more than ever. Less severe events take place in our communities and workplaces on a day-to-day basis. Alertable notifies you about these events right inside of Microsoft Teams.

**Key Features**
- Get notified about critical and general, daily events in your community and workplace including floods, fires, outages, equipment failures, facility closures, health incidents, and more!
- Choose the locations and types of events you want to be informed about.
- Alert maps show the geographical area the alert is for
- Informative emergency descriptions, impact areas and instructions keep you informed and help you remain safe

Want to find out how to use Alertable for workplace incidents, or just need help getting started? [Contact us online](https://peasi.com/contact/) or reach out to [info@peasi.com](mailto:info@peasi.com)

title: moreNOTE
shortDescription: 会議中の双方向の資料操作を実現する、グループディスカッションに最適な資料共有システムです。
Description:
moreNOTE for Microsoft Teamsをご利用いただくことで、Microsoft Teamsの会議での会議中の双方向の操作を実現し、 会議での議論の活性化やスムーズな合意形成につながります。

１．資料の共有中に参加者は自由にページの移動ができます。先読みやページ戻りにより、会議参加の質を向上します。
２．会議参加者全員でペンやポインタの同時操作ができます。
３．ホワイトボード機能なども活用することで、議論の活性化を支援します。
４．参加した会議や参加する会議は自動でリスト化されます。事前準備や振り返りも簡単に行うことができます。


[詳しくこちら](https://info.morenote.jp/support/master/teams/redirect_landingpage.html)
　
本製品は無料でご利用いただけます。
機能がグレードアップした有償版もご用意しておりますので、
ご利用の際はサポート窓口までお問い合わせください。

[お問い合わせはこちら](https://info.morenote.jp/support/master/teams/redirect_contact.html)

title: MoodConnect
shortDescription: MoodConnect AI bot scores conversations to measure sentiment.
Description: MoodConnect AI bot scores conversations on Microsoft Teams and then measures the sentiment of those conversations. The sentiment is then displayed on the MoodConnect dashboard. Conversations are not copied and stored on our database. The sentiment is measured, stored, and reported to let managers, HR professionals, and business owners know how teams are feeling. MoodConnect is a SaaS platform plus marketplace that serves remote, hybrid, and in-person workspaces. This app requires an active subscription on https://moodconnectapp.com/. Visit https://moodconnect.com  or contact us at info@moodconnect.com for more information.

title: Loops - Creative Learning
shortDescription: Loops is a tool for teaching and learning through interactive mind maps.
Description:
Loops is used in both schools and companies. In Loops you can transform your educational content into a high quality digital experience. The mind-map structure provides the opportunity to create the pedagogical process, with the content you need, that is best for the context you are in.

The loop that you build yourself will be a mixture of your own texts, videos and tasks together with content you choose to link into the loop, all sorted into the 10 activities in Loops where you can communicate in different ways with your students.

The students will get a great overview of the area they are working with, thanks to the mind map structure, but also a path to follow. The learning experience will be versatile as students can watch videos, read texts, and learn from websites and quizzes. Either together or on their own in the loop.

In Loops, the students always communicate in the way they prefer. They can answer a question by writing a text of course, but also easily record a film or a sound file directly into the system, post a picture, add a link or attach a document. 

As a teacher, you can see all your students' answers in a teacher panel where you can give feedback, check off a task, and communicate throughout the whole learning process. 

Loops works great as a tool in the classroom, but also for distance learning. To instruct remote students, you can share your screen in an online meeting, but also interact with students in the product between the occasions when you meet.

Loops – Creative Learning contains a bot that will keep you updated about things happening in Loops.
- As a teacher, your notifications will tell you when assignments are handed in and when you get comments.
- As a student, you’ll receive notifications when a loop gets started, when you get new feedback on an assignment, or if you get a new comment.

In order to use this app, you need to have an active account with Loops.
Sign up on [https://loops.education/](https://loops.education/).

For contact or help, visit [https://help.loops.education/](https://help.loops.education/).

title: 123 Timer and Clock by BlueSky
shortDescription: Timers, Agendas, Clocks & more, easily shared in your Microsoft Teams meetings.
Description:
⏱ Customizable Timers, Countdowns, Clocks, Agendas & Stopwatches easily shared directly in your Microsoft Teams meetings & webinars.
 
 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Trusted by 50,000+ organizations (based on BlueSky usage data) 
 
 
 
**Simple Timers:** Start a simple timer to help manage a presentation, pitch, or discussion. Count down or count up to any specified time. Colors automatically change as the timer gets closer to zero to help keep the speaker on track.

**Agenda Timers**: Display an entire meeting agenda with timed segments for each portion of the meeting.
 
**Clocks**: Display the current time so you can stay on track while presenting.
 
 
 
**Features:**
😃 Integrates directly into your Teams client
🔊 Audio alerts keep your meetings on track
👀 Multiple display options to keep the timer visible in Teams
🎨 Timer customization to fit your unique meeting needs
🔄 Cycle timers automatically
😌 Saved templates for easy re-use
🤝 Easily grant timer access to a designated Timekeeper
🔒 Built securely. Timer does not transmit or save meeting data
🙋‍♀️ 24 hour support team is here to help
 
 
 
**How does it work?**
1. Timer App is added to the Apps section of your Teams client. Simply click Apps and then 123 Timer in any Teams Meeting.
 
2. Once the Teams App is opened, simply click to customize your timer. Select between simple timers, agendas, and clocks. Customize the display, set audio alerts, and more.
 
3. Optionally share the Timer display with your Teams participants. Click "Share Timer Display" to make Timer visible to all participants.
 
[Sign Up](https://blueskyapps.org/users/sign_up) | [Get Started](https://blueskyapps.org) | [Contact](https://blueskyapps.org/contact) | [Help](https://help.blueskyapps.org)
 
Try it free today!

title: XNODE Meeting AI Agent
shortDescription: AI-powered agent transforming meeting data into actionable insights.
Description:
An intelligent agent from XNODE INC. that captures and transcribes Microsoft Teams meetings, transforming raw data into actionable insights. From transcripts, meeting ID, and recordings to analytics and content generation, this agent enables seamless workflows like reporting and final output preparation, helping teams achieve their next objectives effortlessly.


Please note: This app will only work in meetings and require two consents:

  1. User consent to access meeting transcripts (Mandatory): Without this consent, the app will not work.
  2. User consent to process historical transcripts (Optional): The agent can fetch historical transcripts for recurring meetings if consent is given by the user. If consent is not provided, the agent will only fetch current and future transcripts.

To use this agent fully, you will need an XNODE account. Sign up here

title: Engagedly
shortDescription: Drive employee performance management, engagement, and development
Description:
Engagedly is a talent management solution that offers continuous performance management with engaging performance reviews, drives employee engagement with a gamification system, and provides a host of analytics and workforce planning tools.

The Engagedly App for Microsoft Teams makes it possible for you to get all your notifications from your Engagedly account so that you are always up to date and don't miss out on actions that require your input. 

Note: In order to use this app. Users must have an active Engagedly Inc account, please contact our [support team](mailto:support@engagedly.com) or visit [here](https://www.engagedly.com/demo) to get a demo from our team.

title: Akouo Interpretation
shortDescription: Make your meetings multilingual with simultaneous interpretation.
Description:
Akouo simply and securely adds simultaneous interpretation to your Microsoft Teams meeting with the click of a button. Add Akouo to your scheduled meeting in Teams and select the languages required by your participants.

- Unlimited languages
- Up to 350 people can access interpretation per language channel
- Interactive functionality allows for natural multilingual exchanges (understand and be understood in your own language)
- Meeting participants will hear translation in selected language
- Microsoft Active Directory authentication for all participants and interpreters
- Akouo Universal Access provides complete multilingual access via browser to meetings for users without Microsoft Teams or Akouo License
- Supports StreamText multilingual captions alongside interpretation
- Book interpreters with your preferred LSP (Language Service Provider) directly from Teams or internally with Akouo Management Portal (included)
- Please ensure you add the required meeting language in advance to allow for interpreter scheduling
- Akouo is accessible to any meeting participant via Microsoft Teams or Akouo Universal Access
- Access meetings with interpretation on your mobile device


**Limitations**

- During a meeting, the Akouo side panel must remain open to hear interpretation


**Requirements**

- To start using Akouo Interpretation in Microsoft Teams please visit [https://www.akouo.io/post/deployment-guide-akouo-interpretation](https://www.akouo.io/post/deployment-guide-akouo-interpretation)

- In order to use Akouo Interpretation, please contact your language service provider, or contact [https://www.akouo.io/support](https://www.akouo.io/support) for assistance.

shortDescription: Access Tableau's self-service analytics directly in Microsoft Teams
Description:
The Tableau Cloud App for Microsoft Teams is an app designed for any business user. It is easier than ever to access, share, and collaborate on your Tableau dashboards and Tableau Pulse Metrics within Microsoft Teams. Access Tableau through the personal app, channels tabs, and during meetings, ensuring that your trusted data is always at your fingertips, empowering data-driven decision making. 

To get started, simply install the Tableau app from the Teams Marketplace. 

Once installed, you can:
 - Integrate key Tableau metrics and visualization into your meetings in real-time
 - Share and pin your most relevant Tableau content in message and in channels
 - Discover and Interact with Tableau Pulse Metrics directly in Microsoft Teams

Note: The Tableau Cloud app for Teams requires a Tableau Cloud license to unlock its full potential. Tableau Server users can also manually configure the app for their server environment. title: Creately
shortDescription: The AI-Powered Visual Workspace to Plan, Execute, and Capture Knowledge
Description:
With Creately, you can experience visual collaboration like never before. Now plan, analyze, and execute all your work without leaving Microsoft Teams.

**With Creately, you can:**

*   Plan and brainstorm visually
*   Create custom workflows to run projects
*   Maintain visual knowledge hubs
*   Create a single space for all your work.

Creately also comes with AI-powered visual intelligence to organize thoughts, brainstorm solutions, design processes, and collaborate with teammates in real-time. Creately's AI capabilities are designed around 4 core pillars:

**Organize:** Using natural language prompts, you can organize stickies, group them by sentiment, summarize key points - create action items, and so much more.

**Generate:** Simply give it context and ask Creately for a mind map, a business model canvas, visualize process flows and much more with just a simple command.

**Expand:** Create structure for thoughts- have conversations, generate counterpoints, and much more. It is a great way to keep the momentum going until you find solutions that fit just right.

**Transform:** Transform one set of content seamlessly into another. Transform 'how might we' sessions into product briefs, visually generate the user stories for it- and assign them to individual teammates- all in just a few steps.

**Integrates seamlessly into the Microsoft Teams environment:**

**Convert chats to visuals:** Seamlessly generate visual workspaces directly from chats and channel conversations. Enter "@creately generate me a brainstorming board for X from this thread." Creately understands the request and produces the visual framework/model inside Teams. You can even update pinned workspaces with just a single command.

**Creately comes with**

*   Real-time collaboration for everyone's mouse cursor as they draw
*   Edit notes collaboratively on the canvas or as shape notes
*   Comments and tasks for managing action items
*   1000+ professional templates
*   Supports 70+ diagram types natively

**What's new**
* You can now use Creately across Microsoft 365 and Outlook seamlessly
* Creately now works with Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365
* Try 'Show my workspaces from last week tagged as In Progress'

New to Creately? [Sign up for free ↗](https://creately.com/register/)

[Adding Creately to Microsoft Teams ↗](https://support.creately.com/hc/en-us/articles/5201431878159-Creately-for-Microsoft-Teams)

Need a product demo? [Contact us for an expert demo ↗](https://creately.com/contact-sales/?lead_source=MSTAppStore)

In order to use this app, users must have an active Microsoft Teams account. Please [contact our support](https://support.creately.com/hc/en-us/requests/new) team for more details.

title: Gallery Show
shortDescription: Host or attend a live virtual gallery show in 3D with Galeryst.
Description:
Galeryst generates 3D virtual galleries from Adobe Photoshop Lightroom albums. Anyone can create a free gallery on Galeryst to share their artwork with the world. Subscription plans are available to create more and larger galleries, add sculptures, and to see visitor analytics for galleries that you create. 
 📷 Before you create a gallery, you will need to create an album with Adobe Photoshop Lightroom.  Download a free trial of [Lightroom](https://www.adobe.com/products/photoshop-lightroom.html#mini-plans-web-cta-photoshop-lightroom-card). 
 🖼️ Once you have created an album in Lightroom, login to [Galeryst](https://galeryst.com) with your Adobe ID and [create your first gallery](https://galeryst.com/tutorial/createGallery). 
 ✉️ If you have trouble, contact us [here](https://galeryst.com/support)

title: Atera AutoPilot
shortDescription: Atera AutoPilot is an AI-powered technician that solve IT issues quickly
Description: Atera AutoPilot is your AI-powered technician, designed to revolutionize IT problem-solving. Seamlessly integrated with Atera’s powerful remote monitoring and management (RMM) platform, AutoPilot delivers rapid, intelligent solutions to common IT issues. Whether you need to troubleshoot endpoints, resolve tickets, or perform routine maintenance tasks, Atera AutoPilot is always ready to assist. Key Features: 24/7 Availability: The bot operates around the clock to tackle IT issues as they arise. Remote Management: Directly utilizes Atera’s RMM tools for troubleshooting and endpoint management. Automation: Handles repetitive IT tasks, freeing up your team to focus on strategic priorities. Scalability: Supports businesses of all sizes, enhancing IT service efficiency. With Atera AutoPilot, IT professionals can enhance productivity, reduce response times, and deliver top-tier service to their clients or organization. Welcome to the future of IT support!. In order to use this app, users must have an active account/configuration. for further help check out our [documentation](https://support.atera.com/hc/en-us/articles/17009693964188) or contact our [support](mailto:support@atera.com). Our app is committed to providing a safe and positive user experience. If you encounter any inappropriate or objectionable content, we offer multiple mechanisms for reporting such issues: In-App Reporting: You can report specific content directly through the app using our feedback feature. Simply click the '👎' button associated with the content you wish to flag.Email Support: Contact our support team by emailing us at [support@atera.com](mailto:support@atera.com) with details of the issue. All reports are reviewed promptly by our team to ensure a safe and respectful environment for all users.

title: emotii
shortDescription: Break language barriers and connect like never before with emotii.
Description:
emotii leverages advanced AI to enable genuine communication between individuals of different cultures. With emotii, all users can speak the same language.
Providing seamless, accurate, and culturally appropriate translations, emotii enables authentic connections while fostering empathy. Capturing cultural nuances, idiomatic expressions, and the true essence of messages, emotii helps you not just translate, but truly communicate.
For millions of people, poor communication tools negatively affect every aspect of life. Emotii allows users to express themselves in their native tongue without the need to dumb down or simplify content.
Make deeper connections with emotii.
New to emotii? [Read more about how it works](https://www.emotii.ai).
To report issues, objectionable content or to get help [reach us out](support@emotii.ai).

title: GoConqr
shortDescription: Create, discover and share learning resources
Description:
**The Complete Learning Toolkit** 
GoConqr provides a range of free tools for teaching and learning. From brainstorming and note-taking to testing and revising - find everything you need with our suite of tools including mind maps, flashcards, quizzes, slides, flowcharts and notes. 
The GoConqr app for Microsoft Teams will allow you to organise and manage the learning resources you have created on the GoConqr platform, within the Teams environment. Use channel tabs to share GoConqr mind maps, flashcards, quizzes, slides, flowcharts and notes with your classes, or attach these resources to your Assignments. 
**Please note:** You need a GoConqr account to use this app within Teams. You can signup when you install the app or [signup for a new account now](https://www.goconqr.com/users/sign_up). 
For additional information on getting started with the different tools please refer to our [FAQ section here](https://www.goconqr.com/faq).

title: Nexus 3D Whiteboard
shortDescription: Cross functional 3D Collaboration through Nexus platform
Description:
Nexus 3D Whiteboard is a Visual collaboration app that allows stakeholders to perform live, interactive reviews in full 3D. With easy-to-use collaboration tools like 3D Pens and Markups, the app simplifies the design review process across global and multi-discipline teams.

title: AI Producer
shortDescription: Democratizing Production with Microsoft Teams.
Description:
**AI Producer and Microsoft Teams turns anyone into a professional Producer. Fully Automated.**
* Engaging and sharing information using video, has never been more important.
* Use AI Producer for live webinars, Townhall meetings, interactive events, and broadcasts. Without leaving Microsoft Teams.
* Use AI Producer to Play high-quality videos in meetings. Or create vivid productions in the same meeting for later viewing/sharing.
* All fully automated without the need for extra hardware or production staff.
**AI Producer for Microsoft Teams**
* Integrated in, and Certified for Microsoft Teams as a meeting extension app.
* Enhance your Teams meetings and hybrid work.
* Fully automated live productions and broadcasts.
* Preset Production Formats, Branding, Overlays, Custom Layouts, Manual Mode etc.
* The audience can watch your production in a Teams meeting, Teams webinar, Teams Town Hall, Teams live event, on LinkedIn or any other distribution platform of your choice.
* Microsoft 365 Certified.
**ENHANCE YOUR TEAMS MEETINGS EXPERIENCE**
Play high-quality video in your Teams meetings. Or automatically produce your presentation, lecture, or panel discussion in a more vivid and engaging way, in the same meeting. Or save it for later viewing and/or sharing.
* Play high-quality video in Teams meetings.
  * Play your Playout video library from anywhere, regardless of limitations in local bandwidth.
* Be in the same Meeting, Webinar, or Town Hall as your audience.
  * Let AI make your production vivid and engaging.
* Produce your meeting using AI in just a few clicks.
  * For later viewing and/or sharing.
* Education format, optimized for one Presenter.
  * Only the Presenter's camera and audio feed will be recorded.
  * Designed in compliance with GDPR, where other meeting attendees remain anonymous.
**LIVE PRODUCTION - FULLY AUTOMATED**
Use AI Producer for live webinars, Town Hall meetings, interactive events and broadcasts. All fully automated, or take control in Manual Mode, without leaving Teams.
* Presentation
  * Optimized for one Presenter at a time.
  * Displays in Focus mode, Shared screen, and Split-screen.
* Panel Discussion
  * Supports several Presenters, and a shared screen.
  * Displays in Focus mode, Shared screen, and Split-screen.
* Talk Show
  * Supports several Presenters.
   * Displays Presenters individually in Focus mode or together in Split-screen.
* Rundown
  * Utilize the strength of different Preset Production formats in the same production.
  * Combine formats easily with prerecorded videos in a planned production schedule.
**About LiveArena Technologies**
*We provide software for automated live broadcast productions. Our solutions are based on AI and cloud technologies. Our customers include small and large corporations and organizations worldwide.*
In order to use this app, users must have an active AI Producer license. Licenses can be purchased from Microsoft marketplaces. Please contact our support team at [contact us](https://aiproducer.com/contact/) for more details.

title: Ayda Insights
shortDescription: Enhance collaboration with real-time analysis of your online meetings.
Description:
Ayda Insights gives objective, science-based data on your online collaboration efficiency, psychological safety, employee engagement, and inclusion. The insights help you spot areas for improvement, prioritize problem areas, adjust your hybrid policies, and find the optimal balance that supports employee productivity, engagement, and wellbeing. To get started, choose "Add to a meeting" and choose which meetings you want to follow.

Ayda is active only in the selected meetings and has no access to meetings it isn't explicitly set to join. Ayda also always announces its presence when being added to each meeting. All individuals who were in the meeting have equal access to the results provided by Ayda. The results are primarily delivered as aggregated insights straight to the meeting chat, not highlighting any individuals. The individual insights provided by Ayda are always personal and delivered while protecting the individual’s privacy.

With Ayda you can:
- Understand your meeting efficiency and improve online collaboration.
- Get objective data on the psychological safety of your meetings.
- Find the right balance of onsite and remote work for your company and your employees.
- Upskill yourself to the new hybrid era.
- Steer and monitor your organizational transformation projects with objective data.

You need to have an active "Ayda Insights" account in order to benefit from installing this app.

Ayda Insights utilises artificial intelligence (AI) models to process conversational data from your meetings, in order to generate insightful summaries and analytics.

[Book a demo](https://www.adalyon.com/learn-more/) or get in touch at [info@adalyon.com](mailto:info@adalyon.com)

title: HubSite 365
shortDescription: Find and share the most recent news, knowledge and events around Microsoft 365.
Description:
Hubsite 365 integrates seamlessly into the modern workplace, focusing on collaboration in Microsoft Teams.  

Here you get the most recent news around Microsoft 365,  Microsoft Azure and other IT related news, as well as high quality knowledge articles. Share these articles on your teams channels to show them to more employees and get feedback on them. In a later version, further integrations are planned such as finding technical support through a bot or the automatic publication of messages in a channel. 

If you are looking for the next event where you can learn new stuff around Microsoft 365 or search for a possibility to meet the community, Hubsite 365 gives you the ability to schedule them directly in Teams and add them to your calendar. If the meeting is of interest to the whole team, a modern channel Teams meeting can be created and all employees can participate.  

The functions of Hubsite 365 include: 

- Cooperation on high quality news around Microsoft 365, Azure and other IT related news. In a newer version automatic publishing of messages in a Teams channel possible 
- Book events directly in the Teams calendar for yourself or the whole team. Upcoming and previous events related to Microsoft 365 and Azure 
- Knowledge-Articles helping you solve your problems when working with Microsoft 365 and Azure. In a newer version receive direct support via a Teams chat bot possible 
- Filter and search by Microsoft 365 and Azure products and topics 

If you read an article and want to read it again later, you can save it to your personal favorites list.  

These great functions help you increase your productivity by providing the information you need at the right time and the right place. By integrating sharing capabilities right at the place where you work, Hubsite 365 can improve your collaboration with your colleagues. 

You do not need to log in for the basic functionality of Hubsite 365, however, if you decide to unlock the full potential it is as easy as just confirming to log in with your Microsoft 365 account which you already use in Teams. 

Hubsite 365 connects and informs you right where you collaborate and work: Within Teams. 

If you have any questions or problems, do not hesitate to contact us [here](https://hubsite365.com/support).

title: HPE Virtual Support Agent
shortDescription: VSA offers intuitive self-serve solutions – information is at your fingertips
Description:
The VSA chatbot, available on both desktop and mobile devices, will enable you to gather real-time updates on quotes and order status.The HPE Virtual support agent is intended to provide quick and concise responses to specific order and quote status questions. The benefits include:

**Quote status:** Get the updated status of your Next Generation Quoter (NGQ) quotes as they move through approvals. Search by quote number.

**Order status:** Receive quick, concise responses to order status questions such as:
View item details and request an email with order details.
Request emailed invoice copies.
Stay informed about shipment information—from dispatch to doorstep.
Access other order information and order documents like proof of delivery (PoD), packing lists, serial numbers, etc.
Search orders by order number, invoice number, shipment ID, or serial number.

**24/7 availability:** Check your hardware quote and order status anytime, anywhere.

**Seamless data integration:** Data and documents retrieved from VSA access the same data other sales tools and systems access, including OSV providing you with consistent information.

**Multilingual capability:** Engages all languages available in Microsoft Teams.

**Secure:** Standard HPE system requirements safeguard data accessed through VSA.

**Sign-up / Get Started / Contact Us**

For Partners – Please ensure you have OSV access to use the VSA chatbot. If you do not have access to OSV UI, please contact your PAOM or PPA.

To access VSA chatbot, users need to click on the **login** button and utilize the **HPE Sign** In web page for authentication. If you do not have **HPE Sign In** credentials, proceed with the Sign-Up process.

For further queries, you can reach out to [hpevirtualsupportagent@hpe.com](mailto:hpevirtualsupportagent@hpe.com).

title: Contact Center | ROGER365.io
shortDescription: ROGER365.io ContactCenter for Microsoft Teams Calling
Description:
ROGER365.io offers a Contact Center and Social Messaging solution for Microsoft Teams. Create voice call queues for your customers and route them to your agents. With the Teams App, agents have realtime insight in the queue, waiting time etc. With the reporting module you can view historical data.

The ROGER365.io can be used within every organization who migrated to Teams Calling and would like to improve their communication with their customers. With the optional integration of Microsoft PowerApps you can help your customers even quicker and improve business processes with losing time. 
ROGER365.io is available for small and larger organisations as the pricing model offers as well as consumption based pricing as a fixed pricing model. 

To use the Contact Center solution you must first enrol into the ROGER365.io platform where you get a free 14-days evaluation. After that you can purchase a license to use the platform within your organisation. Please contact us for more details or go to [www.roger365.io](http://www.roger365.io) 

ROGER365.io Contact Center offers:

General
* Queueing
* Neural Text to Speech (for audio prompts)
* CRM Integration
* Various routing methods, including Skill Based Routing
* Schedules

Agent App
* Live queue insights & statistics
* CRM Integration
* Power Platform Integration
* Availability & Reason codes
* Multiple queue login
* Wrap up timer

Supervisor
* Live queue & agent statistics
* Live Calls Overview
* Agent Status Overview & Override
* Monitor & Join

Reporting
* Queue Summary & Details
* Agent Summary & Details
* Agent Logging

title: Zendesk
shortDescription: Boost team performance using the Zendesk for Microsoft Teams Integration.
Description:
Resolve tickets faster, simplify employee workflows and improve team performance by integrating Zendesk to Microsoft Teams. Zendesk is a complete customer service solution that’s easy to use and scales with your business. Start a [free trial](https://www.zendesk.com/register/#step-1) today.

Bring your communication and support solutions together and enable employees to work where they’re most productive. The Zendesk-Microsoft Teams Integration enables you to: 
- Create, view and update Zendesk tickets directly from within Microsoft Teams 
- Add internal notes (agents and light agents) or public replies (agents only) to tickets from within Microsoft Teams 
- Get real-time notifications on tickets based on status, priority, type, or updates within any Teams channel or DM
- Deploy Answer Bot in Microsoft Teams to answer commonly asked questions
- See all open and closed personal tickets in a single listview within Microsoft Teams
- Import Zendesk ticket views as tabs into a single Microsoft Teams workspace (Zendesk agents only)
- Turn a comment from a conversation into a new ticket
- Search and share tickets and help articles with messaging extension

The Zendesk-Microsoft Teams Integration allows you to help your team members get more done. For example:
- Escalate and resolve issues faster by updating and responding to tickets within Teams
- Make it faster for your employees to get help, by creating and managing tickets directly from Teams 
- Improve ticket visibility by using the ticket tab in Teams to see and receive notifications on any ticket activity
- Deflect incoming tickets by using Answer Bot, only escalating to an agent for complex issues

Installation and User Guides
Learn more about how to install from [our installation guide](https://zendeskforteams.com/installation-guide) or how to use the product from [our user guide](https://zendeskforteams.com/user-guide)

Made in collaboration with Zendesk
 This integration is commissioned and funded by Zendesk and provided by SoftServe.
Zendesk has worked with customers to gather feedback and requirements, and played an active role in the design of the product.
SoftServe builds, maintains, and supports this integration and your use is governed by the agreement provided by SoftServe.
Please contact SoftServe for any integration questions and support.

Security
SoftServe provides reliable ongoing customer support, following best practices and industry standards 
- Infrastructure and cloud environment compliant with best security practices
- Support monitored 24/7/365
- 1 business day SLA for support responses

Feedback
We’re actively collecting and incorporating feedback on the product and would welcome your views about anything that’s working well or could be improved. [Please submit your feedback here.](https://zendeskinc.az1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_37YeGQNPH84Whhk)

title: Figma
shortDescription: Riff on Figma designs or jam on ideas in FigJam without leaving Microsoft Teams.

Explore ideas together on a whiteboard in FigJam before bringing them to life through designs and prototypes in Figma.

The Figma app allows your team to riff on ideas together in real-time, present designs to get stakeholder feedback, and share the latest updates with everyone—without ever leaving Microsoft Teams.

**Teams notifications**

Get file notifications in Teams to stay on top of feedback and keep design work moving forward. Respond to comments directly from Teams.

**Teams meetings**

title: ForceManager CRM
shortDescription: ForceManager CRM boosts Video Calls & improves Collaboration for Sales Teams.
Description:
ForceManager CRM helps build incredible customer relationships via video or in person, supercharging Sales Teams performances on the road, in the office and from home.

Our Microsoft Teams integration allows you to
-	Improve the communication flow and collaboration within your sales team by allowing ForceManager CRM data regarding Accounts, Contacts and Business Opportunities to be searched and shared quickly through the Chat or Teams functionality straight from Microsoft Teams.

-	Better prepare for each single customer meeting by searching and accessing CRM data instantly from anywhere in Microsoft Teams with our message widget.

-	Help share with sales reps relevant information on the lead they are going to meet for the first time when somebody else in the sales team schedules the meeting in Microsoft Teams by attaching information with our message widget on the related chat.

-	Share information about Accounts, Contacts and Business Opportunities to better run internal meetings organized on Microsoft Teams between Sales Managers and their Sales Reps.

-	Efficiently organize and collaborate with your sales team and customers thanks to the personal and intelligent CRM dashboard integrated in Microsoft Teams. With a panoramic view of your business agenda, you will be able to track in real time your recent Activities, Goals, upcoming Tasks and Events, as well as joining your next Video Call in one click. All the data you and your sales rep create will be logged in ForceManager CRM automatically, and viceversa you will see all the data in your CRM magically appear in the dashboard to improve performance, generate more impacts and close more sales.


Our Microsoft Teams integration works seamlessly both from web and mobile, allowing you to access ForceManager CRM data directly in our mobile app or web version depending on where you are working from.

In order to use this app users must have an active ForceManager CRM account, Please [contact our support team](https://www.forcemanager.com/contact/) for more details.

title: Helpfy
shortDescription: Converse com especialistas prontos para te ajudar nos desafios do seu dia a dia.

Agende atendimentos com experts e tire suas dúvidas diretamente por reuniões!

Já imaginou ter uma plataforma com experts de alto nível à sua disposição? O Helpfy disponibiliza profissionais prontos para colaborar nos seus desafios de construir soluções robustas e realmente impactantes!

Com o Helpfy, em poucos passos, você apresenta seu problema e escolhe uma data e hora para encontrar nosso especialista. Com seu agendamento realizado, basta comparecer na reunião.

Não sabe exatamente em qual ferramenta é sua dúvida?

Não tem problema, na plataforma você também pode nos explicar seu desafio que nós te ajudamos a identificar a melhor maneira de resolvê-los.

Benefícios de usar o Helpfy da Ímpar:
- Os melhores especialistas em cada uma das ferramentas
- Alta disponibilidade de horários para você não perder o timing e atingir seus objetivos
- Portfólio de especialidades disponíveis adaptado à realidade da sua companhia
- Redução dos tickets de suporte ao time de TI
- Ampliação da adoção de ferramentas low e no-code na sua companhia

Você e sua companhia preparados para tirar todos os benefícios das ferramentas que têm a disposição.

Para utilizar este app, é necessário possuir uma conta corporativa (business central account). Contacte nosso time de suporte para mais detalhes clicando [aqui](https://forms.office.com/r/aZBRcivBwa). 

Este app também está disponível em Inglês.

title: SyncWorks
shortDescription: Streamline AEC communication with SyncWorks, integrating with Microsoft Teams
Description:
SyncWorks: Streamlining AEC Communication

Enhance collaboration and transparency within your AEC teams with SyncWorks. Our app integrates seamlessly with popular communication platforms like Microsoft Teams, providing real-time notifications for critical project updates.

Key Features:
Entities Supported:
* Keep a watchful eye on your project's progress with notifications for the following entities in Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC):
  - Issues
  - Issue comments 
* Instant Notifications:
  - Receive immediate alerts on entity changes, whether it's a new issue, a modification, or any other update.
* Benefits Over BIM360 and ACC Native Usage: Expanded Entity Support:
  - Unlike BIM360 and ACC native notifications, SyncWorks covers a wider range of entities, ensuring you're always informed about the aspects that matter most to your project.
* Seamless Integration with Communication Platforms:
  - Enjoy the convenience of push notifications directly to your preferred communication platforms, including Microsoft Teams. 
* No Need to Leave Your Communication Hub:
  - Say goodbye to constant platform-switching. With SyncWorks, you receive notifications right where you collaborate with your team, eliminating the need to log in to BIM360 or ACC for updates.

Elevate your AEC project management by staying in the know, no matter where your team communicates. Try SyncWorks today for a smoother, more transparent project experience.

Getting started:
To start using this application, you have to complete the setup by following the instructions described in the cards that the bot will send you during the first launch, or you can find it [here](https://alexandrpanam.wixsite.com/syncworks/how-to-use) 

Contact us:
If you encounter any issues with the application, feel free to send an email to alexandrpanam@gmail.com 

Useful links:
 [Official website](https://alexandrpanam.wixsite.com/syncworks)

title: LinguaLink
shortDescription: LinguaLink - Bridging language barriers.
Description:
LinguaLink is a useful, user-friendly, innovative tool for Microsoft Teams that brings different cultures together.  Using this tool in your Teams meetings, helps you communicate smoothly by providing real time transcription and translation to a variety of available languages.
Subscribe to LinguaLink, add it to your meeting and all conversational content will be transcribed and translated, so that you may keep up more easily with its progress. Also, the content of every meeting will remain for a short time available for review.    
More Highlights:
*	Make sure you are either the organizer of the meeting or you have available meeting’s join url, before adding LinguaLink. 
*	Available to use in multiple meetings at the same time. 
*	A great list of transcription and translation languages, including the most popular learnt worldwide.  
	Both original and translated texts are displayed in the side panel.
*	By adding LinguaLink to your Teams meeting, you invite its bot as a new participant. 
*	Only the users that activate LinguaLink to a meeting have access to transcription and translation of the meeting content. 
Having this tool by your side, you and your Teams mates will break any language barriers you may face.

(Please reach out to us at support@dataflows.gr to ask for a demo or a trail account.)

title: Unleash
shortDescription: Unleash Bot leverages a preset knowledge to automatically answer questions
Description: Unleash - Your Intelligent Q&A Bot Unleash is your all-in-one knowledge management solution seamlessly integrated within Microsoft Teams. Unleash offers a comprehensive suite of features that transform how your team accesses, shares, and collaborates with information. From AI-based Q&A to real-time collaboration, Unleash empowers your team with a versatile knowledge hub that elevates productivity and streamlines information management. Key Features of the Unleash Bot for Microsoft Teams: 1. Automated Q&A: Unleash’s bot actively monitors your team’s channel content, identifying questions and delivering automated responses from a predefined knowledge base. No more repetitive inquiries or delays in finding answers. 2. Effortless Knowledge Retrieval: Seamlessly integrate Unleash’s bot into your Teams workspace to retrieve accurate information instantly during conversations, eliminating the need to switch between tabs or search for documents. 3. Advances Search: Use natural language queries to find all the information you need - FAST. Who Benefits from the Unleash Bot for Microsoft Teams: - Teams of All Sizes: Unleash’s bot is adaptable, ensuring everyone has quick access to accurate answers, regardless of your team’s size. - Knowledge-Driven Professionals: Professionals relying on accurate information, including project managers and knowledge workers, will find the bot invaluable. - Sales and Customer Support Teams: Provide swift responses to customer inquiries and access product information effortlessly, boosting efficiency. - Remote and Hybrid Teams: Enable effective collaboration and knowledge sharing, no matter where your team is located. Get Started with Unleash for Microsoft Teams: Transform your Microsoft Teams experience with Unleash’s intelligent Q&A bot. Eliminate redundant questions, access information instantly, and empower your team with the knowledge they need at their fingertips. Experience the future of knowledge management in Microsoft Teams with Unleash. Add our bot to your Teams workspace today and see how it can enhance your team’s productivity and efficiency. Notes - In order to use this app, users must have an active Unleash account. Please contact our support team - [support@unleash.so](mailto:support@unleash.so), for more information. If you encounter any issues with the bot or the AI-generated content, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us for assistance at [support@unleash.so](mailto:support@unleash.so).

title: HappyFox Helpdesk
shortDescription: Turn support requests into actionable notifications and keep teams in sync
Description:
HappyFox is a cloud-based help desk software. With built-in features including ticketing, asset, task, and knowledge management. Create recurring tickets or use our other automation features to drastically improve support response time. Our most popular features include canned responses, bulk actions, work schedules, ticket templates, smart rules, and beautiful real-time reporting. HappyFox is easy to set up and offers an intuitive interface.

While you're collaborating with your team on Microsoft Teams, you'll never have to leave Teams to stay on top of your tickets in HappyFox. The HappyFox bot gives you on-the-spot notifications right inside Teams.

Get Instant Ticket Notifications

Stay up-to-date on critical events such as new customer response to an important ticket, or new ticket creation. These notifications can be configured to be sent to any channel of your choice inside your organization. Better yet, you can also perform ticketing actions like sending a reply, adding a private note, or changing ticket properties from within teams.

Make conversations actionable

Collaborate on Tickets and keep agents connected, without having to leave Teams. Directly convert Teams conversations into HappyFox tickets or open up the new ticket creation form - right within your channels.

Search Knowledgebase articles

All your knowledge base articles are right at your fingertips within Teams. You can search and get knowledge base articles by @mentioning the HappyFox bot with a search term.

In order to use this app, users must have an active HappyFox Helpdesk account. If you would like try out Helpdesk, you can book a demo using this link. Please contact our support team (support@happyfox.com) for more details.

This app supports Microsoft Teams.

For installation instructions, please refer to our Knowledge base article:

Configure Microsoft Teams Integration with HappyFox

title: absentify
shortDescription: The easiest way to manage employees' vacations and absences
Keywords: ['Employee Vacation Tracker', 'Absence Leave and time off Management', 'Holiday Management Urlaub Management', 'absentify']
Description:
absentify is a free, comprehensive absence management solution designed to streamline your company's management of employee absences directly in the Microsoft 365 environment. With its integration into the Microsoft ecosystem, absentify offers several advantages to users.

One of the key features of absentify is its ability to manage all types of employee absences, including sick days, personal days, and vacation time. With absentify, employees can easily request absences through Microsoft Teams or the absentify web dashboard, and managers can quickly approve or deny those requests, all without leaving Microsoft Teams.


Advantages over applications not developed for the Microsoft environment:

- Only one login possible via the Microsoft account, if an employee leaves the company, the account only has to be deactivated in one place, then there is also no more access to absentify.

- Automatic user synchronization: profile pictures, name, email address and manager are automatically synchronized from the Microsoft AD profile. Nothing needs to be manually maintained in absentify.

- Outlook synchronization: All absences are synchronized directly to the Outlook calendar, which helps in scheduling and is also shown in the Microsoft Teams status display accordingly.

- Outlook automatic absence notifications can be configured in absentify, these are then automatically set in Outlook in the event of an absence, employees no longer forget an absence note configuration.

- Everything on the web, but can also be used directly in Microsoft Teams, in the place where employees work every day. Also, all notifications come directly to Microsoft Teams.

- Teams mobile app: No need to roll out an additional app, absentify can be automatically pre-installed for all employees in Microsoft Teams.


In addition to managing absences, absentify offers several other useful features, including the ability to:

  • Absence Types: Create custom absence types that are specific to your company's needs.
  • Multiple departments: Create and manage teams and locations within your organization.
  • Approvers: Assign Approvers for each team or team member.
  • Leave Policies: Set leave policies for each department to ensure consistency across your organization.
  • Custom Quotas & Rules: Create custom leave quotas or rules for each team member.
  • Calendar View: View and filter the leave calendar for each team.
  • Holiday Schedule: Set up a holiday schedule for all your team members. You have access to public holiday calendars from over 250 countries
  • Custom Schedules : Set up a custom workweek for the entire organization, or customize workweeks for individual employees.
  • absentify is offered in English and German by our team. Currently, are French, Hungarian, Italian, Polish and Spanish translations also available from our community. You are welcome to join the community to add more languages!

With absentify, companies of all sizes, from small to large, as well as government organizations, schools, and nonprofits, can benefit from its efficient and user-friendly absence management solution.

The complicated and frequently lengthy process of managing employee absences can be converted into a few easy steps, all of which can be done directly in Microsoft Teams.


For more information about absentify, please visit our website: ​https://absentify.com/. If you have specific questions about product features, check out our roadmap: https://feedback.absentify.com/roadmap

If you have any questions, please contact our helpdesk: https://support.absentify.com/

title: Allocatus
shortDescription: Implement projects faster by integrating Microsoft Project with Microsoft Outlook
Description:
With Allocatus, project managers who use Microsoft Project and whose project team works with Microsoft 365 Outlook Calendar can get their projects done faster.
With Allocatus, you can identify impending schedule and resource conflicts earlier and thus resolve them faster.
With Allocatus, the entire project team saves effort in communicating scheduling and resource planning.


This is how easy it is

In the role of project manager you use Microsoft Project, all others use Outlook only and Microsoft Teams if necessary. The process is very simple.

The project manager assigns employees to tasks in Microsoft Project and publishes the project plan. Allocatus sends an email to employees with the new dates and updates their calendars.

The appointments appear in the calendar without the employee having to do anything. This can be done, for example, as a all-day event as free or as individual appointments according to the work planned in Project as booked.

Allocatus appointments are colored in grey by default and contain all the info about the task, including a link to send an email or teams message to the project manager.

The employee can see the appointments in the Outlook desktop app on the PC or Mac, in the web browser in the Microsoft 365 calendar, on a mobile device such as an iPhone or Android smartphone, in the car with CarPlay or Android Auto, for example, or on a smartwatch such as the Apple Watch.

Allocatus makes the entire Microsoft Project project plan accessible to the whole team - even in Microsoft Teams.

title: Attach
shortDescription: The Attach app allows you to add standard supplements or charges to your sales documents.
Description:
General

The Attach app allows you to add standard supplements or charges to your sales documents.

Per sales item you can add specific taxes or additional costs for packaging.

In the article card you can define if this needs to be done either per sales line or rather as a single charge per sales document.

E.g. recycle charges, packaging costs, ...

You can setup per item the different charges that you want to add.

You can also setup charges for customers in other countries that have different charges or taxes.

Attach app will check the settings, and automatically apply the relevant charges/taxes depending on the article (settings item card) and the country (setting customer card).

If the charges/taxes are set as per line, the Attach app will automatically multiply the amount of the charge line with the amount of the linked item.

So, you will not need to add these charges or taxes manually, nor will you need these lines manually when you change the number of the article.


Supported Editions

This app supports the Essentials and Premium Editions of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central

Supported Countries

Belgium

Supported Languages

Dutch and English

title: Boxcryptor
shortDescription: Protect your files in Microsoft Teams with end-to-end encryption.
Description:
Boxcryptor is an easy-to-use encryption software, optimized for the cloud. Have all your files always at hand in Microsoft Teams — additionally protected with AES-256 and RSA-4096 encryption “Made in Germany”.

The software allows the secure use of cloud storage services without interrupting your usual workflow. Boxcryptor encrypts your files client-side on zero knowledge basis, before they are synchronized to the Microsoft cloud. You can enjoy peace of mind, knowing that no one but you can view and access your data.

This is how it works: When uploading a file in the Boxcryptor app in Microsoft Teams, you can choose whether you want to encrypt it. If so, the file will be automatically encrypted in the background during the upload before it is stored in Microsoft Teams. You and team members authorized by you are the only ones who can access your information.

title: Calendar Pro
shortDescription: Looking for a calendar you can share with your colleagues or external users in Microsoft Teams?
Description:
We've got a solution for you!


What is calendar Pro?

Calendar Pro is a shared calendar app for Microsoft Teams. The app is the go-to solution to create a group calendar in two simple steps.


Here's what you can do with Calendar Pro

  1. Add as many events as you need, and color code them to your needs.

  2. Display Calendar Pro in monthly, weekly, and daily formats.

  3. Customize the title, description, and color of the event.

  4. Create tags to filter out events.

  5. Personalize the timezone of the calendar and the events.

  6. Add a location to your events.

  7. Print the calendar.


Calendar Pro comes in two modes standard and room.

Standard Calendar:

A standard calendar with the features mentioned above.

Most common uses:

  1. Important dates:a calendar where everyone can put in their leaves, birthdays, or special dates.

  2. Project Management: To keep all existing appointments with team members, keep track of daily tasks and scheduling.

  3. PTO Calendar: a calendar that only managers can add paid time off and the rest of the team can view.

  4. Community Calendar: any association, church, or local community can manage a team of nonprofit program managers or volunteers.

  5. Operations Calendar: small companies or teams in large organizations use Calendar Pro to track their operation. For example, a flooring diary, maintenance, or delivery dates.


Calendar Pro - Room Mode:

In this calendar, you can list resources (rooms or objects) and book them.

Examples of use

  1. Meeting room reservation: companies with a limited number of meeting rooms.

  2. Workspace Management: companies that are operating from a flex office space and who need to manage the occupation.

  3. School or university: to manage computer lab reservations, arts and crafts rooms, or material (computers, tablets, TVs, 3D printers).

  4. Medical: for hospitals and clinics that need to control the booking of surgical procedures from Teams.


If you encounter any issue with Calendar Pro, reach out here. For any other inquiries, contact us.

title: Chorus
shortDescription: Solve More Crime with Chorus
Keywords: ['Communications data analysis', 'Data cleansing and visualisation', 'police digital data analysis', 'Chorus']
Description:
Chorus is a solution for Analysts, Investigators and front-line officers that enables them to solve crime based on the data they have available to them. It can automatically cleanse, combine, and connect complex datasets including communications data, handset downloads, financial transactions, and ANPR data, to help answer key investigation questions and create courtroom-ready reports.

Benefits:
-Save time - Business cases from UK forces have demonstrated that 97% of time can be saved by investigation teams allowing them to be far more efficient and effective.
- Data integrity - Our custom cleansing rules allow the noise to be removed from datasets so data integrity is maintained.
- Analyse any digital data - Chorus' flexibility allows it to ingest and analyse any digital that might be involved in a criminal investigation, from call data and ANPR to handset downloads and financial data.
Visualisation - Automatically map and chart data to show what happened around the time of an offence and aid attribution.
- Courtroom ready reports - As data integrity is maintained, the outputs and reports that are produced from Chorus can be submitted as evidence.
Ease of use - An intuitive user interface means that it can be used quickly and easily with minimal training.
- Deployment - Best of all you can deploy on Azure alongside your existing applications.

title: ClassPoint
shortDescription: Transform traditional PowerPoints with whiteboard tools, audience polls, and AI-generated questions.
Description:
We’re transforming traditional PowerPoints into audience-focused productive presentations. With effective whiteboard tools, interactive questions, gamification, and AI-generated questions, you can capture interest, crowdsource questions & ideas, and reinforce training objectives.

How Does it work?
  1. Sign up, download, and install ClassPoint
  2. Open any PowerPoint presentation and begin interacting with your audience
  3. Add Interactive Questions throughout your presentation
  4. Use Presentation Tools to annotate and interact with your audience during the presentation
  5. Learn more about the best ways to use ClassPoint

ClassPoint Features:
    • 8 Interactive Question Types including Multiple Choice, Short Answer, Word Cloud, Fill-in-the-Blanks, Slide Drawing, Audio, Video, and Image Upload
    • AI-Generated Quiz Questions based on slide information
    • Unlimited Whiteboard Slides
    • Enhanced Annotation Tools including pens, highlighters, shapes, and text boxes
    • Drag and Drop PowerPoint elements during the Presentation
    • Timer
    • Wheel of Names
    • Embedded Browser
    • Gamification features including Stars, Levels, and Leader Boards

What you can Achieve with ClassPoint:
Seamless Content Enhancement - Use content you've already created in PowerPoint
Efficient Presenting - Never leave PowerPoint with access to all the presentation tools you need without switching apps
Comprehensive View of Audience Understanding - Anonymous submissions allows everyone to feel comfortable responding
Adaptive Teaching Insights - Tailor presentations in response to audience feedback and engagement
Optimizing presentation planning & creation with ClassPoint AI

ClassPoint Plans:
  • ClassPoint Basic: This forever version gives you access to 5 of the 8 interactive question types, max of 25 participants, and up to 3 saved classes. Other limitations include a limit of 5 questions per file, 3 draggable objects, and basic gamification features.
  • ClassPoint Pro: ClassPoint Pro is an annual subscription that upgrades you to unlimited questions, access to all question types, the ClassPoint AI feature, advanced gamification, and more.
  • Enterprise: For enterprise and school plans, your users can access custom branding and webhooks, unlimited ClassPoint AI credits, up to 300-person class size, and a mobile teaching app for more data and review.

title: Coda
shortDescription: Coda is the all-in-one doc that brings words, data, and teams together.
Description:
The Coda for Microsoft Teams app lets you access all your team docs—meeting notes, team wikis, project trackers, and briefs—directly from Teams. You can even spin up new docs and add tabs with important resources to your chats and channels. That way, your team’s entire informational universe is always at your fingertips.

Ways Coda and Teams work together:

  • Increase your team’s focus by creating a customized hub with Coda. Then coordinate and centralize your team’s wiki, meeting notes, administration, and documentation in one place without having to leave the Teams app.

  • Easily navigate to a Coda doc from a tab inside your chat, where you can update a status in your project tracker on the fly. Coda emphasizes customized structured task tracking to address your team’s unique needs and connects to other apps to manage your workflow in one place.

  • Collect feedback directly in your project briefs. With these two-way writeups, you can create collaborative and interactive proposals that capture your team’s discussions and decisions—all within one space.

  • Make Coda docs seamlessly accessible via Teams for teammates who aren’t already on Coda. Looking for another solution? No need to start from scratch. We turned our most popular compositions of building blocks into time-saving templates and made them available inside your doc.

Even better with the Teams Pack

Install the Microsoft Teams Pack to your Coda doc to send messages to chats and channels, tag your teammates, automate your workflow, and eliminate duplicating work.

Connect Microsoft Teams to Coda

The Coda for Teams app is free for all who use both Coda and Teams.

Coda is the doc that brings it all together. Want to learn more? Sign up for free, or speak with a Coda representative.

Coupler.io is a one-stop solution for connecting to multiple platforms and seamlessly integrating data from various sources. Start making decisions powered by the insights gained from your data.

title: deNote
shortDescription: On-demand scalable team organiser, versatile web-whiteboard for multi-site distributed teams
Description:
Boost team collaboration! 


N-Shores teams need to share information and collaborate on several projects.
deNote is a virtual paperboard where elements are stickers, can be pinned up and 
are updated live on all user's screens.

Elements can be Tasks, images, shapes, texts… deNote allow user to see 
live updates which occurs on an element (move, update of information, deletion…).

People can easily collaborate on multiple projects by separating sticky elements in 
different and fully customizable boards.

Boards and stickies


Boards are grouped by Topics and projects. 

A board is like a paperboard sheet. It has a name, width and height.
Stickies are elements that can be pinned up on a board. It can be anything, like text, shape, image or more complex types. 

Stickies can be moved, edited, duplicated and locked. 

Key concepts


  • Real-time Shared white board
  • Visual management tool
  • Content aggregator (Jira, Salesforce...)

Start today!


Test deNote with a free trial, contact us for pricing and licensing conditions.

title: FluidMath
shortDescription: Bring your handwritten math to life with FluidMath!
Description:
FluidMath is a smart piece of math paper for collaborative and individual teaching and learning.

Learning math is about seeing connections between things. With FluidMath, all your representations of the same problem stay in the same workspace, interactively connected to one another: handwritten and typed math expressions, symbolic and numeric calculations, graphs, hand-drawn animated simulations, drawings, rich text descriptions, quizzes and worksheets, and videos.

Students can see if they are on the right track in step-by-step problems by highlighting equivalent expressions on the page.

Give life to existing worksheets and quizzes by dragging and dropping PDFs and images to form page backgrounds which can then be annotated. Can be used for chemistry, physics, or even non-math-related courses.

* from fractions to algebra to calculus

* values can be manipulated interactively

* calculations update dynamically as inputs on the page change

* the use of a few simple gestures minimizes switching modes

* automated interactive checking of students' answers

* collaborators see updates immediately

* researched, developed, and tested in consultation with teachers over 10 years with support from NSF, NIH, and U.S. Dept. of Ed.

Fluidity Software, Inc. makes innovative educational software aimed at revolutionizing the way people learn.

title: Foxit PDF Editor
shortDescription: Built for Business. Optimized with AI.
Keywords: ['PDF editing software', 'Adobe Acrobat alternative', 'PDF solutions for enterprise', 'Foxit PDF Editor']
Description:
Foxit PDF Editor is an award-winning digital document solution and the first AI-enabled PDF Editor in the market, improving the way organizations manage documents by empowering remote worker productivity and driving business momentum through AI-powered collaboration, speed, and scale. Foxit PDF Editor is built with innovative tools for users to create, edit, eSign, and manipulate PDFs with color, images, and charts for more engaging, professional documents. To ensure projects remain on target, Foxit PDF Editor includes collaboration functions, allowing users to comment, edit, and create digital documents from a desktop or via the cloud, which also includes 20 gigabytes of storage.

Foxit PDF Editor comes with conversion tools that make turning PDFs into Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files a breeze regardless of the original format. Foxit PDF Editor also includes OCR, which scans and converts images, charts, and any other document quickly into editable and searchable PDFs. Foxit’s AI assistant is an automation powerhouse that can instantly generate summaries from long and complex documents, making it great for organizing meeting notes or client documents before a proposal.

Foxit AI Assistant also revises documents in seconds, ensuring that more professional documents retain the original message. Foxit’s native integrations include Microsoft365 and Google, among others, and make it a seamless addition to any ecosystem. Its ribbon-style interface leaves almost no learning curve during adoption and quickly turns new users into Foxit pros.

Want more? Foxit PDF Editor+ includes all of the same tools as PDF Editor, plus a complete e-signature solution with 150 yearly envelopes per user, an AI-powered smart redaction tool, and full access to the mobile app. Foxit PDF Editor+ also includes:
• Status notifications for documents sent that require signing, commenting, or other feedback.
• A mobile app for creating and editing PDFs from any device.
• 150 gigabytes of storage, so teams never worry about document storage
• AI-powered Smart Redact that automatically and permanently removes sensitive information from documents.
• Tracking across desktop, mobile, and in the cloud for documents requiring signatures.

title: Gantt
shortDescription: A type of bar chart which illustrates a project timeline or schedule with resources
Description:
Gantt chart is a type of bar chart to illustrate a schedule with time axis. When you put Gantt chart along with other insightful charts in an interactive canvas, you can manage your project in whole new way. In Power BI as visuals interact with each other, you can look at your resource allocation, task completion, remaining tasks in different perspective and get a firm handle on the future.
Gantt charts are indispensable part of project management portfolio. Project Managers and executives love Gantt charts, since they visually show in a very effective at-a-glance way, the overall time line of the project, the current status & progress (or lack thereof) along with the assignment at considerable details.
With this custom visual, you can specify the Tasks, Start Date, Duration and %Completion for rendering them as Gantt. Please note that the %Completion expects a decimal value ( for example 0.85 means  85%) and Start Date , a date field and not a date hierarchy.

You can also control the color of the bar with a Legend. You can use any relevant field from your project as Legend for example task type for this purpose. Additionally, you can also specify the resource field, which would be listed next the bar in the Gantt.

This is an open source visual. Get the code from GitHub: https://github.com/Microsoft/powerbi-visuals-gantt

title: Hive
shortDescription: Hive empowers your team collaborate more effectively
Description:
Hive allows your team to manage their projects in the way that works best for them with flexible project views. Organize projects in a Gantt chart, Kanban board, table, or calendar, and easily switch between each layout. Updates are reflected across all project views so the whole team is informed no matter which view they use. A summary view is also available, which lets you combine several projects and look at progress from a macro view across your company or department. Projects can also be sorted by current status, team member, or assigned labels.

Hive also uses action cards, which allow you to track tasks, assign to-dos to team members, attach files, create subactions, set dependencies, and comment directly on the action card. Additionally, Hive has a native chat and email integration, which allows you to communicate efficiently with your team while in the app. The native email sync works with major email clients including Outlook and Gmail.

Progress and potential risks can easily be tracked with Hive Analytics, which works by leveraging AI and machine learning to provide interactive and customizable dashboards that help you gain actionable insights on team productivity and proactively spot risks. Hive’s resourcing capability also maps out team utilization across specific projects or clients by accurately allocating current and future resources, while time tracking estimates time spent on projects for accurate resource allocation, client billing, and project planning.

Hive also integrates with thousands of applications to make it easier than ever to connect all your work in one centralized place. To connect to these apps, they need to be enabled in the Hive apps section of the tool. Once they are enabled, you’ll be able to leverage the power of Hive in conjunction with these apps. To use this integration you will need to create an account at https://app.hive.com. With this integration users can access the full functionality of Hive including:

  • Create and view projects in Hive using Kanban boards, Gantt charts, calendars, and tables
  • Assign tasks directly to team members
  • View all tasks assigned to an individual
  • Share documents and files

Hive provides the flexibility for every team to work the way that best suits them. Learn more at https://hive.com

title: HubSpot Sales
shortDescription: Organize leads, track email opens and clicks, and send email templates all in one place.
Description:
HubSpot Sales helps you uncover more leads in less time, connect with those leads, and close deals faster while managing all your contacts in one central database. And it’s 100% free to get started.

Note: a HubSpot account is required to use this add-in. Some features require a paid subscription. Learn more here: https://www.hubspot.com/pricing/sales

FOLLOW UP FLAWLESSLY

Track emails through Outlook and get notified the instant a prospect opens an email, clicks a link, or opens an attachment for a timely, relevant follow up.

CREATE AND SHARE EMAIL TEMPLATES

Turn repetitive emails into templates, measure their performance, and share the best ones with your entire team. Access all your templates directly in Outlook.

AUTOMATE OUTREACH WHILE KEEPING IT PERSONAL

Queue up a sequence of personalized follow-up emails and reminders that get delivered automatically. Enroll contacts into a sequence right in Outlook window.

LAND MORE MEETINGS

Eliminate back and forth emails and missed calls by sending a link that lets your leads pick a time that works for both of you.

MAKE DEALS NOT, DATA ENTRIES

Eliminate manual entry as every lead’s contact info, email opens, and clicks get logged automatically.

MANAGE YOUR SALES PIPELINE

HubSpot Sales comes pre-packaged with HubSpot CRM Free, allowing you to manage your entire pipeline and speed up your sales process without clunky tools or spreadsheets.

GET STARTED IN MINUTES.

Get started for free. Connect it to the tools you already use and watch it become the first sales tool that your sales team will actually use. It's fully integrated with a rep’s inbox so it works where they do.

STAY MOBILE

Use HubSpot Sales on the go with iOS and Android mobile apps and stay on top of all your deals.

ALL THE TOOLS TO GROW YOUR BUSINESS

HubSpot Sales comes packaged in HubSpot CRM Free giving you powerful free marketing and customer success tools - A complete Growth Stack to grow your business on. Only upgrade if your business grows so much that you need extra functionality.

Over 30,000 customers in 90 countries are using HubSpot to grow their businesses.

WHAT CUSTOMERS ARE SAYING

“Three months after implementing HubSpot I had my highest revenue month in 5 years. Instead of talking to voicemails all day, we now conduct more demos and close more deals.”

- Tory Tucker, Account Manager at Top Echelon

“The sales tools in HubSpot are unbelievably practical and helpful. There's no excuse for not using them regularly. I highly recommend the CRM for both veterans and first-time users.”

- Joshua Smith, Manager at Pyxl

HubSpot Sales connects seamlessly with other software including:

- Outlook

- Gmail

- HubSpot CRM

- PandaDoc

- Zendesk

- LinkedIn Sales Navigator

- Proposify

- Drift

- Freshbooks

- Hellosign

- Vidyard

- Salesforce

- Base CRM

HAVE QUESTIONS?

Learn more about Hubspot Sales at https://www.hubspot.com/products/sales.

CUSTOMER SUPPORT

If you have any problems or suggestions please visit https://academy.hubspot.com/ for useful resources.

NOTE:

In order to help you track your email's opens and clicks, we insert an invisible tracking pixel into your mail. This is a setting that can be turned off all the time or per email without affecting the rest of the add-in's functionality.

title: IntelliWiki
shortDescription: Real-time collaborative wiki and knowledge management app for your organization's content
Description:
IntelliWiki provides a markdown-supported text editing interface to create, edit, and save documents for your organization. This knowledge management app is ideal for meeting notes, documentation, or similar repositories of knowledge shared by a team.

IntelliWiki supports several features absent from similar offerings, such as real-time collaborative editing, image uploading, automated table of contents, per-page revision history, and search for wiki content across all of a user's teams. Its real-time collaborative editing allows multiple users to work on a wiki document simultaneously.

IntelliWiki integrates directly into MS Teams and is available within the MS Teams store. During their free 30-day trial, users have access to the expanded features available in IntelliWiki Enterprise. When their trial ends, users can opt to purchase an IntelliWiki Enterprise license to keep the benefits of their expanded features or continue with the free version of IntelliWiki which is more limited.

Visit IntelliTect.com/IntelliWiki for product information, or see the list of features and pricing tiers below for IntelliWiki.

Highlighted Features

  • Collaborative editing
  • Inline Comments
  • Automated Tables of Contents
  • Image Upload
  • Markdown Support
  • Text Editing
  • Dark mode
  • Tables
  • @ mentions for
    • Microsoft Teams users
    • Uploaded files
    • Wiki pages
  • Page Searching
  • Revision History

Pricing
  • Free

    • 1 wiki per team channel

      2 pages per wiki

      – PAGE SIZE LIMITS –

      · 1MB of text

      · 10MB of images

      – TEAM SIZE LIMITS –

      · 2MB of text

      · 20MB of images

      – ORG SIZE LIMITS –

      · 100MB of text per org*

      · 1GB of images per org*

*Up to 10 users

  • IntelliWiki Enterprise ($2.00 user/month)

    • Unlimited wikis per team

      Unlimited pages per wiki

      – PAGE SIZE LIMITS –

      · 5MB of text

      · 50MB of images

      – TEAM SIZE LIMITS –

      · 1GB of text

      · 10GB of images

      – ORG SIZE LIMITS –

      · 5 read-only users per paid seat*

      · Additional 1GB of images per paid seat**

    • *Paid seats provide editor access, 5 additional read-only users are included with a paid seat
      **Up to 100 paid seats
