title: Team Board In/Out Status List
shortDescription: Struggling to find out who's available? Stop guessing – see your team’s availability in real time
Description:
Can’t keep track of who’s in-office, remote, or offline?

Tired of switching between apps to check calendars and statuses?

Frustrated with endless messaging to find out who’s available?

With Team Board In/Out Status List - for Microsoft Teams, you can instantly see your team’s availability in real-time, whether they’re in the office, working remotely, or unavailable. Say goodbye to wasted time, missed connections, and inefficient workflows.

Why is the Team Board In/Out Status List a must-have for modern teams?

  • 🚀 Boost Productivity: Spend less time searching and more time doing.

  • 🌐 Enhance Transparency: Keep everyone on the same page.

  • 💬 Simplify Communication: Connect with your team effortlessly.

  • 📊 Provide Insights: Download history and view calendar events for better planning and reporting.

Key Features:

  • ✅ Real-Time Team Visibility:

    See who’s available, in a meeting, or out of office at a glance. No more guessing games!

  • ✅ Quick Communication:

    Message, call, start a video call or email directly from the dashboard. Connect with your team in seconds.

  • ✅ Calendar Integration:

    View each team member’s calendar events to better plan meetings and collaborations. Know when they’re free or busy without switching apps.

  • ✅ Download History:

    Track attendance or availability trends over time with downloadable reports. Perfect for managers and HR teams.

  • ✅ Mobile-Friendly:

    Access your team’s status anytime, anywhere—right from your fingertips.

How organizations are using Team Board In/Out Status List:

  1. Simplify Communication Across Departments

    With hundreds or thousands of employees, finding the right person can feel impossible. Team Board In/Out Status List search feature lets you filter by name, availability, or status message keywords, making it easy to connect with the right colleague.

  2. Improve Productivity for Remote and Hybrid Teams

    Keep your distributed workforce aligned with real-time visibility into who’s in-office, remote, or offline. Plan meetings and collaborate effectively, no matter where your team is located.

  3. Simplify Meeting Scheduling

    Avoid double-booked calendars and last-minute rescheduling. Our Microsoft Teams calendar integration lets you see team members’ availability at a glance, so you can plan meetings faster.

  4. Track Team Availability Trends

    Download historical data to analyze attendance patterns, identify bottlenecks, and make informed decisions about resource allocation.

  5. Enhance Managerial Oversight

    Managers can quickly check team availability, assign tasks, and ensure projects stay on track—all from one centralized dashboard.

Why Choose Team Board In/Out Status List?

  • ✨ Easy Setup: One person installs the bot for the entire team. No individual installs needed.

  • 💰 Affordable & Scalable: After trial, upgrade to the premium version for just $5 per user/year.

  • 🌍 Proven Results: Trusted by organizations worldwide to improve productivity, transparency, and collaboration.

    • Get Started Today!

    👉 Click on the Get it now to start your 30-day trial—no credit card required and no obligation to buy!

    Have questions? Reach out to us at help@teamboard.in.

title: Teams Manager
shortDescription: Governance, Lifecycle, and Templates with Approval Workflow: Structure for Microsoft Teams!
Description:
IT administrators can keep control of their Microsoft 365 environment with Teams Manager. Use Teams Manager to prevent the uncontrolled creation of Teams and Groups and automate your governance processes!

Key Features to keep control of Microsoft Teams:

  • Governance Dashboard and Reports – get an overview of your Microsoft 365 environment (inactive or ownerless teams, teams with guests, etc.)

  • Provisioning of new teams and SharePoint sites – with channels, tabs, folders, files, Planners with tasks, OneNote with content, pre-set owners and members, etc.

  • Request and approval workflow – for provisioning new teams and channels, Microsoft 365 groups, SharePoint sites, and more

Governance Rules and Features:

  • Lifecycle management – automatically archive or delete teams that are no longer needed

  • Naming conventions – set rules for Teams names, OneNotes, and Planners for more structure

  • Metadata – ask for customizable metadata for new teams

  • Guest access – activate or deactivate access for external users

  • Access review – for team owners and their users

  • Governance policies – combine all of the above and more into a powerful governance automation

Adoption:

  • Better overview for your users

  • Works with Microsoft 365 Copilot

  • Bot communication for requests, workflows, and lifecycles

To find out more about Teams Manager, please refer to the product website.

Get started right away!

If you're ready to get control of your Microsoft 365 environment and automate your governance processes, simply add Teams Manager in the Microsoft Teams app store for a free trial!

About Solutions2Share

Solutions2Share is creates governance applications for Microsoft 365 with over 40,000 installations and more than 1.5 million users worldwide. Our clients save time with full governance automation and a structured environment in Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Teams.

Contact us to raise a request with our support team if you come across any objectionable content generated by AI.

title: Jurisprudência GPT
shortDescription: Jurisprudência GPT é IA Generativa responsável pré-treinada com conhecimento jurídico e uso da lei
Description:
Um Assistente especialista em conhecimento jurídico e aplicação da lei, treinado com publicações de Jurisprudências e Precedentes dos Tribunais Brasileiros.

Com Inteligência Artificial Generativa você usa linguagem natural para conversar sobre as mais diversas áreas do direito, com conhecimento enriquecido de Jurisprudências e Precedentes publicados pelos Tribunais Brasileiros, e pode explorar a aplicação da lei em casos, em situações ou teses específicas.

O Jurisprudência GPT é capaz de responder perguntas com conhecimento jurídico e apoiar uma conversa especializada sobre um caso, uma situação ou tese.

Com citações de conhecimento é possível validar e verificar as referências analisadas para a resposta, acessando trechos de conhecimento e até o documento original da publicação da Jurisprudência ou Precedente do Tribunal.

Esta Inteligência Artificial Generativa não é criativa, todas as respostas são fundamentadas no conhecimento e informações originais do treinamento. Nenhuma informação, documento ou fontes externas são utilizadas para respostas; somente publicações oficiais de Jurisprudência e/ou Precedente dos Tribunais.

Nossa abordagem para Inteligência Artificial Responsável reforça:

  • a Ética na gestão do conhecimento e na etapa aprendizado;
  • e Explicabilidade da inteligência nas respostas durante a conversa;

Assim proporcionamos um ambiente seguro e confiável, que contribui para a produtividade e eficiência dos usuários.

O Jurisprudência GPT esta disponível no Microsoft Teams, Outlook, Microsoft 365 Chat e Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365 chat. No Copilot utilize:

  • Pesquise por Precedentes do Supremo Tribunal Federal sobre liberdade de expressão
  • Pesquise por Jurisprudência do STJ sobre responsabilidade civil em acidentes de trânsito

Experimente nosso aplicativo gratuitamente hoje! Se você gostar, licenças podem ser adquiridas no Microsoft Marketplace ou com nossa equipe de vendas.

Entre em contato conosco se encontrar algum conteúdo questionável gerado pela IA, ou se precisar de alguma ajuda.

This app is only available in Brazilian Portuguese.

title: ArcGIS for Teams
shortDescription: ArcGIS for Microsoft Teams enables you to discover maps and applications from around the world.
Description:
Explore a trending world of maps and data

Maximize collaboration with powerful mapping and spatial analytics software. ArcGIS for Teams allows you to access ready-to-use datasets including demographics, psychographic and business data, live feeds like traffic and weather, places, movement data, and high-quality imagery in Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Share the latest maps that are trending globally, or find hyper-local applications created by your local governments.

Discover geospatial applications that use data visualization tools to see unique patterns and relationships. Using data-driven visualizations, you can create rich interactive 2D and 3D maps. Use ArcGIS for Teams with Microsoft 365 Copilot to seamlessly search for ArcGIS content. These tools work both client-side for highly interactive user experiences, and server-side to help you scale with large amounts of data.

Log in to your ArcGIS account and gain access to private content across your organization in a centralized application, in addition to millions of public maps and applications.

Here's what this app can do:

• Use the chat bot to access the world’s foremost collection of geospatial data.

• Collaborate at the speed you need by sharing ready-to-use maps and authoritative data via message extensions.

• Keep your tactical teams organized by managing your ArcGIS content, maps and apps in one central location.

• Share interactive maps and apps privately with your groups or publicly with everyone.

• Send messages and notifications to teams in a channel.

• Use an ArcGIS account to access private content.

What's new - ArcGIS for Teams now works with Microsoft 365 Copilot:

• Copilot now comes with an ArcGIS agent for Microsoft Copilot which enables you to search for public content in ArcGIS.

• When signed in to ArcGIS, you can access a wide array of public and private content, including specific items from your repositories.

• Results returned get further refined as you continue searching with more focused keywords, for example, Search for education maps in ArcGIS.

• You can access the search results in ArcGIS for Teams when prompted via Microsoft Teams Copilot.

Permissions:

This app will have permission to:

• Receive messages and data that I provide to it.

• Send me messages and notifications.

• Access my profile information such as my name, email address, company name, and preferred language.

• Receive messages and data that team members provide to it in a channel.

• Send messages and notifications in a channel.

• Access this team's information such as team name, channel list and roster (including team member's names and email addresses) - and use this to contact them.

This app is available in:

Arabic, Bosnian, Bulgarian, Catalan, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Latvian, Lithuanian, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese (Brazil), Portuguese (Portugal), Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Simplified Chinese, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong), Turkish, Ukrainian, and Vietnamese.

About Esri

Esri, the global market leader in geographic information system (GIS) software, location intelligence, and mapping, helps customers unlock the full potential of data to improve operational and business results. Visit us at esri.com.

title: ServiceDesk Plus Cloud for Microsoft Teams
shortDescription: Microsoft 365 Copilot driven, Use ServiceDesk Plus Cloud to extend your IT via Microsoft Teams
Description:
The cloud version of ServiceDesk Plus now integrates with Microsoft 365 Copilot, leveraging the collaboration app from Microsoft as an additional channel for IT and enterprise support.

Service desk teams can now integrate the incident management module of ServiceDesk Plus as a tab inside their organization's Teams interface. This enables technicians and end users to perform a host of request management activities, including

  • Access the tabs like Dashboard, Scheduler, Tech Availability Chart, Tasks, Reminders, and Announcements from within the home page.

  • Picking up incidents or assigning them to other technicians.

  • Initiating remote sessions or initiating meetings with end users through Microsoft Teams to diagnose incidents.

  • Resolving and closing requests, and marking FCRR, if applicable.

  • Tracking the status of user requests with real-time updates and notiﬁcations.

  • Boost productivity and efficiency with the ServiceDesk Plus Cloud plugin for Microsoft 365 Copilot with natural language prompts


    • Channeling major incident management.

    Handling major incidents is always a challenge, and could turn out to be a disaster if a business doesn't know the status of an incident. It's also important that any possible workarounds and solutions are quickly and easily shared with end users to avoid repeat and duplicate incidents.

    Service desk teams can leverage conversations in Teams to:

    Tag relevant and necessary service desk members to get them working on tasks.

    Post regular updates about each incident to the members of a channel, including service desk teams and end users.

    Search and publish relevant solutions from ServiceDesk Plus.

    Handling tickets through chatbots.

    Both technicians and end users need various kinds of information about their service desk tickets during the ticket life cycle. The built-in Teams chatbot now allows them to interact with ServiceDesk Plus to fetch information and perform various service desk actions right from within Teams for quicker resolution. Technicians can perform activities like adding notes, approving requests, picking up requests, assigning requests to technicians, and resolving tickets through the actionable cards within the chat window. The list of chatbot commands include:



  • Select instance: To select the ServiceDesk Plus Cloud instance.

  • View all requests: To display all open requests that the technician has access to.

  • View my open requests: To display all open requests that are assigned to the technician.

  • Pending approvals: To show all the pending approvals associated with the technician, then approve them with another command.

  • Search request "Search_key": To search a request with keywords.

  • Create request "subject": To create a new service desk request with the deﬁned subject.

    • An active subscription to ServiceDesk Plus Cloud is required, please do sign up for 30 days free trial via our website

title: MDaemon Calendars
shortDescription: A CalDAV client by MDaemon for MDaemon Users
Description:
A CalDAV client for viewing and editing your MDaemon calendar. Available in Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Written by MDaemon for MDaemon users.

An MDaemon WebDAV Server version 21.5.1 or greater is required.

**Connect and Authenticate**

From the Settings page, enter the host name of the CalDAV server where your MDaemon calendar is hosted. If the standard \"/.well-known/caldav\" path is not being used, click the *Edit '.well-known' path* button.

Click *Test CalDAV server* to confirm that the server is there.

If the \"Server verified\" alert appears, you can enter your credentials and click *Connect to CalDAV server*.

Set your default options in the Calendar Configuration form. When you click *Save Settings*, you will be taken to the Calendar.

**Calendar Features**

From the Calendar, you can Create, Edit, and Delete any events that you have permissions for.

- ***Create*** an event by clicking *New Event* in the right hand pane. The subject, start, and end fields are required. Click *Save* to create the event, or click *Discard* to cancel the event creation.

- ***Edit*** an existing event by clicking on the event in the calendar view. The details will appear in the right hand pane.

- ***Delete*** an event by clicking on the event in the calendar view, and then clicking *Delete* in the right hand pane. In order to use this app.

**Helpful Links**

For product support, please click this link [https://mdaemon.com/pages/support-options](https://mdaemon.com/pages/support-options)

To contacts us, please click this link [https://mdaemon.com/pages/contact-us](https://mdaemon.com/pages/contact-us)

**NOTE**

Users must have an active MDaemon account to use this app, please visit [https://www.mdaemon.com](https://mdaemon.com) for purchasing options.

To use Skedda in Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365, you need to have a Skedda user account that is linked with Single-Sign-On (SSO) to a Microsoft Azure Active Directory tenant. Please reach out to Skedda support if you would like assistance in getting started!

Please note that, within the Microsoft 365 family of apps, only the schedule tab of Skedda’s Microsoft Teams app will be displayed. But, in the full Microsoft Teams experience, you have access to the complete Skedda experience!

title: Edgility SMS
shortDescription: Send and receive SMS and MMS directly from Microsoft 365, Outlook, and Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Edgility Enhances SMS/MMS Communication with Seamless Microsoft 365 Integration

Edgility takes your communication to the next level with its integration of SMS and MMS directly into Microsoft 365 products. With the Edgility Microsoft Teams App, you can effortlessly send and receive SMS and MMS right from your Teams chat, enhancing your workflow and collaboration with clients and staff.

Simply enable the app within any chat, compose your message, and click SEND. Your SMS will be added to the chat thread for easy tracking and inbound SMS or replies can be routed to specific Teams or Chats, ensuring efficient handling of customer inquiries or support requests. Real-time message notifications alert you of incoming texts, keeping you on top of all conversations.

Currently available in Australia and New Zealand

The features of Edgility SMS for Teams:

  • Send and receive SMS from collaborative Teams chats

  • Send and receive SMS privately from Edgility App

  • Send and receive MMS (Australia only. With Virtual Number)

  • Schedule SMS for later delivery

  • SMS Chat tab for conversational messaging

  • Quick sending to saved Contacts and Groups

  • SMS templates

  • Native Teams notifications of inbound SMS

Not an Edgility customer? Visit https://edgility.com.au one of our experts, call us on +61 2 9518 5955 or email support@edgility.com.au

Here’s why SMS is so effective

With almost as many handsets in circulation as there are people on earth, SMS is perhaps the most widely accepted form of communication available. 98% of text messages are read by their intended recipient with 3 minutes of delivery. The immediacy and rate of successful delivery makes it more effective for reminders, alerts, and notifications than email.

SMS is who we are.

With two decades of experience in mobile technology, Edgility are leaders in the development and integration of SMS conversational tools. Whatever your objective, Edgility can offer a simple, sometimes automated, solution to ensure SMS communication is effectively implemented into your marketing or transactional channels. Send or schedule SMS campaigns, receive replies, import contacts, view live delivery reporting, interact using the SMS Chat, integrate SMS into other systems using our APIs and more.

title: SurveyMonkey: Surveys for Feedback
shortDescription: Seamlessly capture survey feedback and view results for better decision-making.
Description:
Manage all your SurveyMonkey and Microsoft surveys in one place.

Create, capture and analyze feedback within the platform you use every day.

Ask for feedback from your team or colleagues about an important topic. Quiz them on a training that just happened or seek their opinions on a recent launch or meeting. Capture the voice of your key stakeholders with regular surveys and share results in Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365 and Outlook. The app allows any user to capture feedback from a variety of use cases such as; project feedback, diversity and inclusion, training and learning development, and meeting effectiveness.

Use SurveyMonkey's expert-built templates to jumpstart your survey creation. Enjoy the flexibility of multiple question types, longer surveys, and configuration options. SurveyMonkey includes advanced and intuitive privacy settings for even more confidence. SurveyMonkey makes it easy to get timely and important feedback when and where you want it.

Share a survey to any of your Microsoft Team's Channels or Chats or copy a unique URL and share virtually anywhere. View results as they come in and share them when you're ready - your way!

Want to learn more, check out our latest blog here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/curiosity/how-the-surveymonkey-app-for-microsoft-teams-can-help-amplify-the-voices-of-your-team/ Or see all our Microsoft integrations here: https://www.surveymonkey.com/mp/microsoft-integrations/

SurveyMonkey Analytics Tab

Share analytics from any SurveyMonkey or Microsoft Team's survey on a SurveyMonkey Tab. Build a shared understanding of survey data with your colleagues. Create one Tab or multiple to drive better decisions and awareness.

Note: Microsoft Teams users must have an active SurveyMonkey plan to manage surveys in this app. Survey responders do not require a SurveyMonkey Account. You can link an existing account or create a new one for any plan type. Basic (free) users may have limited features such as reduced question types or response limits based on current SurveyMonkey plan types. For current plan details, see Plans and Pricing page on https://www.surveymonkey.com/ or reach out to our support team at https://help.surveymonkey.com/en/contact/

title: eWay-CRM Collaboration
shortDescription: Collaborate smarter with a CRM that sits inside Microsoft Teams.
Description:
The Outlook integrated CRM now available in Microsoft Teams

eWay-CRM is a CRM tool that sits right inside Microsoft Outlook 365. It turns Outlook into a fully-fledged CRM that helps companies and individuals manage contacts, companies, sales, marketing, and projects.

Integration with Teams makes collaboration seamless

  • Need to talk to your colleague about a customer, deal, or task? Click Chat in Teams in eWay-CRM and send a direct link to open the item.

  • Get familiar with the subject of your talks right in the chat panel. eWay-CRM adds a handy card that summarizes the most important info. If you need more, click Open to get full details.

  • Do you need to follow up on the conversation? Click Convert to Task and create a task in eWay-CRM. Just two-clicks. No more.

  • Have you learned some important info? Convert the conversation into a journal in eWay-CRM and save it by a customer. So simple.

  • Do you want to open eWay-CRM? It’s right in the Teams left panel. Check it out!

To begin, please go to signup and create an account. You can choose between eWay-CRM Free or eWay-CRM 14-day Trial (paid account).

Why is eWay-CRM embedded into Outlook?

  • One software for everything. Outlook helps you manage your e-mails, calendar, contacts, and tasks. With eWay-CRM, you will extend its functionality to a fully-fledged CRM without switching between different apps.

  • Well-known environment. You already know Outlook and eWay-CRM looks the same. There is no need to learn any new piece of software. Just sign up and start working.

  • Shared database. Outlook is a great single-user app. eWay-CRM allows you to share e-mails, contacts, or calendars with your team. Besides, everything will be well organized by customers, deals, or projects. It's like Outlook for teams!

What are the main features of eWay-CRM?

Contacts & Companies

  • Contacts and companies shared within your team.

  • Synchronized with your smartphone.

  • Organized by categories and custom fields.

  • Automatic email tracking.

  • Notes and follow-ups.

  • Advanced user rights.

Sales

  • All deals and leads in one place.

  • Integration with web forms and lead-generating tools.

  • Emails, notes, and documents.

  • Reminders.

  • Automated workflows.

  • Power BI dashboards.

Marketing

  • Marketing emails right inside your CRM.

  • Beautiful templates.

  • Detailed stats of user behavior.

  • Heatmaps.

  • Easy to turn a lead into a deal.

Projects

  • Keep an eye on your deliveries.

  • Tasks and subtasks.

  • All communications in one place.

  • Billing, costs, and profit.

  • Timesheets.

Advanced customizations & integrations

  • Custom fields.

  • Workflows.

  • Module permissions.

  • Field permissions.

Find out how eWay-CRM can help you and your team, and try eWay-CRM today.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact us using our contact form.

title: Deskare
shortDescription: 🥇 Organize hybrid work, flex office, room booking & more
Description:
Hybrid work, flex office... New ways of working can't be improvised.

With Deskare in Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365:

Manage hybrid work and team presence:

  • 📅 Share your schedule with your team in one click

  • ⏱️ Save time with the “Routine week” and the automatic Teams reminders.

Organize flex office with desk and zone booking:

  • 🪑 Book your desk in the team area and finally feel reassured, even in flex office

  • 🗺️ Set up team zones and access rules directly on your floorplans

  • 🚘 Book a parking spot when coming in your office

  • 👥 Invite visitors in your office

Social life and events:

  • 🥳 Recreate team moments and social ties between collaborators, helping your colleagues get together in the office for the moments that matter

Meeting rooms booking:

  • ✅ Book the meeting rooms you need, synchronized with Outlook

  • 👻 Fight against “ghost meetings” with the Teams "no show" reminders

Data and Analytics:

  • 📊 Analyze your space occupancy and team presence with our dedicated administrator dashboards

  • 🔔 Set alerts when certain thresholds are exceeded

Setup and integrations:

  • 🔁 Automatic provisioning from Active Directory (SCIM)

  • 📌 Pin on the Teams sidebar for the users you want

  • 🔐 SSO connection (SAML)

  • 🔗 Integration with HRIS for leave day synchronization

  • 🔗 Open API access

  • 🇪🇺 GDPR compliant with data hosting in Europe

Deskare is used in 500+ office sites across 24 countries worldwide, and has won numerous awards: STATION F Future 40, Trophée de l'Immobilier 2023, Trophée de l'Innovation RH 2023...

To find out more, visit our website www.deskare.io or contact us at hello@deskare.io

title: Unified Contacts Free
shortDescription: Unified Contacts Free | Finding ALL your Contacts in Microsoft Teams
Description:
Unified Contacts Free extends Microsoft Teams by delivering a unified search experience for the two most popular address books: Entra ID (Azure Active Directory) and Microsoft Exchange Online.

With Unified Contacts Free you can simultaneously search your Entra ID (Azure AD) for corporate contacts and the Exchange Online address book for personal and other organization-wide contacts. Search results will be presented in a unified, well-structured, and comprehensive result page displaying contacts from both sources.

If your contacts contain multiple phone numbers, Unified Contacts Free allows an easy selection of your desired phone number for dialing (dialing requires Microsoft Teams Phone System enabled users). In addition, you can directly initiate a Microsoft Teams call, start a Microsoft Teams chat, or write a mail from the contact card. For internal users the presence status is displayed as well.

Unified Contacts Free searches contacts by

  • First name

  • Last name

  • Job title

  • Department

  • Organization name


In addition to the free version, we also offer other editions of Unified Contacts:

  • Community Edition

  • Pro


Learn more on Unified Contacts here:

Unified-Contacts website

Unified-Contacts technical documentation

title: PDF4me
shortDescription: PDF4me delivers an intelligent and efficient solutions for all your PDFs.
Description:
Boost your productivity with Pdf4me: access crucial data, make edits, and convert files on PDFs directly within Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 —all in one convenient platform.From a single document conversion to mega data files PDF4me is there.

Key Features:

- Compress PDF: Reduce PDF file sizes with customizable compression

options.

- Watermark: Add text or image watermarks to your documents.

- Split PDF: Break down large PDFs into smaller, more manageable files.

- Extract Text and Images: Retrieve text and images from your PDFs with

ease.

- Merge PDF: Combine multiple PDFs into a single document in your

preferred order.

- Image to PDF: Convert up to 200 images (JPG or PNG) into PDF format.

- Organize PDF: Re-arrange, re-order, or remove pages from your PDFs.

- PDF to Word/Excel/PowerPoint

- Sign PDF: Create and add digital signatures to your documents.

- PDF Viewer / Editor: View and edit PDFs directly, adding text, notes, or

stamps.

- Optimize for Web: Make PDFs web-ready with linearization for efficient

streaming.

- Prepare for Print:

- PDF Metadata: View and edit metadata, including author, keywords,

and copyright information.

- Flatten PDF: Converts interactive elements (forms, annotations and

layers) into a static image or text, preventing further editing.

- Add Page Numbers: Inserts sequential numbers on each page of the

PDF.

- Convert to PDF/A: Converts the PDF into an archival format (PDF/A) for

long-term preservation.

- Redact PDF: Permanently removes or blackouts sensitive information

from the document.

- Find and Replace: Searches for specific text and replaces it with new

text or redacts it.

- Merge PDF Overlay: Combines two PDFs (useful for adding watermarks,

stamps, or templates).

- Optimize PDF: Improves usability, security and performance.

- Repair PDF: Fixes corrupted or damaged PDFs, resolving issues like

missing content, unreadable text, or broken formatting.

- Protect PDF: Adds security features such as password protection,

encryption, or restrictions.

[Instructions](https://pdf4me.com/addons/teams-app/)

Licensing:

This add-in offers free access to all our Premium features, with a limit of 2 actions per hour. A PDF4me account is required to use it with Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365.

For free sign-up to PDF4me, please visit our

[web portal](https://pdf4me.com)

To remove the hourly action limit, start a paid subscription with your PDF4me account. For subscription options, visit our

[Pricing Page](https://pdf4me.com/pricing/)

or contact us for more information at

[PDF4me Support](https://pdf4me.com/contact/)

title: Simpatico
shortDescription: AI mental health app, transforming the way employees and organisations address mental health issues.
Description:
Simpatico's AI-powered mental health support for workplace well-being and wellness, within Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Introducing Simpatico, the Conversational AI Mental Health Application designed to transform the way employees and organisations address mental health challenges. With Simpatico, users can engage in anonymous and personalised conversations, access self-assessment tools, and receive actionable insights. Seamlessly integrated with Microsoft Teams, Simpatico offers a secure and convenient solution for improving mental well-being in the workplace. Our advanced AI technology ensures non-judgmental support and scalability, while providing organisations with anonymised analytics and reporting dashboards. Join the mental health revolution with Simpatico and empower your workforce for greater well-being and productivity.

Our advanced AI technology ensures non-judgmental support and scalability, empowering organisations with anonymised analytics and reporting dashboards. Inspired by Simon Kinsella, a renowned corporate psychologist, Simpatico harnesses the extensive capabilities of the Mesh Ai Conversational AI engine, developed over 5 years of dedicated research and development, to combat the global "mental health pandemic."

Key Features and Benefits:

AI-driven Conversational Platform: Simpatico enables users to engage in personalised conversations about their mental health challenges, providing a humanised and non-judgmental experience.

Comprehensive Self-Assessment Tools: Users can access diagnostic tools, tips, and resources to understand and manage their mental health better.

Workplace Psychological Risk and Satisfaction Surveys Simpatico's solutions assess psychological wellbeing through surveys, addressing concerns, and fostering a healthy work environment. Resources, assessments, and adjustments lead to increased satisfaction and productivity.

Actionable Insights: Simpatico provides anonymised analytics and reporting dashboards for organisations, offering visibility into the mental health of their workforce and actionable insights for intervention and support.

Simpatico Advantage:

Unique Value Proposition: Simpatico's anonymous and personalised conversations set it apart from existing tools, making it more approachable for users.

Integration with Microsoft Teams: Simpatico benefits from its partnership with Mesh Health and Microsoft, providing access to a large user ecosystem and facilitating market penetration.

Pricing Strategy: Simpatico adopts a competitive pricing strategy, offering various subscription options to scale with an organisations uptake. The model is per user per month, sold through the Microsoft Market Place to provide a global payment and procurement process.

In summary, Simpatico is a cutting-edge Conversational AI Mental Health Application with a unique value proposition, targeting the workplace mental health market. With its personalised approach, actionable insights, and strategic partnerships, Simpatico is poised for growth and success in meeting the increasing demand for mental health support in organisations.

*In order to use this app you require an active subscription with Simpatico. To create an account please contact via support

Please report any inappropriate content found within this app via support.simpaticoteams.com

title: Sociabble
shortDescription: The Engaging Employee Communication Platform
Description:
Sociabble is the engaging employee communication platform providing businesses with powerful tools for streamlined internal communication, dynamic employee advocacy, and effective social selling.

It offers a unified, comprehensive solution which not only fosters a culture of open communication and collaboration but also amplifies your brand's reach.

The integration of Sociabble into Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 brings added value by seamlessly combining the power of corporate communication with your daily collaborative tool. This integration allows you to create tailored content tabs for specific teams, fostering targeted discussions and knowledge sharing. An embedded Sociabble experience is also available directly from your sidebar, providing fast access to company news.

This integration enhances productivity, promotes employee engagement, and ultimately drives business results.

To start using the app, you need an active Sociabble account. Please visit https://www.sociabble.com/contact-us to set up your account.

title: Gaia Workspace
shortDescription: Gaia Workspace makes your space & visitor management easier and more efficient.
Description:
Gaia Workspace Room & Desk Booking Integration for Microsoft Teams

Gaia Workspace is a comprehensive solution for team scheduling, desk, and meeting room bookings, designed for hybrid work environments. It seamlessly integrates with Microsoft 365, allowing employees to easily locate where their teammates are working and book available desks and rooms in one place. With no setup, passwords, or training required, employees can start booking and checking into spaces using the familiar Microsoft Teams interface, making adoption effortless.

Effortless Room Booking with Outlook Integration

Gaia Workspace integrates with both Teams and Outlook calendars, enabling users to manage meetings and room bookings directly within the Microsoft Teams app or through the calendar.

Prevent Ghost Bookings with Desk Check-In/Out

Set up notifications via Microsoft Teams to ensure that employees check into their reserved desks or meeting rooms. This feature helps release unused spaces automatically, making them available for others to book.

Accurate Office Utilization Analytics

Gain insights into your office space usage with detailed analytics. Visualize booking data across all locations, buildings, and floors to evaluate the effectiveness of your hybrid work policy. Understand attendance patterns and meeting room availability.

Track Employee Attendance

Employee attendance is primarily tracked through desk or office check-ins.

Simple Setup Process For existing customers:

     1. Sign in to Microsoft Teams.

     2. Search for ‘Gaia Workspace’ and select ‘Add’.

     3. Start using Gaia Workspace as you did before!

For new customers, please sign up on our website and refer to our help center for detailed setup guides. Once registered, follow the three simple steps above to integrate with Microsoft Teams.

If you encounter any issues, please report them to Gaia Workspace support.

Key App Features

  • Desk Booking

  • Office Check-In

  • Analytics

About Gaia Workspace App Information

  • Created by: GaiaDigits Inc

  • Publisher Attested

  • Version: 2.01

  • Supported Languages: English (United States), Français, Chinese

title: Cards micro-learning
shortDescription: Cards is a simple and easy to use microlearning solution.
Description:
Thanks to Cards application, access your company's microlearnings directly in Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365.

You will find there the new trainings, the trainings that you have not yet completed, and the completed trainings, which you can start again. When you complete a training, and the chapters that compose it, you improve your progress and your score. It is thus possible for you to follow your progress, and to challenge your colleagues if the ranking is enabled.

The simple and easy to use interface makes Cards the ideal solution for simplifying training materials and making the transmission of information digestible.

To use Cards and create your first training, you must register by following this link: register.

For any request for information, please contact us.

shortDescription: Autopilot utilizes the power of Microsoft Teams to speed up your employee onboarding process.
Description:
Autopilot utilizes the collaborative power of Microsoft Teams to automate your Employee Onboarding process. Ensure that your new employees upload the correct information and documents first time, without you having to repeatedly follow up.

Speed and Convenience.

Onboarding processes usually require you to follow up and chase after information. Now, your team can focus on more important parts of their job while your new employees are seamlessly onboarded.

Easy and Cost-Effective

Utilize power of Teams to consolidate your onboarding processes.

Assign, Automate and Report

Create tasks and assignments, automate sequences and get important reporting, all in a fraction of the time and cost.

Utilize Autopilot Employee Onboarding solution to automate your onboarding processes.

Supported in Microsoft Teams, Microsoft365 and Outlook

Getting Started

Download the app and try it for free.

Help

Ask the Employee Onboarding bot, included in the app, for assistance or email support@autopilotworkflows.com

title: SOFI
shortDescription: This application allows you to upload your Microsoft Team's recordings to our AI platform SOFI
Description:
Discover SOFI – Your Comprehensive Meeting Intelligence Platform for the Financial Industry. Engineered specifically for the financial sector, SOFI is a tool designed for institutional clients including asset management firms, investment advisors, and professionals within the pensions and insurance fields. SOFI empowers your organization to capture the full essence of every meeting through its state-of-the-art AI-driven analysis.

Key Features and Value Proposition:

  • Comprehensive Analysis: Upload your meeting recordings to the SOFI platform to unlock a wealth of insights. From detailed transcriptions to nuanced analyses, including summaries, key points, and actionable items based on the conversation's core topics or "lenses".

  • Presentation Feedback: Enhance your presentation skills with SOFI's feedback on the quality of language and engagement during your meetings. A valuable asset for continuous professional development.

  • Enterprise-Level Integration: With a corporate license, integrate SOFI analyses directly into your organization's CRM system, streamlining your workflow and enhancing team productivity.

Ideal for Professional Environments:

SOFI is the ultimate tool for professionals seeking to optimize meeting outcomes and improve presentation skills within the financial sector. It’s an indispensable asset for teams aiming to elevate their strategic discussions and client engagements.

Subscription Information:

  • Enterprise Subscriptions: SOFI's services are accessible via enterprise subscriptions purchased by your organization. Individual purchase options are not available. Ensure your organization acquires an enterprise SOFI license to take advantage of our platform’s full capabilities.

  • Unlocking SOFI in Teams: For organizations with an existing SOFI license, our Teams app acts as a secure gateway to upload and access meeting analyses enhancing your enterprise productivity seamlessly.

Getting Started:

To begin transforming your meetings with SOFI, ensure your organization has an active account. If your organization is yet to discover the transformative power of SOFI, here's how to get started:

  1. Sign Up / Contact Us: Visit www.sofiai.com to explore how SOFI can revolutionize your meeting dynamics. Our team is ready to assist with enterprise license inquiries and integration details.

  2. Help and Support: Need guidance or have questions? Our dedicated support team is here to ensure your SOFI experience is seamless and productive.

title: WIVIO
shortDescription: The ultimate tool for uncomplicated organization of company knowledge
Description:
WIVIO is your ultimate tool for easily saving, organizing, and using important knowledge in your company. With the WIVIO app, you can integrate the WIVIO knowledge management system directly into Microsoft Teams without leaving your familiar working environment. Thanks to the practical search and extensive filter options, WIVIO guides you quickly and accurately to the content you need in your day-to-day work. You can read the documents found with relevant content directly in Teams or open them in the usual Microsoft 365 programs.  


Use WIVIO simply and easily in your day-to-day work:

  • Secure and distribute knowledge easily and efficiently

  • Unlimited access on any device

  • Intuitive search with extensive filter options

  • Read documents

  • Structured organization and classification of documents

Take your knowledge management to the next level with WIVIO! Secure your wealth of knowledge and work on new ideas and innovations today.

 

The WIVIO app is aimed at companies of all sizes and industries that already have Microsoft Teams and an existing WIVIO Enterprise license.

 

In order to use this app, you need to have an active WIVIO account. In addition, your WIVIO system must already be connected to Microsoft Entra ID (SSO) and the Teams integration must be activated for you.

 

The WIVIO app is available in English and German.

 

Further information can be found at: www.wbi.at/ms-teams

title: Klynke Time Management
shortDescription: Free Klynke Time Management App for Seamless Time Tracking in Microsoft Teams & Outlook
Description:
This free app for Microsoft Teams and Outlook gives you access to all the essential time tracking and registration features of the full Klynke Time Management suite, except for project management and advanced configuration settings.

While the app itself is free to use, an active subscription to the Klynke Time Management SaaS application or a 30-Day Free trial is required.

Click the “Get it here” button above to get started today.

Overview of the Full Klynke Time Management Suite:

Klynke provides an all-in-one solution designed to boost productivity with advanced time tracking and registration features. Fully integrated with Microsoft 365, Teams, and Outlook, Klynke empowers you to take control, gain comprehensive insights, and maintain precise records—all within the familiar Microsoft environment.

Key Features:

  • Project and Task Management: Efficiently manage time for projects and tasks. Set estimated hours and deadlines at both the project and task levels, assign tasks to team members, and ensure on-time delivery. title: imDocShare One
shortDescription: imDocShare One app allows users to view, edit, or sync iManage Work content in Microsoft Teams
Description:
imDocShare One app allows users to view, edit, add, sync, search, and provision iManage content within Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, and Microsoft Office, enabling easy access to relevant firm content right within a Team Channel Post or 1-1 Private Chat.

Key Features of the imDocShare One app include:

1) Access iManage content in Microsoft Teams via adding imDocShare One app as new Team Channel Tab, 1-1 Private Chat, Meeting Chat, or simply Pin to Teams Navigation bar as a personal app.

2) Reference iManage content within Microsoft Teams Channel Post, including add, edit, update, and quick sync iManage content with Team Channel Files Tab.

3) View any iManage content in Microsoft Teams using Normal View, Tree View, Recent Documents View, Favorites View, My Checked Out Documents View, My Email Files View, or My Matter View.

4) Check-in, Check-out, Rename, Mark as Favorite, Edit Profile and Co-Author using Microsoft Office Client any document in iManage.

5) Collaborate with colleagues using our real-time sharing of iManage content within Team Channel Post Tab or Files Tab, 1-1 Private Chat Tab, or Meeting Files Tab, eliminating the need to leave Microsoft Teams just to access relevant iManage content.

6) Ability to easily save Teams Channel Post or 1-1 Private Chat Messages or Meeting Chat Messages with or without attachments directly from within Teams into iManage.

7) Ability to Search & Lookup any iManage content to share within Microsoft Teams Channel Post tab or 1-1 Private Chat Messages or Meeting Chat tab.

8) Ability to synchronize any iManage content (workspaces, folders etc.) from the Team's Channel imDocShare One Tab with the Channel Files Tab.

9) Ability to perform Advanced Search of specific iManage content sources right within the imDocShare One Channel tab.

Install imDocShare One app within minutes and rapidly add Channel Tabs to view your favorite iManage content from library, workspace, folder / sub-folder.

The imDocShare One app augments the power of instant collaboration and communication using Microsoft Teams with advanced Document Management capabilities of iManage to create a modern digital workplace.

In order to use this app. Users must have active imDocShare One licenses and iManage accounts, please contact our support team at licensing@imdocshare.com for more details.

title: Vtiger CRM
shortDescription: Connect Vtiger CRM to view dashboards, reports and share deal, case, task or contact within team.
Description:
Vtiger CRM empowers Sales, Marketing, Customer Service, and Implementation teams with the power of one view on deals, cases, contacts, and tasks.

Over 300,000 businesses use Vtiger to create delightful customer experiences that measurably improve business revenue, customer loyalty, and team performance.

Note to admins: If your business does not have a Vtiger CRM account yet, you can sign up for the forever free Vtiger CRM One Pilot Edition by following the installation steps in Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365.

Vtiger's One Professional and One Enterprise paid version provides enhanced Sales, Support and Marketing capabilities.

The Vtiger's Sales and Marketing CRM boosts sales by

* Helping sales teams win more deals faster.

* Highlighting the most valuable leads to work with.

* Enabling sales reps to track all deals.

* Nurturing prospects automatically.

* Alerting sales rep when to follow up.

* Showcasing sales performance & insights.

* Suggesting areas of improvement.

* Support multiple Pipelines.

* See Sales Insights dashboard & reports

Vtiger's Help Desk boosts customer satisfaction & loyalty by

* Enabling customers to find helpful information at an instant.

* Letting teams define the flow of how issues are reported, routed, assigned and handled.

* Automatically creating, routing, assigning and prioritizing cases.

* Letting support reps monitor, assign, & track progress of customer requests across multiple channels.

* Proactively surfacing important issues that need attention to prevent escalations.

* Making it super-easy for support managers to be on top of things.

* Support multiple SLA's.

* View Cases Insights.

Vtiger's All-in-one CRM breaks silos between marketing, sales, and support teams by enabling

* Provides unlimited number of records.

* Marketing teams to capture and nurture leads.

* Sales teams to score, track and close resulting deals.

* Support teams to access complete customer history and provide exception support.

* All teams to effortlessly share data and communicate, collaborate, and automate workflows across the company

* With the Microsoft Teams & Vtiger integration,

* View your Tasks, Contact, Deal lists and CRM dashboards directly within your team channels tabs and personal tabs.

* View your detail report, Pivot tables and Chart reports from within the Teams app.

* View your CRM alerts inside teams activity feed.

You can also be notified of the important CRM alerts inside the Microsoft Teams app in the Activity Feed channel, configure the rules in the CRM and allow notifications in Microsoft Teams app. For more details and configuration please visit our help page.

For more details on the features please visit our pricing page.

Ask Vtiger Bot for your agenda for the day, view contact, or deal info by doing search via Vtiger Bot.

In the Microsoft Team's mobile app we are showing only data at the moment, create/update new Contacts, Deals, Tasks etc and other actions will be available in coming releases.

Signup for a new Vtiger account for your business, if you do not have one.

title: Deventral
shortDescription: Deventral is an AI-assisted internal tool builder for business users to make better decisions faster
Description:
We're Deventral. Your development central.

We believe all businesses need to be able to build their internal tools, because they know what they need better than anyone else. We're here to make that easier with the help of generative AI.

Businesses run on internal tools but software development is really complex and it requires deep IT knowledge and skilled workforce. That's why most businesses are stuck between spreadsheets with low security and poor scalability and out-of-the-box software with inflexibility and high cost.

With Deventral, business users can build their own internal tools using generative AI without any development skill by defining what to do in simple instructions.

We provide a platform where business users who generally do not have technical knowledge to build software can build purposeful internal tools, which are called micro tools on the platform. With the help of these micro tools, business users are able to improve their organisation's operational efficiency.

🤖The way of building micro tools depend on an AI model which means AI generates the codes required to build these tools. In this way, business users do not have to write any code or configure any technical infrastructure. Having a cloud-based infrastructure also provides high-level security and scalability for this environment.

⚙ Micro tools build a bridge between data sources and work management systems for business users. In this way, they provide a new way to make better decisions faster, and thus better results in a more efficient way. They connect to data sources with connectors and extend to work management systems with plugins. Therefore, business users can fetch their data quickly and turn it into a tool to make decisions faster and take actions through their work management systems via plugins.

💻 Another important characteristic of Deventral is providing all its functionality through an application specifically developed for the most used communication and collaboration tool, Microsoft Teams. The application also supports Microsoft 365 and Microsoft Outlook. In this way, users can use Deventral without going to any other software, just in their favourite collaboration tool in an embedded way.

If you’d like to learn more, please schedule a demo or get in touch with us. It is time to build your internal tools your way!

title: Simplify365 Cleaner
shortDescription: Clean Teams effortlessly: find errors, fix issues, and manage teams
Description:
Simplify365 Cleaner: Optimize Your Microsoft Teams Environment

Simplify365 Cleaner is the ultimate tool for maintaining and optimizing your Microsoft Teams environment. Designed for administrators and users alike, this app ensures your Teams workspace stays organized, efficient, and clutter-free.

Key Features:

1. **Problem Detection:**

- Simplify365 Cleaner scans your Teams environment for common issues and errors, helping you identify problems before they impact productivity.

2. **Comprehensive Solutions:**

- The app provides actionable solutions for detected errors, ensuring you can quickly and effectively resolve any issues.

3. **File Management:**

- Identify large files that may be taking up unnecessary space. Simplify365 Cleaner helps you locate and manage these files to optimize storage.

4. **Member and Owner Insights:**

- Get detailed information on team members, owners, and guests. Easily manage roles and permissions to ensure everyone has the right level of access.

5. **Guest Management:**

- Monitor guest activity and manage guest access to maintain security and compliance within your Teams environment.

6. **User-Friendly Interface:**

- The intuitive dashboard provides a clear overview of your Teams environment, making it easy to navigate and manage all aspects of your workspace.

7. **Regular Updates:**

- Stay ahead of potential issues with regular updates that keep Simplify365 Cleaner in line with the latest Microsoft Teams features and best practices.

Why Choose Simplify365 Cleaner?

- **Efficiency:** Save time by quickly identifying and resolving issues that could otherwise slow down your team's productivity.

- **Organization:** Keep your Teams environment neat and orderly by managing files, members, and activity levels effectively.

- **Security:** Ensure compliance and security by closely monitoring guest access and team member roles.

- **Ease of Use:** With a straightforward and user-friendly interface, Simplify365 Cleaner is accessible to users of all technical levels.

Get Started Today!

Don't let a cluttered Teams environment hinder your productivity. Simplify your Microsoft Teams management with Simplify365 Cleaner and experience a more organized, efficient, and secure workspace. Download the app now and take the first step towards a cleaner, more streamlined Teams experience!

Analysis and Informations are free. All tools inside the Simplify Cleaner to take action are included in the Pro License for which you can contact us

title: MeetUS
shortDescription: Enhance Corporate Banking Meetings' Efficiency and Productivity
Description:
MeetUS by EBITAUS is designed to elevate meeting management and efficiency with advanced features for financial institutions and corporate borrowers by integrating with Microsoft Teams. Why Choose MeetUS?

  • Simplify Scheduling: Managing numerous meetings and synchronizing agendas and timings becomes challenging when communication is limited to traditional methods.
  • Preserve Historical Records: Prevent the loss of crucial historical records of financial institution meetings or intra- and inter-organizational meetings during role transfers or employee exits.
  • Enhance Efficiency: Avoid the loss of valuable data, efficiency, time, and resources with MeetUS comprehensive meeting management solutions.
What MeetUs Does:
  • Streamlines Scheduling and Documentation: Simplifies the process of scheduling meetings, documenting every detail, and maintaining records for future reference.
  • Seamless Coordination: Offers seamless coordination of pre- and post-meeting processes through a single Application, providing structured data for financial institutions and corporate borrowers.
  • Efficient Collaboration: Facilitates convenient coordination with participants to track changes, assist in the editing and finalization of minutes of meetings, and ensure ease of agreement and consolidation through document merging among multiple attendees.
  • Customizable Features: Customise MeetUS to your organizational needs by incorporating customized features, ensuring flexibility and alignment with specific requirements.
Key Features
  • All-in-One Meeting App: Easily manage Agendas, Minutes of the meetings, supporting documents, recordings, attendance, and notifications regarding our additional features in a single interface.
  • End-to-end meeting solution: Manage your meetings effortlessly with additional assistance, covering everything from agendas to action items.
  • Automated Minutes of Meeting (MoM) Approval system: Streamline the approval process for Minutes of the meeting with automated workflows, ensuring efficient and timely approvals.
  • Hassle-Free Follow-Ups: Enjoy effortless follow-ups with a system-driven approach that keeps everything organized and in one place, eliminating the need for multiple communications.
  • Effortless Role Transfer: Facilitate efficient handovers by allowing new employees to seamlessly pick up where others left off, with centralized access to all meeting data and history.
  • Real-Time Alerts: Get instant alerts on task updates and follow-ups, keeping you informed and responsive.
Various Purposes of MeetUS by Ebitaus
  • Consortium meetings
  • Multiple Banking arrangement meetings
  • Joint Lenders Meetings
  • Banker’s Meeting
  • Committee of Creditors Meetings (COC)
  • Credit Committee meetings
  • Department or Regional wise meetings
  • Portfolio review meetings
  • And for many more meeting purposes

To connect with us, you may either email us at support.meetus@ebitaus.com or fill out the form, and we will get back to you shortly.

To use MeetUS App,your tenant admin must first approve MeetUS App by adding access policy to share meeting details with MeetUS. Please get in touch with your entity admin fo updating the access policy.

Redefine productivity with MeetUS! Make every meeting count and experience the future of corporate and banking meetings today!

title: Asset Log
shortDescription: Manage company assets right within Microsoft Teams, Outlook & Microsoft 365
Description:
Streamline how you track, manage, and assign assets. Whether you're a small team juggling a few devices or a large enterprise with a vast inventory of equipment, this app simplifies asset oversight, reduces administrative overhead, and enhances team productivity.

Asset Log was designed to work with Microsoft Teams, Outlook & Microsoft 365 and integrates seamlessly with your workflows.

Features:

- Track and manage devices, rooms, equipment, and any other assets critical to your company

- Easily assign assets to team members and keep track of their current assignees

- Simplify assignments with an intuitive ticketing system

title: Definitive Choice
shortDescription: Make great team decisions!
Description:
Do you need to facilitate team decisions?

While team meetings are excellent for discussions, and polls and voting serve well for straightforward decisions, complex decisions demand a more robust solution. Definitive Choice empowers your team to make complex multi-criteria decisions efficiently within Microsoft Teams, Outlook, Microsoft 365, via a web browser, or on a mobile app.

Easy to Use — Our step-by-step process and ready-to-use templates enable you to set up a decision, define the criteria, and select alternatives swiftly. Participants are promptly notified and can contribute their inputs without delay. Inputs are simplified to moving a slider, allowing you to easily gauge the importance of criteria or the impact of an alternative on your goals.

Powerful — Leveraging the premier algorithm in multi-criteria decision making, Definitive Choice transforms basic binary choices into an accurate decision model and prioritization of alternatives.

Flexible — You have control over the extent of input from your team. Assign different roles to team members and decide whether their inputs are considered.

Transparent — Decisions are documented and secured, providing a historical account of how and why decisions were made. Reports include visualizations and comprehensive underlying data.

Efficient — For recurrent decision-making needs, you can save time and ensure consistency by reusing existing decision models.

Confidence-Building — Involving team members in the decision-making process fosters confidence in the outcomes, as they understand the objectives and have contributed to achieving the goal.

Versatile Uses — Apply Definitive Choice across various business decisions, including:

• Hiring Decisions

• Product Features

• Task Prioritization

• Risk Analyses

• Purchasing

• Technology Alternatives Analyses

• Vendor Selections

...and many more

For assistance or to learn more about Definitive Choice, visit www.definitivechoice.com..

title: ShipIntel
shortDescription: A maritime solution based on high-quality AIS and other maritime data, AI, and industry knowledge
Description:
ShipIntel for Microsoft Teams

Are you involved in maritime business and want a collaborative maritime environment in Microsoft Teams?

While Microsoft provides versatile software solutions for various industries, ShipIntel offers specialized maritime extensions tailored for companies involved in maritime business.

ShipIntel is made for those who need to track vessels, monitor port activities, or make chartering decisions. It leverages high-quality maritime data, AI, and industry knowledge, and is built by shipping professionals. ShipIntel is seamlessly integrated with Microsoft 365 products and is offered through flexible and affordable subscriptions.

ShipIntel in Microsoft Teams

With ShipIntel and Microsoft Teams you can save time, work more efficiently, and stay aligned — in a solution built by people who understand the shipping industry.

Get notified in Microsoft Teams about vessel movements, port activity, and cargo statuses

  • Monitor vessels and ports, and get notified when vessels set a destination or when ShipIntel predicts a destination (including ETAs and ETDs), or when they arrive or depart.

  • Get alerts when vessels set and change speed, course, or status.

  • Be notified about changes in cargo status (open, in calculation, in negotiation, fixed on subs, or fully fixed).

Collaborate, follow team members' progress, and ensure everyone is aligned

  • Assign tasks, track progress, and share notes in real time to improve efficiency – all synced in ShipIntel and Microsoft Teams.

  • ShipIntel’s notification and notes system ensures that everyone is aware of changes and updates, reducing misunderstandings and promoting a collaborative environment where conflicts can be resolved quickly.

  • Get notified when a team member updates lists, adds documents, performs TCE calculations, or changes the status of a cargo or vessel.

Attach team resources like documents, notes and contacts to vessels, ports, and cargoes

  • Combine high-quality processed AIS data, enriched by other publicly available maritime data, and a sea route engine, with your proprietary data, for sharing business intelligence efficiently within teams, allowing you to make data-driven decisions.

  • Reduce the time switching between apps by integrating your Microsoft 365 features with ShipIntel maritime features (live and historical).

  • Attach your documents, folders, notes and contacts to vessels, ports and cargo.

Interested in ShipIntel? Learn more about our solutions or get in touch.

To use this app, users must have an active ShipIntel account

title: e2e-assure
shortDescription: Manage your Security Operations anytime, anywhere with e2e-assure
Description:
The e2e-assure app for Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office connects you to the e2e security analyst team, whenever and wherever you are. To use the app you need to have a service contract from e2e-assure.

The app has a wide range of functionality, including:

Delivery of security alerts that require your attention.

Enables the actioning and approving of security requests, such as ‘isolating machine’ or escalating incidents.

Set up ‘bridge calls’ to collaborate on incidents.

Requesting instant access to information, whether that’s on live or previous incidents.

View dashboards, showing the status of your security operations. (MDS customers are limited to the Microsoft Defender suite).

Update information rapidly, ensuring both e2e-assure and your team are up to date.

Manage requests, by approving or rejecting suggestions, adding notes and commentary.

Receive incident summaries to share internally, review live or retrospectively.

Providing a single pane of glass into your organisation’s security operations, through the Microsoft Teams interface you use daily. (MDS customers are limited to the Microsoft Defender suite).

Anytime, anywhere cooperation with the e2e-assure team, leading to reduced time to respond to alerts and incidents.

Access to the e2e-assure bot for instant updates on incidents and tickets.

Features include:

- Dashboard

- Summarisation of tickets, incidents and more

- Multi-featured Bot

- Easy and instant access to the information you need

- Live Incident management

- Reporting - Receive and review reports in a central location

- Notifications

- Talk with SOC Analysts live, through Microsoft Teams

The e2e-assure Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office app currently requires you to be an e2e-assure customer. This app utilises Cumulo, e2e’s SOC platform, to connect your security team to our security analysts and supports all our security monitoring services, including both Enterprise SOC and the Microsoft Defender Services.

title: Workflow byEcho.ai
shortDescription: Workflow byEcho.ai is revolutionizing the workplace by providing unified access to AI !
Description:
Workflow by byEcho.ai transforms how teams work by integrating cutting-edge AI technologies into Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. This app includes tools like ChatGPT, Leonardo AI, Eleven Labs, and advanced AI automation, making teams more efficient, collaborative, and innovative.

**Key Features**

- Seamless Integration: Integrate AI capabilities into Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365 without disrupting existing workflows.

- Advanced AI Automation: Use complex AI workflows and model-to-model interactions to automate intricate tasks, enhancing efficiency and accuracy.

- Traceability and Compliance: Track which AI performed each task to ensure transparency and compliance with industry standards.

**Unique Value Proposition**

Workflow by byEcho.ai offers a unified subscription model that brings together multiple AI technologies into one cohesive platform. This integration enhances productivity and fosters innovation by leveraging AI to solve everyday challenges.

**Capabilities and Scenarios**

- Enhanced Collaboration: Use ChatGPT for real-time communication and idea generation during team meetings.

- Creative Projects: Use Leonardo AI for image generation and editing to enhance visual content.

- Audio Narration: Use Eleven Labs' text-to-voice conversion for engaging audio narrations.

- Complex Workflow Automation: Chain multiple AI models together for seamless processes. For example, use ChatGPT for content ideas, Leonardo AI for visuals, and Eleven Labs for audio narrations.

**Customer Problem Resolution**

Workflow by byEcho.ai addresses workplace challenges like inefficient communication, data overload, and repetitive tasks. By integrating AI technologies and automating complex workflows, our app helps teams work smarter, enabling them to achieve more in less time.

**Key Benefits**

1. Increased Productivity: Automate tasks, allowing your team to focus on strategic initiatives.

2. Enhanced Collaboration: Foster a collaborative environment with AI-powered communication and idea generation.

3. Simplified Complexity: Streamline processes by leveraging model-to-model interactions.

4. Traceability: Maintain a clear record of AI-performed tasks, ensuring transparency and compliance.

**Requirements**

Users must have a subscription to Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Additionally, a byEcho.ai subscription is required to access the full suite of AI technologies and automation features.

To use this app, users must have an active Workflow account. Please [contact](mailto:support@byEcho.ai) our support team for more details.

**Conclusion**

Workflow by byEcho.ai is your all-in-one solution for integrating AI technologies into Microsoft Teams. By automating complex workflows and enhancing collaboration, our app enables teams to work more efficiently and creatively. Experience the future of work with Workflow by byEcho.ai.

**Contact Us**

If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact our support team at [support@byEcho.ai](mailto:support@byEcho.ai) or visit our website at [https://byecho.ai/#contact](https://byecho.ai/#contact). We are here to help you make the most of Workflow by byEcho.ai.

Description:

Please note: All content generated by our AI is provided for informational purposes only and may not always be accurate. We advise that you verify any AI-generated content before using it for critical decision-making. If you encounter any content that is inappropriate, harmful, or offensive, please use the in-app "Report Content" feature to alert our team or send an email to reportai@linkando.com. We are committed to reviewing and addressing any such issues promptly.

Benefits:

  • Standardize Your Sales Process: Ensure consistency across your team with centralized playbooks.

  • Increase Efficiency: Automate routine tasks and focus on closing deals.

  • Enhance Collaboration: Share insights and updates within Teams meetings.

Requirements:

  • Microsoft Teams account.

  • Account in Linkando organization with a pre-configured playbook. Ask your administrators for an invite, or contact us to create a new organization.

For support or more information, contact us here.

title: nBold
shortDescription: Pre-built teams, channels and sites with files, tasks, lists and governance
Description:
Empower Your teams with Seamless Collaboration and Governance Automation with nBold!

nBold helps organizations create, manage, and govern Microsoft Teams collaboration at scale through advanced templates, Planner automation, site provisioning, and governance policies — all fully integrated into Microsoft 365.

Key Features

  • Team Templates: Deploy pre-configured Teams with channels, tabs, apps, Planners, SharePoint sites, documents, tasks, and more — all ready to go.

  • Planner Templates: Standardize project and task management by creating and rolling out Planner boards and task templates automatically.

  • Site Provisioning: Automate the creation of SharePoint sites connected to Teams, complete with folders, documents, and permissions based on your templates.

  • Governance Automation: Enforce naming conventions, approval workflows, guest-access management, lifecycle policies (archiving, deletion), and other compliance requirements at scale.

  • 3rd-Party App Integration: Connect Salesforce or HubSpot to enhance collaboration on sales deals, key-account management, or customer projects. Connect any app via our Power Automate connector or APIs.

  • Microsoft 365 Copilot: Use nBold as an agent for Microsoft Copilot agent to quickly locate the right Teams and take actions such as archiving or deleting them.

Governance & Compliance Highlights

  • Lifecycle Management: Automatically archive or delete inactive or ownerless Teams.

  • Metadata Management: Capture custom metadata when provisioning new Teams and projects.

  • Approval Workflows: Control the creation of new Teams, channels, Planners, and SharePoint sites with approval flows.

  • Membership Management: Manage owners and members at scale by assigning the right people to every Team.

Why Choose nBold?

  • As simple as it is powerful: the world’s most advanced Microsoft Teams template engine — enterprise-grade governance and automation in a no-code experience.

  • Faster Collaboration Launch: Launch new collaboration workspaces in minutes, not hours.

  • Consistent Processes: Ensure every new project, department, or initiative follows your company’s best practices.

  • Enhanced Control: Avoid sprawl, maintain security, and improve user experience inside Microsoft Teams.

Get Started Today!

Install nBold from the Teams App Store and enable your 14-day trial.

Sign up: Get in touch

Get-started guide: Getting started

nBold works across Microsoft 365, Outlook, and Microsoft Teams.

nBold is the leading Collaboration Process Technology platform for Microsoft 365 users, trusted worldwide to scale and govern collaboration with ease.

Message.

【記事の作成】

・記事の編集画面では、書式設定、画像と表のサイズ変更、テキストの検索と置換、目次、Word 文書のインポートなど、一般的なワードプロセッサ機能を提供します。

・記事を公開したいユーザーやグループを設定した「カテゴリー」を作成することで、特定の部門やグループにのみ記事を公開することができます。

【記事の閲覧】

・記事一覧の表示形式は、タイル表示またはリスト表示から選択することができます。

・タイトルやタグ、投稿者名、公開日時などから記事を検索することができます。

・記事内の「既読にする」ボタンをクリックすることで、該当の記事が既読になります。


■Microsoft Teams通知機能

・記事を公開したタイミングでTeamsアクティビティへの通知を行います。


本製品を利用するには、弊社サービスに契約する必要があります。

ご利用の際は、弊社サポート窓口までお問い合わせください。

お問い合わせ窓口

Booking a free shared desk has never been easier, and with our app's integration with Microsoft 365, desk management is a seamless experience for everyone. Say goodbye to the hassle of managing desk availability and hello to a more organized and efficient workspace.
