title: Panopto for Microsoft Teams
shortDescription: Send Microsoft Teams meeting recordings to Panopto and view Panopto content
Description:
The Panopto integration allows you to save your Microsoft Teams meeting into Panopto, and also allows you to easily search, share, and view your Panopto videos without leaving Microsoft Teams, Outlook, or Microsoft 365.

Microsoft Teams meeting recordings in Panopto are easy to centralize, manage, and share along with your other video assets stored there. Panopto automatically creates a visual index of every meeting and enables accessibility features such as human-verified closed captioning.

Panopto optionally provides AI generated captions, summaries, and key points for customers with Access AI enabled. Utilize Microsoft's AI companion Copilot to search for Panopto videos, generate summaries, action points, or follow-up tasks from meeting recordings. Should any objectionable content arise, it can be reported by sending a message to support@panopto.com for review and action.

Additionally, you may now access your favorite Panopto features without leaving Microsoft Teams, Outlook, or Microsoft 365:

1. Browse and search your entire Panopto video library via the Panopto Home tab.

2. Create a new channel tab mapped to a Panopto folder.

3. Search and share your Panopto video from a Teams chat or channel post.

4. Select and present your Panopto video in a scheduled meeting.

5. Receive notifications when a new Panopto video is ready to view.

6. Search and discover relevant Panopto videos with Microsoft 365 Copilot

If you do not have a Panopto site, visit here to learn more.

title: ALVAO
shortDescription: Connect agents and users within one workspace with ALVAO Service Desk for Microsoft Teams.
Description:
ALVAO IT Service Management for Microsoft Teams

Automate routine processes, boost productivity, and focus on key projects.

Enhance Team Collaboration with ALVAO for Microsoft Teams

By integrating ALVAO with Microsoft Teams, you can enhance collaboration across departments, improve IT services, increase user satisfaction, and expedite ticket resolution with powerful features.




Key Features:

  • Create Tickets and Save Messages in Existing Tickets within Chat
    Agents can create tickets directly from messages received in Microsoft Teams and seamlessly save chat messages to existing tickets.

  • Look for Existing Tickets and Share Them in Chat
    Easily find and share relevant tickets in chat, providing context and insights for effective request resolution.

  • ALVAO Ticket Dashboard for Agents
    Manage tickets seamlessly with the integrated ticket dashboard in Microsoft Teams, without leaving the platform.

  • ALVAO Bot Support for Users and Agents
    The ALVAO Bot assists users with submitting tickets through the ALVAO Service Desk self-service portal within Microsoft Teams, reducing IT workload and streamlining user support.

The ALVAO bot helps users with:

  • Creating tickets in chat and selecting the appropriate IT service.

  • Finding solutions to issues by entering relevant keywords in chat, with the bot providing information from the ALVAO Service Desk knowledge base.

  • Receiving alerts about ticket status changes and incoming messages directly in the ALVAO bot chat.

Use ALVAO in Microsoft 365 Copilot.

Find and filter tickets by status or solver, e.g., “Find printer problem tickets in a solution status solved by Joe Doe.”



Note: Ensure your account is registered with ALVAO before using the app. For assistance with signing up, please contact us.

title: Surfy
shortDescription: Gérer, élaborez et connecter vos espaces et plans en toute simplicité.
Description:
Surfy : Révolutionner la Gestion de l'Environnement de Travail

Dans un monde où l'efficacité et la digitalisation des espaces de travail deviennent primordiales, Surfy émerge comme une solution avant-gardiste, transformant radicalement la manière dont les entreprises gèrent leur environnement de travail.

Cette plateforme innovante se présente comme un outil incontournable pour les organisations désireuses d'optimiser leurs espaces, d'améliorer la sécurité et de digitaliser la gestion de leurs bâtiments.

Surfy, en proposant une exploitation digitale des environnements de travail, répond aux besoins d'une variété d'utilisateurs au sein de l'entreprise, incluant les directions immobilières, les départements de facility management, les fonctions achats, ressources humaines, finances, ainsi que les responsables de la santé et de la sécurité. Cette large applicabilité démontre l'universalité et la flexibilité de Surfy en matière de gestion d'espace.

Surfy propose de digitaliser les plans des bâtiments pour faciliter la gestion de l'environnement de travail. Vous pouvez utiliser l'application Surfy pour gérer votre planning de présence, déclarer votre présence au bureau et réserver un espace de travail, ou alors indiquer que vous êtes en télétravail. Vous pouvez également voir quels collègues ont réservé un poste de travail sur le plan.

Ce qui distingue Surfy, c'est sa capacité à adapter les espaces de travail aux besoins changeants des entreprises, en tenant compte des nouveaux modes de travail comme le Flex Office. La plateforme facilite la recherche de places libres, la gestion des ratios d'occupation, et assure une répartition équitable des budgets grâce à une refacturation adaptée.

Les entreprises leaders internationaux, telles que STMicroelectronics, HEC, TotalEnergies, Sephora, Volkswagen, Danone, Suez, et Orange, font déjà confiance à Surfy pour l'exploitation de leur environnement de travail. Cette confiance traduit l'efficacité et la valeur ajoutée que Surfy apporte à ses clients.

En somme, Surfy se positionne comme un partenaire stratégique pour les entreprises en quête d'innovation dans la gestion de leur environnement de travail. Sa solution complète et modulable en fait un acteur clé dans le domaine de la digitalisation des espaces de travail, offrant ainsi une réponse concrète aux défis actuels des organisations.

L'application est disponible seulement dans les régions francophone.

Afin de pouvoir utiliser l'application Microsoft Teams de Surfy, la plateforme doit être configurée avec un premier bâtiment, pour cela merci de prendre contact avec nos équipes via https://www.surfy.pro/contact

title: Zoho Sign for Teams
shortDescription: Digital signature extension for Microsoft Teams - Send, sign, and manage documents
Description:
The Zoho Sign extension seamlessly integrates with Microsoft Teams to give you and your team complete access to all of Zoho Sign's features inside the Teams app.

This extension allows users to collaborate, set up workflows to sign documents or collect signatures, and efficiently manage signed documents. This streamlines your paperwork processes and adds the convenience of getting it done without leaving Microsoft Teams.

Key features:

  • Securely sign, send, and manage documents from within Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, and Outlook.

  • Receive personalized assistance from the Zoho Sign chatbot.

  • Sign up directly using your Microsoft 365 credentials and access the app using Microsoft single sign-on (SSO).

  • Import documents from OneDrive.

  • Save signed documents back to OneDrive.

  • Configure document signature workflows with multiple recipients in specific orders and roles.

  • Set up alerts to remind recipients to complete the signing and approval process.

  • Stay updated with real-time notifications for all document activity.

  • Create custom email templates to maintain a consistent brand identity.
    • of

  • Create SignForms for link-based self-service signing and share them with your teams to collect signatures.



Please note that a valid Zoho Sign account is required to use this extension. If you don't have one, you can sign up at https://www.zoho.com/sign.

Zoho Sign offers a freemium pricing model with flexible options across four plans: Free, Standard, Professional, and Enterprise. Paid plans start at just $10 per user per month (paid annually), and new users can enjoy a free 14-day trial across all plans to explore the various features and benefits.

For detailed pricing and feature comparisons, visit https://www.zoho.com/sign/pricing.html.

title: MOFFI
shortDescription: MOFFI facilitates flex-office and mobility for employees on a daily basis.
Description:
At MOFFI, our aim is to give every employee and every company the freedom to work better.

We make hybrid work management easy, thanks to a tailor-made web and mobile application. MOFFI adapts to all companies, whatever their size or sector of activity.

Our mission? To make your day-to-day work easier. How can we do this? By integrating us with your everyday tools, such as Microsoft Teams.

  • Visualize available spaces thanks to our mapping system.

  • Book your workstation.

  • Declare your teleworking days or half-days.

  • Book meeting rooms & confidentiality boxes.

  • Post your vacations.

  • Book a parking space

  • Book a slot in the cafeteria.

Consider MOFFI your new assistant! Use the following commands to:

  • where_is = see where my colleagues are

  • week = see my declarations this week

  • enable = activate notifications

  • disable = deactivate notifications

  • idea = share your ideas

Say goodbye to software multiplication and double data entry 👋

In short, MOFFI is THE flex office solution that enriches and simplifies your daily work life on Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365.

To use this application, users must have an active MOFFI account. Please contact ready@moffi.io for more information.

If you have any questions, please feel free to browse our FAQ or contact us by email at ready@moffi.io.

title: MAGIC
shortDescription: Analyze financial capital markets with a team of specialist AI agents.
Description:
MAGIC (Multi-Agent Generative Investment Copilots) is a team of specialist AI agents that collaborate, among themselves and with you, to analyze financial capital markets.

Team of AI agents:

- Analysts of major central banks (Federal Reserve, ECB, BOE, Bank of Japan)

- Quant analyst with access to the SigTech quant library and datalake

- Research analyst of user uploaded documents

- Web search

Use Cases:

- Research market news and events

- Analyze global macro economics and markets quantitatively and qualitatively

- Analyze statements, minutes and speeches by central banks

- Analyze user uploaded documents in PDF, Word, Excel, Powerpoint formats

- Use natural languages to write and execute code

- Build and backtest investment portfolios of equities, fixed-income, FX and commodities with spot, futures and options

- Create custom agents with custom instructions, styles and output

Our UX Approach:

- Human user plays the role of “research director” of the AI team

- AI agents collaborate autonomously

- All agent actions are recorded for audit and analysis

Getting started:

- In order to use this app, users must have an active “MAGIC” account. Please contact our support team support@sigtech.com for more details.

Using MAGIC:

- Please refer to our User Guide (https://guide.sigtech.com/v2/magic/) for more information about how to use MAGIC

title: Boards Lite
shortDescription: Increase productivity by bringing your tools together in one convenient dashboard.
Description:
Ichicraft Boards Lite is a personal workplace in the shape of handy dashboards. It offers a canvas that you can fill with configurable widgets, displaying up-to-date and personalized information to boost your productivity.

Ready-Made Templates for Your Digital Workplace

To get started quickly, Ichicraft Boards Lite provides you with ready-made dashboards for your digital workplace. You can choose from a variety of templates and customize them to fully fit your needs. Once you have selected a board template that most suits your workflow, you can use the Widget Library to add (and customize) widgets to your board.

Enhancing Your Board with Widgets

Widgets are mini-applications that can be added to your board. They perform specific functions or provide personalized information. You can tailor widgets to fit your needs by resizing, moving, and configuring them. As Ichicraft continues to invest in the product, more and better widgets will become available over time. Currently, you can pick from:

  • Upcoming meetings: Your upcoming meetings from Outlook

  • Inbox: Your e-mail inbox

  • Shared Inbox: Access a shared inbox

  • Microsoft Teams: View and navigate to the Microsoft Teams you've joined

  • Files: Access your files from OneDrive, SharePoint or Microsoft Teams

  • To Do Tasks: Manage your tasks from To Do

  • Planner Tasks: Complete your tasks from Planner

  • My favorites: Quickly get to your favorite webpage

  • Power BI: Add your favorite PowerBI tiles to your homepage

  • Tableau Reports: View Tableau reports

  • App Launcher: Launch your favorite applications right from your board

  • External feed: View external rss feeds

  • Embed: Embed anything as a widget

Boost Efficiency with Additional Boards

If you need more space to work with, you can easily add another board and customize it to your heart's content using the widget library's diverse selection of widgets.

Stay Productive on-the-go with Ichicraft Boards Lite

With Ichicraft Boards Lite, you can take your digital workspace with you wherever you go! It's fully optimized for mobile devices, making it easy to access and use on-the-go. Whether you're on the road or away from your desk, Ichicraft Boards Lite is your trusty companion.

Ichicraft Boards Lite Subscription

This Lite version comes with a 30-day free trial. To continue using Ichicraft Boards Lite, simply visit our website.

Ichicraft Boards Enterprise

If you're looking for more advanced features like integrating other systems, having control over the templates offered, or tailoring the digital workplace for multiple audiences, you can check out Ichicraft Boards Enterprise.

Are you keeping up with your organization’s recent changes?

Stay aligned with your company’s key change initiatives; access internal knowledge and external expertise; share intel and interact with your colleagues – do it all on Tigerhall.

Get all the information you need to deliver key business results in one place, at the right time, and in your flow of work.

title: InLoox
shortDescription: Access all important project information directly from Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Introducing InLoox for usage in Microsoft Teams: Your Project Management Powerhouse

Transform Microsoft Teams into a dynamic project management tool with InLoox. Designed to seamlessly integrate with your existing Teams interface, InLoox brings comprehensive project management capabilities right into your favorite communication tool. Whether you're a project manager, a team member, or a C-level executive, InLoox is tailored to streamline your workflows, enhance collaboration, and drive project success.

Key Features:

  • Project Planning: Visualize your projects with Gantt charts, mind maps, and Kanban boards, all within your Teams environment. Set milestones, dependencies, and deadlines with ease to keep your projects on track.

  • Task Management: Create, assign, and manage tasks directly from Teams. Track progress, set priorities, and update statuses to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

  • Time Tracking: Record time spent on tasks with the integrated time tracking feature. Generate detailed reports to analyze productivity and optimize resource allocation.

  • Document Management: Attach, share, and manage project-related documents directly within Teams. Keep all your important files in one accessible location, linked to the relevant tasks and projects.

  • Collaboration Tools: Enhance team collaboration with shared calendars, project spaces, and direct communication tools. Keep your team aligned and engaged, regardless of their location.

  • Budget and Expense Tracking: Monitor your project budgets and expenses in real-time. Make informed financial decisions with comprehensive budgeting tools and financial overviews.

Benefits for Various Users:

  • Project Managers: Gain a 360-degree view of your projects, streamline planning and execution, and deliver projects on time and within budget.

  • Team Members: Stay on top of your tasks, collaborate effectively with your teammates, and contribute to project success with greater visibility and clarity.

  • Executives and Stakeholders: Access real-time project insights, make data-driven decisions, and ensure strategic alignment across all projects.

Why Choose InLoox?

With InLoox, you're not just getting a project management tool; you're enhancing Teams with a powerful, intuitive solution designed to fit seamlessly into your daily workflow. InLoox is perfect for businesses of all sizes and industries looking to improve project delivery, increase productivity, and foster a collaborative work environment.

Ready to take Teams to the next level? Try InLoox for Teams today and experience the difference it can make in your project management processes. Join the thousands of users who have transformed Teams into a project management powerhouse with InLoox.

Subscription Required

To use InLoox in Microsoft Teams, a paid InLoox subscription is required.

Contact

If you need help getting started, would like to contact us, or to report inappropriate or offensive content, please contact us.

title: BeComm
shortDescription: Experience the end-to-end internal messaging experience with BeComm
Description:
Imagine a world where internal communication flows smoothly, and efficiently, where all members of your team receive information seamlessly in one place.

Experience the end-to-end internal messaging experience with BeComm. A solution developed within Microsoft Teams that allows you to administer and manage internal communications with people in your organization in a simple and agile way.

You'll enjoy an intuitive interface, instant and dynamic notifications, the ability to analyze the effectiveness of every communication sent, and much more.

Collect all the information to analyze, manage and optimize your communication!


Download our app today in Microsoft Teams, and take your team collaboration to the next level, either on Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365.


Note: This application requires that end users, the one receiving messages, have the receiving bot installed. You can find this bot in the FAQ section to download and as an IT Admin use any deployment tool to install that bot for end users. If you are not an IT Admin, please contact an organization IT Admin for assistance.


To get started with the application, please refer to the FAQ within the app, so you can enjoy BeComm.

Is BeComm functionality limited in the trial period?

No, trial version is fully functional.

What happens after the trial period?

Once the 30-day trial period is over (counted from the installation date), to continue enjoying the benefits of BeComm, you will need to subscribe to one of our subscription plans. The subscription will allow you to continue using BeComm.


For more information, please, fill outthis form


Need assistance or support during the trial period or after you sign up?

Our support team is always available to answer your questions, provide technical assistance and help you with anything you need. You can access our support section via the following link:


Support Link

title: SEFOS
shortDescription: Send encrypted messages to identified recipients and book meetings with identified participants.
Description:
SEFOS is a service that makes it easy to send secure messages and book meetings through Microsoft 365.

Send encrypted messages and meetings at the touch of a button and use strong authentication to log in to the service.

As a recipient it's as easy to decrypt the information as sending it.

SEFOS works in combination with various e-IDs and authentication methods and SEFOS can be used when addressing non-registered users also.

In order to use the service, please go to [get started](https://sefos.se/en/kom-igang/) and follow the steps on how to get started.

In order to use this app. Users must have an active SEFOS account.

title: CyberCoach
shortDescription: CyberCoach was built to make learning security and safety less annoying and more useful.
Description:
CyberCoach is an app that trains and supports employees to stay safe online at work and beyond work.

Today's internet can threaten not just our bank accounts, but our emotional well-being, physical and psychological safety, and even our democracy. CyberCoach is a way for responsible organizations to do more to protect their employees, customers and society.

We have woken to a new reality of cyber threats. Online security and privacy require more and more skills and resources.

CyberCoach equips employees with these important skills, as well as coaches them to protect others.

Learning practical security skills has never been this quick

CyberCoach training scenarios are realistic simulations of situations where employees need to take action. Scenario training is effective and memorable because employees receive concrete, immediate feedback to their actions. One training scenario takes only minutes to complete. No headphones or even laptop needed (with Microsoft Teams/Other platforms on mobile). 82 % of users say they actually learned something new with CyberCoach. Training scenarios cover both cyber security and data privacy, as well as regulations including GDPR, HIPAA and PCI DSS.

Individuals, not "end users"

It has never been more difficult for employees to keep themselves and their close ones safe as it is today. Cyber threats are constantly changing. The ways we can protect ourselves keep changing too. Parents are struggling to keep their children safe, and have both proactive and reactive age-appropriate conversations with their children about difficult cyber issues such as disinformation, juvenile cybercrime and online predators. It is not necessarily any easier to protect elderly family members or others in need of support. CyberCoach offers instant anonymous help in both work-related issues as well as personal issues ranging from safe online shopping to online bullying, fake profiles and romance scams.

Employee data privacy as top priority

Employees can safely and anonymously make mistakes in trainings and get help even with embarrassing off-work issues. Employees see all their data and are in full control of what is shared with others in the organization.

Admin Features

- Always provide training against latest threats

- Actionable Insights: Incidents & Awareness

- Develop & Measure Security Culture

- Social Impact: Coach employees to stay safe off work, respond to disinformation and support those they care about.

- One App for Employees for both Cybersecurity & Data Privacy: Covering regulations such as GDPR, HIPAA and PCI DSS

In order to use this app, you need to have an active CyberCoach account and subscription.

For signup and purchase visit: CyberCoach page

For help and support visit: CyberCoach Support page

title: Guests
shortDescription: Invite and manage guests in Microsoft Teams based on your company's governance & lifecycle policies.
Description:
Guests enables users to invite and self-manage external guest accounts in Microsoft Teams, following their company's

workflows and policies for secure and compliant invitation, collaboration, and condition-based removal. The app

includes the following features:

Features for guest invitation:

  • Invite different guest types based on predefined templates

  • Assign responsibility to the guest's point of contact

  • Send invitations to up to 20 guests simultaneously

  • Validate required guest information

  • Manage resource access permissions

  • Include a personal message and send a copy to an additional recipient.

  • Review guest details and settings before sending the invitation

  • Receive feedback on invitation success or failure

Features for guest management:

  • View guests under your responsibility

  • Search and access all guests in your organization

  • Monitor invitation status, host information, and compliance

  • Update guest details as needed

  • View group memberships and access rights

  • Transfer guest responsibility to another colleague within your organization

  • Resend invitations that have not been redeemed

  • Renew access for active guest accounts

  • Block or delete guest accounts

  • Get notified if guests require your attention

Start a free trial

  • Sign in as Microsoft 365 global administrator at Guests admin center

    to start your trial and test all features for 30 days for free.

Prerequisites

  • To use the app, your organization must have an active trial or a subscription.

  • Administrators must grant permissions to the app in the Guests admin center.

  • In order to invite guests, administrators must first set up templates and policies in the Guests admin center.

Get support

For more information or to contact our team, visit our documentation or use our

support and contact form.

Links

  • Guests admin center

  • Documentation

  • Support and contact form

Supported hubs

  • Microsoft Teams

  • Outlook

  • Microsoft 365

title: Skooler
shortDescription: Skooler integration for Microsoft Teams, Office or Outlook
Description:
This Skooler app allows teachers and students to get the full Skooler experience in Microsoft Teams, Office or Outlook. It contains a set of tabs that you can add to your teams to access relevant Skooler data. Collaborate on creating assignments, register absence or use the full Skooler solution without leaving Microsoft Teams, Office or Outlook.

In order to use this app, users must have an active Skooler account. New users will be able to onboard Skooler and define their role after signing in the first time.

Get Started

You can get more information on how to easily get started using Skooler by visiting the startup guide on our website.

Contact us

If you experience problems, we always recommend contacting your IT department first. That is in most cases the quickest way to get help where you are. But if you need to get in touch with Skooler, you can find information about that on our website.

Support and training

You can get in touch with our support team and find resources like videos and release notes by clicking this link. If you need training for your school or district, you can find good information about that by clicking this link.

title: Gaspardesk
shortDescription: Conversational AI to help companies auto-resolve their repetitive employee IT support requests.
Description:
Gaspardesk is your conversational AI and workflow automation platform that integrates on top of systems that companies already use and allows employees to manage and auto-resolve their IT support tickets and service requests without ever having to switch platforms.

With Gaspardesk's conversational AI capabilities users will be able to:

1. Get answers to their IT questions.

2. Resolve within a few seconds and without human involvement repetitive support requests.

3. Log and manage your tickets directly from Microsoft Teams.

4. Requests that need approval from a manager or an application owner are done in an automated way on Microsoft Teams.

Note: To use this app you will need a paid account with Gaspardesk which currently supports ticketing integrations with Atlassian's Jira Service Management, Jira Cloud and Freshservice.

You can get started [here](https://www.gaspardesk.com/).

title: EcoMatcher
shortDescription: Plant and gift trees—make a real impact!
Description:
The EcoMatcher App for Microsoft Teams empowers users to integrate tree planting into their daily work, fostering sustainability and engagement.

With EcoMatcher, you can:

  • Gift trees to colleagues for occasions like birthdays, welcomes, and appreciation.
  • Plant trees in regions where reforestation makes a meaningful difference.
  • Track trees in 3D, meet the planters, and explore your growing impact.
  • Calculate your carbon footprint and discover ways to reduce it.
  • Relax with ForestTime, a collection of calming forest videos.
The EcoMatcher App can also be customized to align with your brand.

Start your sustainable journey today—sign in to access all features. Learn more at https://teams.ecomatcher.com/

NEW: With the EcoMatcher Agent for Microsoft Copilot, you can ask anything about EcoMatcher and instantly get guidance on how to use EcoMatcher. From planting trees to gifting trees, the EcoMatcher Agent helps you navigate every feature with ease.

title: MiClient
shortDescription: Enable Sales Processes with unified CRM & Configure Price Quote (CPQ) Solution
Description:
MiClient sales platform allows business owners and sales leaders to automate and manage their entire sales cycle: from lead management - quote management - closing the deal.

An active two-way communication with their customers through our Virtual deal room, streamlines all the interactions and also helps managing the versions of the quotes in one centralized place. You can create your quotes with in-built template builder capabilities which improvises your customer experience and increases the chances of closing the deals. With the help of MiClient, sales people can create quotes with accuracy and send it to their prospects faster and quicker.

To summarize MiClient provides unified experience of CRM and CPQ for businesses by doing their real-time end-to-end sales activities at one place.

title: FrontStage
shortDescription: FrontStage TC is an agent/supervisor client app to connect to FrontStage Omni-channel Contact Centre
Description:
FrontStage TC is an agent and supervisor application that allows users of Microsoft Teams to connect natively to the FrontStage Omni-channel Contact Centre. The initial setup provides access to voice channels, which is crucial to any omni-channel customer care strategy. Additional channels can be individually added based on customised deployment.



The FrontStage TC connects to the FrontStage core platform and uses the complete Private Branch Exchange (PBX) capabilities provided by Teams. It is connected to the Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) using one of the Microsoft-approved methods (Calling Plan, Operator Connect, Direct Connect).



Along with the standard communications channels mentioned above, FrontStage offers a broad and innovative range of omni-channel contact centre functionalities. These include a unified omni-channel routing and intelligent queuing algorithm, predictive diallers, built-in contact and case management, quality management, co-browsing, native calls, a knowledge base and an API for integration with third-party applications. The complete FrontStage core platform can be deployed as an on-premise system or as a cloud service within Microsoft Azure.



To use FrontStage TC, you must have an active FrontStage account.



Click here for more information. For commercial requests and technical support, please access our support form.

title: ivCampus
shortDescription: A virtual office. Enabling social user experiences and adoption of Microsoft Teams valuable features
Description:
ivCAMPUS makes hybrid work

The virtual office for companies so that colleagues can work together again every day and support each other.

Made for a modern workforce enabling results one can't reach alone.

Knock the door of your colleague. Spend your break in a coffee kitchen for social exchange. Enjoy that your colleagues get used to stop sending messages once you're out of the office the evening. Enjoy the ease access to Microsoft Teams valuable features without many clicks or special knowledge. Benefit from spacial orientation to find people and information.

Click the ivCAMPUS icon whenever you work...

  • to be visible for your colleagues

  • to see what’s up in the office

  • the status of your closest team mates

  • currently running meetings

  • changes for quick checks

  • for spontaneous encounters like in the office

  • to navigate to specific rooms

Office-feeling for free

Features to create the office feeling - creating rooms and areas and getting in touch with colleagues - and three useful widgets (calendar, chat, email) in your personal room are for free.

How to

  • get started: Once the ivCAMPUS App is added by an Microsoft Teams Admin as App for your organization (quickly done and a one time effort) you can enter the virtual office with a single click without registration. The Microsoft Single-Sign-On feature of your organization will be automatically applied (visible in a pop-up window).

  • contact us and/or get help here.

title: Ruli App
shortDescription: Ruli handles legal intake and answers company FAQs.
Description: Ruli reimagines legal work. Ruli handles legal intake, answers team’s FAQs, automates legal review, and assists with research and drafting. We focus on an AI-first, human-intuitive design approach to seamlessly advance legal teams. In order to use this app, you need to have an active Ruli account and reach out to the Ruli team at contact@ruli.ai before installing the App. If you need more information, come across any objectionable AI-generated content, or have any questions at all, reach out to us at contact@ruli.ai. title: Dutify.AI
shortDescription: Transform voice meetings and chats into actionable tasks
Description:
Dutify enhances your Microsoft Teams meetings by turning conversations into actionable tasks. Our advanced AI suggests new tasks and updates to existing ones in real-time directly in Microsoft Teams and after the meeting in our hub.

AI-Generated Task Proposals: Automatically receive suggestions for new tasks based on live meeting discussions.

Real-Time Task Revisions: Get immediate updates and revisions to tasks as they are discussed during meetings.

Post-Meeting Analysis: Receive detailed summaries and analyses of tasks after meetings conclude on Dutify Hub (please note this is available on Dutify Hub, outside of Teams).

Natural Language Processing: Transform spoken language from calls into actionable task updates without manual input.

shortDescription: Instant access to ASL interpreters for Microsoft Teams meetings.

Designed for Deaf and Hard of Hearing participants and their colleagues, the app allows users to request a live ASL interpreter with just a few clicks, without the need for prior scheduling.

Request a live ASL interpreter from inside a Teams meeting

Interpreter joins the meeting to facilitate real-time communication

title: NPC
shortDescription: Enterprise productivity platform for banks and credit unions to streamline all branch operations
Description:
NPC – Productivity Platform for Banks & Credit Unions

NPC is a productivity platform built for the unique needs of banks and credit unions. It enables organizations to efficiently manage daily branch operations — all from within Microsoft Teams.

From frontline staff to branch managers, NPC brings structure, visibility, and automation into everyday workflows. Whether you're tracking tasks, completing inspections, or monitoring performance, NPC unifies these processes into a single, easy-to-use interface — improving operational efficiency and enhancing the in-branch experience.

🔍 Key Features & Capabilities

  • ✅ Task Management, Forms & Compliance: Create, assign, and track tasks. Use digital forms, checklists, and inspections to meet compliance standards efficiently.

  • 📆 Unified Branch Calendar & Notifications: See tasks and events at a glance. Stay informed with real-time alerts delivered through the Stream module.

  • 📈 Dashboards & Insights: Access actionable analytics to monitor branch performance, identify gaps, and optimize processes.

  • 🤖 Copilot AI Assistance: AI-driven assistance is part of our roadmap and will support smarter decisions and workflow optimization in future releases.

🔐 Built for Banks. Powered by Microsoft.

NPC is hosted on Microsoft Azure and integrates with Microsoft 365 to deliver secure, scalable, and compliant branch operations. Designed specifically for financial institutions, NPC ensures data protection and operational reliability.

This app requires an active NPC account for access. If your organization is not yet using NPC, please contact your administrator or visit our Getting Started page to learn more.

✨ Why NPC?

  • Streamlines daily operations and team collaboration

  • Reduces manual tasks through smart automation

  • Strengthens compliance and audit readiness

  • Boosts employee engagement through integrated workflows

  • Provides insights to continuously enhance performance

For implementation or operational support, please visit our Support section.

NPC is developed by Nextenture Inc. and is not a Microsoft product. It is an independent solution built to work seamlessly within the Microsoft Teams ecosystem.

Safe Spaces provides privacy-compliant collaboration across enterprise, community and home settings.   • Create a secure workspace for discussions and document exchange.

  • Send referrals to appropriate community-wide partners.

title: ESi-Tik
shortDescription: Effective booking experience with an Intelligent system to Optimize meeting spaces.
Description:
Let’s enjoy a new booking experience

Effective:

Instance booking via the user-friendly UI with a floor plan for actual room status. Schedule meeting with various filters (by facilities, capacity, availability, location …etc. ) to shortlist the best fit meeting space for you. Benefit as a Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office, you can book a meeting space from PC, from mobile, from anywhere, anytime without any restrictions.

Intelligent:

With IoT sensors*, the meeting spaces can manage their own meeting schedule. They will free themselves if nobody is in the rooms; if someone keeps staying in the room, they will extend their meeting schedule. Sometimes, they know who you are and personalize the room settings for you.

Optimize:

Admin can pre-set the meeting space policy, user policy to maximize the benefit of the whole company. Integration with Microsoft Teams Meeting* can further extend your meeting space beyond a physical room.

Key features:

Effective Booking Experience

• Book a room or view the status in anywhere

o Web-portal for PC, mobile

o Meeting Room Panel*

• Confirmation by email or SMS* or IM*

• Room filtering by

o Location

o Facilities

o Availability

o No. of attendee

Intelligent Booking

• Intelligent booking by IoT sensors*.

• Real-time response of the room occupancy

• Check-in, Checkout via Panel or IoT sensors*

Integration & Customization*

• IoT devices integration such as door lock control, lighting control

• Calendar Integration

• UC Platform Integration

• Custom User Database Integration

• Room Policy Management

(*Requires additional integration)

Benefit:

Solve no-shows

• To avoid unused rooms due to no-shows, the Auto-cancelling function will cancel the booking if no one check-in, and the room becomes available to others.

Increase room visibility and employee productivity

• Real-time room occupancy helps minimize over bookings, miscommunicated meeting locations, or wasted space.

Minimize booking steps

• Book a room in just a few clicks.

“You need to have an active account of ‘ESi-Tik' to use the app”

title: adenin
shortDescription: Connect your apps to a smart answer bot and easily monitor them on a dashboard
Description:
Easily connect our chatbot to your favorite business apps and monitor your work data

With the adenin chatbot you gain a smart assistant that's connected to all your workplace tools and can answer user questions ranging from "How much PTO allowance do I have?" to "Show me my open Jira cases". To get started, simply add the adenin app.

Features

✅ Choose from the App Directory to connect all your existing apps to a centralized smart assistant that can show you rich in-chat cards called Adaptive Cards. Popular example include Salesforce, ServiceNow, Hubspot, Github, Workday, Zendesk – or just create custom connectors to use with your own RSS Feeds or Webhooks

✅ Make your own Adaptive Cards from scratch, or by using built-in templates for businesses; including lists, notifications, forms and expanding sections

✅ Pin interesting Cards to your dashboard tab to keep them persistently visible and train your own chatbot that can retrieve Adaptive Cards for users based on natural language AI

✅ Delight and empower your employees with an award-winning digital workplace that is proven to improve workplace satisfaction by 17%, by helping to simplify your co-workers’ day and making them more productive

title: ShareFile
shortDescription: Securely share, receive, and save files using ShareFile integration in Outlook.
Description:
The ShareFile add-in is seamlessly integrated into your productivity tools and transforms collaboration, simplifies file sharing, and supercharges productivity.

SIMPLIFY FILE SHARING

Say goodbye to manual downloads and uploads – with just a few clicks; you can securely share from ShareFile and receive files in ShareFile, encrypt email and effortlessly save emails and attachments directly to ShareFile, all from your Outlook. Whether it's large documents, multimedia files, or important presentations, effortlessly include them in your work without worrying about attachment size limits.

SECURE COLLABORATION

Effortlessly collaborate with ShareFile add-in - You can grant specific permissions to recipients, ensuring secure and controlled access to shared files and folders. You can track document accesses and keep everyone on the same page by linking to the latest version of files.

WORK PRODUCTIVELY FROM ANYWHERE

Access the ShareFile add-in from any browser or device and access the most up-to-date information because ShareFile automatically syncs your files across devices.

REQUIREMENTS

This add-in requires a ShareFile account. Sign up for a free trial at https://www.sharefile.com/pricing.

Note: When an email contains an attached file link (requiring sign-in access), a request link (requiring sign-in access), or an encrypted email link, recipients are added at the time of sending, and users are alerted of any failures in adding recipients. In classic Outlook on Windows, users will be prompted to update access settings when sending such emails. Additionally, users will be alerted if they attempt to send an email with partial encryption.

ABOUT SHAREFILE

Join over a million users who have embraced ShareFile as their go-to solution for secure file sharing and content collaboration. Simplify your workflow, enhance collaboration and elevate your productivity with ShareFile.

appName: Exclaimer Cloud - Signatures for Outlook Feature
title: Exclaimer Cloud for Outlook
shortDescription: Outlook Add-In: Create and centrally manage professional email signatures for all users on M365
Description:
***This Web Add-in is an integral part of Exclaimer Cloud Signature Management Cloud and requires a paid subscription to this service to work. The service is managed organization-wide by your IT or Marketing Team and you need to be licensed to use the add-in. See details & pricing here***

Why choose Exclaimer Signature Management Cloud?

  • Centrally manage email signatures wherever you are.

  • Deliver your brand consistently every time.

  • Create large cost savings by reducing the load on current IT personnel.

  • Turns email signatures into a valuable marketing channel.


Features & Benefits

  • Automatic email signatures added to email sent from all mail clients and web-enabled devices.

  • Design signatures in a cutting-edge signature designer (requires no HTML skills to use).

  • Signatures are auto-populated with user details taken from your Azure AD.

  • See signatures as you type whether you are using a PC, Mac or mobile device.

  • Assign different signature templates for individual users or various groups/departments without additional rules.

  • Create separate signatures that appear directly under replies/forwarded emails, not at the bottom of an email chain.

  • Easily add additional content such as social media icons, user photos, display banners, and legal disclaimers.

  • Update any signature element and apply the changes instantly.

  • Apply display banners based on time-and-date for dynamic marketing campaigns.

  • Share access with anyone in your organization and assign admin or editor permissions.

  • Use custom attributes as a way to apply signatures.

  • Suppress unpopulated contact fields from the signature.


Security

  • ISO 27001 Certified and GDPR compliant.

  • Hosted within 12 load-balanced Microsoft Azure datacenters worldwide.

  • Multi-factor authentication system.

  • Situated in load balanced groups for reliability and scalability purposes.

  • Datacenter failover if an issue occurs at a regional datacenter.

  • Scales with increased number of tenants, maintaining reliability and uptime.

  • 24/5 technical support.

  • 24/7 monitoring services with real-time service alerts.

  • Fillable text boxes, dropdown lists, date and time pickers

  • Prefilled To, Cc, Bcc, and subject line

  • Images and attachments from SharePoint, OneDrive, and URL

Calendar event templates

  • Customizable templates for meetings and appointments

Signature templates

  • Support for custom HTML-based templates

  • Personalized attachments in mail merge campaigns

  • Trusted email campaigns sent from your Outlook mailbox

Safe and secure sharing

  • Secure sharing of templates and signatures across teams

  • Strong data privacy and security by design

  • Secure cloud-based templates storage

  • End-to-end encryption for teams

More about Shared Email Templates...

Centralize your law firm’s client communication with the MyCase Add-In for Outlook. Save essential email data to MyCase without leaving your Outlook inbox.

shortDescription: Confluence - Where Knowledge and Collaboration Thrive
Description:
Confluence is the dynamic, remote-friendly team workspace where knowledge and collaboration seamlessly converge. It's the ultimate hub for your team's collective wisdom and project brilliance. Whether you're creating, organizing, searching, or sharing content, Confluence empowers you to work harmoniously from anywhere on the globe.

Why Choose Confluence for Microsoft Teams

Elevate your collaboration game with the Confluence Cloud app, seamlessly blending conversation within Microsoft Teams with the collaborative prowess and adaptive organization of Confluence.

Discover a world of features and benefits that enhance your teamwork:

Access Information in a Flash:

  • Add Confluence pages as tabs to any channel, effortlessly view, edit, and comment on content right from Teams.

  • Customize Confluence notifications in Teams to stay in the loop about updates to pages and spaces you're connected to.

  • Search and share Confluence pages from the Teams chat messaging extension.

  • Adaptive link cards provide a quick overview of relevant page details.

Effortless Documentation and Sharing:

  • When notes are published to Confluence, meeting attendees are identified, notes are automatically formatted, and action items are seamlessly organized.

  • Instantly access shared meeting notes within the Teams chat using a post-meeting adaptive card.

Streamlined Organization:

  • Meeting notes are automatically sorted by time and date, creating a tidy 'Microsoft Teams Notes' page

    tree in Confluence.

More Productive meetings

  • Collaborate as a team with a Confluence notes panel right within your Teams meeting window.

  • Create, edit, and publish content to any Confluence space without leaving your Teams meeting.

  • Harness the power of Confluence macros to make notes more digestible and actionable, with options like action items, decisions, code snippets, mentions, tables, and more.

Unleash a seamless, interconnected flow of information within your team by merging the ultimate productivity hub, Teams, with Confluence, your remote-friendly team workspace.

What's New

  • Search for pages and effortlessly share them via email, right from Microsoft Outlook.

  • Retrieve and view Confluence pages using Microsoft 365 Copilot. Simply start by saying, 'Fetch Confluence pages updated by me'.

  • Supercharge your workflows with Atlassian Intelligence in Confluence. Take the help of AI to create content and get insights.

Availability

To harness the full potential of Confluence for Microsoft Teams, ensure you have an active Confluence account. Be sure to have your administrator enable the Confluence app for your Microsoft Teams account.

Add-in Capabilities

When this add-in is used, it

  • Can send data over the Internet.

  • This add-in can access personal information on the active message, such as phone numbers, postal addresses, or URLs. The add-in may send this data to a third-party service. Other items in your mailbox can’t be read or modified.

New to Confluence?

Sign up for free

Additional resources

Documentation

See all Atlassian + Microsoft Teams integrations

title: Templafy
shortDescription: Search, find and create on-brand documents and presentations from templates by using Templafy
Description:
Templafy is the smart way to manage, dynamically update, and share business document templates and brand assets throughout your organization. It's a solution that communications and compliance teams can control, IT can trust, and supports employees during every step of document creation.

To be able to use this app a Templafy account is required.

To allow this integration to function properly, please navigate to the following page as an Microsoft 365 administrator and grant consent on behalf of the organisation. The requested permissions are listed on the following page.

Grant Consent

The app provides a one-stop-portal to all approved company content which is typically filtered so each user only sees what they have permissions to see. It means less searching, and an easier way to find company templates and digital assets. For example, users no longer need to exit document creation applications to search for an image in the company's DAM system. Library provides a direct portal to content in Templafy and content stored in other company systems that are integrated with Templafy. Now made even more accessible with the Templafy messaging extension for Microsoft Teams. Within Microsoft Teams, users can manually activate a Templafy popup in their chat or channel, allowing them to search for and select document templates and digital assets directly, which can then be shared instantly in the chat.

Existing company content storage systems (DAM, DMS, CRM) can be connected through integrations with Templafy. Through the Templafy integration the Build module can be used, whereby the person creating the document is inserting content onto the page. The Build modules automate a great deal of this process, making it easier and faster. The content inserted is taken from company governed sources only – whether it's content stored in the company's Templafy or in another system that has been integrated with Templafy. Build automates business document creation with relevant filtered content based on the document context. By simply typing commands such as ‘Find the proposal presentation template in Templafy' or ‘I want to create a contract document with Templafy', users can prompt Microsoft 365 Copilot to search Templafy's library directly in the chat. Microsoft 365 Copilot then displays the search results in a user-friendly card format, allowing for the selection and generation of documents or presentations through Templafy's Composer without leaving the chat interface.

This integration ensures a seamless workflow by allowing users to generate and save documents or presentations directly within the Microsoft Teams environment, leveraging Templafy's Composer, thus enhancing productivity and streamlining document creation processes.

We are deeply committed to security and compliance. Even as you leverage the convenience of natural language commands, our system ensures every document adheres to your brand guidelines and compliance standards. This commitment extends to our latest features with Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 Copilot, where we provide a streamlined yet secure document creation process.

Administrators can easily configure the Templafy extension for Microsoft Teams, ensuring users are trained to use the keyword 'Templafy' when interacting with Microsoft 365 Copilot, simplifying the adoption of this powerful integration.

In order to use this app, you must have an active Templafy account and the Microsoft Teams App Connector must be installed. Please go here for more details.

title: Egnyte for Outlook
shortDescription: Use Egnyte from installed Outlook on your PC.
Description:
Easily share Egnyte files into your Outlook emails or save attachments and emails from incoming Outlook emails directly into an Egnyte folder, all without leaving your inbox.

With Egnyte, all your content is in one place, meaning you don’t have to keep searching for your files. Save files, and emails to a shared folder and they are automatically accessible to your co-workers, vendors or partners. Links are more secure, require no time to upload and save space in your inbox and sent messages folders. This is only available to Egnyte users.

title: Capsule for Outlook
shortDescription: Work smarter, directly from your inbox, with Capsule's powerful CRM and sales management tools.
Description:
Say goodbye to siloed systems that you have to switch between. Now, your CRM and inbox can work together, helping you action emails more quickly and bring context where you need it.

When to use Capsule for Outlook:

  • A new sales opportunity comes into your inbox. Send it to Capsule to make sure it enters your sales pipeline.

  • You need more context to personalize your emails. Use the Add-In to see details of existing contacts when you open an email.

  • Received important details in an email relating to a customer that your colleagues need access to? Store it in Capsule so that it’s recorded alongside the contact and everyone in your organization can see it.

With the Capsule Add-In for Outlook you can also:

  • Get started quickly with a CRM. Once you’re set up you can easily add contacts to Capsule.

  • Ensure your CRM is front of mind and make sure that information is consistently being added to it, so everyone is up to speed with customers.

  • Create cleaner and more consistent data, providing one version of the truth

  • Use the integration from your mobile

  • Have a complete record of interaction with customers stored in one place.

Setting up the integration is quick and easy, and delivers benefits straight away. But, if you need help to link the Outlook Add-in with your Capsule CRM account, just contact our friendly support team on support@capsulecrm.com and we’ll be happy to help you out.

About Capsule:

Capsule is an easy-to-use CRM that helps you build stronger customer relationships, make more sales and save time.

Compatibility:

  • Capsule for Outlook works with most versions of Outlook that allow add-ins for Office: Outlook Web App and Office 2016 for Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android.

  • Email storage requires your email account to included in your Microsoft 365 subscription

  • You must have a Capsule account and a Microsoft 365 Commercial subscription to use this add-in. On-premises Exchange Server is not supported.

  • If you do not have a Capsule account you can create one for free at www.capsulecrm.com

  • The add-in does not support Internet Explorer

title: AI Perfect Assistant for Outlook
shortDescription: The ULTIMATE AI Assistant for Outlook
Description:
AI Perfect Assistant boasts a comprehensive suite of features to help reduce time spent on mundane tasks

Fix your writing in one click with AI Perfect Assistant - a multitask AI tool that enhances you written content wherever you work.

AI Perfect Assistant for Outlook offers numerous content suggestions - including creating full-length email from a single line right in your Outlook workspace, improving email drafts, replying to messages, translating content, grammar and style checks - all that to bring your communications to a higher level, regardless of what you're working on.

AI Perfect Assistant is here to save your precious time and energy for things that really matter, instead of wrecking your brain over mundane writing tasks. AI Perfect is an irreplaceable helper for your Outlook workspace if you want to:

📝 Create full-text emails from a short draft

💌 Reply to messages instantly

✅ Fix your spelling and grammar

🌐 Translate foreign content

🤖 Come up with mailing ideas

▶️ Complete ideas effortlessly

✍️ Paraphrase or rewrite messages

📑 Compile persuasive copies

AI Perfect Assistant goes far beyond the simple proofreading and paraphrasing. With its smart and professional content suggestions, perfect writing style and rich toolkit - it empowers you to write with confidence and efficiency to speed up your communications wherever you work. AI Perfect Assistant's AI model is always at hand with creative ideas, top quality drafts, instant replies and many more to boost your writing. AI Perfect Assistant is a great alternative to Grammarly as it is integrated into Outlook, Microsoft Word, GMail, Chrome, PowerPoint, Microsoft Teams, and other Office 365 apps.

Check our website to see the full scope of features and integrations AI Perfect Assistant has to offer: https://perfectassistant.ai/

We are continuously adding new features to the add-in. In order to use this add-in users must have an active AI Perfect Assistant account, please mail [ilia@ipirozhenko.com](mailto:ilia@ipirozhenko.com) for more details (for getting the license key).

If you need more information, come across any objectionable AI-generated content, or have any questions at all, please reach out to us at [ilia@ipirozhenko.com](mailto:ilia@ipirozhenko.com).

title: LEAP for Outlook
shortDescription: LEAP for Outlook makes it easy to assign your emails and attachments to your matters in LEAP.
Description:
The LEAP add-in can save your email and attachments to your existing LEAP matters. Once pinned, it will display matter information for each saved email as you select it.

Requires a paid subscription to LEAP.

title: Vocal: Record voice notes & send audio mail in Outlook
shortDescription: Record your audio note and send voicemail messages in Outlook
Description:
Send voice mail in Outlook using this voice recorder extension.

One of the best ways to get your point across online today is via voice.

As asynchronous work is growing, it is becoming an important way to communicate and be more efficient. Your voice and tone can help a lot and it will help you build trust and strengthen your relationship with the people you are communicating with.

Vocal.email is here to make it easy for you to create voice notes and send those via email.

You can use this extension to record your voice and share your recordings over the Internet.

A single click is required to start the recording, so you can get going fast. Then, your recording can be listened to by your recipient, directly inside Outlook!

Every voice recording is is also turned into a beautiful web page that you can share anywhere. This makes it easy for your recipient to hear your voicemail even when they're using an email client that does not support the playing of mp3 attachments.

Vocal.email also makes it easy for you to connect custom microphones, so you can make sure you sound the best.

Email is just text and humans don't relate to it. Audio messages are much more personal and create a real connection with the listener.

Sending audio recordings per email is a real productivity improvement and a great way to share a personal message and communicate better. Tired of typing messages the whole day? Just send a voice message instead.

Our voice recordings can be listened to directly inside Outlook by your recipient without needing to open another app.

Get access to vocal.email and start being more unique in your online communication!

Key features:

- Easily send voice recordings

- Fast and simple

- Shareable link generated in seconds

- 10x your productivity

- Simple and fast

title: Toggles: Outlook Email Automation & Templates
shortDescription: Automate Outlook emails & templates. Save 80% time on repetitive tasks.
Description:
Email is essential, but it's often a huge time sink.

You're constantly swamped with repetitive tasks: writing the same emails,

attaching the same files, and sending the same follow-ups. This tedious work

steals valuable time that you could spend connecting with people, closing

deals, and building relationships.

At Toggles, we asked:

>What if Outlook email could work for you, not the other way

around?

>

That's why we created

Toggles: Outlook Email Automation & Templates. It's more

than just an add-in; it's like having a personal assistant directly in your

Outlook toolbar. Toggles understands your workflows, anticipates your needs,

and helps you get things done in a fraction of the time.

With Toggles, every email you send is perfectly crafted, consistent, and

sent with just a click. No more searching for templates, scrambling for

attachments, or worrying about compliance.

---

Why Use Toggles?

  • Save Time: Automate repetitive email tasks and save up

    to 80% of your time.

  • Ensure Consistency: Use shared templates and

    standardized workflows for professional, error-free communication across

    your team.

  • Enjoy Ease of Use: Manage everything with a simple,

    intuitive interface built directly into Outlook.

---

Key Features

  • Dynamic templates with variables for personalized emails.

  • Automated workflows for repetitive tasks, such as inserting subjects,

    templates, and attachments.

  • Tagging and search functionality to quickly find templates, workflows, or

    signatures.

  • Shared templates, workflows, and email signatures for team-wide consistency and compliance.

---

Example Use Case

Jessica, a customer support agent, uses Toggles to respond quickly and

professionally to customer inquiries:

  • ✓ Subject Line: Toggles automatically inserts a

    standardized subject (with variables), like "Support: Resolution for Case #12345."

  • ✓ Help Documents: The right troubleshooting guide is

    automatically attached.

  • ✓ Templates: An email template with fillable variables

    (e.g., customer name, issue summary) is inserted instantly.

  • ✓ Signature & Compliance: Her external signature and

    any required compliance messages are automatically added.

With Toggles, Jessica saves 80% of her time per email, handles more tickets

daily, and ensures every response is accurate, consistent, and professional.

---

Who Benefits Most?

Customer Support, HR, Sales, and more: If your role

involves sending a lot of emails, Toggles can help you automate your email

processes and spend more time on what truly matters—building relationships

and delivering results.

---

Get Started with Toggles

Ready to transform your Outlook email? Try Toggles for free!

  • Individuals: Enjoy a

    free 14-day trial of our Premium plan to experience all

    features.

  • Teams: Explore our solutions with a

    free 14-day trial of our Business Pro plan, designed for team

    email consistency and collaboration.

After your trial, choose the plan that best fits your needs. Visit our

website for detailed pricing information.

---

Need Help?

Visit

www.gettoggles.com/support

or email us at

support@gettoggles.com.

title: Phished - Report button
shortDescription: Easily report phishing emails to the Phished systems using an easy-to-use button.
Description:
The Phished report button can be used to report phishing simulations or actual threats to the Phished sytems. Reporters will receive immediate feedback on the status of their reported email and can be guided to act accordingly.

The feedback shown in the button can be changed on the application (https://app.phished.io)

title: Clipse
shortDescription: Instant scheduling across companies and calendar platforms without sacrificing privacy.
Description:
You, your clients, vendors, and all your external contacts have been blind to one another's availability. Until now.

How does it work?

Clipse gives you a list of available meeting times that work for everyone, right inside your meeting invitation.. Invite people outside your company to join you on Clipse, then just open a new invite, run Clipse, and pick one of the suggested times that represent common availability across the entire group.

Your private scheduling link

Want to allow non-Clipse users the ability to schedule meetings with you based on your availability? Clipse has that covered as well. Each user gets their own personalized scheduling link to share, embed in a website, or add to an email signature.

Clipse only stores your name and email address. All calls to your calendar are encrypted and done on the fly calling just your busy, free, or tentative time. No event details, no attachments, no passwords - none of it, is stored.

Pricing

We offer 3 tiers:

Individual - a free tier that lets you schedule up to 2 external Clipse users, and a personal scheduling link (upgrade to Professional is required to schedule with more than 2 other users)

Professional - $8 per month that lets you schedule with an unlimited number of Clipse users, and a personalized scheduling link

Organization - $10 per user, per month built for companies that have ongoing group scheduling needs with multiple vendors, clients, or partners

title: Core Fax (US)
shortDescription: Use the Core Fax app to securely send documents from Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Core Fax integration with Microsoft Teams lets users send faxes directly from Microsoft Teams in a secured and streamlined fashion. The Core Fax Microsoft Teams application eliminates mishandling of sensitive information by allowing users to manage document transmissions without leaving Microsoft Teams – so no printing or device switching.

OpenText™ Core Fax™ is an enterprise-grade digital fax solution offering businesses of all sizes the features and functionality they need to keep communications flowing. Core Fax solution provides complete encryption for faxes with centralized traceability for easier audits and optional zero retention settings to further ensure document protection. Core Fax enhances productivity, reduces costs and helps organizations comply the with highest security requirements.

Core Fax cloud account is required to use the Microsoft Teams Core Fax application.

Important: Core Fax has three Microsoft Teams apps. Make sure to select the appropriate version based on the location of your Core Fax account.

The domain corresponds to the region of your enterprise account:

* For xmedius.com – select Core Fax (US)

* For xmedius.ca – select Core Fax (CA)

* For xmedius.eu – select Core Fax (EMEA)

* For corefax.opentext.au – select Core Fax (AU)

To learn more about Core Fax, please visit our web site

title: Roam Meetings Add-In
shortDescription: Roam Meetings lets you schedule meetings in Roam directly from your calendar.
Description:
This add-in enables you to create Roam meeting links directly in Outlook. Upon doing so, your Outlook event is automatically updated to include your meeting link details.

The Roam Meetings Add-In requires an active Roam subscription to work.

title: Learn365
shortDescription: Bring learning where work happens with Learn365 app (formerly LMS365)
Description:
Deliver courses within a channel, access training and collaborate with your colleagues without leaving Microsoft Teams.

With the Learn365 app built for Microsoft Teams you can:

  • Access learning and skills development from familiar Microsoft applications
  • Employ AI to create courses with quizzes and learning modules in moments
  • Get personal training recommendations and start learning fast with the Learn365 chatbot
  • See an overview of learning and skills progress on the familiar Learn365 dashboard
  • Browse catalogs or use AI recommendations in Learn365 to discover relevant courses and training plans
  • Personalize learning journeys by targeting audiences or suggesting relevant training
  • Rely on a robust LMS that offers end-to-end learning management
  • Offer the entire learning experience, including learning management, within Teams
  • Pin courses in Teams chats or channel tabs to encourage collaboration on targeted learning topics
  • Enable conversations on pinned training between channel members
  • Track activity using ready-made Power BI dashboards and present advanced analytics with just a few clicks

Weaving your organizations' training into everyday interactions in Teams meetings, chats, and videos, the Learn365 app for Microsoft Teams provides a rich and flexible learning experience.

Deeply integrate learning into your organization by making it available anywhere, anytime, in the Learn365 app for Microsoft Teams.

The Learn365 app supports Microsoft 365 Copilot, Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365.

Copilot prompt examples:

  • Find training about languages in Learn365
  • Search for a course regarding languages in Learn365
  • Can you find training that refers to languages in Learn365?
  • Show training overview in Learn365 for Johanna
  • Show me my training overview in Learn365
  • I want to create a new course about GDPR

It's easy to find get started materials, helpful articles and other guidance for Learn365 in our Help Center. If there are any issues related to AI-generated content visit our Trust Center.

Note: Learn365 app for Microsoft Teams is a free add-on for Learn365 and requires Learn365 installed on your Microsoft 365 tenant - see details here.

title: Contacts by XPhone
shortDescription: Access your business contacts directly in Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Access all business contacts from ERP, CRM, etc. directly in Microsoft Teams.

  • Free text search across all connected databases of your business applications.

  • Flexible search by name, department, company, e-mail, telephone number, etc.

  • Start a Teams call with one click. Optionally, you can also call your contacts directly in Teams via a third-party application (a licensed Microsoft Teams telephony or a third-party telephony system configured as a Windows standard app for telephony is required for a call via the telephone network).

  • Save your favorites for quick access.

  • Access your contacts seamlessly across Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365.

  • For contact searches, your Teams client automatically connects to the associated OnPremise Directory server (included in the product and can be installed on a Windows system). The download package will be accessible during the ‘Try & Buy’ phase (see below)

You can test the app with sample contacts immediately after installation without any further requirements.

The application is fully localized in English, German, French, and Italian.

To be able to use this app with your business contacts, users need an active ‚Contacts By XPhone‘ subscription and your company must provide a configured directory server.

To proceed with 'Try & Buy' please click here

title: Seatsurfing
shortDescription: Desk sharing, room reservation, free seating, and co-working for enterprises.
Description:
Seatsurfing for Microsoft Teams brings flexible workspace management directly into your daily workflow. Perfect for hybrid and flexible work environments, this app seamlessly integrates desk booking, office planning, and team coordination into your Microsoft Teams experience.

A free Seatsurfing account is required which is available here.

Features

✨ Statistics

title: Verto 365
shortDescription: Verto 365 is your work management solution for Microsoft 365 and Copilot
Description:
Flexible Project Management, including team collaboration and productivity tools, directly from within Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Copilot.

Using Verto 365 within the Microsoft 365 platform allows you to streamline your day by managing all your project work within your chosen Microsoft tool, alongside related conversations, whether they are emails or Teams chats. Verto 365 can be used within Microsoft 365, Teams, and Outlook to help manage your day-to-day tasks, right through to tackling the end-to-end management of complex projects and programmes of work.

For individuals, project managers and those working in large project management offices, Verto 365 helps you manage what you do, directly from within Microsoft 365.

Verto 365 is the solution for:

  • Organising and managing all your work tasks

  • Implementing consistent processes for your project approach

  • Providing visibility of information across your whole team

  • Empowering teams to collaborate more efficiently

Get more with Copilot:

Contact Us

title: Coffee-Break - Crewting
shortDescription: Building Better Teams, Anywhere.
Description:
Crewting Coffee-Break is the ultimate solution to foster real connections within remote and hybrid teams. Our app empowers employees to easily engage in meaningful interactions - breaking down silos and enhancing team collaboration in a fun, effortless way. We go beyond simple matching by creating interactive, moderated experiences that drive genuine engagement.

Key Features:

🪄 AI-Powered Matching:

Smart pairing that connects employees across departments and locations, ensuring diverse, valuable interactions.

🎙️ Interactive Boosts:

Conversations don't stop at introductions - our interactive and highly personalized games, quizzes, and icebreakers keep things dynamic, so no more awkward silences.

⚙️ Customizable Group Size & Frequency:

Tailor the experience to your team's needs, from one-on-one chats to group discussions, weekly or monthly.

📅 Seamless Calendar Integration:

Effortless scheduling through Google Calendar, Outlook, and more.

🎲 Gamification:

Engage teams through challenges, making each interaction fun and rewarding.

🙌 Inclusive and Scalable:

title: MacroView Mail (EU)
shortDescription: Save email and attachments to SharePoint, Microsoft Teams and OneDrive
Description:
BENEFITS

MacroView Mail allows you to save emails and attachments to, or insert files as attachments from, SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, and OneDrive from Outlook on modern devices.

Metadata can also be captured automatically* as emails are saved to your chosen location, so users can view, organize and retrieve them easily.

FEATURES

  • Save up to 100 emails and attachments at a time using Outlook on the web, macOS or Windows

  • Save emails and attachments directly from your mobile device with native support for Outlook for iOS and Android

  • Save to SharePoint libraries, folders and document sets, Microsoft Teams channels and OneDrive

  • Save or insert attachments from Outlook for iOS, Android, Outlook on the web, macOS and Windows

  • Insert files from Microsoft Teams, SharePoint Online or OneDrive as attachments, links or PDFs

  • Browse SharePoint, Teams and OneDrive locations in an intuitive tree-view on desktop devices

  • Pin the app to Outlook for easy access on desktop devices

  • Efficient workflow to save emails with minimal user interaction compared to competing products

  • Find save locations using search or browse

  • Define Favorite locations or use automatically generated Recent locations

  • Rename emails and attachments before they are saved

  • Select from available content types in the selected SharePoint location

  • Capture custom metadata when saving attachments

  • Automatically capture email metadata such as To, CC, From, Subject, etc.*

  • Select different content types for an email and its attachment

  • Prevent duplicate emails being saved in the same location

  • Continue working in Outlook while emails are saved in the background

  • Saved emails are categorized with ‘Saved to SharePoint’ and the URL of the save location in Outlook

  • Optionally moves saved email from your Inbox to a nominated folder in Outlook

  • Dark mode support based on your Outlook/system theme

*: Requires the location to be configured with MacroView Email columns.

Learn more

Note: This add-in is hosted in EU data centers, where all data processing takes place. It connects to the US only for licensing purposes.

UPGRADE - ADDITIONAL FEATURES

  • The limit of 15 saves per 30 days is removed when saving to SharePoint, Teams, and OneDrive

  • Push Favorites - Automate the creation of favorites for users in your organization

  • Premium Support

  • Learn more about MacroViewMail and the benefits of email management

WORKS WHERE YOU DO

Save to SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams and OneDrive from:

  • Outlook for iOS (iPhone / iPad)

  • Outlook for Android

  • Outlook on the web (OWA)

  • macOS (Outlook 2016+, Microsoft 365)

  • Windows (Outlook 2019+, Microsoft 365)

Note: A Microsoft 365 SharePoint Online and Exchange Online account are required to use this add-in.

ABOUT US

MacroView delivers complete document life cycle solutions for Microsoft 365 from generation to document and email management, integrating SharePoint, Teams and OneDrive.

We have over 25 years of experience working with leading professional and financial services firms, all levels of government and corporations worldwide.

Our feature-rich products, enabling tools and dedicated specialists are well-placed to address your unique business requirements to further unlock the power of Microsoft 365 to increase user adoption and productivity.

Every day, thousands of business users think, work and collaborate using MacroView solutions across more than 70 countries and in over 30 languages in pursuit of our vision to drive the positive transformation of the digital workspace.

LEARN MORE

Contact Us: https://www.macroview365.com/contact-us

Support: https://support.macroview365.com/hc/en-us
