title: Search Assistant
shortDescription: Search data and manage list and document libraries easily
Description:
Search Assistant is a comprehensive Microsoft 365 application designed to help users refine searches for large lists or document libraries. This app allows users to select search and refinement fields, making searches easier and more efficient. Additionally, users can select fields they want to edit without needing to navigate to the original location. Users can also insert new data or files into lists or document libraries directly from the app.

Search Assistant is an App which Works on Microsoft 365 on the Web, Microsoft 365 for windows, Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft Teams

Key Features:

  • Search Assistant enhances the search capabilities across various repositories such as Microsoft SharePoint, Microsoft OneDrive, Microsoft Teams, personal emails and attachments, contracts, and sites.

  • Users can define and pin their working lists for direct access, streamlining the retrieval and management of necessary content.

  • The app integrates content from multiple environments into a single application, providing easy access to working content without the need to traverse to original locations.

  • By centralizing information retrieval, management, sharing, and collaboration within one interface, Search Assistant saves users time.

  • The app provides continuous document preview capabilities, ensuring users can always access and work with the content of interest.

  • The user can select its own search fields in order to simplify the search process.

  • The user can any time to navigate to original location either on Outlook if the result is an email or to document library and folder

  • Users can always update content types and metadata of the documents / list items (if they have the permission to do so).

  • Users can create shareable links for documents

  • Users can share their working lists or libraries directly from inside the app with other users from the same Teams-Channels

Search Assistant's key value lies in its ability to integrate content from multiple environments into a single application. This integration saves users time by centralizing information retrieval, management, sharing, and collaboration within one interface. Users can easily access their working content without the need to navigate to original locations, enhancing productivity and efficiency.



Search Assistant is an essential tool for users looking to streamline their search and content management processes across Microsoft 365 environments. With its robust features and user-friendly interface, it ensures that users can efficiently manage and access their content, saving time and enhancing productivity.

Contact Us

Help

Get Started

title: Sift
shortDescription: Find, discover, and connect with your organization's people
Description:
Rich and interactive org chart, profile, and instant search to foster connection and collaboration for your organization's people across Microsoft 365 apps such as Microsoft Teams and Outlook.

  • View extensive profiles of attendees during a Teams meeting

  • Quickly find others to collaborate with through Sift's integration to Copilot for Microsoft 365. Try asking Copilot something like "Sift search for someone skilled in PowerPoint"

  • Access Sift's dynamic profile pages, advanced org chart, and full employee directory right in Teams and Outlook

  • Use the command bar or message compose area to find profiles or perform people searches across dozens of attributes

  • Send Sift profiles or searches to others through adaptive preview cards

Getting Started

Sift is intended to be used by your entire organization, not individually. To get your company started with Sift, and view your company's full org chart and employee profiles within Microsoft 365, please purchase through the subscription link above.

To purchase Sift, click the subscription button above and you will receive an email with credentials to set up your account.

What is Sift?

Sift enables organizations to tap into the unlimited potential of their talent pool, rise to any challenge and realize the power of their people. Democratize people data and foster instant connections with the right experts.

As your organization grows, it can become harder for team members to know who their colleagues are, what they do, and how to connect with them. Sift is a powerfully simple people directory that links to rich, customizable profiles that go far beyond job titles. Get a full 360° view of each member of your organization:

  • Dynamic employee profiles that collect education, work history, skills and more

  • Integrates directly with your existing HR and IT data systems to ensure data accuracy

  • Intuitive search and filtering to find the experts you need faster

  • One system to connect your entire workforce, building bridges between silos

Sift brings data from your HCM, Identity Management, and other systems into one easy to use, easy to discover place for your end-users to leverage. Sift allows you to aggregate data from different systems in a single employee profile, ensuring the right data from the right systems is available for your people to use:

  • Prebuilt connectors for Azure Active Directory and an LDAP agent allow real-time connections with identity systems.

  • Robust and flexible SFTP workflows allow flexibility for any system integration.

  • Collect and update attributes like skills, experience, education, or cell phone number directly from your end-users via their Sift profiles.

  • It’s your data, use it! Put your aggregated people data to work in your internal systems via the Sift API.

  • Families of Companies can aggregate data from across disparate entities into a single employee directory, even if they are on separate HR, IT, and SSO systems.

Get Started

Learn More and Get Started Today

title: Wellness Coach
shortDescription: Boost well-being & engagement in Microsoft Teams with AI-powered wellness, recognition, and rewards.
Description:
Wellness Coach for Microsoft Teams, Office 365 & Outlook

Transform workplace well-being, recognition, and engagement—directly within your Microsoft tools.

At Wellness Coach, we seamlessly integrate with Microsoft Teams, Office 365, and Outlook to enhance employee well-being, recognition, and performance—helping organizations foster healthier, more engaged workplaces. Our AI-powered platform provides real-time data insights to drive well-being, reward achievements, and align recognition with business goals.

For HR Leaders: A Smarter Way to Boost Employee Well-Being & Productivity

With seamless integration into Microsoft 365, HR teams can:

✅ Improve Well-Being: Support employee wellness with personalized coaching, wellness challenges, EAP support, and on-demand resources—all accessible in Teams.

✅ Increase Engagement & Retention: Boost employee morale with a recognition & rewards system integrated into Microsoft Teams & Outlook, making it easy to celebrate achievements.

✅ Enhance Performance: Leverage AI-powered engagement insights within Microsoft Teams to drive participation, measure success, and align well-being with business objectives.

For Employees: Well-Being at Your Fingertips in Microsoft Teams

* Stay Active & Healthy: Track steps, nutrition, and mental wellness—right from your Office 365 suite.

* Earn Recognition & Rewards: Get celebrated for achieving wellness milestones through Microsoft Teams notifications and Outlook emails.

* Boost Performance & Growth: Develop healthier habits with AI-driven coaching and unlock personal and professional growth within the tools you already use.

Well-being should be easy and accessible. Now, with Wellness Coach integrated into Microsoft Teams, Office 365, and Outlook, prioritizing health and engagement has never been simpler.

*📌 Available Now in Microsoft Teams App Store – Start your journey to a healthier workplace today!

If you have any difficulties with setup or have suggestions to improve the app, please contact us at support@wellnesscoach.live

title: Infinity
shortDescription: Infinity integration lets you manage your telephony needs within Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Infinity by Infracom Communications AB for your telephony needs integrated in Microsoft Teams

Our solution is centered around Infinity, a cloud PBX by Infracom Communications AB, offering a comprehensive suite of communication features designed to facilitate both internal and external interactions. This app is meticulously crafted to provide an intuitive dashboard view, seamlessly integrating native Microsoft Teams functionalities, with company telephony queues, contact books, and essential call control features.

Key Features:

  • Our innovative Call journey feature, enabling real-time call information showing information about the caller, which route the call took through your system, length of queue time, forwarding call, and more.

  • A Dashboard designed to offer quick and efficient access to critical information, including user details, queue statuses, call history, and contact lists in relation to Microsoft Teams and our Infinity product.

Favourite Telephony Features:

  • Settings

  • Favourites

  • History / Interactions

  • Call forwarding

  • Logging in/out of queues

  • Queue statistics

Dependency:

  • This app supports PSTN dialing.

  • To use this app, users must have an active subscription to Infracom Communications AB services.

For further inquiries visit us here: Contact Us

title: GoBright
shortDescription: The user-friendly platform for Room, Desk & Visitor Management
Description:
GoBright for Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook and Microsoft 365 is part of the cloud-based GoBright platform. GoBright offers smart software solutions for room, desk and visitor management at the office that fit together perfectly and are easy to use. Find an available meeting room, desk or parking, book it in seconds and be assured of a workplace that fits your needs. Stimulates flexible and activity based working.

The office is the place where people want to collaborate on projects, where they want to meet partners and customers and where they want to be inspired. And you need suitable, varied (meeting) spaces to do so. Activity based, open spaced and flexible working are the future. The use of Smart Office technology is unavoidable in agile work environments and helps you gain insight into the use of all areas in the office. By applying technology in the workplace, you help employees work faster, better and smarter. Making them more productive and giving them more time to focus on what really matters. The GoBright platform is a good example of smart technology.

Read more about our products on our website www.gobright.com.

- You can only use GoBright if you have purchased a GoBright license for Room or Desk Booking.

- The device permission 'Media' is only used on the Microsoft Teams mobile application when you use QR-codes for making bookings.

title: MIRA
shortDescription: Mira is an AI tool that automates time capture for professionals, enhancing efficiency and accuracy.
Description: Mira is an advanced AI tool designed to revolutionize time capture for legal professionals. By automating the time-tracking process, Mira significantly enhances efficiency and accuracy in legal practices. This innovative tool leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence to seamlessly integrate with existing workflows, ensuring that every minute of billable work is accurately recorded without manual intervention. Mira's intelligent algorithms analyze various data sources to automatically capture time spent on different tasks. This not only reduces the administrative burden on legal professionals but also minimizes the risk of errors and omissions in time tracking. With Mira, legal teams can focus more on their core responsibilities, such as providing high-quality legal services to their clients, rather than getting bogged down by time-consuming administrative tasks. One of the standout features of Mira is its ability to provide detailed insights and analytics on time usage. Legal professionals can easily understand how their time is being spent, identify areas for improvement, and make data-driven decisions to optimize their productivity. Additionally, Mira's user-friendly interface ensures that even those with minimal technical expertise can easily navigate and utilize the tool to its full potential. The tool complies with industry standards and regulations, ensuring that all data is securely stored and transmitted. Legal professionals can have peace of mind knowing that their time-tracking data is safe and confidential. In summary, Mira is a game-changing AI tool that automates time capture for legal professionals, enhancing efficiency, accuracy, and productivity. By reducing administrative burdens and providing valuable insights, Mira empowers legal teams to deliver exceptional service to their clients while optimizing their own workflows. In order to use this app, you need to have an active account, please contact our support team for more details. If you wish to integration captured time entry with your billing system, or connecting to third party systems such as iManage Work to capture billable activities, additional configuration is required by Matteroom team, please contact us at support@matteroom.com.

title: factro
shortDescription: Verwalte Deine Aufgaben und Projekte mit factro in Microsoft Teams.
Description:
*Die factro-Integration in Microsoft Teams bietet eine nahtlose Integration zwischen Teams und factro.*

Du brauchst mit dieser einfachen Anwendung Teams in vielen Situationen also gar nicht verlassen, um mit factro zu arbeiten.

Verwalte Aufgaben, verfolge den Projektfortschritt, weise Aufgaben zu und bleibe über wichtige Updates auf dem Laufenden - alles direkt innerhalb der Teams-Oberfläche.

Dank der einfachen Handhabung und der reibungslosen Kommunikation zwischen den Plattformen kannst Du effizienter arbeiten und die Zusammenarbeit in Deinem Team verbessern.

*Features*

- Erstelle Aufgaben direkt aus Teams heraus

- Bearbeite Aufgaben, Pakete und Projekte

- Erhalte factro Benachrichtigungen direkt in Teams

- Verknüpfe Projekte mit Teams-Kanälen, um alle relevanten Informationen an einem Ort zu haben

- Lasse dir eine Vorschau für Links zu factro-Inhalten anzeigen

*Vorrausetzungen*

Um die factro-Integration nutzen zu können ist ein factro Account in einer factro Cloud mit gültiger Lizenz notwendig.

Wenn du noch keine factro Cloud besitzt kannst du [hier](https://www.factro.de/preise/) kostenlos eine erstellen.

*Unterstützte Clients*

- Microsoft Teams

- Outlook

- Microsoft 365

title: Vena for Microsoft Teams
shortDescription: Ask Vena Copilot for FP&A to create reports, analyze data and more—all within Microsoft Teams
Description:
Vena Copilot is Your AI-Powered FP&A Partner—Now Available in the Vena App

Vena Copilot for FP&A provides instantaneous planning and decision support in the natural flow of work, unlocking FP&A efficiency, influence and strategic impact.

And with the Vena app you can access Vena Copilot directly within Microsoft Teams, making it even easier to uncover insights and share them with your team.

Make it Easy for Everyone to Get the Insights and Reports They Need

  • Use a conversational AI interface to generate reports, analyze trends, run scenario simulations and more

  • Includes a pre-built library of prompts tailored for FP&A

  • Put FP&A expertise, capabilities and insights into the hands of budget owners

  • Free up your finance team to focus on strategic tasks instead of ad-hoc requests

Supercharging FP&A Workflows in Real Time

  • Access AI agents for reporting and analytics directly within Teams

  • Share insights, reports, and recommendations with your team

  • Collaborate in real-time with Excel Live and Vena's ad-hoc reporting tool

  • Bring Vena Copilot into meetings to answer questions and provide instant insights

Built With the Security, Privacy and Compliance of Microsoft Azure

  • Full transparency into how insights and answers are generated

  • Role-based access controls and prompt compliance management

  • User prompts and data inputs are not used to train public LLM models

In order to use this app, users must have an active Vena Copilot license. Please contact your Vena account owner for more details on activating a Vena Copilot license. Learn more about Vena at https://www.venasolutions.com/.

Contact us to raise a request with our support team if you come across any objectionable content generated by AI.

Additional Resources

How-To: Setting Up Vena for Microsoft Teams (IT Guide)

How-To: Using Vena Copilot for Microsoft Teams

shortDescription: Centralizes client WhatsApp and WeChat communication into a business communication portal

* Delight private clients and business owners who prefer to chat on WhatsApp and WeChat.

* Centralize messaging data to offer team-wide visibility of conversations and meet your data retention obligations.

shortDescription: Share your Project Gantt in Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365
Description:
Allocatus Viewer allows the entire project team to access the complete Microsoft Project schedule through Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, or Microsoft 365. Additional advantages include:

  • Early detection of scheduling conflicts: Allocatus Viewer makes scheduling and resource conflicts apparent to the whole team at an early stage.

  • Constant awareness of project status: With Allocatus Viewer, every team member has continuous visibility of the deadlines and tasks that pertain to them.

It's that straightforward:

  • As the project manager, you utilize Microsoft Project, while all other roles only require a Microsoft 365 account, with Microsoft Teams and Outlook being optional. The procedure is quite simple.

  • Publish the project plan: The project manager opens the project plan, for instance, via a .mpp file or Project Online, and then selects Publish from the Allocatus menu.

  • A unified Gantt chart for the entire team: Allocatus Viewer presents the complete project plan to all team members within Microsoft Teams, Outlook, or Microsoft 365.

Requirements:

To utilize the Allocatus Viewer app, each user must have an Allocatus Cloud subscription. Additionally, the project manager must download and install an Add-In for Microsoft Project to publish data to Allocatus Viewer.

Supermonday goes beyond a simple meeting management app; it's a tool for professionals to set up productive meetings and bolster social connections with peers.

Supermonday streamlines the scheduling process, eliminating the need for lengthy email threads and cumbersome calendar coordination to identify a suitable meeting time. This straightforward and accessible app simplifies the organization of meetings with minimal effort, automatically aligning participants' schedules and sending out tailored invites.

Supermonday offers a "well-being bubble" feature which includes 3-minute video clips aimed at improving work posture, stress management, or re-energizing before important meetings. :)

As a user, you benefit from the classic formula that simplifies scheduling meetings for groups, arranging many one-on-one sessions, and access to the well-being bubble.

shortDescription: A fixed assets management platform that manages physical assets and consumables.
Description:
A Simple and Customizable Asset Management and Tracking Platform


Seleam is a cloud-based platform designed to manage and track fixed assets, helping enterprises to streamline their asset management processes, optimize business operations, and minimize waste.


With Seleam, you can enjoy the following:


  • Fixed Assets Management: Full life cycle management of fixed assets, including check-in/out, tracking, transfer, auditing, and disposal. Bar-code asset tracking and auditing are supported to ensure accuracy and efficiency.

  • Consumable Management: Oversee of the entire inventory management process, including check-in/out, transfer, auditing, and real-time inventory tracking.

  • Procurement Management: Enjoy one-stop management for fixed asset purchase applications, purchase orders, receipt & payment, and check-in.

  • Software Management: Provide an efficient way to manage software register, applications, distribution, and maintenance etc.

For more information or any questions, please contact us at service@seleam.com

title: oneTeams
shortDescription: Erweitern Sie Microsoft 365 um die Telefoniefunktionen von Unicope
Description:
Mit den Telefoniefunktionen von "mobiles Festnetz" erweitern sie Microsoft Teams, Outlook und Microsoft 365 um klassische Sprachanrufe und Funktionen wie Weiterleiten von Gesprächen.

Bitte beachten Sie, dass Sie zusätzlich die Telefonielösung "mobiles Festnetz" für Desktop oder Mobilgeräte von der Firma UNICOPE GmbH benötigen.

Diese zusätzliche App entpricht dem Endgerät, führt dann die eigentlichen Gespräche und benötigt deshalb auch Mikrofon und Lautsprecher.

Damit können sie aus Microsoft Teams, Outlook und Microsoft 365 normale Sprachanrufe starten und annehmen, die über "mobiles Festnetz" geführt werden. Ins Fest- oder Mobilnetz, national wie international.

Sie rufen einfach Kollegen, Nummern innerhalb ihres Unternehmens oder Kunden außerhalb des Unternehmens.

Die Kontakte dafür kommen aus der umfangreichen Kontakt-Datenbank von unicope.

Zusätzlich wird auch der eigene Status abgeglichen. Sowohl ein Meeting innerhalb von Microsoft Team, Outlook und Microsoft 365 als auch ein bestehender Call ins Fest- oder Mobilnetz führt zu einem entsprechenden "Belegt-Status". Ihre Kollegen können daran erkennen, dass sie gerade nicht erreichbar sind.

In der Anrufliste sehen sie natürlich alle ihre über "mobiles Festnetz" geführten Gespräche, auch die von anderen Geräten.

Für die Nutzung von "oneTeams" benötigen sie einen aktiven Microsoft Teams Account innerhalb einer Organisation und die entsprechenden Berechtigungen. Kontaktieren Sie dafür Ihren Administrator oder [support@unicope.com](mailto:support@unicope.com).

Wenn Sie Interesse an unseren Produkten haben wenden Sie sich bitte an [sales@unicope.com](mailto:sales@unicope.com) oder kontaktieren Sie uns direkt unter [+43 5 06216-7200](tel:+435062167200)

title: Autopilot Accounts Payable AI
shortDescription: Optimize invoice management/Accounts Payable with AI in Microsoft Teams/Copilot.
Description:
Use Autopilot Accounts Payable AI to automate and optimize invoice management processes within Microsoft Teams and/or Copilot for Microsoft365.

Upload, assign, approve, and track supplier invoices through single-platform customized automated workflows.

  • AI-automated data extraction allows you to quickly and accurately send invoices for approval and payment.

  • Automated reminders and notifications tell you exactly which invoices are due, and when.

  • The Autopilot Accounts Payable bot in Microsoft Teams is there to help you with your daily tasks. Ask questions such as "Do I have any outstanding approval requests" or "What is the status of the supplier invoice".

  • Using Copilot for Microsoft365 you can get additional insight into your financial spend by asking questions such as "How much do I currently need to pay this supplier?" or "Provide me with a breakdown of all the current outstanding invoices"

Key Features:

  • Rapid set-up with enterprise-level configurability

  • Self-service configuration

  • Multi-channel invoice approval

  • Robust reporting and at-a-glance dashboards

  • AI-powered automatic data extraction

  • Integrates with existing financial and business systems

  • Action tasks in Microsoft Teams or Outlook

Getting Started

Download the app and try 10 invoice requests for free, then click here to purchase a subscription.

Help

Ask the Accounts Payable bot, included in the app, for assistance or email support@autopilotworkflows.com

Reporting inappropriate/incorrect content

The Autopilot Accounts Payable app relies on the use of AI services and responses may occasionally be inappropriate or incorrect.

Please report any inappropriate or incorrect content by emailing support@autopilotworkflows.com

title: Team Explorer
shortDescription: Explore Teams: Navigate, Join & Collaborate with Ease
Description:
"Team Explorer" is your essential app for enhancing your Microsoft Teams environment. With an intuitive navigation we offer you an overview of all available teams and insight into the teams you are already a member of.

Features:

  • Team Insights: Gain clear visibility into all teams within Teams, their goals and activities, and identify new collaboration opportunities. Apply for team membership with team owners.

  • Personalized Dashboard: Effortlessly manage your engagement with multiple teams through a centralized, user-friendly dashboard that provides direct access to all teams you are part of.

  • Optimal Use of Teams: Collaboration goes beyond just sharing documents and attending meetings. As an organization, you share rules and behavioral norms for using Teams directly through this app to ensure productive and respectful communication with each other.

Discover and Connect Effortlessly:

"Team Explorer" is a practical enhancement for your Teams experience. It's uniquely designed to fill a crucial gap in the standard functionality of Teams, offering features that elevate your efficiency and connectivity within your workspace. With "Team Explorer," you gain:

  • Discovery of Private Teams: Go beyond the standard Teams capabilities by discovering private teams within your organization. This feature lets you uncover teams you might not have known, presenting new opportunities for collaboration and connection.

  • Request to Join: After finding new teams, easily send requests to join them. This streamlined process enables you to become a part of diverse groups and projects quickly, enhancing your engagement and contribution to the organization.

  • Comprehensive Overview: Get a holistic view of all teams in your organization, including those you're already a member of. This complete overview empowers you to manage your team memberships more dynamically. As a result, your memberships are always up-to-date and relevant, ensuring your Teams environment remains organized.

Improve on the Teams user experience with "Team Explorer".

Do you need information or any help to get started? Feel free to reach out to https://www.inspark.nl/contact/

"Team Explorer" is developed for Microsoft 365 and Teams.

title: CloudTalk
shortDescription: Boost productivity and streamline operations by integrating CloudTalk’s advanced call center feature
Description:
Improve productivity and optimize operations with CloudTalk for Microsoft Teams

With the CloudTalk for Microsoft Teams add-in, seamlessly integrate advanced call center functionalities directly into your Teams environment.

This integration combines CloudTalk’s top-tier call center performance with the flexibility and depth of Microsoft Teams, enhancing both your customer and agent experiences.

- Effortless Setup: Get started quickly with minimal effort.

- Real-Time Status Sync: Keep agent statuses synchronized in real-time between CloudTalk and Microsoft Teams, ensuring seamless communication and collaboration.

- Caller ID Flexibility: Customize your caller ID on outbound calls with options like anonymous calls, selecting from a dropdown of outbound numbers, or automatic outbound number assignment.

- Comprehensive Call History: Automatically log all interactions with detailed call history, including recordings, call notes, and tags, for complete documentation.

- AI-Powered Conversation Insights: Enhance customer interactions with AI conversation intelligence that help improve the quality of your communications and drive better outcomes. Conversation Intelligence add-on required. Content is generated through AI analysis of recorded conversations. If you encounter any inappropriate content, please report it to us by emailing support@cloudtalk.io.

- Advanced Contact Management: Easily access, manage, and create internal and external contacts directly within the platform.

- Dark Mode: Reduce eye strain and improve user experience with a sleek dark mode option.

CloudTalk is a paid service, and installation of the native CloudTalk app is required for full functionality. Some features may depend on specific account types and licenses.

Visit https://www.cloudtalk.io/pricing/ for more information.

shortDescription: Class - The next generation virtual classroom.
Description:
With Class, you can drive active learning, collaboration, and engagement in online classes and virtual instructor-led training.

From your Class tab, you can:

  • Create and Manage Class Settings, Schedules and Participants. From within the Class tab, you can quickly access Today’s Classes or look at the full Class Schedule.

  • Easily Join a Class with the click of a button. Class harnesses and extends the scalability of the Microsoft Teams trusted video conferencing platform to provide a unique set of tools and analytics that transform the virtual learning experience.

title: KrispCall
shortDescription: KrispCall is a Cloud Telephony for modern business for both small & large businesses.
Description:
KrispCall is a cloud telephony system for modern businesses, offering advanced features for high-growth startups and modern enterprises.

With KrispCall, you can instantly get toll-free, local, mobile, and national phone numbers in over 100 countries. You can make calls, track and listen to call recordings, integrate with CRM software, set up a multi-location call center for sales and support in the cloud, and more.

Using KrispCall, businesses can quickly and easily enter new markets and provide customers with a better experience, without needing to invest in costly physical infrastructure. It is an affordable and efficient solution that allows firms to expand their operations and improve customer engagement.

KrispCall provides enterprise-grade capabilities on an accessible platform to any organization. Whether you're a startup trying to get more customers or a distributed organization trying to connect multiple systems, this is the perfect solution for you.

KrispCall seamlessly integrates with Microsoft Teams, enabling click-to-call functionality directly from the Teams interface. Automatic call logs synchronize with Teams, ensuring all communication records are centralized and easily accessible. This integration streamlines workflows and enhances collaboration within your organization.

This integration also works with Outlook and other Microsoft 365 clients.

In order to use this app, users must have an active KrispCall account. Please contact our support team for more details.

Get started with KrispCall by visiting our home page or sign up directly. You can also reach out to our support team by clicking the chat bubble on the bottom right anywhere on our website.

title: DMS Next
shortDescription: Effortlessly manage, store & collaborate on your business files in Microsoft 365
Description:
BENEFITS

MacroView DMS Next integrates with Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams and Outlook, providing easy access to all your SharePoint, Teams and OneDrive files in one intuitive file explorer.

It combines the powerful document management and collaboration features of Microsoft SharePoint with the enhanced usability and intelligent automation of MacroView, empowering users to spend less time managing files and more time focusing on higher-priority tasks.

Simple drag-and-drop functionality, intuitive tree view navigation and built-in search make DMS Next feel instantly familiar and easy to use.

FEATURES

  • Tree view navigation of SharePoint, Teams, and OneDrive for easy file management.

  • Drag-and-drop functionality to quickly save documents and emails to SharePoint, Teams and OneDrive.

  • Automated provisioning to create new SharePoint document libraries with pre-configured columns and content types to capture document and email metadata.

  • Search and filter files based on keywords, file type, and metadata for fast retrieval.

  • Share files from SharePoint, Teams, and OneDrive directly to Teams chats or channels, and copy links to share in email.

  • Access recent locations and bookmark favourite areas for quick navigation.

  • Fast file preview to quickly view files before opening or sharing.

  • Seamless integration with Microsoft 365, Teams and Outlook, accessible across all desktop, mobile, and web platforms where they're supported.

  • Supports file open preferences (open in app, browser, or preview) for flexible file management.

  • Easy to deploy, implement and use.

WORKS WHERE YOU DO

Access DMS Next directly in Microsoft 365, Teams and Outlook (new and classic) using:

  • Microsoft Windows

  • MacOS

  • Web

  • iOS

  • Android

Note: A Microsoft 365 SharePoint Online account is required to use this app.

ABOUT US

MacroView delivers complete document life cycle solutions for Microsoft 365 from generation to document and email management, integrating SharePoint, Teams and OneDrive.

We have over 25 years of experience working with leading professional and financial services firms, all levels of government and corporations worldwide.

Our feature-rich products, enabling tools and dedicated specialists are well-placed to address your unique business requirements to further unlock the power of Microsoft 365 to increase user adoption and productivity.

Every day, thousands of business users think, work and collaborate using MacroView solutions across more than 70 countries and in over 30 languages in pursuit of our vision to drive the positive transformation of the digital workspace.

LEARN MORE

Contact Us: https://www.macroview365.com/contact-us

Support: https://support.macroview365.com/hc/en-us

title: SMS Calendar Reminders
shortDescription: Reduce appointment no-shows by sending automated text message reminders
Description:
🔥 Already installed in 120,000+ Calendars, the Remind1 app is now available for Outlook / Microsoft Teams calendars and Microsoft 365.

❓ Why send SMS reminders?

SMS reminders are a highly effective way to reduce appointment no-shows by up to 90%. Additionally, it's a part of great customer communication.



❓ Why use the Remind1 app?

Our app requires no additional effort from your side, as it's directly integrated with your Outlook / Teams calendar. Phone numbers are automatically extracted from your existing events to send reminders based on your preferences.



❤️ Some of our most loved features:

• Set message text, time and sender ID of the SMS reminder

• Include a link to your branded appointment page where clients can...

→ Confirm or cancel appointments (you can see the status in your calendar or be notified)

→ contact you by phone

→ see appointment time, date and additional information (free text)

→ join video conferences (works with most video conferencing providers)

→ see your address and start navigation (supports dynamic addresses from the calendar event location for on-site appointments)

💳 Starts from $9/month with free trial (no credit card required).

✅ Works great with scheduling tools like Microsoft Bookings and Calendly.

✅ No matter if you're a busy professional, small business / SME or large enterprise.

✅ GDPR compliant and supports 90+ countries.

Some countries have local regulations regarding the sender ID which you can find here: https://my.remind1.com/countries

Sign up: https://remind1.com

Get started & help: https://my.remind1.com/quick-start

Contact us: support@remind1.com

title: eSIM Copilot
shortDescription: Effortlessly order and manage eSIM with your own personal mobile connectivity assistant.
Description:
eSIM Copilot is a smart mobile connectivity assistant that helps you manage and distribute eSIMs, all from within Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, and Outlook.

Connect to mobile networks in minutes, order mobile plans and get instant support.

From managing multiple mobile connectivity plans to guiding employees through installing an eSIM, eSIM Copilot makes it easy.

eSIM Copilot uses AI trained specifically to provide users with tailored support for their mobile services. It helps get answers to general questions about eSIM, working with eSIMs in mobile devices as well as discover and select the most suitable mobile plans your needs.

Order local mobile plans for your next business trip to use alongside your existing SIM and avoid expensive roaming charges and poor data speeds.

Setting up is simple and secure — with no separate logins required. eSIMs are securely delivered via email and are accessible from within Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365. No postage required!

Interested in deploying eSIM Copilot across your business? eSIM Copilot can help you manage mobile expenses and assign your employees to the correct billing account based on their job title, department or location.

Having trouble with your mobile? Whether ordering a plan, troubleshooting, or setting up eSIM on a device, eSIM Copilot support is always a question away in the Teams chat.

To use eSIM Copilot, you or your business must have an account. You can register at https://www.esimcopilot.com or gain access through your businesses existing eSIM Copilot account.

Get started with eSIM Copilot today to change how you manage your mobile connectivity!

For further assistance, please contact us at hello@esimcopilot.com

title: Yablo
shortDescription: The AI-first customer service platform - right inside Microsoft Teams
Description:
Yablo puts all your customer conversations — email, chat, WhatsApp, and more — directly into Microsoft Teams, so your team can collaborate, respond, and resolve inquiries faster. Use built-in AI to prioritize messages, summarize conversations, and automate repetitive tasks.

Amazing service starts with amazing teamwork

Collaborate seamlessly in Microsoft Teams: loop in colleagues with @mentions, assign owners, and manage handoffs without switching tools. Yablo makes teamwork effortless — no more forwarding emails or juggling external help desk systems.

All your service channels in one place

Manage every channel — email, live chat, WhatsApp, and more — from a shared inbox inside Microsoft Teams. Keep conversations organized, visible, and actionable without switching tabs or tools.

Yablo Genius: AI that works for you

Yablo Genius uses AI to automate the busywork: routing messages to the right team members, settings priorities, tagging conversations, assigning deadlines, and generating instant summaries.

Actionable insights

Track team performance, customer satisfaction, and workload with real-time analytics — all inside Microsoft Teams. Yablo gives you actionable insights to spot trends, optimize workflows, and improve service quality.

Seamless integration

Yablo integrates seamlessly with Microsoft Teams and Outlook, letting your team collaborate right where they already work — no extra tools, no switching platforms.

Get started today — add Yablo to Microsoft Teams and unify your customer conversations.

Learn more

Want to see Yablo in action? Check out our library of video guides covering setup, features, and tips: Explore Yablo Video Guides.

If you see objectionable content, please let us know.

title: WOX
shortDescription: Hybrid Work with easy-to-use tool, including Room and Desk Booking
Description:
WOX is a complete solution for Hybrid Workplace Management, including Meeting Room Booking, Desk Booking, and more.

Features of WOX include:

1. Meeting Room Booking:

- Book rooms on interactive maps

- View room status

2. Desk Booking:

- Book desks on Interactive Floor Map

- View desk status and where colleague sits

Employees using WOX for Microsoft Teams can schedule their hybrid work plan and book desks or rooms using interactive maps.

title: Presence by Enable 365
shortDescription: Solve flexible work challenges with improved visibility and statistics on staff presence.
Description:
Presence by Enable 365 is your go-to solution for managing hybrid work environments, seamlessly integrating with Microsoft Teams and Outlook to streamline workforce coordination.

Designed to meet the needs of modern workplaces, Presence offers visibility into employee locations, facilitates resource planning, and simplifies the vacation management and approval process. Whether your team is remote, in-office, or working flexibly, Presence ensures that everyone is better connected and informed, driving productivity and collaboration across your organization.

Getting Started

  1. Go to the Team and Channel where you would like to have the app as a tab app.

  2. Click the '+' button to add the app.

  3. Search for and select Presence by Enable 365.

  4. Select Start 30-day Free Trial to try out the app. No Creditcard required.

Key Features

  • Work Location Registration: Easily register your work location, whether you are in the office, working remotely, or on leave. Presence provides a clear overview for both employees and managers to know where everyone is working.

  • Statistics: Presence generates valuable statistics on work locations and resource utilization, helping management and HR make data-driven decisions. Analyze trends to optimize hybrid work policies and resource planning.

  • Integrated Approval Process: Streamline your annual leave and work location approvals.

  • Visibility of Employee Locations: At-a-glance overview of your colleagues' work location to collaborate efficiently.

  • Outlook Sync: Presence syncs effortlessly with Outlook, allowing users to manage their registrations in one place and without double work. This integration reduces the administrative burden and ensures your calendar is always up to date.

  • Vacation Planning and Approval: Say goodbye to time-consuming spreadsheets. Presence simplifies vacation planning with an intuitive interface that tracks and approves leave requests, ensuring that all plans are transparent and efficiently managed.

Customer Benefits

  • Efficient Workforce Coordination: Presence helps you know where your team members are working and plan accordingly, leading to better collaboration and efficient use of resources.

  • Streamlined Processes: Automate and simplify the registration and approval processes, saving time and reducing errors associated with manual tracking and approvals.

  • Enhanced Flexibility and Control: Provide your team with the flexibility they need while maintaining oversight and control. Presence ensures that even in a hybrid work environment, everyone stays aligned and engaged.

  • Data-Driven Decision Making: Leverage the comprehensive statistics and reports generated by Presence to make informed decisions about workforce management, ensuring fairness and policy compliance.

Who Should Use Presence? Presence is ideal for organizations managing a hybrid workforce, especially those seeking to improve visibility, streamline processes, and optimize resource utilization. HR managers, team leaders, and employees will find Presence invaluable for maintaining productivity and ensuring smooth operations in any work setting.

How to buy - Take one of these steps to purchase:

  • Select Buy Subscription in Microsoft Teams to purchase with creditcard or

  • Click here to buy with Microsoft Azure EA or Pay-as-you-go Subscription (Requires Subscription Purchaser Permission and EA or Pay-As-You-Go Azure subscription) or

  • Contact us for a direct invoice (100+ users)

Documentation | IT Admin Guide | Book Demonstration | Contact us

title: Beni
shortDescription: Seamlessly increase well-being, productivity, and results with your current team through Kindness.
Description:
Increase well-being, productivity, and results through simple and meaningful habit changes.

KindWorks.AI is a platform designed to help people feel, work, and live better through the intentional practice of Kindness.

Beni by KindWorks.AIis an AI agent who shares personalized content and exercises to encourage and enable habits that help people feel more connected, appreciated and purposeful.

Our goal

Build work environments where everyone feels valued, connected, and impactful.

Your promise

Engage in simple yet meaningful exercises and challenges with Beni to build habits of Kindness and connect more with your team and with yourself.

How Beni works

Beni delivers simple and effective exercises for you and your teammates to be more intentional about the way you interact with each other and with yourself every day. You’ll receive personal nudges related to practicing gratitude, empathy, sincerity, and other key leadership traits directly through Microsoft Teams. Beni learns from your past behaviors, discerning your preferences and interests to offer exercises and content that resonate most for you.

Beni supports you and your team to:

  • Find new ways to engage and connect through Kind Starters, thoughtful ice-breakers for meetings and conversations

  • Feel more productive by building habits that improve prioritization and time-management skills

  • Improve collaboration and innovation by connecting in new ways through science-backed, personalized nudges

  • Increase recognition between team members through exercises designed to help prioritize sharing positive feedback and compliments

  • Better manage conflicts through sincere conversations grounded in active listening and empathy

You can be the visionary who brings purpose, recognition, and business results to your workplace using the practice of Kindness.

title: Reminds Pro
shortDescription: Reminders for you and your team. Stay organized in Microsoft Teams with Reminds Pro.
Description:
Reminds Pro: Smart reminders for you and your team in Microsoft Teams

Stop forgetting what matters. Reminds Pro helps you track personal and team tasks directly inside Microsoft Teams. No more sticky notes, scattered apps, or mental overload.

✅ Why teams choose Reminds Pro

Set reminders for anything important:

  1. Send a follow-up email

  2. Track an RFP deadline

  3. Check in with a client

  4. Take a break or stay hydrated

Free your mind from remembering every little thing. Reminds Pro helps you stay focused on what matters.

🧩 When project tools aren’t enough

Not all tasks belong in a project management board. Reminds Pro is perfect for informal or one-off reminders, like:

  1. Following up with a teammate

  2. Reminding a colleague about their action items

  3. Checking in after a meeting or deployment

  4. Nudging yourself with healthy habits

Keep your day on track without cluttering formal workflows.

🛠 Flexible setup inside Teams

Use Reminds Pro your way, whether you’re working solo or collaborating with others.

  1. Personal app: Pin Reminds Pro to your Teams sidebar to manage personal reminders and view all shared reminders in one place.

  2. Channel tab: Add Reminds Pro to a channel to manage reminders with your entire team.

  3. Meeting tab: Set shared reminders directly in a meeting to follow up on key points or actions.

  4. Group chat tab: Create and track reminders with small groups or project partners in ongoing chats.

All shared reminders appear automatically in your personal app, giving you a complete view without switching tools.

🔔 Notifications that don’t get lost

Reminders show up directly in your Teams activity feed — not in emails or hidden bot messages. This means:

  1. Your reminders are always visible

  2. You stay in flow without leaving Teams

  3. No more missed action items

🔒 Control who can do what

Collaboration is great, but control matters too. Set custom permissions for shared reminders to decide who can:

  1. Create

  2. Edit

  3. Delete

This keeps reminders organized and prevents accidental edits. Ideal for teams that need accountability and structure.

🚀 Get started in under 1-minute

  1. Open Microsoft Teams

  2. Go to the Apps section

  3. Search for Reminds Pro and click Add

  4. Start setting reminders from your left-side menu or shared tabs

Stay focused, not forgetful

With Reminds Pro, you reduce mental load, stay on schedule, and boost productivity. Right from inside Teams.

👉 Add Reminds Pro now and stop relying on memory alone.

If you're having trouble, reach out here. For other inquiries, contact us.

shortDescription: Put team strengths into action and let growth, communication and leadership thrive!
Description:
Is your colleague an action driven Activator who can benefit from your clear Analytical insights? Can your awesome concept generating Ideation go hand in hand with someone’s Arranger that masterfully aligns the puzzles together?

e2grow - Strengths at Work takes professional communication between work colleagues to a new level. Your trusted companion for becoming a more effective communicator, fostering meaningful relationships, and achieving leadership excellence in any work environment. You'll learn all about your strengths and those of others, understand why others may misinterpret your messages, and learn how to express your thoughts in a way that resonates with everyone. Whether you're addressing colleagues, partners, team leaders, or customers, e2grow will help you make every interaction meaningful and productive.

Every team member is unique and valuable. That's why e2grow - Strengths at Work provides customized advice for communication and self-development based on your talent profile and the profile of your colleagues. With instant access to these profiles directly in Microsoft Teams, e2grow - Strengths at Work gives you valuable insights to better understand team dynamics and foster a more inclusive work environment.

Use e2grow - Strengths at Work to work better and create tangible results together.

  • Get diverse insights into your strengths and contributions to your team via your personal dashboard.

  • Get ideas on how to be more productive, who to collaborate with, how to build meaningful relationships with others, and how to motivate others by leveraging their strengths.

  • Apply the strategies, customized through your strengths report, for conflict avoidance and management and get actionable advice for your own development and a better understanding of your team members.

  • Improve your delegation skills to make teamwork more effective.

e2grow - Strengths at Work is more than just an app; it's a development tool that fits seamlessly into your daily workflow.

Because e2grow - Strengths at Work stands at the intersection of technology and psychology, offering an unprecedented approach to interpersonal communication in the workplace. By focusing on users' unique talent profiles, e2grow - Strengths at Work enhances self-awareness and understanding of others, improving the quality of interactions and collaboration in the enterprise.

Don't miss the opportunity to change the dynamics of your workplace with e2grow - Strengths at Work, where growth, communication and leadership thrive!

title: WeTransact
shortDescription: Boost Microsoft Marketplace insights and collaboration in Microsoft Teams!
Description:
WeTransact is a powerful SaaS platform specifically designed for B2B SaaS vendors, including ISVs and startups, making it straightforward to list and sell on the Microsoft Commercial Marketplace.Integrated with Microsoft Teams, WeTransact simplifies collaboration of your marketplace activities directly from Teams.

Who Should Use WeTransact in Teams?

Some features are available for any Teams users but this application is ideal for WeTransact customers who are active vendors on the Microsoft Marketplace. It helps streamline operations and enhances the effectiveness of sales and marketing efforts through better collaboration and real-time access to crucial data.

Key Features of WeTransact in Teams:

  • Message Extension:

    • Search Microsoft accounts using a domain name to quickly gather and share details like Company Name, logo, country, Microsoft Entra Tenant ID and MACC eligibility (for WeTransact customers only).

    • These information are crucials to target the right customers and boost your B2B sales.

  • Personal Tab:

    • Provides an overview of your marketplace offers, including publication status, and tracks revenue and orders.

    • This integrated tab allows for real-time monitoring and management, making it easier to respond to market dynamics and optimize your sales strategy.

Unique Value Proposition:

WeTransact in Teams has been built to facilitate seamless integration into your daily workflow, enabling you to monitor marketplace activities and collaborate without switching between multiple tools. This integration helps maintain focus, save time, and increase productivity.

Key Benefits:

  1. Streamlined Collaboration: Communicate and share crucial marketplace information directly within Teams chats and meetings, enhancing team coordination and decision-making.

  2. Real-time Monitoring: Keep a pulse on your marketplace presence with real-time updates on offers, publication status, and sales metrics.

  3. Enhanced Productivity: Reduce the need for multiple tools by monitoring your marketplace activities directly from Teams, Teams mobile and other Microsoft 365 clients such as Outlook, thereby minimizing context-switching and boosting efficiency.

Requirements:

  • The Teams app is using Microsoft Entra ID SSO which should be consented at the admin or user level.

  • Some of the data provided through the message extension are restricted to WeTransact active customers (MACC status).

  • The personal tab data are available only to WeTransact active customers.

Getting Started & Support:

To know more about WeTransact as a platform, visit our landing page. For further inquiries or to request a demo, feel free to contact us.

For assistance and more information on how to optimize your use of WeTransact, please refer to our Help and Support page.

Take the first step towards optimizing your Microsoft Marketplace sales by integrating WeTransact with Microsoft Teams today!

It streamlines the entire event and venue management operations, from venue booking and event management to contract generation and event settlement. Furthermore, the centralized platform of VenueArc fosters collaboration among multiple departments throughout the organization.

Who can benefit from VenueArc?

VenueArc is entirely dedicated to performing centers, including theaters, arenas, auditoriums, and all other live events venues. Venue owners, managers, stakeholders, board members, CEOs, CFOs, and other management professionals can get numerous enterprise-level benefits from VenueArc. It brings administration, production, finance, operations, and all other departments to a centralized platform with its cloud-driven features.

VenueArc automates and streamlines the entire event and venue management lifecycle to help performing arts professionals boost accessibility, collaboration, productivity, and profitability of performing arts centers.

  • Built-in CRM integration

  • Intuitive booking calendar

  • Easily add, modify, and search events

  • Manage performance notes for each event

  • Comprehensive client management portal

  • Feature-rich event portal

  • Contract generator

  • Manage deposit schedule

  • Event rescheduling

  • Financial management for events

  • Event settlements and reporting

  • Admin Center for settings

Our Client Says:

"The back-office team at San Diego Theaters was facing many challenges, including outdated technology, lack of visibility, manual processes, and scattered systems, severely affecting the enterprise productivity. By implementing VenueArc, all those challenges have been resolved through its innovative technology that simplifies the end-to-end venue and event management operations."

- Carol Wallace, San Diego Theatres, President & CEO

title: RechtGPT
shortDescription: RechtGPT antwortet auf Ihre rechtlichen Fragen mit Quellverweisen.
Description:
RechtGPT antwortet auf Ihre rechtlichen Fragen mit Quellverweisen zu österreichischen, deutschen und europäischen Rechtsnormen und Judikatur.

Stellen Sie Ihre Rechtsfrage – RechtGPT durchsucht KI-gestützt Millionen von Rechtsquellen, um eine mögliche Antwort zu generieren. RechtGPT ist RAG-basiert und reduziert Halluzinationen auf ein Minimum.

Jede generierte Antwort wird mit entsprechenden Quellverweisen zu den Originalquellen erzeugt. Sie können die Richtigkeit der Antwort direkt in der Originalquelle prüfen und Zusammenfassungen der Quelltexte (z.B. Entscheidungen) erstellen lassen.

Umfassende Quellenbasis:

  • RIS Bundesrecht konsolidiert

  • RIS Judikatur Justiz

  • RIS Judikatur Verwaltungsgerichtshof (VwGH)

  • RIS Judikatur Verfassungsgerichtshof (VfGH)

  • Findok BFG

  • BMF Richtlinien

  • Deutsches Bundesrecht und Judikatur

  • Bayrisches Landesrecht und Judikatur

  • EU Verordnungen und Richtlinien

  • EU Judikatur (EuGH, EuG, EuGÖD)

Leistungsstarke Funktionen:

  • Gezielte Suche: Verfeinern Sie die Suche mit Filtern auf bestimmte Rechtsquellen oder Zeiträume. Für Bundesrecht AT besteht die Möglichkeit, Fassungen ab 01.01.2015 für die Beantwortung festzulegen.

  • Eigene Dokumente nutzen: Verwenden Sie Ihre eigenen Dokumente als Arbeitsgrundlage (Antwortschreiben, Zusammenfassung, etc.) oder Quellen für die Recherche. RechtGPT kann Dokumente analysieren und Fragen dazu beantworten.

  • Exportieren: Exportieren Sie den Chatverlauf als PDF-Dokument oder die Antwort als Word-Dokument zur Weiterbearbeitung oder Archivierung.

Voraussetzung: Um RechtGPT verwenden zu können, benötigen Sie einen aktiven Microsoft 365 Account.

Integration: Sie können RechtGPT nahtlos in Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook oder Microsoft 365 einbinden.

Testen & Preise: 7 Testfragen sind kostenlos enthalten. Für unbegrenzte Nutzung können Sie ein Abo ab 20 Euro pro Monat abschließen.

title: Youkeeps AI Personal Assistant
shortDescription: Effortlessly coordinate meetings natively in Microsoft Teams and Outlook
Description:
Save time and boost productivity

Wish your meetings can schedule themselves?

Youkeeps Meetings is your Personal Assistant built for the modern workplace.

Seamlessly integrated into Microsoft Teams and Outlook, it automates meeting coordination, handles rescheduling, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

Instead of using a tool, you talk to an assistant.

- Schedules new meetings and other calendar events

- Manages rescheduling, cancellations, and last-minute conflicts on your behalf

- Coordinates commonly available time slot even for several participants automatically on your behalf - no back-and-forth needed

- Handles time zones and preferences like a pro

- Nudges attendees with a single click if responses are delayed

Youkeeps Meetings kills the chaos.

It helps scheduling, manages the calendar effortlessly and reliably, so your team can focus on what actually matters—closing deals, hitting deadlines, and growing the business.

Youkeeps Meetings is your all-in-one corporate scheduling tool that saves you time, minimizes stress, and ensures meetings are set up effortlessly inside and across organizations.

How It Works:

Open Microsoft Outlook or Microsoft Teams and click the Youkeeps Meetings App.

Just ask an Agent to create, coordinate or cancel a meeting:

“Schedule a meeting with Maria and Sam from 1 PM to 5 PM this Friday.”

“Coordinate a meeting with John and Peter for the next week.”

“Block the time from 1 to 3 pm for Focused work. I have some tasks to work on”

The AI Agent will confirm the details and then acts directly on behalf of the organizer.

Youkeeps Meetings connects directly to your address book and calendar, so it automatically knows your colleagues' contact info and schedules meetings only during available time slots.

Youkeeps Meetings handles scheduling updates, reminders, and time zone adjustments seamlessly.

Integrations:

Youkeeps works seamlessly with Microsoft 365, Outlook, Teams, and other calendar platforms, making it the perfect solution for corporate teams.

Try It Free for 14 Days!

Experience the difference with Youkeeps Meetings—no commitment, no hassle. After the free trial, purchase a plan that fits your needs.

Start simplifying your scheduling process today! Click Get it now!

Support and Requirements:

For any questions, contact us at support@youkeeps.com. A Microsoft work or school account is required to use this add-in.

title: Zoho CRM for email
shortDescription: Powerful, contextual CRM inside your mailbox
Description:
Zoho CRM empowers organizations with a complete customer relationship life-cycle management software for managing organization-wide Sales, Marketing, Customer Support & Service and Inventory Management in a single business system. This add-in brings the benefits of a smart and powerful CRM system inside your Outlook mailbox making customer relationship management a simple yet effective task. 

Features:

  • Create new leads and contacts from Outlook.
  • Associate the mail to your CRM records
  • See complete lead/contact detail when you open an email. 
  • Add tasks, events, log calls for a customer. 
  • Create deals, campaigns and notes for easy CRM management. 
  • FREE add-in; no credit card required.
  • Installs in seconds, easy to use.
  • Pinnable to your Outlook client.
  • Supported on multiple devices (desktop, mobiles, tablets)

 

Lead and contact management inside Outlook

Why switch windows when you can manage your CRM from Outlook? Zoho CRM for email shows you a complete customer profile immediately upon opening an email from the customer. Instantly view customers’ contact information without opening Zoho CRM. You can create new Contacts and Leads, and log calls, add tasks, events, allowing you to keep better track of prospective deals and customers. 

Keep track of all your information.

Convert leads to contacts, add, edit and delete notes, events, tasks, log calls with a contextual add-in. It's easy to use interface helps you see all the information when you need it. 

Make the most out of your CRM investment.

Increase your ROI by entering timely and accurate information about your leads and contacts in your CRM system. Refer to the emails to create tasks and notes to keep your CRM always updated.

Supported on

Outlook for Android, Outlook for iOS. The add-in is available for iPhone, iPad, Android phones, tablets, on-premise desktop app, web app.

 

Zoho CRM is simple to use, yet packed with features and advanced functionality that allow you to grow your business while having a single view of your customer interactions.

Benefits:

* Automate your Sales and Marketing with ease

* Have a complete grip on your communication with your contacts

* Take advantage of an Award-Winning, complete CRM solution

* No Servers, No expensive software and No Backup solutions. It's all hosted!

* Not just CRM - gain access to the entire Zoho suite of products

* No long-term contracts, pay as you go

Add-ons & Integrations:

* Zoho Mail Add-on

* Zoho CRM for Microsoft Outlook

* Zoho CRM for Microsoft Office

* QuickBooks Integration

* Zoho PhoneBridge (Telephony integration with Asterisk, Avaya, and Trixbox)

* Zoho Projects Integration

For support and queries, please write to us at support@zohogadgets.com

title: CodeTwo Signatures Add-in for Outlook
shortDescription: Outlook Add-in: Automatic email signatures, legal disclaimers & marketing banners in your emails.
Description:
***This Web Add-in is an integral part of CodeTwo Email Signatures 365 and requires a paid (or trial) subscription to this service to work. The service is managed organization-wide by your IT or Marketing Team. See details & pricing at: codetwo.com/email-signatures***

With CodeTwo Signatures Web Add-in for Outlook, users in a Microsoft 365 organization get automatic, personalized email signatures, legal disclaimers and marketing content (such as banners) in their emails. IT or Marketing teams can centrally control and update these signatures for the entire organization.

The add-in can only be deployed organization-wide by an organization's admin. It automatically adds a signature when a user starts composing an email in Outlook for Windows and Outlook on the web (OWA). The user can also change the signature to another one using the add-in pane.

This add-in was co-engineered with Microsoft and is a part of CodeTwo Email Signatures 365 - a cloud solution for central management of email signatures, disclaimers and branding in Microsoft 365 & Office 365.

KEY FEATURES

  • Add fully-branded signatures with up-to-date contact details automatically

  • Preview signatures that are added in the cloud (managed by your organization)

  • Personalized sender & company data in signatures thanks to safe, real-time Entra ID (Azure AD) integration

  • Start Teams meetings directly from email signatures

  • Automatic integration with web analytics tools, one-click customer satisfaction surveys, meeting schedulers & other services, including Google Analytics, Calendly, CrewHu & more

KEY BENEFITS

  • Centrally-managed, automatic email signatures

  • Professional HTML signatures added to emails sent from any email client and device (including mobiles)

  • Legal compliance ensured thanks to legal disclaimers

  • Email marketing automation & email analytics

  • 24/5, award-winning customer support with 24/7 back-end monitoring

ABOUT

CodeTwo solutions for Microsoft 365 & Exchange Server are used by 120,000+ organizations in 170+ countries, including companies such as Facebook, Samsung, Volkswagen and Fortune 500 companies. CodeTwo is Microsoft Partner of the Year – Customer Experience Finalist and Microsoft Partner of the Year in Poland (ISV).

To learn more, visit: codetwo.com/email-signatures

title: SecureMailMerge - Advanced mail merge for Outlook
shortDescription: Privacy focused advanced mail merge Outlook add-in to send email campaigns and newsletters.
Description:
A private mail merge plugin for Outlook that lets you send personalized mass emails without uploading your data to any servers. It's all done on your computer!

Simply write your email template in Outlook like any other email and use the features you know and like:

  • Upload a spreadsheet or use you address book (including shared mailbox address books)

  • Formatting and Personalization

  • Attachments and Inline Images (including individual attachments per recipient)

  • Send as an alias

  • CC and BCC sending

  • Works on Windows, Mac and in the browser

What does it cost?

You can use the plugin for free which includes a small promotional message in each email or purchase a commercial license via a monthly subscription which removes this message.

Who is it for?

SecureMailMerge is the ideal tool for

  • professionals with higher data security needs (HR, lawyers, doctors,... ) that cannot afford the risk of having their data being leaked by other email marketing providers,

  • internal campaigns that include confidential information that cannot leave the company network,

  • privacy conscious individuals that want to minimize their threat surface, and

  • sending any data that must not be processed by third parties.

IT departments choose SecureMailMerge over other providers because it aligns better with their IT data security strategy than other mail merge and email marketing options.

How does it work?

Built directly into Outlook's modern add-in infrastructure the plugin loads and processes the campaign data in your Outlook client. Add personalization tags to the email and send yourself a test email to verify. When you're happy let the add-in generate emails to each recipient.

title: Todoist for Outlook Mail: Planner & Calendar
shortDescription: Stay on top of your emails with Todoist for Outlook
Description:
Trusted by over 47 million people, Todoist simplifies tasks for individuals and teams. Instantly declutter your mind, build habits, and boost your productivity.

Use Todoist for Outlook from any client, whether you use it on desktop, web (Microsoft 365 and Outlook.com), or mobile, to:

• Add emails as tasks: Finally, achieve inbox zero by adding emails to Todoist so that you can take action on them later.

• Remember to follow up: Include dates, reminders, task durations, and priorities to the emails that you've added as tasks so that they'll never slip under your radar.

• • •

Questions? Feedback? Visit todoist.com/help

title: Seismic for Outlook
shortDescription: Discover, Share, and Manage Meetings Seamlessly — All Within Outlook
Description:
Seismic for Outlook empowers Marketing and Sales teams by putting Seismic content and meeting workflows directly where sellers work — in email and on the calendar. Now, in addition to discovering and sharing content, sellers can create, link, and manage Seismic Meeting drafts without leaving Outlook.

With Seismic for Outlook, sales reps can:

  • Quickly search for and share Seismic content without leaving their email.

  • Create and manage meeting drafts tied to calendar invites—manage agendas, add content, and launch presentations seamlessly. .

  • Access all features from Outlook on desktop (Mac and Windows) or web (Office 365), ensuring flexibility wherever they work.

Core Features:

  • Easy Content Discovery: search and browse your Seismic library to find content. Preview the entire document and content properties to help you choose which to share.

  • Flexible Sharing: select and share content via Livesend link or as attachments. Configure Livesend links with passwords, expiration dates, etc. in order to meet your needs.

  • Meeting Management: Create and link Seismic Meeting drafts to calendar invites, configure agendas, attach content, and launch presentations — all from Outlook.

  • Powerful Insights: when content is shared via Livesend link, receive immediate notifications and tracking when the recipient views your content.

New for Meetings (pilot):

Easily create, manage, and present Seismic Meetings directly from your Outlook calendar — making your prep and follow-up workflows faster and more integrated than ever. Reach out to your representative for more details.

Prerequisites:

  • Seismic license and account

  • Email account on Office 365/Outlook or Exchange 2013 (or later)

  • Outlook, Outlook for Mac, or Outlook on the web

Disclosures:

Seismic for Outlook offers the option to send separate emails to each recipient. This enables you to get individual engagement data for each recipient who views the Livesend link. To enable this, Seismic for Outlook will monitor your email drafts to detect when you've inserted a Livesend link and entered two or more recipients. If these conditions are met, we will show a prompt suggesting that you open Seismic for Outlook to send separate emails.

shortDescription: Create and centrally manage professional email signatures for all users on Microsoft 365

This add-in is an integral part of Signature 365, a cloud-based email signature solution by Symprex, and requires a trial or paid subscription to work. Signature 365 is managed by your IT or Marketing team. Visit symprex.com/signature-365 for more information.

Signature 365 highlights:

Create eye-catching email signatures, plan and run campaigns, boost brand awareness, get real-time insights and more all from one place:

  • Create and deploy beautiful email signatures to all your users
  • Extend email marketing campaigns to email signatures with tracking
  • Comply with legal requirements adding disclaimers to all email
  • Manage everything from the modern cloud dashboard
  • Use template library to get you started quickly
  • Works with all email clients on all devices
  • Automated setup wizard
  • Secure ISO 27001 data centres
  • Hosted in 6 regions around the world
  • And more...

Signature 365 was the first solution in the world to offer the exact same email signature experience in Outlook for Windows, Outlook for Mac and Outlook on the Web.

Signature 365 is now also the first solution in the world to offer the same email signature experience in Outlook mobile on iOS and Android.

Signature 365 advantages:

  • Very easy to use
  • 100% cloud-based
  • No servers required
  • No software to install or maintain
  • No requirement to route email via Signature 365
  • Signatures on all email from all devices
  • Signatures visible in Outlook on Windows, Mac, Mobile and Web
  • Setup and configure everything in web portal
  • Visual and source template editor with preview
  • Default and additional signatures
  • Include campaign banners with tracking and analytics
  • Append legal disclaimers
  • Rules for new, reply, internal and external email
  • Manage images and banners in portal
  • Supports custom fonts and web fonts
  • Create custom fields with different types
  • Ability to allow users to edit specific fields
  • Invite additional admin and editor users
  • ISO 27001, ISO 27018 and SOC 2 Type II certified
  • GDPR, CCPA and HIPAA compliant
  • 99.99% SLA
  • And more...

Signature 365 subscription benefits:

  • One subscription including all features
  • Create any number of signatures
  • Technical support included
  • Based on number of users
  • No charge for secondary email addresses
  • No charge for multiple devices/email clients

Signature 365 add-in features:

  • Add signatures to email
  • Preview signatures
  • Select additional signatures
  • Change default signatures
  • Edit user details
  • Manage settings

title: Kleos for Outlook
shortDescription: Manage your inbox and archive your emails.
Description:
Kleos is the leading web-based practice management software in Europe and is trusted by over 30.000 legal professionals for law firm management. It has been designed by lawyers for lawyers and offers a comprehensive suite of features that seamlessly integrate case management with time tracking, billing, and reporting. With its exclusive file-sharing portal and mobile apps, users can work remotely from anywhere and collaborate in real-time.

 

Manage your inbox and archive your emails.

  

The Kleos Outlook Add-In facilitates smart management and processing of your emails. Thanks to the direct synchronization of Outlook with Kleos, you can work across systems without interrupting your work processes.

 

Start now with instant e-mail filing:  

  • Email filing made easy

    • File case-related e-mails and attachments in Kleos smartly, without leaving Outlook

    • Save whole conversation threads at once and increase your efficiency

    • Save all related metadata associated with the attachments in Kleos automatically

  • Smart organization, on a case-by-case basis 

    • Get case proposals depending on selected e-mail

  • No duplicate filing

    • Organize your inbox easily, with labels for emails to be filed to Kleos 

  • Mail composition with data from Kleos

    • Use metadata from cases to create emails

    • Save time by using proposals for email addresses and attachments

 

This add-in is currently intended for Outlook for macOS users. If you use Outlook with a Windows operating system, we recommend the add-in optimized for this purpose, which you can download from our homepage.

 

This integration is included for all users with an Essential, Pro and Business subscription.

title: Booking Room Pro
shortDescription: Organize and manage your office and seating occupancy
Description:
What is Booking Room Pro?

Booking Room Pro is a room occupancy and seating solution for Microsoft Teams working with Microsoft 365 Copilot and Outlook. The app is the go-to solution to manage space availability in two simple steps.


Here’s what you can do with Booking Room Pro

  1. Add as many bookings as you need, and color code them to your needs.

  2. Display Booking Room Pro in monthly, weekly, and daily formats.

  3. Customize the title, description, and color of the booking.

  4. Create tags to filter out bookings.

  5. Personalize the app and bookings' time zone.

  6. Add a location to your bookings.

  7. Print the reservations.


Booking Room Pro – Examples of use

  1. Meeting room reservation: companies with a limited number of meeting rooms.

  2. Workspace Management: companies that are operating from a flex office space and that need to manage the seating occupation.

  3. School or university: to manage computer lab reservations, arts and crafts rooms, or material (computers, tablets, TVs, 3D printers).

  4. Medical: for hospitals and clinics that need to control the booking of surgical procedures or exam facilities from Teams.

  5. Communities: any association, church, or local community who need to optimize their spaces or share their limited resources.

  6. Operations: small companies or teams in large organizations use Booking Room Pro to track their operation. For example, a flooring diary, maintenance/cleaning, or delivery points and dates.


What's new:

Booking Room Pro now works with Microsoft 365 Copilot and Outlook

Example: What is the room for my HR meeting in Booking Room Pro?


If you encounter any issue with Booking Room Pro, chat with us from our website.

title: Epic Bridge
shortDescription: Epic Bridge connects to Applied Epic® to simplify creating and documenting email communications.
Description:
Applied Epic® is the most technologically advanced cloud-based software application built for independent insurance agencies to automate business operations and drive connectivity to insurers and insureds in the changing insurance marketplace.

To use this extension, you must be licensed for Applied Epic and supply your existing login credentials. Once signed in, Epic Bridge will connect you to your Applied Epic data to provide important information about your customers and connect to sent and received emails in Outlook to facilitate the process of documenting those communications back into the management system.

When using the option to attach email(s) to Epic, Epic Bridge will access the entire email contents and use it to attach that email as a .eml file to appropriate account in Epic, either after sending a new email or when selecting emails from your inbox.

title: DocuWare for Outlook
shortDescription: The ultimate add-in for integrating emails and their attachment into business processes.
Description:
With this add-in, you easily import emails and their attachments directly to your DocuWare system without leaving the Microsoft Outlook environment. Choose a document tray or file cabinet and index the documents with just a few clicks, making them readily available to your authorized colleagues and integrating them into your business processes. For example, storing an email with an attached invoice can trigger immediately the approval workflow.

Available on both web and desktop versions of Microsoft Outlook, this add-in can be used in a wide variety of Outlook deployment scenarios. On the DocuWare side, you need a user account for a DocuWare Cloud system. More details can be found here. In case of technical questions or problems, please contact our support team at support.emea@docuware.com for more details.

Add-in Capabilities:

With this add-in, you can:

  • store email messages and attachments effortlessly

  • select the attachments to be archived together with the email

  • instantly identify the most valuable information of the email for indexing

  • accelerate your workflows and provide relevant business information to your team by storing related emails directly into DocuWare, your central business application.
