title: teamsTALK for Outlook
shortDescription: The first comprehensive Microsoft Teams with Outlook integration finally available
Description:
Our teamsTALK will finally allow you to use Microsoft Teams chat directly in Outlook. Now is your Microsoft Teams, thanks to our teamsTALK application, a fully recognized part of your Microsoft Outlook. The user does not have to switch between screens or start a new group chat in Microsoft Teams.

The teamsTALK application is designed to fit beautifully into your Microsoft Outlook as a native integrated part. It allows you to either continue with your current chats from Microsoft Teams or start a new chat directly in Microsoft Outlook interface. The teamsTALK application is available for both Microsoft Outlook on the web and your Microsoft Outlook desktop application and will also run on your MAC OS X.

The installation is more than easy; you can download teamsTALK from the official Microsoft Store; no need to install anything on your machine; no need to ask for an admin approval to install teamsTALK to your Microsoft Outlook; security is ensured, your data is staying inside Microsoft servers and every sensitive part of your communication is transferred purely between Microsoft and teamsTALK; the free version of the teamsTALK application is available as a 30-day trial version; ...

Get to know our teamsTALK. It brings you to a new level of team-work effectiveness while working with your Microsoft Outlook client. Outlook has never been as strong as with teamsTALK. Download teamsTALK, chat to your Microsoft Teams members and teams directly within Microsoft Outlook and...

... have very high expectations, because this is just the beginning.

Get your teamsTALK and chat like a PRO.

title: Tasks in a Box for Outlook
shortDescription: Always stay on top of your inbox. Snooze emails and turn them into tasks.
Description:
Tasks in a Box for Outlook allows you to turn your emails into tasks, all without leaving your inbox. Take control of your inbox: snooze emails and get them out of your way until you're ready to deal with them. Tasks in a Box will move your emails back to the top of your inbox at the moment of your choice.

Why use Tasks in a Box for Outlook:

**********************************

  • Stay Focused: Snooze emails you want to deal with at a later moment in time and Tasks in a Box will move them out of your inbox until you're ready to deal with them. Tasks in a Box will move your emails back to the top of your inbox at the moment of your choice.
  • Share with Ease: Avoid forwarding emails back and forth between co-workers. Simply share your email with team members, use comments to collaborate on the email, and keep everyone informed about important changes.
  • Perfect Inbox Zero Companion: This add-in allows you to practice the Inbox Zero philosophy in Outlook. Leave your desk with peace of mind knowing that everything that required your attention was done.

What is Tasks in a Box:

***********************

Tasks in a Box is a tool that enables you and your team to collaborate on tasks, emails and meetings, become more productive, get work done faster and create a better work-life situation. Streamline your processes across the company by adding structure to your inbox.

For more information check out our website: https://tasksinabox.com

Compatibility Information:

**************************

  • Tasks in a Box for Outlook supports the following versions of Outlook: Outlook on Windows (Microsoft 365), Outlook 2019 or later on Windows, Outlook on Mac (Microsoft 365), Outlook 2016 or later on Mac, Outlook on iOS, Outlook on Android, Outlook on the web.
  • Tasks in a Box for Outlook requires a Microsoft 365 account.
  • Tasks in a Box for Outlook relies on Tasks in a Box, which is a subscription-based service. Sign up for a Tasks in a Box free trial from within the Tasks in a Box for Outlook app.

appName: Flowtrace Meeting Cost for Outlook Add In
title: Meeting Cost for Outlook
shortDescription: Displays appointment cost estimates, meeting policy, and validates appointment structure in Outlook.
Description:
Meeting Cost for Outlook: Because meetings are investments, make them count.

Adds meeting costs and meeting policy to Outlook calendar when organizing meetings. Meeting policy and central configuration available through Flowtrace paid plans.

Meetings can either catalyze productivity or become a drain on resources. Empower your meeting organizers with free estimated meeting costs using Flowtrace's Chrome extension.

Our add-in integrates with the rest of the Flowtrace Meeting Analytics ecosystem to provide accurate cost estimates for both direct and group invited meetings. Your users will get the company configuration automatically when Flowtrace and your calendars are integrated.

Available features in free plans:

• Meeting cost estimate for edit and compose view

• Cost estimate updates when you adjust time, recurrence, attachments, or involved people

• Recurring meeting cost estimates on quarterly basis

Additional feature in premium plans:

• Centralized deployment and consent

• Custom meeting policy and link configuration

• Rules for event validation when sending an invite

• Prompt organizer to consider meeting costs and rules before sending an invite

• Currency, hourly rate, and buffer configuration

• Custom cost alert thresholds for no, low, medium, and high levels

• Organization structure based cost averages

• Dynamic appointment rule validation on the side panel when crafting the invite

• Option to switch between time and cost estimates

Experience the transformative impact of cost transparency. By providing tangible estimates on meeting costs, our tool ensures your team is aware of the time and financial implications of meetings. This awareness encourages a mindful approach to scheduling, potentially saving your organization significant resources.

By using our Add-In you foster a culture of accountability and cost-effectiveness, and move your team towards streamlined, productive meetings.

title: Popl Email Signature Add-In
shortDescription: Easily create, assign & manage your company’s email signatures via Popl - Digital Business Cards.
Description:
Improve your team's digital communication and stay on-brand with the Popl Email Signature Add-In, the most powerful email signature management solution in the world.

With the Popl Email Signature Add-In, you can create email signature templates via Popl Teams, then assign those signatures to any group or members of your team. Once assigned, members will be able to choose any of the Popl email signatures that you have assigned to them, ensuring your team's emails stay on-brand, with up to date business info.

Popl's digital business card based email signature management will provide 3 core benefits:

- Consistent design for all email signatures to showcase your brand and communicate key contact information

- Automatic QR code additions with digital business card information, making lead generation and connecting with customers as easy as a scan

- Seamless email signature management making it easier for IT departments to create and set team member's emails

  

Why Popl?

- Keep the company branding consistent across all emails with centralized management via digital business cards (Popl Teams)

- Save IT time and reduce employee headaches with our simple interface and automatic default signature updates.

- Make your emails a low-cost acquisition channel for marketing using member QR codes and custom signatures & banners.

Features include:

- Popl’s instant click to apply signature is easy to use for all members

- Distribute email signatures on Office 365 & Outlook with a single click

- Automatic QR codes added to all signatures for instant lead generation & CRM syncs

- Add banners, campaigns, and disclaimers to any email signatures

- Quick installation and deployment - Creation and deployment happens in a matter of minutes

- Easy auto-fill and update contact info in signatures via Popl Teams to keep everyone up-to-date

- Automated template suggestions based on your brand logo and colors

- Measure your team's email signature ROI at the team and individual level using our click and QR code scan insights via Popl Teams

Popl's easy-to-use interface, Office 365 integration, and customization make it the perfect choice for your business.

title: Juniper Square for Outlook
shortDescription: Connected software and fund administration services for the private markets.
Description:
Juniper Square for Outlook connects your inbox to your investor CRM, so you can access the information you need—when and where you need it. View contact details, see recent activity, and log emails or meetings without leaving Outlook, keeping relationship data organized and up to date across systems.

Benefits of Juniper Square for Outlook:

  • Search and view Juniper Square contact information directly in Outlook

  • Access recent activity, notes, and key relationship details to inform outreach

  • Log emails, notes, meetings, and calls in Juniper Square without leaving your inbox

Learn more about Juniper Square at www.junipersquare.com.

Juniper Square for Outlook is supported on Outlook for Windows (Microsoft 365), Outlook 2019 or later (Windows), Outlook 2016 or later (Mac), Outlook on the web, and Outlook.com. It also supports customers using Microsoft Exchange Server 2016 and 2019.

title: Reach 360
shortDescription: Get alerts about new, upcoming, and overdue Reach 360 training.
Description:
Reach 360, part of Articulate 360, is a fast, frictionless learning management system (LMS) that makes it easy to distribute training. The Reach 360 app is designed for users of Articulate 360 who are seeking seamless integration with Microsoft Teams. This app caters to educators, trainers, instructional designers, and learners who utilize Articulate 360 for creating and managing courses and learning paths.


The Reach 360 app offers a streamlined communication channel within Microsoft Teams, enhancing the user experience for Articulate 360 subscribers. It enables direct messaging notifications for crucial events such as course and learning path enrollment and reminders for past due and upcoming courses and learning paths. By consolidating notifications and updates within Microsoft Teams, this app ensures that users stay informed and engaged with their learning journey without the need to switch between platforms.


The Reach 360 app seamlessly integrates with Microsoft Teams, leveraging its robust communication and collaboration features. Users can access Reach 360 notifications directly within the Microsoft Teams interface, enhancing accessibility and convenience. Additionally, the Reach 360 app interacts with Articulate 360 to fetch relevant course and learning path data, ensuring accurate and timely notifications.


To utilize this app, users must have an active Reach 360 account. Integration with Microsoft Teams requires users to have access to Microsoft Teams within their organization's subscription. No additional software installation is necessary, as Reach 360 operates within the Microsoft Teams environment.


Capabilities:

  1. Direct Messaging Notifications: Receive instant notifications within Microsoft Teams regarding course and learning path enrollment and reminders for past due and due courses and learning paths.

  2. Seamless Integration: Access Reach 360 notifications directly within Microsoft Teams, eliminating the need for switching between platforms.

  3. Rich Previews: Share rich previews of courses and learning paths directly within Microsoft Teams, facilitating collaboration and engagement among team members.


Limitations and Conditions:

  1. This app relies on the availability and functionality of Articulate 360 and Microsoft Teams APIs. Any changes or disruptions to these APIs may affect the performance of Reach 360.

  2. While this app facilitates communication and collaboration, it does not directly manage or modify course content within Articulate 360 or Reach 360.

  3. Users must ensure they have appropriate permissions and access levels within Articulate 360, Reach 360, and Microsoft Teams to utilize this app effectively. Please visit our support page for more details.


The Reach 360 app offers a valuable extension to Articulate 360 users by providing seamless communication and collaboration within the familiar environment of Microsoft Teams. With its direct messaging notifications and rich preview capabilities, Reach 360 enhances the learning experience and fosters collaboration among team members.

title: CloudLex for Outlook
shortDescription: Eliminate email chaos-save your important Outlook messages and Outlook calendar events to CloudLex
Description:
Developed specifically for personal injury law firms, the CloudLex for Outlook Add-in eliminates email chaos and streamlines law firm email management by syncing all email communications directly from Outlook to CloudLex. Active CloudLex users can use this add-in to:

Compose, reply and save emails — including entire threads — to matters directly in CloudLex.

Easily save attachments, documents, and notes from Outlook into CloudLex Matter Manager.

Create custom Events with dynamic reminders for firm users.

Much more!

Never Miss a Calendar Deadline With Cloudlex for Outlook

Easily push important case events to your Outlook Calendar using the CloudLex for Outlook Add-in. Assign events and set reminders right from Outlook and make your workday more productive with better transparency for your tasks and upcoming deadlines with CloudLex for Outlook.

Seamless Law Firm Email Management With Cloudlex for Outlook

In a crowded inbox, crucial case communication is often lost. Add the power of CloudLex directly into your email using CloudLex for Outlook. Emails from Outlook can be saved directly to CloudLex with the rest of the case or intake as notes. No Bcc’ing. No “Drag n Drop.” Link entire email threads to a matter — including future emails from that recipient — and streamline your law firm email management.

title: Send Individually for Microsoft 365
shortDescription: Easily send personalized mass emails right from your mailbox - no 3rd parties.
Description:
Need to send personalized mass emails in Outlook? Or send an email marketing campaign to many people but don’t want to put in the work of performing a Microsoft® Word Mail Merge or risk having your email being flagged as spam using a BCC? Then our Send Individually add-in is for you.

This bulk email sender in Outlook sends an email that you create to each of your recipients, one at a time. It performs a mail merge in three simple steps, right from your own email account. Individually addressing emails allows those emails to make it through more spam filters and raises response rates. Don’t you pay more attention to emails that are directly addressed to you? Now you can do it with ease. It’s perfect for sending out your newsletters, press releases, business announcements, or other marketing emails.

This new version of the Outlook add-in is designed to enhance email functionality for Microsoft 365 users. It offers personalized email options, privacy, and integration with Excel, all within Outlook. Here are some of the benefits and features of this new add-in:

• Grow your business: This email tool is built specifically for Microsoft 365 users, allowing you to easily reach your most important people one-to-one.

• Simplicity: Designed with simplicity in mind, this add-in allows you to send personalized emails right from your mailbox.

• Privacy: No external servers or third parties are used, and your list is kept private.

• Excel integration: This add-in works in conjunction with your Excel files, reads columns, and makes substitutions in your emails.

• Drafts folder: Generates personalized emails into your chosen Drafts folder, so that you can review your emails before sending them.

• Rate throttled send speed: This add-in has a rate throttled send speed to avoid server overload and increase receiving rates.

• Send as many as 1000 emails at a time: You can send as many as 1000 emails at a time, but not to exceed 2000 a day.

• Works entirely in Outlook: No other servers are used (except for licensing).

It works like this:

1. Start by choosing your Excel file that has a list of the email addresses and any other information you'd like to include in your message and give your campaign a name.

2. You create your campaign email.

3. You then generate your personalized emails. It works in conjunction with your Excel file, reads columns, and makes substitutions in your emails on the fly in a mail merge. It generates personalized emails into your Drafts folder, so that you can review your emails before sending them.

4. Once you're happy with the generated emails, you can then begin sending them all with the click of one button!

The add-in has a rate throttled send speed to avoid server overload, and you can send as many as 2000 emails at a time (not to exceed 2000 a day). Best of all, for the ultimate in security, it works entirely in Outlook, and no other servers are used (except for licensing).

And because this add-in has been designed with Microsoft 365 in mind, it works in desktop Outlook and Outlook on the Web!

Click "Get It Now" to try before you buy or book a demo with us to see it in action but start growing your business today!

Based just south of Jacksonville, Florida, Mike Sperry of Sperry Software has been producing professional Outlook tools and solutions for over 20 years.

With Signitic signatures, take back control of your communication

title: DailyBot
shortDescription: AI assistant for standups, ChatGPT powered, surveys, kudos, forms, virtual coffees, watercoolers.
Description:
DailyBot is an AI and ChatGPT powered assistant that provides an all-in-one toolkit for Microsoft Teams. Replace unnecessary meetings with daily standups or automated team check-ins. Improve team interactions with kudos, virtual coffees, and watercoolers, or automate workflows with in-chat forms and custom chat commands.

Need to integrate with another app? We got you. Use our webhook integrations or connect DailyBot with 2000+ apps via Zapier. Thousands of startups and enterprises use DailyBot to improve team collaboration. Backed by Y Combinator 🚀

WHAT'S NEW:

DailyBot works with Microsoft 365 Chat.

Example prompts:

- Could you provide the check-in responses from Laura

- Please share the check-in responses from Laura and Steve.

- Could you get the check-in responses from the daily standup check-in of last week?

THE POWER OF DAILY UPDATES

Productivity features 🚀 :

Check-ins | Standups | Retrospectives | Pomodoro | In-chat forms | Polls & Surveys | Countdown

Social & Motivation features :

Kudos | Virtual Coffee | Watercooler | Icebreaker | Birthday reminder | Virtual Commute | Mental health checks

✅ Agile & Asynchronous: Run team check-ins, stand-ups, retrospectives, 1-on-1s, team feedback surveys, 360 feedback reviews, icebreakers, mental health checks, collect anonymous responses and more!

👏 Culture & Recognition: Create a team culture of continuous recognition and positive feedback with Kudos. You can see the leaderboard report, and add your own Team Values to align kudos with your vision.

⚒️ Customize your own bot: Create workflows connecting commands to your own apps. Create multiple teams, set up the frequency of your check-ins, multiple time zones; Spanish, English & Portuguese languages, and more!

📊 Dashboards & Reporting: DailyBot aligns your teams with streamlined updates and automated reporting. Get and download reports as CSV, XLSX, PDF and see relevant metrics on the web app.

💡 Integrations: Connect JIRA, Trello, or Bitbucket to your check-ins. You can also connect more than 2,000 apps using Zapier like Google Sheets, Webflow CMS, or even send SMS based on specific conditions.

🔭Advanced API and Webhooks: We built a robust API for your most creative use cases. There’s no reason why you can’t shoot up to the stars.

🔐 Privacy & Security: Robust SOC2: Protecting your data and your security is our top priority. Trust DailyBot to keep your data secured with enterprise-grade features, compliance in our data centers and privacy protections. We offer Enterprise SLAs, Priority Support and DPAs.

Highly compatible with remote teams, the perfect companion for managers, scrum masters or agile coaches. It's also a powerful bot for on-site or partially distributed teams.

LINKS OF INTEREST

- Get Started

- Help Center

- Contact

shortDescription: Xakia is an in-house legal department matter management platform.
Description:
Xakia is an in-house legal toolkit, purpose built for teams of 2 to 20. It is simple, powerful and affordable, and brings together information and legal process in one simple, beautiful interface. Do away with endless excel spreadsheets and clunky, scattered data – Xakia provides a holistic view into your matters, tasks, deadlines, contracts, documents and budgets, and creates informative, data-driven dashboards for full visibility across individual and team workloads. With Xakia, it is easy to set up workflows, automation and notifications and immediately communicate the value of the Legal Team to your stakeholders.

Xakia provides key features to optimize team productivity with a focus on minimizing the administrative burden to achieve this outcome. Key features include:

- Matter capture, collaboration and management

- Control and visibility over workloads, tasks, and deadlines

- Matter intake and triage

- Automated document assembly

- Spend management and e-billing

- Contract Management

- Beautiful data visualization with dashboards and reports

- Seamless integrations with business and legal technologies to bring all your tools into a single toolkit

With Xakia’s add-in for Outlook, users can:

- Create matters in seconds, using information from an email.

- Add status notes, tasks, and save relevant emails and/or documents to your matter.

- Use templates to create matters.

- Search and view details of existing matters from your inbox.

Further information can be found at the Xakia website or in a demonstration of the software on request.

Xakia’s subscription levels are:

- Advance - $95 USD per user per month, to access Xakia’s document management, legal intake, triage and external spend management, internal client portal and logs & libraries features

- Professional - $115 USD per user per month, to access Xakia's autodocs, autotasks and professional reports

- Enterprise - $155 USD per user per month, to access Xakia's workflows and enterprise integrations

shortDescription: Capture contact data from email signatures and save them in Outlook or your CRM system
Description:

• Create a new lead directly in your CRM system

shortDescription: Use Dialpad Meetings to easily schedule, organize, and modify meetings within Outlook.
Description:
"Meet beautifully and stay connected wherever you go–for free!

With Dialpad Meetings, you will get:

EASY MEETINGS

Easily add meeting details to Outlook emails and calendar invites. Joining meetings is as simple as clicking on a calendar invite or a URL, and right from your browser.

BUILT-IN AI*

BRILLIANT HD VIDEO

CRISP, CLEAR AUDIO

A PERSONALIZED EXPERIENCE

HIGHLY ENGAGED MEETINGS

title: eformity | Signature Manager
shortDescription: Easily manage signatures and building blocks for Outlook.

Creating and managing your signatures can be very time-consuming. There are a lot of things to consider, even before you start with the content. A simple adjustment will quickly become a day’s work if you have to apply it to all your signatures. And perhaps you don’t want everybody to be able to adjust data, because you could lose consistency in your signatures. In short, there’s too much to consider.

Directly useable in Outlook

With our add-in it’s easy to manage the signatures. All adjustments are directly visible and useable. This way, the signatures will always be consistent.

Multilingual

International companies often use the same signatures in multiple languages. With our platform, creating signatures in multiple languages is no problem at all. In addition, user interaction can also be adjusted to the language of your choosing.

Multiple units

With our platform, it’s possible to easily create subdivisions, such as locations, organizations or departments. If the company consists of multiple locations, you can easily personalize this by adding their own logo and name and address details.

A few advantages in a row:

  • Direct access from Microsoft Outlook

  • Manage signatures from one central location

  • Create and modify signatures in different languages

  • Signatures based on user rights

  • Single Sign On

  • Easily manage and insert images through the side panel

Please note:

This add-in only works in combination with a subscription on eformity.net. If you don't have a subscription you can create a trial subscription for free.

Kloud Connect is revolutionising the way Practice Management Software can help you manage your firm.

Enterprise-level functionality across 7 core modules. Kloud Connect offers the modern-day firm new levels of sophistication, improving the clarity, confidence and control you have in your firm. 

CRM

CRM functionality ensures key client data is centrally captured and able to be reported on. Build & manage relationships and generate client insights.

Workflow

Configurable workflow module integrating data to planning, time and billing allowing you to plan and manage your jobs, tasks and people on a single platform.

Billing

Job data flows through from Workflow ensuring a clear view of WIP and efficient management of invoicing, recovery and cash flow. Bulk invoicing and smart debtor management.

Time Management

An intuitive timesheet function, integrated with our workflow and billing to ensure efficiency. Add time quickly and simply in various locations in the platform, saving time.

Document Management

One central location to store all your Practice and Client files and drive workflow to complete your jobs. Able to integrate into your Sharepoint or your chosen application.

Capacity Planning

In-built planning module that leverages job estimate data from your workflow to ensure you get the clearest picture of staff work allocation.

Reporting

Business Intelligence to run your practice, improve efficiency and get insight.  Powered by Azure and Power BI, get actionable insight at your fingertips.

Integrations

Independent and tech stack agnostic, Kloud Connect will Integrate with your preferred third-party software and organisations to save you time

title: emSigner For Outlook
shortDescription: Sign anytime, anywhere with emSigner! Simplify your signature process with emSigner
Description:
emSigner is a comprehensive digital signature and document management solution that helps businesses of all sizes digitize their signature processes. With emSigner, users can securely sign, send, and manage documents online, without the need for physical signatures or paper-based processes.

emSigner's user-friendly interface and integration capabilities makes it easy to upload and sign documents in just a few clicks, from environments native to the end user. The platform supports a variety of signature types, including digital signatures, biometric signatures, and electronic signatures, making it flexible enough to meet the needs of any business. emSigner also offers advanced security features such as two-factor authentication, encryption, and audit trails to ensure the integrity and confidentiality of documents.

In addition to signature capabilities, emSigner also offers advanced document management features such as document tracking, version control, and workflow management. This makes it easy for businesses to manage documents throughout their lifecycle, from creation to signature to storage.

Overall, emSigner streamlines the signature process, reduces paperwork, and increases efficiency while maintaining the highest levels of security. With emSigner, businesses can save time and money while meeting compliance requirements and enhancing their overall digital transformation efforts.

For more information, please visit our website www.emsigner.com

title: CatchApp Meeting Scheduler
shortDescription: Schedule meetings/calls 10x faster, right from within your email. Include locations & multiple times
Description:
CatchApp is an add-in for Outlook that helps you find the best time for any meeting or call by allowing you to offer several time options to your invitees. They pick a time that suits them and CatchApp sends out a meeting confirmation on your behalf. It’s simple and saves lots of time by removing the back and forth.

CatchApp works with anyone, even contacts outside of your company, and they don’t need a CatchApp account to accept.

CatchApp is ideal for planning any meeting, Skype call (or Zoom, Google Hangouts). You can even include an address or a location, and your invitees will receive all the details (even place image, address, ratings etc.)

Stop the back-and-forth over email or messaging and experience smooth scheduling that will save hours every week. It’s so simple to use, you ‘ll wonder how you ever lived without it.

WHY USE CATCHAPP

  • SAVE TIME: Instead of messaging back-and-forth, you send out one email with your available times and that’s it. Easy!
  • FREE: There are no subscription fees to use CatchApp, and no payment is required.

  • CUSTOMISED & POWERFUL: Select the free timeslots you‘d like to send to your invitee, the location (address, custom, or specific place), the meeting agenda, and more.
  • SEND TO ANYONE: You can send invites to anyone’s email address. They don’t need a CatchApp account to accept. They simply view the times offered and pick what works for them.
  • INTEGRATED CALENDAR: When selecting what timeslots to offer in your meeting invite, you can view your Calendar in CatchApp so you never double book..
  • INTEGRATED LOCATIONS: Wherever you chose to have your meeting, your invitees can see full location details including the address (with map view) and the venue’s contact details.

AND MUCH MORE

WHAT THEY SAY ABOUT CATCHAPP

“I use CatchApp to schedule 10-15 meetings each week. Each person accepts a time, and all are automatically in my calendar without double-booking my time. Saving over 2 hours a week since I started using CatchApp” – Markus Schmaus, Snowflake

Description:
**Empower your team to manage business from Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office**

Yeeflow is a powerful and easy-to-use app that allows you to create and manage workflows, forms, databases and reports within Microsoft Teams, Outlook of Office.

With Yeeflow, you can automate your business processes, collaborate with your team members and customers, and access your data anytime and anywhere. **The notifications you want, where you work**

- Receive customizable notifications in Teams with personal notifications.

- Approve or reject workflow tasks directly in the Teams notifications or Outlook email notifications.

**Collaborate with one source of truth**

- Easily create a central view in Teams by adding a tab to a team or channel and selecting an application.

- In the tab, you can view and edit data, raise workflows and view dashboards.

Yeeflow is the ultimate app for building smart solutions in Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office.

NOTE: Yeeflow is a subscription-based service and requires either a free trial or paid account.

title: hyOffice App
shortDescription: Who is in the office? Who is working remotely? hyOffice brings people together.
Description:
The hyOffice app makes hybrid working easy and efficient, transforming the way teams collaborate regardless of their physical location. Have you ever wondered who is in the office or considered the optimal day for office collaboration? hyOffice eradicates the guesswork and provides a clear view of who's working in-office or remotely.

Transform your hybrid workplace management with hyOffice, the most innovative solution for seamless team collaboration and office space optimization. Whether you want to know the places your colleagues are working from or you're planning the week ahead, hyOffice makes sure everyone stays connected.

With our innovative features like automatic Wi-Fi and Ethernet check-in, you can bypass barriers like scanning QR codes and make hyOffice an integral part of your daily routine.

Flexible companies have access to a more diverse talent pool, higher employee satisfaction, and accelerate revenue growth four times faster than companies with rigid office policies. Embrace flexibility and lead the future of work with hyOffice.

  • Dashboard: Get an instant overview of who's working from the office or home today. Encourage more impromptu brainstorming sessions and inspiring coffee breaks around the office. Easily see which meeting attendees are in the office and book a meeting room instead of sitting in front of your computer all day.

  • Planner: Never walk into an empty office again! With Planner, you can see your team's planned in-office and remote workdays in one easy-to-read calendar view. Effortlessly schedule your next in-office or remote workdays in sync with your colleagues. You can even set up regular locations for specific day of the week!

  • Insights: Gain valuable insights into your office utilization, employee work preferences, and optimal days for team events. Our reliable, automatic check-in feature ensures data accuracy, empowering you with the information needed to make informed decisions about your hybrid work strategy.

Start integrating hyOffice seamlessly into your Microsoft ecosystem today. With single sign-on (SSO) and full integration with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, and Microsoft 365, hyOffice is designed to complement your Microsoft environment. Our commitment to privacy by design ensures the highest level of data privacy and security.

Start the free trial with full functionality directly from the app. After the free trial, you can choose between the free Starter Plan with limited features for a small team or the Business Plan with all Pro features for a dedicated team.

Try the hyOffice app for free and revolutionize your hybrid work environment now!

Learn more at www.hyoffice-app.com

title: HumanLike Alert Reminder
shortDescription: Set Reminders in Microsoft Teams and stay on top of your schedule, keeping everything organized!
Description:
BoostSolutions HumanLike Alert Reminder lets you set up reminders in Microsoft Teams, ensuring timely notifications and helping you stay on track.

Choose how you want to receive your notifications, via a Teams post or email, and stay informed in the way that suits you best.

Easily set up reminders using your own natural language, such as ‘something + sometime,’ like ‘team meeting in 1 hr’.

Whether it’s a one-time reminder or a recurring notification (daily, weekly, or monthly), you have full control over when and how you’re reminded.

You can set a reminder from any Teams message, chat, channel message, or post. HumanLike Alert Reminder will notify you at your selected time.

Example commands:

- remind me about the team meeting at 3 pm

- submit project report every Fri at 9 am

- call John about the proposal at 10:30 am tomorrow

- take a break at 2 pm every day

Boost your productivity and never miss an important event by adding BoostSolutions HumanLike Alert Reminder to your daily routine!

With HumanLike Alert Reminder, you can:

- Recurring Event Notifications: Set up reminders for regular events like weekly check-ins or monthly reviews.

- Personal Task Reminders: Keep track of personal tasks, such as grocery shopping or appointments.

- Personal Productivity Reminders: Get reminders for breaks or check-ins to stay on track.

- Monthly Report Submission: Receive timely reminders to submit monthly reports and prevent missed deadlines.

For More Information:

title: Share Work Jr
shortDescription: Share email-followup-work with coworkers.
Description:
Share Work Jr helps you coordinate timely responses with your coworkers by assigning emails to yourself and coworkers


Coordinating Email Responses is Inefficient Today


When multiple coworkers are copied on an email, there is overhead, often duplicated, in figuring out:


  • Who will reply to the email and followup?

  • Did they reply? Is that issue closed?

  • Did an important email go unanswered?


The root problems causing those issues are that:


  • Email is designed for individuals, not workgroups

  • Email overload is rampant


How This Add-in Helps


Share Work Jr lets users tag each email with to-dos:


Which are automatically shared with coworkers:


  • Who are copied on that email

  • Coworkers are users on the same email domain


This can keep coworkers on the same page and avoid duplicate work. They can share email triaging work and track closure, making coordinating the email responses easier.


Benefits include: productivity, efficiency, transparency, accountability, focus, prioritization, team load-balancing, collaboration, shared triaging, and closure tracking.


All users of this add-in get the free Starter plan. Starter plan does not require any payment, nor does it require any credit card details.


Starter plan provides 3,000 new tags (comments or to-dos) per user per month.


Please visit our Terms and Privacy Policy for additional details.

title: BoldDesk
shortDescription: Receive real-time ticket updates from BoldDesk
Description:
BoldDesk is a Help Desk software tool designed to assist with customer support services. It functions as a central hub for managing support requests, emails, and team collaboration. The tool automates tasks, assigns tickets to agents, gathers feedback, provides reports, and helps improve overall customer service.

Integrate Microsoft Teams with BoldDesk to improve customer service operations. Empower your support team to provide exceptional service, enhance collaboration, streamline response times, centralize interactions, and effectively manage support tickets with real-time updates.

Features

1. Create a new ticket directly from Microsoft Teams.

2. Receive live notifications and threaded message notifications to stay informed and maintain context in ticket conversations.

3. Monitor ticket status and progress easily in Microsoft Teams and notify assignees directly of ticket information.

4. Reply professionally to tickets on Microsoft Teams.

5. Create public and private notes and modify ticket attributes like priority and status.

title: Beyond.RFP for Outlook
shortDescription: Automation of answering RFI questionnaires for the faster RFP response process.
Description:
Beyond.RFP helps sales and proposal teams to win deals by speeding up the entire process.

With this tool, the Digital Transformation of the proposal process begins with finding the right answers for the questionnaires and finding the right documents for the response using the content from the original request text, the so-called RFP.

The Tool Offers:

- Finding the answers and relevant documents directly in Microsoft Office environment, Microsoft Word and Excel.

- SharePoint integration enables finding relevant response documents by scanning the content of original documents from customers.

- Use similar answers across different questionnaires.

- Bulk answering of tens of questions at the same time

- Enables collaborative working, so the entire team can work on the same response document in the same.

- Modern cloud-based approach with the most modern Machine Learning algorithms to find the right answers precisely.

- Very Easy user interface to manage the questions and answers database.

First Steps:

This add-in requires a licence key obtained before for the Beyond.RFP. Contact us now for a free trial key or a long-term purchase:

beyondrfp@beyondsc.de

title: TeamDrive Files
shortDescription: Microsoft Teams integration for TeamDrive
Description:
This Microsoft Teams App enables you to work with files shared in TeamDrive from within Microsoft Teams, taking advantage of the secure end-to-end encryption of TeamDrive and the convenience and messaging functionality of Microsoft Teams.

Files from a local TeamDrive Space which are relevant to your team can be:

  • Listed in a Tab on your channel

  • Linked to in posts

  • Opened directly from within the Teams app

In addition, files can be added to a Space from within Teams, and you can jump from a linked file to it's info-page in TeamDrive. Files always remain securely end-to-end encrypted.

In order to make use of this integration you need a local TeamDrive installation and a user account. You can download the TeamDrive app here.

When you start TeamDrive for the first time, you will be prompted to create a user account. Additional information on how to get started with TeamDrive, as well as help on a variety of other topics, can be found here.

title: smartQED Bot
shortDescription: Streamline and speed up incident and problem investigations with AI-powered visual fishbone maps.
Description:
With the smartQED Bot, a visual collaboration for structured and efficient incident and problem resolution is now available to Microsoft Teams users!

What is smartQED?

smartQED is a visual workspace to help operations & support teams solve incidents and problems faster, with integrated recommendations and insights from prior issues.

Get clear visibility into complex investigations, track status efficiently, get cause and solution suggestions from our AI-based recommendation engine(Problem matching), and generate reports in real time with a single click!

Benefits of smartQED

smartQED speeds up your incident and problem resolution times significantly and increases the productivity of your teams. Here’s how it works:

Methodical Cause Analysis: Use structured fishbone-based Investigation Maps to visualize and explore in depth the potential causes of a problem. Our layered visual approach scales easily to complex issues and large teams.

Efficient Collaboration: Entire teams can jointly analyze problems with data organized in context in a 360° view. Get your teams on the same page by easily tracking causes and their statuses, deadlines, and relevant findings.

Automated Real-time Reporting: Provide better visibility into the investigation progress with summary or detailed reports to managers, customers and other stakeholders. Manually generate reports with one click, or auto-email them on a periodic basis.

Artificial Intelligence: Powerful AI capability in smartQED analyzes historical data of solved problems to generate cause & solution recommendations for your new issues. These AI-powered insights reduce or eliminate tedious manual searches to slash training times of new staff.

Easy Knowledge Capture and Reuse: Create and reuse QED templates to standardize the analysis approach and jumpstart future investigations. The mix-and-match capability of QED templates enables you to perform more complex analysis easily.

smartQED's innovative visual solution applies to problem and incident investigations as well as root cause analysis in any domain including:

🗸 IT Operations & Site Reliability Engineering

🗸 DevOps

🗸 Service Providers

🗸 Financial Systems

🗸 Healthcare

🗸 Transportation

🗸 Automotive, Aerospace & more.

Turbocharge your problem resolution process with the combined power of smartQED and Microsoft Teams collaboration! Increase the quality and reliability of your products and services, boost your customer satisfaction, and obtain higher efficiency and team productivity.

smartQED Bot

Leverage the power of QED Investigation Maps without leaving your Microsoft Teams channel. Using easy-to-use buttons and commands, you can quickly build up the visual map of your issue while working in Microsoft Teams.

You can add causes to the investigation map, attach notes, clues, and actions, check the status, and even generate and download real-time summary and detailed Excel reports – all within a Teams channel!

Operations supported by the smartQED Bot

Invoke the smartQED Bot by typing "@smartQED" in "New conversation", or by using the Messaging Extension within Teams. You will get a menu of operations to set the context information (connect the channel to an application and problem in smartQED), and view and update the investigation map for that problem. You can add causes, clues (relevant symptoms), assignees, actions, due dates and other relevant information.For example:

@smartQED ➡️ Menu ➡️ Cause [UPDATE] ➡️ Add (adds a new cause)

@smartQED ➡️ Menu ➡️ Action [UPDATE] ➡️ Add ➡️ Add an action to a cause

click here to see the entire list of operations

In order to use this app, your organization needs to have an active account on smartQED,

click here to sign up for an account with 30-days free trial.

title: anny bookings
shortDescription: The add-in allows you to book resources from anny in your organization directly via Outlook.
Description:
Managing and booking resources can be a time-consuming and tedious task, especially when these processes are spread across multiple platforms. Switching between different applications and tools can not only lead to a loss of productivity, but also increase the risk of errors and double bookings.

anny's add-in for outlook is a seamless integration that allows a company's meeting rooms and resources to be booked directly in Outlook. This feature is designed to make the process of room booking and resource management more efficient and user-friendly.

It is useful for large organizations that use Outlook as a central system and are looking for a simple solution for bookings.

The Outlook add-in works as follows:

You create a new meeting, set the time and add the participants. You then open the add-in in the Outlook sidebar and search for available rooms that meet your requirements. In the add-in, you can filter the rooms according to availability and certain criteria, such as size or technical equipment. With just one click, you can book the room, make sure there are no double bookings and even add additional options such as catering if required.

Our add-in uses SmartAlerts and LaunchEvents to improve your booking experience. If there are any problems with the booking, you will get a smart alert. Furthermore, we are using the launch events to finalize your booking, before the entry is created inside Outlook.

To use the add-in, you need an anny account. Create your account here:

app.anny.co/register

More information:

www.anny.co

title: EchoMark
shortDescription: Protect your private messages and files with invisible forensic watermarks and AI rephrasing.
Description:
EchoMark protects your private data by personalizing email messages and attachments with invisible forensic watermarks and AI rephrasing that allow you trace and prevent leaks. The EchoMark add-in for Outlook allows you to use AI Rephrasing directly in your Outlook client and customize watermark options for messages and attachments sent through EchoMark.

title: Knowee Signatures
shortDescription: Professionalize your emails in Outlook by integrating dynamic digital signatures and business cards.
Description:
Knowee Signatures seamlessly integrates Knowee's digital business cards into Outlook, enabling efficient and professional digital signature management directly from your email. This 100% cloud-based integration does not require additional software installation, making it easy to maintain and use.

Add-In Benefits:

Visibility:

  • View and manage Knowee digital signatures without leaving Outlook, integrating your organization's corporate identity directly into your emails.

Productivity:

  • Access and customize Knowee digital signatures within Outlook, optimizing your workflow.

  • Create and update digital business cards for each employee, directly from Outlook.

  • Automatically insert the appropriate digital signature when composing emails, with just one click.

  • Use customized templates for signatures, adapting them to the different roles and departments of your company.

  • Manage email signatures centrally, ensuring coherent and professional communication.

With a Knowee account, you can:

  • Schedule automatic signature updates to instantly reflect promotions or organizational changes.

  • Ensure a unified and professional corporate image in every email sent.

Additional Notes:

  • A subscription to Knowee is required. For more information on our plans, visit Knowee Plans.

  • To get started, create an account for free at Knowee Registration.

  • If your company is interested in customized solutions, visit Knowee for Corporations.

  • The add-in utilizes EventBasedLaunch functionality to enhance user experience, automatically activating certain features in specific contexts to maximize the efficiency and effectiveness of digital signature management.

  • Setup instructions and system requirements available at Knowee Add-in.

  • Compatible with Outlook versions on desktop and web, including IE11, Edge, Chrome, Firefox, and Safari.

With Knowee Signatures, take your corporate communication to the next level, ensuring that every email sent from Outlook reflects the professionalism and values of your organization.

title: AdvAIsor Mail
shortDescription: Ferramenta de IA (LLM-powered software) para Tradução e Revisão de e-mails.
Description:
AdvAIsor Mail

Aprimore sua experiência com nosso Add-In para o Outllook, que possibilitará uma experiência de revisão e tradução de seus e-mails ainda melhor, com máxima integração.Através de um painel acoplado, é possível ter acesso rápido, fácil e dinâmico a todos os recursos com apenas um clique.

Descrição

Ferramenta de inteligência artificial (LLM-powered software) para Tradução e Revisão de e-mails.

Recursos

  • Velocidade e eficiência na criação, revisão e tradução

    A velocidade e eficiência na criação, revisão e tradução são essenciais no mundo contemporâneo, onde a comunicação rápida e precisa é valorizada. No contexto de negócios, acadêmico ou pessoal, produzir conteúdo de alta qualidade em um tempo reduzido pode significar a diferença entre sucesso e fracasso. Isso envolve não apenas a habilidade de criar material original, mas também a capacidade de revisar e corrigir rapidamente, e, quando necessário, traduzi-lo de forma fidedigna para outros idiomas, garantindo que a mensagem original seja mantida e compreendida por diferentes públicos ao redor do mundo.

  • Integração com o Microsoft Office

    A integração com o Microsoft Office refere-se à capacidade de diferentes softwares ou serviços se conectarem e trabalharem em conjunto com as ferramentas do pacote Office, como Outllook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, entre outros. Essa integração permite que os usuários ampliem as funcionalidades padrão desses aplicativos, automatizem tarefas e melhorem a eficiência dos fluxos de trabalho.

  • Interface amigável, intuitiva e objetiva

    Uma interface amigável, intuitiva e objetiva é projetada para proporcionar aos usuários uma experiência de uso fluida e sem complicações. "Amigável" indica que o design é acolhedor e fácil de compreender, minimizando a curva de aprendizado. "Intuitiva" sugere que a interface foi desenvolvida de forma que as ações e funções sejam naturalmente percebidas pelo usuário, sem necessidade de instruções extensas. "Objetiva", por sua vez, destaca que a interface foca no essencial, eliminando elementos desnecessários ou distrativos, o que permite que os usuários alcancem seus objetivos de forma rápida e direta. Juntas, essas características garantem que o software ou plataforma seja acessível, reduzindo frustrações e maximizando a eficiência do usuário.

  • Segurança da informação nos termos da Política Microsoft

    A segurança da informação, conforme os termos da Política da Microsoft, enfatiza a proteção de dados e informações dos usuários, garantindo sua confidencialidade, integridade e disponibilidade. A Microsoft investe significativamente em medidas de segurança, como criptografia, autenticação de múltiplos fatores e monitoramento contínuo, para proteger seus serviços e produtos contra ameaças cibernéticas. Além disso, a empresa se compromete a cumprir regulamentações globais de privacidade e a ser transparente sobre como coleta, usa e compartilha os dados dos usuários. As políticas de segurança da Microsoft são revisadas e atualizadas regularmente para abordar novos desafios e garantir que os usuários e organizações possam confiar em seus serviços no que diz respeito à proteção de suas informações.

  • Uniformização no estilo de escrita de todo o time

    A uniformização no estilo de escrita de todo o time refere-se à padronização da linguagem, tom, estrutura e outros elementos estilísticos em comunicações ou e-mails produzidos por um grupo. Esta prática é vital para organizações e equipes que desejam apresentar uma voz coesa e profissional ao seu público-alvo. Ao garantir consistência no estilo de escrita, as mensagens tornam-se mais claras, reduz-se a possibilidade de interpretações equivocadas e fortalece-se a identidade da marca ou entidade. Para alcançar essa uniformização, muitas organizações implementam guias de estilo ou manuais de redação que definem regras e diretrizes específicas para a produção de conteúdo, garantindo que todos os membros da equipe estejam alinhados em sua abordagem comunicativa.

Licenciamento

Você precisará de uma assinatura do AdvAIsor Mail para usar este complemento.

Visite a página https://tendencias.com.br/contato/ para saber mais sobre as licenças do AdvAIsor Mail e para entrar em contato com um representante de vendas.

title: ListAlpha CRM
shortDescription: Mention ListAlpha notes in chats and conversations.
Description:
ListAlpha is an advanced deal flow management platform, tailor-made for the dynamic world of modern investors and

extensively utilized by premier private equity funds across the globe.

Our application takes your chats and conversations to the next level by facilitating the seamless exchange of notes

stored on the ListAlpha platform, directly within your communication channels.

Key Benefits:

  • Streamlined Workflow: ListAlpha integrates seamlessly into your chats and conversations, allowing for the

    effortless exchange of notes. This not only saves time but also enhances the clarity and efficiency of your

    communications.

  • Dedicated Support for Microsoft Teams: With deep integration into Microsoft Teams, ListAlpha ensures a

    frictionless experience for sharing and managing notes, making it the perfect complement to your investment

    toolkit.

  • Quickly find and share notes from ListAlpha CRM.

Limitations and Dependencies:

  • Full use of the application's features requires an active account on the ListAlpha platform.

  • While the application is designed to perform optimally with Microsoft Teams, adjustments may be necessary for

    comprehensive integration with other systems.

Getting Started:

New users can easily embark on their ListAlpha journey. Simply click on the link to talk to our sales team to begin leveraging ListAlpha. If questions arise or you need further assistance, our team is readily available to help through Microsoft Teams.

title: Essembi
shortDescription: Create tickets in Essembi directly from Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Essembi is your all-in-one solution for building better software, faster. It eliminates the need for multiple, expensive tools and the headaches of managing them. Forget wrangling conflicting data and building custom integrations. Essembi brings your entire team together on a single, customizable platform.

Essembi for Microsoft Teams allows you to:

  • Create Essembi tickets from personal and group chats

  • Create Essembi tickets from team channels

  • Include existing message subjects and texts in tickets

  • Easily share new tickets with colleagues in Microsoft Teams

Once tickets are created, you can log into Essembi to plan roadmaps, customize agile workflows, manage sprints, and more!

In order to use this app. Users must have an active Essembi account, please contact our support team for more details.

title: LawVu for Microsoft Teams
shortDescription: Bring LawVu to where your users work to boost productivity across every team
Description:
Raise legal requests inside Microsoft Teams to boost

productivity

LawVu for Microsoft Teams takes streamlined legal intake to the next level, making it easy to

raise legal requests without leaving Microsoft Teams.
Switching apps and learning new

systems means more time and effort to engage Legal, which impacts relationships and quality of

service. By bringing intake to your users, you create a more effective partnership between Legal

and the business - driving efficiency across every team.

How it works

LawVu users can raise legal requests inside Microsoft Teams. The app captures all relevant

fields, including content and attachments from the original Microsoft Teams message, and creates a

matter in LawVu so it's part of Legal's system of record.
Key details of a matter

created in Microsoft Teams are visible to all channel members, providing transparency and audit

trails anytime.

Capabilities

  • Create new matters from Microsoft Teams

  • Retrieve details about a matter or contract into an Outlook email or a

    Microsoft Teams message using our search-based message extension

  • Query records in your legal workspace using natural language

    interaction and Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365

Copilot Prompts

  • Fetch matters related to 'NDA'

  • Fetch matters currently with the status 'On Hold'

  • Fetch contracts in the 'Draft' status

  • Fetch contracts created since 'June 2, 2023'

Requirements

  • A subscription to LawVu is required. If you don't have an account, visit

    href="https://lawvu.com/getting-started"

    >https://lawvu.com/getting-started.

Known limitations

  • File attachments on a message may be included in the new matter,

    however Media files (such as inline images) are not currently

    supported.

LawVu is a cloud-based legal operations management software for

enterprise businesses.

title: Segmail Campaigns
shortDescription: Send campaign-style (or mail merged) emails in your Outlook with views and link tracking.
Description:
Segmail is the email tracking and campaign tool designed for sales and marketing people without stepping outside of Outlook. Segmail provides:

  • Open tracking: See if your recipient opens your email.

  • Link tracking: See if your recipients click on any links in the email.

  • Send as a Campaign: Simply click "Send" in your Outlook and Segmail will automatically split it up into individual emails addressed to single individual addresses where recipients cannot see other recipients. No additional service required. Note that Campaign mode will not work with distribution lists - you will need to expand all distribution lists in your TO field before sending in the Campaign mode.

  • **NEW** You can now upload an Excel list of recipients and mail merge field for campaign emails! This is currently limited to only 20 recipients for each campaign email.


If you would like to see more features, simply install the add-in, reach out to us via the "Contact Us" link. You don't even need to go to our website, although we would be happy to have you!


Add-in capabilities

When this add-in is used, it:

  • Can send data over the Internet

  • Can read or modify the contents of any item in your mailbox, and create new items. It can access personal information - such as the body, subject, sender, recipients, or attachments - in any message item. It may send this data to a third-party service.

  • Can read your contact list and use contact details such as "Firstname", "Lastname", "CompanyName", etc for inserting into your campaign emails - ie. Mailmerging.

  • Can append tracking pixels in the emails you are sending to your recipients.


This add-in can launch itself when:

  • The user is composing an email.

  • The user sends an email.

title: Reach 360 EU
shortDescription: Get alerts about new, upcoming, and overdue Reach 360 EU training.
Description:
Reach 360 EU, part of Articulate 360, is a fast, frictionless learning management system (LMS) that makes it easy to distribute training. The Reach 360 EU app is designed for users of Articulate 360 who are seeking seamless integration with Microsoft Teams. This app caters to educators, trainers, instructional designers, and learners who utilize Articulate 360 for creating and managing courses and learning paths.


The Reach 360 EU app offers a streamlined communication channel within Microsoft Teams, enhancing the user experience for Articulate 360 subscribers. It enables direct messaging notifications for crucial events such as course and learning path enrollment and reminders for past due and upcoming courses and learning paths. By consolidating notifications and updates within Microsoft Teams, this app ensures that users stay informed and engaged with their learning journey without the need to switch between platforms.


The Reach 360 EU app seamlessly integrates with Microsoft Teams, leveraging its robust communication and collaboration features. Users can access Reach 360 EU notifications directly within the Microsoft Teams interface, enhancing accessibility and convenience. Additionally, the Reach 360 EU app interacts with Articulate 360 to fetch relevant course and learning path data, ensuring accurate and timely notifications.


To utilize this app, users must have an active Reach 360 EU account. Integration with Microsoft Teams requires users to have access to Microsoft Teams within their organization's subscription. No additional software installation is necessary, as Reach 360 EU operates within the Microsoft Teams environment.


Please note: The Reach 360 EU app is specifically tailored for users in the EU. There is also a US version available called "Reach 360," which caters to users in the United States.


Capabilities:

  1. Direct Messaging Notifications: Receive instant notifications within Microsoft Teams regarding course and learning path enrollment and reminders for past due and due courses and learning paths.

  2. Seamless Integration: Access Reach 360 EU notifications directly within Microsoft Teams, eliminating the need for switching between platforms.

  3. Rich Previews: Share rich previews of courses and learning paths directly within Microsoft Teams, facilitating collaboration and engagement among team members.


Limitations and Conditions:

  1. This app relies on the availability and functionality of Articulate 360 and Microsoft Teams APIs. Any changes or disruptions to these APIs may affect the performance of Reach 360 EU.

  2. While this app facilitates communication and collaboration, it does not directly manage or modify course content within Articulate 360 or Reach 360 EU.

  3. Users must ensure they have appropriate permissions and access levels within Articulate 360, Reach 360 EU, and Microsoft Teams to utilize this app effectively. Please visit our support page for more details.


The Reach 360 EU app offers a valuable extension to Articulate 360 users by providing seamless communication and collaboration within the familiar environment of Microsoft Teams. With its direct messaging notifications and rich preview capabilities, Reach 360 EU enhances the learning experience and fosters collaboration among team members.

title: 360 Documents
shortDescription: 360 Documents allows you to quickly and conveniently move your emails to a secure cloud archive.
Description: The 360 Documents Office add-in allows you to quickly and conveniently move your emails to a secure cloud archive. You will be able to flexibly navigate and search through your emails.

title: DiagnoPhish Reporter
shortDescription: Phishing reporting tool (for DiagnoPhish users only)
Description:
When you detect an mail that looks like a phishing email, click the button provided by this Add-In to report it.

If it was a training email from DiagnoPhish, you will get instant feedback.

If it was an email from any other source, it will be forwarded to an internal email address specified by your IT Team for further analysis.

DiagnoPhish is a Swiss cybersecurity awareness training platform, designed to train organizations and their employees to recognize and deflect cybersecurity risks.

DiagnoPhish Reporter is an Outlook Add-In designed for DiagnoPhish users. It is only operational as part as an ongoing training.

More information on https://diagnophish.ch

title: Cellopoint Defender Add-In for Outlook
shortDescription: Report suspicious messages.
Description:
Stay protected from phishing and spam with Cellopoint Defender Add-in for Outlook and seamless management of reported suspicious messages. Users can submit suspicious emails to the Cellopoint SOC team for further analysis using an integrated feedback form. If analyzed as spam or phishing, our SOC team will find similar email messages within the organization and remediate them with Cellopoint Defender for Microsoft 365.

Cellopoint Defender Add-in for Outlook Capabilities:

  • Report suspicious email messages.

  • Provide feedback to Cellopoint’s SOC team on reported email messages.

To leverage Cellopoint Defender Add-in for Outlook, the user's organization must have a Cellopoint Defender for Microsoft 365 subscription.

Add-in Capabilities

When this add-in is used, it:

  • Can send data over the Internet.

  • Can access and modify personal information in the active message, such as the body, subject, sender, recipients, and attachment information. It may send this data to a third-party service.

title: Ironclad EU
shortDescription: Effortlessly manage contracts with Ironclad EU on Microsoft Teams
Description:
Ironclad EU on Microsoft Teams empowers you to seamlessly manage your contracts, ensuring efficiency and clarity in your approval processes. Whether you're launching workflows, reviewing details, or customizing notification settings, Ironclad EU keeps you in control every step of the way.

Key Benefits:

- Effortless Contract Management: With Ironclad EU, launching and tracking contracts becomes a breeze, allowing you to focus on what matters most.

- Transparent Approval Tracking: Stay informed about the status of your requests with real-time notifications delivered directly to Microsoft Teams.

- Customized Notifications: Tailor your notification preferences to suit your workflow participation, ensuring you receive updates precisely when and where you need them.

Features:

- Launch contracts directly from Microsoft Teams.

- Review detailed workflow information within the familiar Teams interface.

- Customize notification settings for personalized updates.

- Receive real-time notifications about important approval activity.

- Stay informed about the status of your requests without leaving Microsoft Teams.

Ironclad EU on Microsoft Teams is designed to seamlessly integrate into your workflow, providing a frictionless experience for users across industries. Whether you're managing contracts, approvals, or any other processes requiring oversight, Ironclad EU ensures that you're always in the know.

Use of Ironclad EU on Microsoft teams requires an active subscription to [Ironclad](https://ironcladapp.com).

Support:

Need assistance or have questions? Visit our help center for comprehensive support resources.

This app is only available in the European (EU) region.

title: OptimateIQ
shortDescription: OptimateIQ Copilot, an augmented AI Assistant powered by Generative AI
Description:
OptimateIQ Copilot, boosts efficiency by automating routine tasks and enhancing accuracy with consistent, error-free outputs. It improves decision-making through data-driven insights, reduces costs, and scales operations.

OptimateIQ's Copilot seamlessly transitions from a Human-out-of-the-Loop (HOOL) model to a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL), ensuring data accuracy through human verification and adjustments when necessary. This harmonious integration of automation with the precision of human expertise delivers superior quality results and drives better business outcomes.

title: Settlement Reminders
shortDescription: Automatically generate reminders for important dates related to your property settlement
Description:
Settlement Reminders is a seamless, efficient solution for managing conveyancing deadlines within Outlook. Its simple, powerful interface offers tailored configurations for each transaction type. By organising your conveyancing transactions, it reduces risk and improves efficiency.

Settlement Reminders automatically generates reminders for all the important dates related to your property sale or purchase. Our Outlook add-in calculates these dates for you based on the exchange date and settlement period and sends them straight to your calendar. The reminders are fully customisable, and automatically adjust for non-business days, saving you the pain and worry of working these all out yourself.

Conveyancers and solicitors managing conveyancing matters will love how easy it is to stay on top of property settlement deadlines, efficiently and conveniently from within Outlook.

Settlement Reminders works with Microsoft 365 accounts and requires Exchange Online. Contact your administrator or visit https://www.microsoft.com/microsoft-365/exchange/email if you do not have a Microsoft 365 account with Exchange Online.

Settlement Reminders also requires its own license. Visit https://settlementreminders.com to view plans and pricing and use the form to request a license, or email info@settlementreminders.com.

NOTE Settlement Reminders is not supported on Internet Explorer.

title: SponsorCX
shortDescription: Keep better track of conversations around the events and deals you are making
Description:
SponsorCX's innovative system streamlines your workflow by seamlessly integrating with Outlook to automatically import emails directly into our platform. This integration ensures that all your email communications are efficiently captured and organized within SponsorCX, eliminating the need for manual entry and reducing the risk of errors. By automating this process, SponsorCX enhances productivity and allows you to focus more on building valuable relationships and managing your sponsorships effectively.

Requires a SponsorCX account to make use of this add-in. Reach out to our team if you're interested in using SponsorCX https://www.sponsorcx.com/request-demo/

title: Soursa
shortDescription: Move emails to the right folder instantly with a single click, based on suggested folders.
Description:
Soursa – Your Personal Email Assistant

Soursa helps Outlook users manage their inboxes efficiently by automating email sorting into folders. With AI-driven suggestions, Soursa predicts the best folder for each email based on your previous sorting behavior, saving you time and reducing the clutter in your inbox. Simply click once to move an email to its suggested destination without expanding the entire folder tree.

Key Features:

  • One-click email filing with smart folder suggestions.

  • Deep integration with Outlook using Microsoft Graph API.

  • Works with all desktop versions of Outlook.

title: Hypertype
shortDescription: Generate replies with your data in Outlook and Intercom.
Description:
Supercharge your team's productivity. Get revenue gain with high-quality answers. 3X response time.

Hypertype automatically drafts replies with the most relevant information. Seamlessly reply to emails in your Outlook inbox. Connect and fetch data from your website, files, email history, and your apps, in one-click.

📩 Outlook Add-in

Effortlessly reply to customers with a single click, saving you time as the system automatically drafts responses based on your company data and how you write.

🗃️ Data integrations

You can easily connect your data from various sources, including your website, Notion, Calendly, as well as PDFs, CSVs, and Excel sheets. Zero technical set-up.

🎙️ Tailor Your Tone

Customize your response tone to suit your needs – whether it's formal, casual, interested, or even a polite rejection.

Right after you start composing a new message, or replying to an existing one, you will be presented with a notification, containing a button that will boot-up Hypertype Add-in.

Our continuous efforts are dedicated to enhancing your Hypertype experience. Should you have any inquiries or feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at support@hypertype.co.

title: pShareEmail
shortDescription: Efficiently save your emails to SharePoint, OneDrive, or Teams
Description:
pShareEmail is a sophisticated 365 Office add in designed to significantly enhance user productivity through its innovative features.

With a few clicks, users can effortlessly navigate all 365 repositories they have access to, including SharePoint Online, OneDrive, Teams, and email content.

The application provides users with a complete history of the selected email sender, enabling easy retrieval and review of previous correspondence.

Users can select up to 100 emails to copy to a specified destination, with the capability to insert or update content types and metadata for each email.

The Add in generates an exact copy of the email as an EML file, a PDF document of the original email, and includes all attachments. Each email and its contents are meticulously saved in a separate folder named the subject and the sending date and time.

PShareEmail is available in all versions of Outlook. 365, Web or New outlook.

benefits

  • Enhanced Navigation: Empowers users to seamlessly navigate SharePoint Online, OneDrive, and Teams Document Libraries to find the context they need.

  • Effortless Communication: Simplifies the process of sending emails into Microsoft Teams chats or tags

  • Improved Collaboration and Security: Allows users to save emails into various repositories, boosting collaboration and security.

  • Integrated Information Management: Connects Outlook users with SharePoint and Teams for superior information management.

  • Universal Compatibility:Function across all versions of Outlook, including mobile devices.

  • Increased Adoption:Encourages users to embrace the Microsoft 365 ecosystem

Features

  • Easily Search: Find what you need in SharePoint, Teams, and OneDrive.

  • Organize with Ease: Set your email category to "Saved Email" for quick access.

  • Convert with a Click: Turn emails into PDFs or EML files effortlessly.

  • Stay Organized: Create folders to keep all your email content neatly sorted.

  • Quick Access: Pin your saved locations for faster use.

  • Save to SharePoint: Store emails in SharePoint Document Libraries and Lists.

  • Flexible Fields: Save email attributes as different SharePoint fields.

  • OneDrive Integration: Save emails directly to OneDrive.

  • Team Collaboration: Send emails to Teams channels or specific Teams tags.

  • Link Attachments: Insert link attachments into Teams chats.

  • Attachment Options: Choose where to save your attachments.

  • Update with Ease: Update metadata and content types effortlessly.

  • Find Emails Fast: Quickly locate previous emails from selected senders.

  • Time Filtering: Easily filter previous emails by time.

  • Bulk Saving: Save up to 100 emails in one go.

  • Seamless Background Operation: The add in works in the background, so you can keep working without interruption.

  • Universal Compatibility: Works on all versions of Outlook, including mobile devices.

Learn More: https://meta-365.com/pshareemail/
