title: Core Fax (AU)
shortDescription: Use the Core Fax app to securely send documents from Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Core Fax integration with Microsoft Teams lets users send faxes directly from Microsoft Teams in a secured and streamlined fashion. The Core Fax Microsoft Teams application eliminates mishandling of sensitive information by allowing users to manage document transmissions without leaving Microsoft Teams – so no printing or device switching.

OpenText™ Core Fax™ is an enterprise-grade digital fax solution offering businesses of all sizes the features and functionality they need to keep communications flowing. Core Fax solution provides complete encryption for faxes with centralized traceability for easier audits and optional zero retention settings to further ensure document protection. Core Fax enhances productivity, reduces costs and helps organizations comply the with highest security requirements.

Core Fax cloud account is required to use the Microsoft Teams Core Fax application.

Important: Core Fax has three Microsoft Teams apps. Make sure to select the appropriate version based on the location of your Core Fax account.

The domain corresponds to the region of your enterprise account:

* For xmedius.com – select Core Fax (US)

* For xmedius.ca – select Core Fax (CA)

* For xmedius.eu – select Core Fax (EMEA)

* For corefax.opentext.au – select Core Fax (AU)

To learn more about Core Fax, please visit our web site

title: Meridian Sync
shortDescription: Effortlessly sync emails to Meridian CRM, linking them to contacts, companies, and deals.
Description: Effortlessly sync your emails to the Meridian CRM. Designed for seamless integration, this tool allows you to associate your email communications with relevant contacts, companies, and deals in your CRM. Simply click "Sync" to transfer your email and attachments directly into the CRM, ensuring accurate and organized data for your team.

title: LockDoc
shortDescription: Send end-to-end encrypted files from right with in Outlook. No account required for recipient.
Description:
Simple way to send attachments securely from right within Outlook. Sign up

How it works:

  • 📎 Click the LockDoc add-in icon to open the taskpane, authenticate and then select your files

  • 🔗 A download link for the encrypted files is inserted into the email body

  • 📨 Get decryption code via email/SMS or copy it manually.

Recipient just needs to paste code at the link - no account needed! Files decrypt and download automatically.

Things to note:

  • No account required for recipients. They only need a passphrase to download the files. Upon entering the passphrase, the files are automatically decrypted and downloaded

  • Log history of files you've sent via LockDoc link can be viewed in the dashboard

  • Exceed Outlook attachment size limit. There is no cap on how big the files you upload are, only the storage allotment of the plan you select

  • The add-in uses LaunchEvents functionality to securely handle the sending process. When you send an email, the add-in temporarily intercepts the send event to distribute encryption credentials and ensure secure delivery to recipients.

Pricing:

  • Per email: Pay-as-you-go secure sending. Only pay when you send encrypted files. $3/secure email + $0.50 per GB. No storage limit.

  • Basic: $9/month. Best for regular individual use. Comes with 2GB of storage

  • Business: $18/month. Comes with 30GB storage and client portal.

  • Business Premium: $42/month. Comes with 100GB of storage and client portal

appName: Document Central Link by Simova GmbH
title: Document Central Link
shortDescription: Upload attachments to the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central extension Document Central.
Description:
Keep working directly where you are - In Outlook!

 

Are your tired of having to switch from Microsoft Outlook back to Business Central to manually archive your email or email attachments?

 

Archive the email itself or the email attachments directly from the Outlook interface with the Document Central Link add-in to the digital archive Document Central within Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central.

Document Central Link makes the process-related archiving of documents retrieved via email as easy as possible.

Document Central Link recognizes the sender email address and provides you with matching records from your Business Central. With just one click of a button the documents are archived securely.

 

Why you should work with Document Central Link:

 

  • Convenient archiving directly from the Microsoft Outlook interface

  • Available for Outlook Online and Desktop Application

  • Domain Matching for automated recognition of sender relation to existing customer, contact or vendor

  • Show related records to targed record

  • Fast & easy setup

 

Boost your productivity with Document Central Link now!

title: XpertEye
shortDescription: XpertEye instant conference creator
Description:
Create an XpertEye conference with your contacts easily and instantly.

Your contacts can join your conference directly, using the link or the QR Code.

In order to use this app, users must have an active account. Please contact our support team for more details. support@xe.live

title: Permido
shortDescription: Dette addin bliver brugt i kombination med Permido's sikkermail produkter.
Description:
Permido - Sikker e-mail og digital post i Outlook

Permido er et brugervenligt Outlook-tilføjelsesprogram, der gør det nemt og sikkert at sende fortrolige e-mails og hente Digital Post – helt i overensstemmelse med GDPR, NIS2 og gældende lovgivning.

Funktioner:

  • Krypterede e-mails: Send sikre beskeder direkte fra Outlook med ét klik.

  • Digital Post-integration: Automatisk hentning af post fra e-Boks og Virk.

  • Lovgivningsmæssig overholdelse: Støtter krav fra GDPR, NIS2 og mere.

  • Sikker portal: Modtagere uden Outlook kan svare via en krypteret webside.

  • Nem installation: Klar til brug direkte i din eksisterende arbejdsgang.

Brug af Outlook-funktioner:

Hændelsesbaseret aktivering: Dette tilføjelsesprogram benytter hændelsesbaseret aktivering (f.eks. ved afsendelse, oprettelse og ændring af modtagere) for at levere sin funktionalitet. Afhængigt af kundens indstillinger kan Permido tilgå hele e-mailens indhold og metadata for at sikre korrekt håndtering og lovgivningsmæssig overholdelse.

SmartAlerts: Permido benytter SmartAlert-funktionalitet til at vise meddelelser i realtid under oprettelse eller afsendelse af e-mails. Disse beskeder hjælper brugeren med at identificere problemer som manglende kryptering, følsomme oplysninger eller ukorrekte modtagere og understøtter overholdelse af interne og eksterne krav.

Permido er udviklet i Danmark og anvendes allerede af både offentlige og private virksomheder. Tag kontrol over din digitale kommunikation – sikkert, enkelt og effektivt.

Læs mere på permido.dk

title: CaseMail.AI For Outlook

CaseMail empowers users to send, track, and certify entire email threads directly from Microsoft Outlook, combining AI-driven identity verification with blockchain-certified proof to ensure unmatched security and privacy.

CaseMail certifies communications without depending on external servers, providing maximum confidentiality, authenticity, and compliance.

Our Outlook add-in works in both read and compose modes, integrates with Microsoft SSO for secure login, and requires no additional installations or tools. Just install, log in, and start certifying emails with confidence.

Key Benefits:

  • Provide clients with free secure eDiscovery accounts

  • Integrate easily with CRM systems and custom environments

Account & Subscription Information

- If you already have an account, connect your mailbox.

- If you do not have an account, visit casemail.ai or email support@casemail.ai.

Note: Use of this add-in requires an active CaseMail subscription plan. Certain features may require a paid plan.

This add-in is intended for enterprise users and is not designed for individual personal use.

CaseMail is designed for speed, consistency, and accessibility following Microsoft's Outlook Add-in guidelines.

Click "Get It Now" to get started!

title: PortalTalk
shortDescription: Transform Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 into a Secure and Efficient Collaboration Hub
Description:
<

Discover PortalTalk: The Ultimate Solution for Digital Collaboration

Effective and secure collaboration is essential for success. PortalTalk offers a solution that fulfils these needs and streamlines digital collaboration within Microsoft Teams.

The Power of PortalTalk

  • Improve your productivity:
    Don't get lost in teams anymore. PortalTalk provides you with a personal workspace where your teams are organized into categories.

  • Set up workspaces quickly and consistently:
    PortalTalk offers automatic provisioning with templates for fast and uniform setup. This saves you time, prevents sprawl, and keeps your Microsoft environment efficient and organized.

  • Control access completely automatically:
    PortalTalk automates access control with periodic Access Reviews. This ensures a safe and controlled environment without extra effort from IT.

  • Archive inactive workspaces:
    PortalTalk makes archiving easy with automated lifecycle management. This keeps your Microsoft environment organized without you having to check for activity yourself.

  • Fully integrated into your Microsoft environment:
    PortalTalk integrates completely with Microsoft, so you always work within the same platform.

  • Track the development of collaboration:
    PortalTalk provides insight into the state of collaboration in your organization. Both through notifications and actions to users, and KPIs with suggested actions to administrators.

Security and Data Protection

At PortalTalk, data security is a top priority. The product uses various technical and organizational measures to protect personal information against unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. Your data is stored as long as necessary for you, or as required by applicable law.

Future-Oriented Roadmap

PortalTalk has a clear roadmap with four releases per year. The team consists of dedicated specialists who ensure continuous improvement and adaptation of PortalTalk to the changing needs of the market. Customer wishes are incorporated into the product, and developments in the Microsoft platform are closely monitored.

Getting Started: Open the PortalTalk app and follow the onboarding wizard. You'll need an active Microsoft 365 user account and a Global Admin account for setup. Also a service account and Entra ID group should be created during onboarding.

title: Give River
shortDescription: Boost morale, engagement, and retention with peer recognition and rewards.
Description:
Transform your team into a happy, healthy, high-performing powerhouse with Give River's seamless Microsoft Teams integration. Our B2B SaaS platform brings recognition, rewards, and charitable impact directly into your existing workflow.

**Main Features:**

Send meaningful recognition using drop emojis. Award virtual "drops" to celebrate wins and build stronger team connections. Experience gamified engagement through customizable seasons modeled after professional sports. Track progress with River Rankings leaderboard that promotes healthy competition while fostering collaboration.

**Problems it Solves:**

Combat employee turnover costs by creating a culture people love. Replace sporadic recognition with peer-to-peer appreciation in your daily workflow. Research shows just 6 meaningful recognition moments per year increase engagement by 30%. Bridge generational divides through universal values of gratitude and generosity. Eliminate the complexity of managing multiple engagement tools.

**Target Audience:**

Small to mid-sized organizations (20-250 employees) seeking improved team performance, retention, and workplace culture. Perfect for HR leaders, team managers, and executives focused on employee experience.

**Capabilities:**

1. Send/receive drops with customizable limits

2. Create recognition posts with personalized messages and team value tags

3. Add bonus drops to recognition messages via drop emoji reactions or action buttons

**Limitations:**

This Teams app provides core recognition and leaderboard functionality. Advanced features including detailed analytics, custom challenges, event management, comprehensive reward redemption, HRIS integration, and detailed reporting require access to our web application platform.

**Expected Outcomes:**

Immediate: 40%+ increase in peer recognition frequency, visible culture shift toward appreciation.

Sustained: Double-digit improvements in satisfaction scores, reduced turnover costs, stronger value alignment.

Long-term: Self-sustaining recognition culture, higher performing teams, enhanced employer brand.

Give River transforms routine workplace interactions into culture-building moments that drive business results while creating positive community impact.

To use this app, users must have an active Give River account. Please [get in touch](https://www.giveriver.com/resources/help) with our support team for more details.

title: WristPlanner
shortDescription: Task management app that helps users plan, assign, and track daily tasks
Description:
WristPlanner is a task management solution designed to streamline daily planning and task coordination directly within Microsoft Teams. The app provides an interactive taskboard that displays tasks scheduled for the current day, with intuitive navigation to previous or future dates via a built-in calendar. Users can add new tasks, assign them to team members using drag-and-drop functionality, and customize the taskboard view to suit their workflow.

Main Features:

  • Real-time taskboard with manual and automatic refresh options

  • Drag-and-drop task assignment

  • Task pinning for recurring or reference tasks

  • Calendar-based navigation for daily planning

  • Customizable taskboard views

Target Audience:

WristPlanner is ideal for teams and organizations using Microsoft 365 who need a lightweight, visual task management tool integrated into their daily Teams environment. It supports team leads, project managers, and operational staff who coordinate daily task execution.

Limitations and Conditions:

  • In order to use this app, you need to have an active Microsoft work or school account.

  • At least one shared plan must exist in Microsoft Planner.

  • Task management is limited to the scope of the selected task plan.

  • Task assignment and visibility are based on user permissions within the Teams environment.

  • Features such as task pinning and drag-and-drop are available only within the Teams app interface.

  • Any workflows or integrations outside of Microsoft Teams (e.g., external task systems or reporting tools) are not part of the core app functionality and must be configured separately.

This app is built to work entirely within Microsoft Teams, and all core features are accessible without requiring users to leave the Teams environment.

For more information, please Contact Us.

title: Commuty
shortDescription: Optimise your employees’ commute & facilitate new ways of working (parking, mobility, booking).
Description:
Commuty is a B2B product developed by COMMUTY SA.

The goal of Commuty is to reduce the number of cars used for commuting.

Commuty provides methodologies to assess appropriate solutions and implement them in companies thanks to 3 main missions (web & mobile): smart parking management, employee assistance and mobility improvement.

Please note your organization must subscribe to Commuty (and its Outlook Integration) before you use it.

Optimization as a service.

Commuty is a software as a service that helps Facility & HR managers optimise the use of their corporate parking, mobility and office space through a fair and automated reservation system.

Our modular approach responds to your evolving needs and allows your employees to efficiently organise their workday.

Our team of experts advises you on best practices and makes sure your employees adopt change with meaning and success.

Smart Parking

Improve parking management:

  1. Employees enter booking requests for their parking spot in 3 clicks through the Commuty app.

  2. Every day the system dynamically distributes resources according to fair rules and mobility priorities set by the company. Employees get notified about their request.

  3. Employees get access to their parking spot. Those who did not get a spot can easily find alternatives thanks to the green mobility module.

Green mobility

Offer green mobility alternatives.

  • Carpooling: Offer carpool matching to your employees and benefit from tax advantage (depends on country).

  • Shared assets: Manage shared bikes and electric steps.

  • Bicycle: Introduce cycler matching and km refund (depends on country) to your employees to encourage biking to the office.

Desk booking

How does the desk booking module work?

  1. The system allows your employees to make a desk reservation when planning to come to the office, and works on a first-come-first-served basis.

  2. This tool is also ideal for ensuring social distancing and managing covid tracing since you will be able to pinpoint which desk was occupied by which specific employee.

  3. On top of that, the desk booking module gives you full reporting on your office space usage, which will allow you to make the necessary optimizations.

title: Access Manager
shortDescription: Manage user access easier.
Description:
As an IT administrator have you ever faced a situation when you needed to assign new employee the same accesses and permissions as the team the employee is joining? Maybe you used a script to accomplish this. But what if the new user should receive only part of the permissions of the base user?

Well, Access Manager is here to help you with that! Our app will allow you easily copy the permissions of one user to other users. Just choose the base user, choose the permissions you are looking to clone and then choose the users you want the permissions to be assigned.

**Follow these steps to install our app.**

1. Purchase the license. You can purchase only one license for you. Currently we do not support multiple license purchase model. If your colleagues need this app as well tell them to purchase this offer from their side.
2. Consent the permission to the app. We need following four permissions: User.Read.All, Group.ReadWrite.All, GroupMember.ReadWrite.All, Directory.ReadWrite.All. We do not collect any data. We work directly with Graph API to accomplish the tasks.
3. Install Access Manager by Madatech from Microsoft Teams App Store.
3. Share with your IT administrator friends to ease their life as well 😊.

**Here are instructions for tab app**

1. Choose the template user. User position can help you find the right person with matching permissions.
2. When you choose the user you will see that user's all access permissions. Check all the permissions you want to copy to target user. Press “Assign Permissions” button.
3. Search for the user you want to assign chosen permissions. You're done!

**Here are the instructions for the messaging extension**

1. Enter Template user UPN or user's username that will serve as an example (usually matching with email).
2. Enter Target User UPN or the user's username that is going to receive these permissions.
3. Press Submit. The permissions are copied!

If you have any questions please fill free to [contact us](https://accessmanager1234.azurewebsites.net/contact). We will respond as soon as possible.

*Please note that this app is for IT Administrators and requires admin consent for given permissions. You have to consent these permissions on your subscription activation process. Otherwise, the app won't work!*

shortDescription: Search, share, preview Bigtincan content and receive notifications.
Description:
Bigtincan is a leading Sales Enablement provider that empowers customer-facing teams to prepare, engage, measure, and continually improve the buying experience.

With the Bigtincan app, you can:
• Search content from Bigtincan within Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365
• Share content of your choice
• View content previews
• Receive notifications about activity on content shared
• Prepare for your meetings by adding content from Bigtincan
• Present content during the meeting
• Get answers from Genie in meetings

**What's new:**
GenieAI is now available in meetings. Get answers to your questions along with content recommendations while preparing for your meetings and also during live meetings.
Bigtincan app works with Microsoft Copilot for Microsoft 365. Sample prompts:
• search content related to Bigtincan XR in Bigtincan
• search files related to Bigtincan XR in Bigtincan, published after 2023-11-01

SearchAI - Bringing SearchAI experience inside Microsoft Teams
Give sellers immediate, expert answers to proprietary content, brand, and product questions. The best part? There’s no risk of “hallucinated” AI responses if the answer can’t be found in your content.
SearchAI is part of Bigtincan's GenieAI™ technology. To know more about GenieAI™ , please visit [Bigtincan GenieAI™](https://www.bigtincan.com/genie-ai/)

title: BitFractal
shortDescription: AI powered Text-to-Speech (TTS) generator for voice over content creation
Description:
BitFractal helps content creators, across Media & Telco, Education, Professional Services, Travel, and other industries, create engaging content and experiences, using our hundreds of AI synthetic voices for most languages and dialects, producing high-quality voice over projects for a fraction of the cost and time of using a studio. The generated content can then be used as video voice overs, IVR and Voice Mail audio prompts, added to websites, used to relay corporate messages, for audio books and more.  

Our Text-to-Speech App was designed to run on Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, and Microsoft Outlook, meeting users where they are, with an easy and intuitive interface that leverage the benefits of Microsoft’s productivity and collaboration tools to completely transform the content creation process. All that with native Single-sign-On, making it even easier for users to start building voice contents without having to create accounts or manage logins and passwords.

Using Microsoft Azure Cognitive Services, combining Speech and Text services, BitFractal is a hub of micro-applications that can create content for the users and have them verbalized in a variety of different languages and speaking styles.

BitFractal removes the complexity of advanced AI technologies, by infusing them into productivity tools in a way that becomes natural for business users to benefit from them without having to worry about the ins and outs of the underlying technology stack. It just works and that’s what matters for users.

In order to use this app. Users must have an account with BitFractal, please contact us via [our support page](https://www.bitfractal.com/support) or [email](mailto:support@bitfractal.com) for details on how to sign up and get started with BitFractal.

title: Breakthru
shortDescription: Tiny breaks to share and play, built right into your day.
Description:
Take tiny breaks in your day with Breakthru. Clear your head, find inspiration, breathe, with a guided system of two-minute movement-based breaks. Choose to feel joy, energy, centeredness, or confidence. Share and play them together to build a collective break taking habit as a team.
Set a team challenge, give breakthru to a colleague, or use it as an ice breaker in meetings. Create custom reminders for yourself, and unlock new breaks over time. Invite moments of movement into your day.  
Scientifically proven to increase engagement, build resilience and manage stress, movement gets your heart rate up, grows your brain, and prepares you to think and to learn.
Breakthru is a tool for all ages. Free for schools, forever. Fully integrated into Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365.

**How to:** A guide will appear at the beginning of each Breakthru. Simply stand, make some room, and follow the movements. There is no right or wrong way to play. Your movement will generate a sound.
**Play:** Launch Breakthru, select the Play tab, then pick a mood and go. Feel joy, energy, centeredness, or confidence.
**Set Reminders:** Breakthru invites you to set reminders to help you build a breaktaking habit. Manage them from the reminder tab.
**Give:** Give the gift of a break to your team. Activate Breakthru in a chat or channel by tapping the Breakthru icon and give a break to your team. Choose a mood you’d like to gift or share them all. Bring energy to your team’s day. 
**Meet:** Share Breakthru in a meeting or a class to take a group break. Add Breakthru when scheduling the gathering, or activate it in the meeting chat via @breakthu. Create collective energy, by bringing people together through movement and play. 
**Set a team challenge:** Launch a challenge in a channel or a chat as a fun way to encourage your team to take healthy breaks throughout the week. 
**In School:** Breakthru microbreaks teach students to articulate how they’re feeling, imagine how they want to feel, and help them learn healthy breaktaking habits to get there. For older students, it’s a chance to check in with themselves and each other. Movement is an antidote to anxiety. Visually led and choreographed by movement practitioners, the microbreaks are accessible to students of all ages and users worldwide.

title: Calamari
shortDescription: Simple HR solution for attendance tracking and leave management
Description:
**Unleash growth by organizing your HR in a productive and simple way**

Calamari is a **modern HR tool** suited to the needs of **fast-growing companies** that put strategy above repetitive tasks. It supports HR processes related to **attendance tracking** and **employee leave management**. It's perfect for organizations with stationary and remote employees.

The application was created out of a **deep need to simplify HR processes** and has been appreciated in over 100 countries around the world for:
* simplicity and quick implementation,
* integrations with popular business tools,
* reliable customer service.

As a company working with remote and stationary employees, **Calamari understands perfectly the challenges and problems** faced by remote and distributed teams. That's why we concentrate on enabling companies to focus on business development.

**As part of the integration with Microsoft Teams, you can:**
* track attendance,
* check the worked hours,
* submit leave requests,
* check entitlement,
* check your scheduled absences,
* check upcoming absences of other employees,
* receive notifications regarding changes in the status of your leave requests.

Calamari also integrates with Microsoft 365 and Outlook.

To use the integration, you need to have a user account in Calamari. To enable the integration, you must have an administrator account. If you want to give the integration a go, but you don't have a Calamari account yet, you can [sign up for a trial period](https://app.calamari.io/o/sign-up-company).

If you need any help or have any questions about the Calamari integration, [contact us](https://calamari.io/contact) or visit our [Help Center](https://help.calamari.io/en)

title: Collaboard
shortDescription: Collaboard is a secure online whiteboard for visual collaboration.
Description:
Collaboard is a secure online whiteboard for visual collaboration, brainstorming, mind mapping, and project planning. Boost online meeting productivity and create outstanding remote workshop and training experiences.

With an emphasis on simplicity and user experience, Collaboard's intuitive user interface allows you to be productive within the first minutes.

On the infinite canvas, teams can work with sticky notes, images, videos, documents, comments, connectors, and much more. Collaboard comes with a wide range of facilitator features like voting, rating, presentation mode, locking, hiding, and pinning content. Leverage the over 150 templates in German and English to kick-start your online whiteboard session.

Collaboards main use cases are:
* Brainstorm with your team and leverage the voting feature to identify the best ideas quickly.
* Plan, execute, and track projects in real time for visual project management.
* Visualize processes and workflows with the intuitive diagramming features.
* Virtual Icebreaker games for online meetings and workshops.
* Interactive and dynamic presentations that will wow your audience.

With the integration of Collaboard into Microsoft Teams you can:
* Add the app to the left toolbar of Microsoft Teams to access it easily within teams.
* You can add a board as a tab in your channel.
* Start a whiteboard session directly in your Microsoft Teams call.

In order to use Collaboard, you need to have an active Collaboard account. Please go to [https://web.collaboard.app/register](https://web.collaboard.app/register) to sign up to Collaboard. With the Free Plan you can create up to 3 projects for free.

Collaboard is available as an app for Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365.

Visit our [Help page](https://help.collaboard.app/microsoft-teams-integration) to learn how to use Collaboard for Microsoft Teams.

Need immediate help? [Contact us](https://www.collaboard.app/contact-us).

title: Conclude
shortDescription: Cross-team collaboration and ticketing for streamlined support
Description:
Boost collaboration and manage support tickets, issues, incidents, and bugs from Microsoft Teams using  Conclude Apps. All tickets and activities remain visible and organized inside Microsoft Teams and the Conclude Dashboard (our web-based UI). Additionally, you can unify chats and improve cross-team communication by connecting different Slack and Microsoft Teams with Conclude Link. 

**Conclude Apps** – install no-code apps to manage support tickets, issues, incidents, bug tracking, and more.

**Conclude Apps is best for:**
- Support tickets
- Incident management
- Bug tracking and reporting

**How does the ticketing feature work?**
- A Conclude app (e.g. Support) is installed in the selected channel where tickets are opened
- Members are invited to collaborate inside the channel to resolve the issue or incident 
- All tickets are archived and recorded in Microsoft Teams and the Conclude Dashboard 

**Conclude Link** – connect Microsoft Teams with Slack for direct chats and seamless cross-team collaboration.

**Conclude Link is best for:**
- Connecting Slack and Microsoft Teams
- Collaborating from your preferred platform
- File sharing and direct chats between both programs

**The Dashboard**
- The Dashboard inside Microsoft Teams allows users to customize their apps
- Track activities and get a quick overview of open and closed tickets or issues in one place
- Filter the Dashboard for all types of activities and re-open concluded tickets as needed
- Get access to important insights and key metrics to detect trends over time
- The Conclude Dashboard (web-based UI) can also be accessed via the Conclude website

**Please note:** a Microsoft Teams tenant admin needs to do a first sign-up before any other tenant user can install and use an app.  

Align people in one place and reduce information silos with Conclude for Microsoft Teams. Try Conclude free for 30 days.

**Links:**
Pricing and plan options [https://conclude.io/pricing/](https://conclude.io/pricing/)
Sign up here [https://conclude.io/getstarted](https://conclude.io/getstarted)
Book a demo [https://conclude.io/getstarted/request-demo](https://conclude.io/getstarted/request-demo)
Developer’s Guide [https://conclude.io/doc/developer/](https://conclude.io/doc/developer/)

Blog [https://conclude.io/blog/](https://conclude.io/blog/)

title: ContextSMS - Seamless Texting
shortDescription: Text anyone from Microsoft Teams with ContextSMS
Description:
Sabrhub ContextSMS for Microsoft Teams

ContextSMS transforms your Microsoft Teams environment into a powerful communication hub. Designed for businesses and people that prioritize customer engagement and streamlined operations, our app bridges the gap between formal email exchanges and the immediacy of texting. ContextSMS allows you to send texts, share images, and manage conversations all through Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, and Microsoft 365.

Trusted by:

- Startups
- Fortune 500s
- School Systems
- Legal Offices
- Insurance Agents
- Mom and Pop shops

Key Features:

- **Integrated Texting:** Seamlessly send and receive text messages without switching platforms. 📱
- **Rich Media Messaging:** Enhance conversations with picture messages, and GIFs adding depth to your customer interactions. 🖼️
- **Full Emoji Support:** Add a personal touch to your messages with a wide range of emojis. 😄
- **Mobile Integration:** Stay connected with the Microsoft Teams mobile app, offering the flexibility to communicate on the go. 🌍

Getting started is simple:

- Add Sabrhub ContextSMS to your Microsoft Teams by clicking "Get It Now" and activate an account/phone number TODAY by signing up [here](https://www.sabrhub.com/teams-signup). ✔️

- Create a new chat message like you would in any other messaging app – our interface is designed to be intuitive and as familiar to you as possible! 📝

- Feel free to customize each chat's name to match your contact's name, customer ID, or any other relevant identifier. When the recipient responds, their message will appear seamlessly within the same chat space. 🔍

- Dark Mode - Afterhours texting or conserving battery? Maybe you just like the aesthetic. We've got you covered.

- Unlock the full potential of ContextSMS with a Sabrhub subscription. Start your free trial today and learn more about pricing and subscription options by reaching out to us. 🚀

To use this app. Users must have an active "ContextSMS - Seamless Texting" account, please visit [https://www.sabrhub.com/teams-signup](https://www.sabrhub.com/teams-signup) for more details. 📋

Experience a new era of communication with Sabrhub ContextSMS for Microsoft Teams – where convenience meets connectivity. 🌟

Don't miss out on this opportunity to revolutionize your customer engagement. [SIGN UP TODAY! 🚀](https://www.sabrhub.com/teams-signup)

title: Dovetail
shortDescription: Bring the voice of your customer to life to unlock better product decisions!
Description:
Dovetail is the fastest way to understand your customer. Turn calls, documents, support tickets, and any other user feedback into insights, like magic, and create a single source of truth for customer knowledge to power better decisions across the org.

The Dovetail app for Microsoft Teams works where you work. Share content from your insights hub, get updates about changes in your projects or channels, and receive comments in real-time — all via Teams.

Upgrade to Ask Dovetail to bring your team even closer to the customer:  

- Add Dovetail to any channel in your workspace, ask anything you want to learn about your users , and get instant, evidence-backed customer insights to unblock innovation and faster decision-making.
- Refine your searches with follow-up questions to get the exact insights you and your team need to move forward.
- Stay in the know with Digests. Configure regular text or audio updates of new user data from the queries or projects you care about, delivered straight to any channel in Teams.

**Important information about Ask Dovetail**

We will never perform unexpected actions, such as joining all public channels by default or taking actions, unless prompted by the user. Ask Dovetail uses AI and Large Language Models (LLM), please note that responses generated may occasionally be inaccurate. We encourage you to verify any AI-generated content before relying on it. The AI model we use is Claude 3 Sonnet.

**Data Retention**

We only keep your data on our servers for a very short time while your request is being processed in the region of your Dovetail workspace. Your Teams data is used solely for conversational search and is processed within the LLM environment.

**What We Don’t Do**

We do not use your Teams data (messages, files, etc.) to train or improve any AI models. We are committed to ensuring a secure and transparent experience for all users. If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to reach out at [support@dovetail.com](mailto:support@dovetail.com)

**Supported Platforms & Prerequisites**

Microsoft Teams Integration: Seamlessly operate within Microsoft Teams for direct, in-context research analysis.

Dovetail Account: An active Dovetail account is required to access the repository and unlock the app’s features. [Get Started](https://dovetail.com)

Need to know more? [Get Help](https://dovetail.com/help/integrations/microsoft-teams/)

title: Dropbox
shortDescription: Share files and upload content to Dropbox without leaving Microsoft Teams
Description:
Access and share your Dropbox content in the place where you get your work done each day: Microsoft Teams.

- Share, upload, search, and preview content stored in Dropbox without leaving Microsoft Teams
- Set Dropbox as your default storage location
- Map specific team folders to Microsoft Teams channels for ease of use
- Reduce the need for switching between different applications, saving time and improving overall workflow efficiency
- Streamline communications and the end-to-end content lifecycle in any project by coordinating files across multiple tools to maximize efficiency and productivity
- Leverage Microsoft Teams’ iOS and Android apps to share and access Dropbox files
- Dropbox app is extensible across other Microsoft products such as Outlook and Microsoft 365
- For customers who have purchased Microsoft 365 Copilot, get more value out of information stored in Dropbox with an integration for Copilot. As an example, you can ask Copilot “Help me find pdf files in Dropbox?” and it will return your relevant Dropbox files in its answer

For more information and assistance, please see our [help page](https://help.dropbox.com/integrations/microsoft-teams). An active Dropbox account is required for this app - use [this link](https://www.dropbox.com/register) to sign up for free!

title: EasyMeet 365
shortDescription: Easily schedule meetings, create polls, and connect with busy colleagues.
Description:
Easily schedule meetings, create polls, and seamlessly connect with busy colleagues using **EasyMeet 365**, fully integrated with **Microsoft 365**, **Microsoft Teams**, and **Outlook**. With EasyMeet, you can streamline the process of scheduling appointments and gathering feedback, eliminating the need for endless back-and-forth emails and phone calls.

**Key Features**
- **Easy Poll Creation**:  
  Quickly create polls, add participants, select timeslots, and instantly notify them. Seamlessly share and modify polls for a smooth meeting scheduling experience.
- **Automated Scheduling**:  
  Say goodbye to the annoying task of manually checking everyone’s availability. Once the perfect meeting time is identified, EasyMeet automatically blocks your calendar, ensuring no conflicting appointments.
- **Integrated Add-in**:  
  Elevate your scheduling efficiency with EasyMeet 365's Outlook and Teams add-ins. Seamlessly integrate it into your Microsoft 365 for a unified meeting coordination experience.
- **Delegate Functionality**:  
  Schedule meetings on behalf of others or create polls in their name within your organization.

**Benefits**
- **Focus on What Matters**:  
  Prioritize the meeting itself rather than getting lost in the organizational process.
- **Increased Productivity**:  
  Manual agenda management is time-consuming. Automate tasks and save valuable time.
- **Enhanced Collaboration**:  
  Simplify the coordination process so teams can collaborate more effectively, leading to better decision-making and outcomes.
- **Improved Communication**:  
  Efficient communication ensures everyone is on the same page, reducing the risk of miscommunication.

**Get Started Today!**
Simply use EasyMeet to find the best time to meet, and let it do the rest.

**Interested?**
*Get the App Now!*

Visit our [website](https://www.easylife365.cloud/products/meet/) to learn more or access our detailed [documentation](https://docs.easylife365.cloud/meet).  

For the app to work as intended, please contact your administrator and request activation in your environment.

title: Embark by Hermis
shortDescription: Transform Documents into Micro-Learning Experiences with AI in One Click
Description:
Embark is an AI-powered solution designed to transform your employee learning experience by automatically creating micro-learning Courses. Simply upload one or more documents, and Embark will intelligently split the content into bite-sized Modules, convert them into engaging micro-learning videos, and schedule their delivery over multiple weeks.

This approach ensures that learners can absorb new information gradually, improving retention and engagement. To reinforce learning, Embark includes periodic trivia assessments, helping learners stay on track and solidify their understanding as they progress.

For more challenging topics, Embark provides a Chat interface that acts as a learning assistant. Learners can ask questions and receive detailed, context-aware answers based on the training content, offering additional support when they need it most.

**Features**
Embark is a learning-focussed solution that can:
- Automatically create micro-learning courses by uploading one or more documents. The documents are split into bite-sized modules and converted into micro-learning videos
- Course content is delivered over multiple weeks to ensure gradual learning and retention.
- Generate engaging activities like Trivia, Bingo, and Scavenger Hunts to make learning fun and interactive.
- Provide a Chat Assistant that helps learners explore and understand difficult topics by answering questions based on the uploaded content.
- Deliver periodic trivia assessments to reinforce learning and measure progress over time.
- Provide detailed knowledge gap analysis to help identify areas where learners need additional support or focus.
In one click, you get Courses, Chatbot, Activities, Multi-media, and Analytics — all working to ensure your employees have the best learning experience while improving knowledge retention. Embark also manages different types of events, including hosted, self-paced, and task-based checklists, and integrates with your Outlook calendar to manage schedules and highlight conflicts.

**Getting Started**.
- It's free to get started. Please watch the [video tutorials](https://www.embark.us/support/embark-help-videos) for tips.
- No registration required, but you'll need an active Microsoft Teams account
- For corporate subscriptions, please [schedule a demo](https://www.embark.us/schedule-a-demo)

**Works in Microsoft 365 Copilot**
With our latest release, you can
- See the learning progress for a particular employee. Sample Prompt: Has Jane Doe completed all her assigned courses
- Get the list of available courses for a given role or topic. Sample Prompt: Show me the courses that are available for a Software Engineer

**Works in Teams Meetings**
- Embed the app in any meeting, and when you launch the event, Embark will open in collaboration mode.

**Works as a personal app in Microsoft 365**
- Just like in the Embark web app, you can access it within Microsoft 365 and enjoy all the features.

**Compose Extension in Microsoft Outlook**
- Search for the learning progress or an employee or look for your course assignments

**Support**
- Learn more at: [https://www.embark.us](https://www.embark.us)
- We understand your security concerns: [https://security.herm.is](https://security.herm.is)
- We respect your privacy: [Privacy policy](https://www.herm.is/legal/privacy)
- Report any inappropriate content [here](https://www.embark.us/contact)
- [Contact us](https://www.embark.us/contact) for any questions.

title: Funtivity Games for Work
shortDescription: Funtivity Games for Work: Transforming Team Building and Corporate Engagement
Description:
Funtivity is the ultimate destination for corporate games and team-building activities. Packed with an extensive library of interactive experiences, Funtivity is designed to strengthen collaboration, enhance communication, and boost morale within your team. With activities like Trivia, Doodle Challenge, One-Minute Story, and meticulously crafted new content released every week, Funtivity offers endless options to energize your team and make meetings unforgettable.

**Getting Started**

Funtivity is free to explore and easy to use. Simply search for Funtivity in the Microsoft Teams App Store and click 'Add' to integrate it into any meeting. Whether you're taking a quick 5-minute break or dedicating a full session to team bonding, Funtivity makes it seamless and fun. Please watch the [video tutorials](https://www.funtivity.co/support/funtivity-help-videos) for tips. No registration is required—just ensure you have an active Microsoft Teams account.

For organizations seeking tailored solutions, we offer Corporate subscriptions with exclusive features and customization. Learn more by contacting us.

**How to Use Funtivity for Corporate Games**

1. Add Funtivity to Your Meeting: Once added, explore the wide variety of activities available, each offering different themes tailored for corporate settings—such as Workplace Diversity, Team Communication, Leadership, and more.
2. Prepare Your Team: Ensure all meeting participants have the Funtivity tab open before selecting an activity to start. Any participant can launch Funtivity, and others will be prompted to join.
3. Host and Control: The activity host selects themes, controls the pace, and sets the tone for the activity. For instance, in Trivia, the host determines the speed at which questions are presented, fostering engagement and friendly competition.
4. Engage and Play: Each activity is time-bound and designed for individual participation. At the end of each session, a summary highlights the top performers and celebrates team achievements.

**Key Features**

- Designed for Corporate Teams: Focus on building stronger connections, improving collaboration, and fostering a positive work environment.
- Variety of Themes: Explore topics like Managing People, Effective Communication, and Workplace Culture, with new content added regularly.
- Solo Play with Collective Fun: Activities are played individually, but the shared experience brings teams closer together.
- Seamless Integration: Works effortlessly within Microsoft Teams meetings, requiring no additional tools or setup.
-Customize with AI: Customize game content easily by providing a topic and let AI help you create a custom experience that your team can enjoy.

**Hosting & Customization for Your Events**

Take your events to the next level with our professional hosting and customization options. Our expert Event Hosts can create a memorable and engaging experience tailored to your team’s needs. Corporate subscriptions include:

- Custom Content & Themes: Align activities with your company’s goals and values.
- Event Hosting Services: Add a professional touch with an experienced host guiding the event  for an extra fee.

Hermis account manager for any other Funtivity requests.

**Works in Teams Meetings, Outlook and Microsoft365**
- Embed the app in any teams meeting. When you launch an activity, Funtivity will open in collaboration mode. Funtivity can also be used within Outlook and Microsoft365.

**Support**
- Learn more at: [https://www.funtivity.co](https://www.funtivity.co)
- We understand your security concerns: [https://security.herm.is](https://security.herm.is)
- We respect your privacy: [Privacy policy](https://www.herm.is/legal/privacy)
- Report any inappropriate content [here](https://www.funtivity.co/contact)
- [Contact us](https://www.funtivity.co/contact) for any questions.

Description:

**SMS, MMS, WhatsApp – Unified Messaging Made Simple**
HelloSend for Microsoft Teams helps you streamline communications by enabling you to send and receive SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages directly within Teams. This app is built for businesses aiming to boost customer engagement and enhance team collaboration—all from one unified platform. (Note: The SMS feature requires a Microsoft Teams phone number.)
**Key Benefits:**
Unified Communication: Manage all your SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messages in one place.
Increased Efficiency: Simplify workflows to save time and reduce manual effort.
Enhanced Engagement: Easily track and manage conversations to improve customer interactions.
**Key Features:**
Multi-Channel Messaging:  Send and receive SMS, MMS, and activate WhatsApp on your existing phone numbers.
Unified Inbox:  View and manage all incoming and outgoing messages directly within Teams.
Campaign Management: Run and manage SMS and WhatsApp campaigns directly within Teams, improving engagement and outreach.
AI-Powered Messaging Assistance: Get real-time content suggestions, rephrasing options, and template ideas powered by AI.

title: Ideamap
shortDescription: Empower your team to brainstorm better and faster with Ideamap
Description:
Ideamap is an AI assisted visual brainstorming app built for Microsoft Teams. It helps you and your team generate ideas and collaborate in real-time. You can use Ideamap to brainstorm new product features, marketing ideas, grow your business, and more. Ideamap transforms your brainstorming sessions into fun, engaging, and highly productive meetings.

**Easy Setup**
1. Add Ideamap to the sidebar
2. Click 'Connect Ideamap with Microsoft Teams' on behalf of all tenant users
3. Create or login to your Ideamap account
4. Create a free workspace following the setup process
5. Add Ideamap to channels or tabs where you work with ideas.

You can use the basic version of Ideamap for free and upgrade when you are ready. Each team can have their own workspace and paid plans are available on a per user basis.

**Core Features**
- Workspaces: Create and manage multiple virtual spaces tailored to specific teams and projects.
- Rooms: Virtual brainstorming canvas for real-time team collaboration.
- Share and Embed: Share brainstorming sessions and embed them in other platforms.
- Import and Export: Import data from other sources and export ideas for use in other - applications.

**AI Features**
- Idea Generation: Generate unique and inspiring ideas with AI..
- Copilots: AI assistants provide real-time guidance and support.
- Framework Templates: AI-powered frameworks such as Six Thinking Hats or SWOT Analysis.
- Challenge Suggestions: Analyse and identify potential challenges in your organisation using AI.
- Inspiration: AI-driven inspiration to overcome creative blocks.
- Visualisation: Transform ideas into visual representations using AI.

**Facilitate Features**
- Timer: Start countdowns to ensure efficient time use.
- Voting: Enable participants to vote on ideas democratically.
- Summary: Wrap up sessions with summaries and next steps.
- Guests: Invite external participants to contribute to sessions.

**Why incorporate AI in brainstorming?**
The aim of using AI in brainstorming should be, in our opinion, to amplify human creativity. We think AI is an ideal partner for ideation - it facilitates a continuous flow of inspiration, supports idea exchanges, can provide feedback from various perspectives and can help finding trends, enhancing the overall brainstorming experience.

**What type of AI do you use?**
Ideamap uses ChatGPT by OpenAI (GPT3.5 & GPT4) for generating text content and Stability AI for generating illustrations.

To get started with Ideamap you can either install this app or go to https://ideamap.ai/get-started

If you need any support or need to contact us, go to https://ideamap.ai/help

This app may contain AI-generated content. If you have any objections or feedback to AI-generated content please contact us at hello@ideamap.ai.

shortDescription: With Klaxoon in Microsoft Teams, maximize engagement and boost productivity.
Description:
Klaxoon is an all-in-one work collaboration platform that makes business easier.

 With 10 powerful visual collaboration tools, Klaxoon is a game-changer that empowers individuals to increase engagement, drive productivity, and shape an innovative workspace. Share ideas on a Board, collect feedback with a Survey, and make decisions collectively. Increase engagement using Vote, Questions and Quizzes, all in one single collaborative space, whether you're a Klaxoon user or a Microsoft Teams meeting participant.

 With Klaxoon for Microsoft Teams get access to Klaxoon directly from your Microsoft Teams workspace:

  - Launch, create and share your Klaxoon activities during your **Microsoft Teams Meetings**
 - Embed a Klaxoon activity as a **Microsoft Teams's tab in any chat or channel** to work asynchronously with your teams.
 - Easily prepare for your meetings by sharing your Klaxoon activities in advance in your **Microsoft Teams Calendar invitations.**
 - Find and share Klaxoon activities and templates from your **Microsoft Teams conversations** and **Outlook**
 - Use Klaxoon as a **Copilot agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot** to search for Klaxoon activities and templates. Try this prompt: 'Can you help me find a Klaxoon templates for icebreaker?'
 

 Step into a world of seamless collaboration and skyrocket your productivity with Klaxoon. Trusted by leading organizations worldwide. Join the movement and revolutionize how you work!

 In order to use this app, users must have an active [Klaxoon](https://klaxoon.com) account, please contact our [support team](https://help.klaxoon.com/en/) for more details.

title: Kunjani
shortDescription: Gamify your meeting with interactive Kunjani activities designed by you.
Description:
The Kunjani app helps make boring meetings lively and productive. The gamified environment creates a buzz, utilising the fact that everyone likes to play and are soon drawn into the fun, collaborative spirit of the serious-game.

There are points, time limits and interesting activities to fuel the fun!

Few meetings are specifically designed to engage participants using their preferred way of giving and receiving information. The wireframe in the Kunjani app, grounded in neuroscience, enables you to transform your own content or meeting agenda into a powerful, serious-game, specifically designed to meet your objectives, while optimising the varied skills and learning preferences of your team.

At the start of a meeting, as participants enter the room they are allocated to a team. Then the serious-play begins. The facilitator invites a participant to roll the dice. Triggered by the roll, an activity or question is revealed. The rolling team has an allocated time to prepare their response before sharing it.  The floor is then opened for discussion. The facilitator awards points to deserving teams and restarts the cycle with the next team rolling the dice. The game dynamic encourages full participation.

Decks can be as long or as short as required. Use them to generate ideas, explore concepts, or as a meeting recap to stimulate action.  Depending on the purpose, the dice can be preloaded for questions and activities to come in a sequence, or in a random order.

Before a meeting, you can create your own Kunjani deck on a topic of your choice using activity prompts to guide you. Alternatively, you can access the public library to search for a pre-developed deck to customise according to your needs. In a Team channel, you can preview and edit each other's contributions in real time. Use the chat to discuss. Get creative!

Kunjani makes learning sticky, fast and fun!

In order to use this app you need to have an active Kunjani account. A free account is automatically created when you sign in with Microsoft.

[Help](https://teams.microsoft.com/l/entity/6b4ac65a-764d-4021-bf3f-40cb2d137a33/help)

title: Let's Copilot
shortDescription: Acquire the skills and mindset to integrate Microsoft Copilot in your daily work
Description:
Unlock the full potential of Copilot with our comprehensive learning app, designed to provide a personalized experience that helps you optimize Copilot based on your unique needs and tasks. Whether you're a developer, writer, project manager, or any professional using Copilot, our app offers a tailored approach to mastering its capabilities, enabling you to work smarter and more efficiently.

**Tailored Learning Journey**
Our app starts by understanding your job role, daily tasks, and specific objectives. It uses this information to create a customized set of lessons that align with your individual needs. No more generic tutorials or one-size-fits-all content?our app adapts to your experience level, industry requirements, and the challenges you face, ensuring every lesson is relevant and immediately applicable.

**Guided by Expert Crewmembers**
Meet our skilled crewmembers, your personal guides to navigating the world of Copilot. These virtual mentors are designed to help you recognize and build essential skills through a series of interactive lessons. They provide insights, tips, and practical examples that make learning engaging and effective. With their guidance, you'll not only learn how to use Copilot more efficiently to maximize its potential in your specific context.

**Tailored Lessons Based on Your Job and Tasks**
The app offers lessons specifically designed for your role and tasks. Whether you're coding, creating content, managing projects, or analyzing data, our app shows you how to use Copilot effectively in your daily workflow. Each lesson is crafted to help you solve real-world problems and achieve your goals faster.

**Why Choose This App?**
- Customized Learning: Lessons tailored to your job role, tasks, and goals.
- Expert Guidance: Crewmembers provide insights, tips, and examples to build your skills.
- Track Progress: Monitor your learning through the skills represented by our Copilot Crewmembers
- Boost Efficiency: Master Copilot and elevate your productivity.

**Start Your Journey Now!**
Download our app today and start a personalized learning journey to master Copilot. Let our expert crewmembers guide you through lessons tailored to your role and tasks, and unlock new levels of productivity and success in your work!
---
In order to use this app, users must have an active Let's Copilot license.

 See our [support page](https://letscopilot.com/support/) for FAQ and contacting support. This app heavily leverages AI in order to:

- Understand your job and responsibilities

- Determine which lessons would be most useful for you

- Customize lessons to your job profile

- Understand and answer any questions you may have about the use of Microsoft Copilot

If you encounter anything inappropriate or objectionable, please let us know immediately by emailing [info@letscopilot.com](mailto:info@letscopilot.com).

title: Lucidspark
shortDescription: Brainstorm and collaborate on a virtual whiteboard right in Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Lucidspark is a cloud-based virtual whiteboard where your team can bring their best ideas to light. Brainstorm and collaborate together in real time, whether you're working remotely or in-person. Lucidspark helps people organize notes and scribbles and turn them into presentation-ready concepts. When it's time for next steps, your team can develop workflows and process documents to turn ideas into reality.

        Add a Lucidspark board as a tab in your Microsoft Teams channel. Using the Lucidspark meeting stage or the embedded editor, anyone in the channel can edit or comment on your board without ever leaving Microsoft Teams. You can also access Lucidspark boards from a personal tab and view link previews in Outlook and Microsoft 365.

        Intuitive features:
        - Infinite canvas
        - Sticky notes
        - Freehand drawing
        - Voting
        - Timer
        - Note Panel
        - Containers
        - Sorting and gathering
        - Templates
        - Full-screen meeting stage environment
        - Use AI to generate ideas from a prompt or to expand upon, sort, and summarize ideas

        Perfect for any team:
        - Real-time collaboration
        - Color-coded Collaborator Colors
        - Group chat and commenting with @mentions
        - Version control and revision history
        - Breakout Boards for small groups

        Enterprise-ready:
        - SSO and SAML authentication
        - Automated account provisioning
        - Account consolidation and secure domain lockdown
        - Dedicated account support group

        Part of Lucid's visual collaboration suite, Lucidspark allows any team to effectively brainstorm, collaborate and align on new ideas and organize collective thinking into actionable next steps. Lucid products are utilized in over 180 countries by more than 30 million users. Ninety-nine percent of the Fortune 500 use Lucid products, and customers include Google, GE, NBC Universal, and Johnson & Johnson. Since the Utah-based company's founding in 2010, it has received numerous awards for its product, business and workplace culture. In order to use this app, users must have an active Lucidspark account. Please contact our support team or visit [lucidspark.com](https://lucidspark.com/) for more details.

        If you need more information, come across any objectionable AI-generated content, or have any questions at all, please reach out to us at [this support page](https://help.lucid.co/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=360000726471).

title: Matter
shortDescription: Employee Recognition, Rewards, Surveys, and Celebrations where you work!
Description:
Increase employee engagement with peer-to-peer kudos recognition based on company values, save time by automating global gift card delivery and birthdays/anniversaries, and 10x your response rate with pulse and custom surveys.

**What you can do with Matter:**

- 🎉 **Start Feedback Friday**! — Automatic, customizable notifications centered around a day where your company is encouraged to give peer-to-peer recognition with kudos and feedback.

- 🙌 **Celebrate wins together with Kudos**! — Choose from 9 templates or create your own custom kudos to share company values, company jokes, and more. 

- 🎁 **Increase recognition with Rewards**! — Add Matter coins to kudos, surveys, and feedback to show extra appreciation. Redeem coins for gift cards, custom company rewards, donations, and more.

- 🥳 **Never miss a Celebration**! — Automatically send birthday and work anniversary messages with/without rewards for everyone to see and celebrate.

- 📋 **10x your response rate with Custom Surveys**! — Automate and send surveys, get real-time feedback, view powerful analytics, and offer rewards.

- 📈 **Gather feedback with Pulse + eNPS Surveys**! — Transform your organization into a champion of diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging. Gather real-time, continuous feedback and insights.

- 🎨 **Put Company Values front and center**! — Make people feel more connected to the company and each other with company value kudos templates.

- 📊 **Answer culture questions with Analytics**! — Leverage kudos, rewards, and feedback activity to identify engagement insights and trends.

**Use Matter with Microsoft 365 Copilot:**

Matter has integrations with Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and now Copilot, which helps teams leverage simple, natural language prompts to get where they want to go, faster. Try these prompts:

- "Matter, generate a leaderboard of top kudos givers and receivers."

- "Matter, what celebrations are coming next month?"

- "Matter, what is my company's current eNPS."

**What companies are saying about Matter:**

- "Our company’s culture & morale changed overnight! In under 2 months, we’ve had over 2,000 kudos sent and 80%+ engagement across all employees. Matter has motivated people to participate like no other software we have ever used." — Jeff Hagel, President | [Customer Story](https://matterapp.com/customer-stories/mcinnis-holloway?utm_source=microsoft-teams&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=partner-center)

- "I love how easy it is for employees to recognize each other with kudos. Matter has boosted morale, increased employee engagement, and it's now a strong presence in our company culture." — Michael Margolese, Senior Human Resources Manager | [Customer Story](https://matterapp.com/customer-stories/trend-hunter?utm_source=microsoft-teams&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=partner-center)

- "Matter helps our employees feel more valued, rewarded, and recognized. It’s a very fun and easy-to-use platform that has created a positive experience and engagement for our people while also helping to reinforce our core values daily." — Taylor Rapp, Director of People & Culture | [Customer Story](https://matterapp.com/customer-stories/true-classic?utm_source=microsoft-teams&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=partner-center)

**Get Started:**

- [Try Matter for Free](https://matterapp.com/?utm_source=teams-app-directory&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=bio)! — *Matter has a 14-day free trial with unlimited access to all features.*

- Want more info? Watch the [Matter demo video](https://matterapp.com/demo?utm_source=teams-app-directory&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=bio) or [schedule a demo](https://schedule.matterapp.com/campaign/demo?utm_source=teams-app-directory&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=partner-center).

**Have Questions or Feedback?**

Email us at [hello@matterapp.com](mailto:hello@matterapp.com) or message us at [@MatterApp](https://twitter.com/MatterApp).

Matter supports Microsoft Teams and Outlook.

title: Meeting Canary
shortDescription: Monitor and improve your meetings with Meeting Canary.
Description:
Get real time feedback to improve the efficiency, inclusivity, and dialogue for any online meeting. Designed specifically for Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft365, Meeting Canary has the following features:

Real-time monitoring of the meeting with visual indicators of participants:
* Engagement and speaking time
* Focus
* Respect
* Energy
* Cost
* Open and closed questions

In meeting Voice Assistant - using the wake work ask, “Hey Meeting Canary, what time is it in Vancouver?” or via the chat: @meeting canary “what’s the capital of Sweden?” to save people wondering off topic.
 
Post meeting, Meeting Canary sends a simple survey to see if a meeting was really that useful and provide analytics of each meeting or series of meetings to help improve meeting performance.
 
Meeting Canary’s goal is simple - to make meetings better. By that we mean; faster, more inclusive, more focused on the job in hand and measuring the energy - because energetic, respectful, and focused meetings are great! 

To learn more about Meeting Canary and how to get the most from it, please visit our support website [https://support.meetingcanary.com/](https://support.meetingcanary.com/).

Meeting Canary is free to use subject to [fair usage](https://support.meetingcanary.com/fair-usage).

title: Meeting Rooms - by Officely
shortDescription: The meeting room booking tool that lives 100% in Microsoft Teams.
Description:
Meeting Rooms - by Officely makes it super easy for your team to see which meeting rooms are free and book them directly in Microsoft Teams. No extra apps. No new logins. Just simple scheduling and happier teams.
 
 
🗓️  **Easy Meeting Room Booking**
Need a room for that brainstorming session or client call? Book it directly in Microsoft Teams and find the perfect space in seconds.
 
 
👀  **Total Room Visibility**
No more wandering the halls or interrupting meetings. Instantly see which rooms are free and when, with real-time updates for total peace of mind.
 
 
🔧  **Fully Customizable**
Set up your office, add meeting rooms, and tag spaces with their unique features like projector or whiteboard. Tailor the app to your team’s needs and keep things simple.
 
 
✅  **All in Microsoft Teams**
Because your team already lives here, so should your meeting room management. The app fits seamlessly into your existing workflow, making adoption a breeze.

 
_Ready for hassle-free meeting room booking or need more information?_ [Check out our website](https://getofficely.com/solutions/meeting-room-booking-software) or send us a message at [hello@getofficely.com](mailto:hello@getofficely.com).

title: Mentimeter
shortDescription: Engage participants with Polls, Quizzes, Word Clouds, Q&A and more.
Description:
Drive engagement and empower your team with interactive presentations.

Ensure every voice is heard with Mentimeter’s interactive presentations. Present your Mentimeter presentation directly from Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Microsoft 365 and allow participants to vote straight from their Microsoft Teams window. No switching tabs or additional devices needed. Streamline your meetings and presentations all in one place.

Mentimeter is an interactive presentation platform that allows every voice to be heard. Engage your team with live Polling, Quizzes, Word Clouds, Q&A’s and more to capture real-time input without leaving Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365.

Transform the audience into active contributors to create meaningful discussions, gain feedback, conduct brainstorming sessions, share opinions, enhance learning and help create more inclusive and valuable meetings.

Access your Mentimeter account in Microsoft Teams, Outlook or Microsoft 365 and start sharing your Menti with your team.

[Sign up for Mentimeter](https://www.mentimeter.com/signup)

title: Miro
shortDescription: Create, embed, pin, search and get notifications for Miro Boards
Description:
**Try the Miro App for Microsoft and turn conversation into collaboration.**

Miro's intelligent canvas enables distributed teams to come together to synthesize information, develop strategy, design products and services, and manage processes all throughout the innovation lifecycle. With extensive white boarding and diagramming capabilities along with 130+ integrations and 200+ templates, Miro turns conversation into action, making teamwork more efficient and dynamic.

Together, Miro and Microsoft Teams integration offer a comprehensive collaboration solution for teams seeking productivity, innovation and enterprise-grade security.

**What’s New : Miro Agent for Microsoft Copilot**

* Use Miro Agent to search across your Miro boards.
* Search results are returned as adaptive cards which offer relevant details at a glance
* For example : Search for Miro boards about Project Alpha, Find Miro boards about Project Alpha

**App Capabilities:**

Use the Miro App for Microsoft across your entire Teams workspace: Meetings, Calendar, Tab, Bots, and Microsoft 365 Copilot to ideate, strategize, and co-create in real time without switching apps.

* **Microsoft 365 Copilot:** Use Miro Agent to search and get centralised access to information across Miro and Microsoft 365, breaking down knowledge silos.
* **Notifications Bot:** Centralise Miro notifications in Microsoft Teams for instant updates and seamless project management. Share boards, get feedback—stay informed and act fast—all within your Teams chat.
* **Microsoft Teams Meetings:** Boost team collaboration by opening existing or new Miro boards directly in meetings for real-time brainstorming with simple, easy steps—perfect for single-screen users who want to stay immersed in the call.
* **Microsoft Teams Calendar:** Embed a Miro board into any Microsoft Teams calendar invite, set permissions, and give access to your collaborators before the meeting.
* **Microsoft Teams Tabs:**
  * Search and embed any Miro board as a new tab to keep important Miro boards easily accessible and centralised for the team, eliminating the need to search through channels and making it easier to reference and use in discussions and decision making
  * Search and add Miro Boards as adaptive cards within Team Posts, providing a centralised space for communication, organised discussions, easy sharing, and better collaboration.
* **Microsoft Teams Chat:** Search and add Miro Boards as adaptive cards within Teams Chat so you and your collaborators can make updates, add comments, and work together asynchronously.

**Availability:**

* Miro for Microsoft Teams is available on all Miro plans.
* An active Miro account is required to use the app.
* Some advanced Miro features may only be available on paid plans.
* Your admin may need to enable the Miro app for your Microsoft Teams account.
* For more information, visit [miro.com](https://www.miro.com)

**This app is available for in Microsoft Outlook, Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 Copilot**

**Get Help and report objections :** Contact [Miro Support](https://help.miro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360020185799-How-to-contact-Miro-Support)

**Learn more:** [Miro Help Center](https://help.miro.com/hc/en-us/articles/360017572514-Microsoft-Teams-board-embed)

title: Mural
shortDescription: Take ideas from imagination to activation with Mural in Microsoft 365
Description:
**With a deep partnership across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, Mural connects teams to drive engagement**

Our mission at Mural is to unlock the hidden potential of every team by improving how we work together. When teamwork is broken, the entire organization suffers. With our intuitive visual workspace and smart teamwork practices, we help enterprise teams work together better, faster, and more effortlessly from anywhere to increase productivity, innovation, and job fulfillment at all levels of the enterprise.

Built for enterprise teams, Mural meets the most stringent of IT and regulatory requirements. Industry leaders — including IBM, ‌Microsoft, SAP, and Abercrombie & Fitch — choose Mural to help their teams accelerate innovation and problem-solving at scale. Whether your team is fully remote, distributed, in the office, or still figuring it out, Mural brings teams across the enterprise together to do the work that matters most.

Align and empower teams with seamless workflows and supercharged collaboration using all of Mural’s visual thinking and Facilitation Superpowers™ features right in Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Take advantage of voting, summon, celebrate, private mode, and much more to stay connected and productive during your next collaboration session.

Mural has integrations with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, Outlook, Azure DevOps, and more, as well as a new integration with Microsoft 365 Copilot, which helps teams leverage simple, natural language prompts to get where they want to go, faster.

Use Mural in Copilot to search your murals and templates. Try these prompts:

- “Can you recommend a mural template for brainstorming?”

title: Officely - Desk Booking
shortDescription: Desk Booking - All in Microsoft Teams
Description:
Desk booking tool that lives 100% in Microsoft Teams
 
 
Officely allows your team to see who will be in the office, book in alongside them, reserve a car parking space and book a meeting room, directly in Microsoft Teams. No extra apps or logins to juggle, ensuring adoption. 
 
 
**About Officely’s Features:**
 
 
**🗓️ Super Easy Desk Booking**
Need a desk? A meeting room? A parking spot? Lunch? Even your dog’s spot? You can book it all right from Microsoft Teams. No downloads. No logins.
 
 
🙋‍♀️ **Increase Office Attendance**
Who wants to rock up to an empty office? Officely shows who’s in, so your team knows exactly when to come in for some face-to-face time. Instant office vibes.
 
 
🤝  **Improve Team Collaboration**
Wondering where everyone’s working? With Officely, you can see if your team is in the office, WFH, at a client’s office, or soaking up the sun on vacay. No need to play detective.
 
 
🧠  **Smart Office Day Suggestions**
Sick of commuting just to spend the day on Zoom? Officely tells your team the best days to come in so they can actually get stuff done. No more commuting regrets.
 
 
📊  **Cut Office Expenses**
Why pay for empty desks? Officely gives you the numbers on who’s in and when, so you can cut those unnecessary office costs without a second thought.
 
 
🚗  **Meeting Room and Car Parking Bookings**
Make sure meeting rooms and car parks aren't double booked or go unused. Officely makes it a breeze to reserve meeting rooms and parking spaces, all from Microsoft Teams.
 
 
✅  **All in Microsoft Teams**
Unlike other desk booking tools, Officely lives right in Microsoft Teams. No extra apps or logins to remember, just higher adoption and a happy team.
 
 
 
**What our customers say about us:**
“For us, the most valuable feature of Officely is that it shows people what they’re missing out on. It shows the exciting events happening each week, it shows who’s going to be there, and it makes you stop and think ‘Wait, I don’t want to miss out on that’.”
 
 - Esme, Office Operations Lead at CloudTalk

 
_Ready for hassle-free office space management or need more information?_ [Check out our website](https://getofficely.com) or send us a message at [hello@getofficely.com](mailto:hello@getofficely.com).

title: RealityCheck
shortDescription: RealityCheck for Microsoft Teams
Description:
RealityCheck by Beyond Identity

RealityCheck is a deepfake prevention and identity verification tool designed to enhance security and trust in virtual communications. Powered by Beyond Identity's phish-resistant authentication technology, RealityCheck enables users to verify their authenticity in Microsoft Teams meetings, channels, and chats.

Key Features & Benefits

-Authenticate with Confidence – Verify your identity seamlessly with RealityCheck and certify your authenticity in any Teams collaboration.
-Verify Others in Real Time – Instantly view the authentication status of participants within a Teams channel, chat, or meeting, ensuring you interact with verified users.
-Prevent Deepfake Impersonation – Stop unauthorized participants from faking their identity, strengthening security in virtual discussions.

How RealityCheck Works in Teams

-For IT Administrators: Deploy RealityCheck organization-wide to enable strong authentication and user verification across Teams.
-For End Users: Authenticate yourself and view the verification status of other members within a Teams chat, channel, or meeting.


Who Should Use RealityCheck?

RealityCheck is ideal for organizations that require strong identity verification and deepfake prevention, including:

-Security-conscious enterprises and IT teams
-Financial, healthcare, and legal industries handling sensitive data
-Government agencies requiring identity assurance in virtual communications

Requirements to Use RealityCheck

To use RealityCheck, your organization must be using Beyond Identity.

-If your organization already uses Beyond Identity: You can start using RealityCheck immediately. If you encounter any issues, contact your IT administrator.
-If you are an IT administrator looking to deploy RealityCheck: Please contact your Beyond Identity Deployment Team for onboarding.
-If your organization does not use Beyond Identity: You can request a demo or reach out to our team for more information.

Beyond Identity is a phish-resistant MFA solution managed by your IT department. Rollout may vary based on your organization’s policies.

To learn more or implement Beyond Identity in your organization, visit beyondidentity.com.
