title: ServiceBot
shortDescription: AI powered virtual agent to answer your employee queries and service requests.
Description:
ServiceBot is a virtual agent that uses natural language processing, machine learning and generative AI to understand end user queries and assists them by providing solutions conversationally and in raising service requests. Key features of ServiceBot include:
1. Conversational support* - Users can now chat with ServiceBot to get assistance. ServiceBot uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) & generative AI to understand user queries and craft relevant responses using the available information.
2. Ticket deflection* - Deflect L1 tickets by providing relevant knowledge base articles and relieve service desk agents from monotonous and repetitive tasks across support channels. To enable automatic responses from the bot on specific support channels, the Admin can add the channels to the allowlist from Freshservice Admin > Servicebot for Microsoft Teams > Virtual agent > Add bot to channels
3. One-click access - Users can ask the Servicebot to show their tickets or approvals within Microsoft Teams
4. Instant updates - Freshservice groups can be mapped to Microsoft Teams groups which are notified whenever a ticket is assigned to the group. Requesters also get notified whenever there's an update on their ticket.
5. Faster approvals - Agents and Requesters are notified about service requests and change approvals assigned to them. They can take action on approvals within Microsoft Teams!

With ServiceBot, your internal support is fast, streamlined and offers the best employee experience.
Freshservice is a cloud-based IT service desk that is easy-to-set up, quick to learn, and is effective in automating your routine internal tasks. It helps your employees raise requests or seek assistance through a self-service portal and allows your IT team to quickly pick up those tickets and fulfill them on time. Freshservice can also be used by HR, legal, admin or facilities team to handle internal requests.
In order to use ServiceBot, users must have an active Freshservice account. Please contact your IT administrator for more details or signup [here](https://www.freshworks.com/freshservice/signup)
Please make sure that you have completed the Microsoft Teams setup in Freshservice via the Freshservice app gallery. Post which, proceed to install the ServiceBot in Teams.

*Requester interactions and deflection features are available only in the Enterprise plan of Freshservice.

To report inappropriate content or contact us, write to us out at support@freshservice.com along with the details of the issue

shortDescription: Connect Microsoft Teams to Jira or Jira Service Management
Description:
The app helps software and business teams to work better together by linking Microsoft Teams chats and conversations to Jira or Jira Service Management issues.

**Features**

- Start a conversation or chat directly in your Jira issue: Involve team members or customers who don’t work primarily in Jira.
- Replies from Microsoft Teams will be displayed automatically in Jira – and vice versa.
- You can search for and share a Jira issue in your Microsoft Teams channel and start a conversation. All replies will be displayed in Jira.
- Use our customer portal in Microsoft Teams to create support tickets for Jira Service Management. Your support sees any new requests in JSM and can work on them.
- Work with your Jira boards in a Microsoft Teams tab and give non-Jira users basic access to Jira boards.

Note: Requires a Jira Cloud, Server or Data Center account and a subscription to "Microsoft 365 for Jira" or "Microsoft Teams for Jira – Smart Connect" in the Atlassian Marketplace.

title: Starmind
shortDescription: An AI-powered knowledge network for employees to tap into the company expertise.
Description:
Effortlessly connect with the right expertise exactly when you need it. Our AI captures and delivers human knowledge on-demand, fully integrated with Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, Outlook, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.
Your organization doesn't leverage **Starmind** yet? Please [get in touch](https://www.starmind.ai/contact) to get you started in no time.
With the **Starmind App** you can:
* Find the right people to help with your problem and get unblocked instantly. For example, use Starmind in Microsoft 365 Copilot to access the depth of your colleagues' knowledge by asking for the top three experts in functional programming and information security.
* Have a busy day at work? Ask your question anonymously in the network, and get answers from the right people while you work on your priorities.
* Access high-quality expert answers to questions that have been asked before, preventing you from digging through outdated information.
**Powered by AI, built for human connection**

When you have a question, Starmind connects you in real-time to colleagues with the exact expertise you need - no matter their title or location.
Learn how it works:
1. **Ask:** Need help resolving a problem but don't know who to ask? Type in your question, in your preferred language, right where you're already working — no need to leave your workflow.
2. **Identify:** Starmind's AI core analyzes the question, then consults your AI-based enterprise-wide Expertise Directory to identify the people who can answer.
3. **Connect:** Starmind routes your question to a small number of the most relevant people across your organization, who can respond quickly, providing specialist, tacit knowledge. Questions are answered with a 95% resolution rate.
4. **Capture:** Once your question is answered, Starmind automatically stores the responses, feeding it back to the AI core and making knowledge easily accessible for others in the future. This way if a similar question is asked again, previous questions and responses will pop up automatically.
5. **Learn:** Stay up-to-date on topics relevant to your expertise with personalized feeds, topic subscriptions and [StarGPT](https://www.starmind.ai/stargpt).
This app uses AI-powered expert selection and AI-generated content. Please [contact us](mailto:product@starmind.com) if you want to learn more about our product or our commitment to build fair, explainable and inclusive AI.

title: Tactic
shortDescription: Tactic Office Management
Description:
Our people-centric software empowers you to manage your in-office hours with tools for reserving desks, meeting rooms and parking spaces. And with our interactive office map, you will be able to see who’s coming into the office each day, making it easy to collaborate with co-workers.

WORKSPACE RESERVATIONS

Tactic's desk and meeting room reservations allow you to easily facilitate in-person collaboration while managing office capacity

INTERACTIVE OFFICE MAP

View available desks, see who's going to be in office and reserve your favorite spot with the interactive office map

Whether you're in need of a quiet place to focus, a day of in-person collaboration or a space to host a meeting, Tactic has you covered.

Signup today at [gettactic.com](https://gettactic.com) and discover the perfect way to get the most out of a hybrid workplace.

title: Teamflect
shortDescription: Everything performance management — right where you already do all of your work
Description:
Transform the way you manage performance inside Microsoft Teams with an all-in-one performance management tool that lets you set goals/OKRs, organize 1-on-1s, manage tasks, send surveys, conduct performance reviews, share feedback, and give praise. 

**Goals & OKRs**
Integrate goal-setting and OKR tracking seamlessly into daily interactions and regular meetings. Keep your team aligned and goals visible by creating cascading goals you can access inside ongoing meetings.

**Reviews**
Conduct performance reviews with ease inside Microsoft Teams, Outlook, and Microsoft 365. Have access to an extensive library of customizable review templates and automate your performance review cycles, inside Microsoft Teams.

**1-on-1 and Team Meetings**
Enrich your 1-on-1 or team meetings with meeting agendas, talking points, shared & private meeting notes, goal setting, feedback sharing, task management, and more!

**Recognitions**
Recognize your employees and celebrate success with customizable recognition badges. Assign points to each recognition and have your team exchange those points for rewards. Foster continuous engagement with real time recognition feeds and dynamic leaderboards.

**360-Degree Feedback**
Practice 360-degree feedback with an intuitive solution. Give and request feedback inside Microsoft Teams chat or meetings, access customizable feedback templates, and send out feedback requests to people outside of your organization, all with a single software.

**Tasks**
Stay on top of your day-to-day tasks with an integrated solution. Create tasks from messages inside Teams chat, set recurring tasks to establish key responsibilities, and sync your tasks with Microsoft To Do.

**Engagement &Pulse Surveys**
Keep your finger on the pulse with surveys you can send out instantly, inside Microsoft Teams & Outlook. Automate surveys to check in with your team regularly. Access a wide variety of customizable survey templates to measure engagement, employee net promoter scores, training efficiency, and more!


Teamflect provides rich context by getting behavioral data from Microsoft 365 and helps managers access deep insights generated from the daily communications with their direct reports and peers.

NOTE: Microsoft 365 account is required to use Teamflect. App may contain AI-generated content. To report inappropriate, harmful, or offensive content, you may reach us on support@teamflect.com. For any other questions, you can always contact us through [https://teamflect.com/contact-us](https://teamflect.com/contact-us).

title: Thrive Global
shortDescription: A behavior change coach embedded directly in your workflow.
Description:
Thrive for Microsoft Teams is a science-backed behavior change platform to improve well-being and productivity, embedded directly into your workflow. Thrive features include: 
- **Expert-led Journeys:** Improve well-being across key pillars including sleep, food, movement, stress management, connection, and more. 
- **Personalized Microsteps:** Choose from hundreds of small, achievable steps that add up to lasting behavior change. They’re too small to fail! 
- **Thrive Reset:** Reduce stress by watching a 60-second Thrive Reset video guiding you through breathing, mindfulness, gratitude, and more. 
- **Peer Storytelling:** Get inspired by others at your organization who have made lasting changes with Thrive. 
- **Motivational Challenges:** Try them solo or team up with colleagues across your organization to improve your well-being together. 
- **Daily Reflection:** Start your day by taking a moment to reflect on how you feel. 
Thrive for Teams makes prioritizing well-being as seamless as starting a conversation. 
Please reach out to [support@thriveglobal.com](mailto:support@thriveglobal.com) if you face any issues. We'll be happy to help. A Thrive Global account is required to use this app.

title: Vacation Tracker
shortDescription: Manage your team’s PTO worry-free within Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office.
Description:
Manage leave and get the visibility you need – right from where you work.


Vacation Tracker is a simple, easy-to-use leave tracking tool that helps growing teams like yours work more effectively, directly from Microsoft Teams, Outlook and Office. Our leave tracker is designed to help you improve your team efficiency by giving everyone easy access to essential leave information, in one central location. Here’s how we do it.


📝  Seamless integration & setup: There’s no need to sign up -- just log in with your SSO to request, approve, and get informed about upcoming leaves, without ever leaving Teams, Outlook, or Office.


🪄  Customize as you see fit: Group team members into an unlimited number of departments and locations. Enjoy the flexibility of setting custom leave policies, and custom holidays for different team locations. All this, and much more.


⏰  One-click everything: Send a leave request in just one click, and get it approved with another. Teams just getting started with Vacation Tracker love our one-click leave approval – and automatic approval for leave requests that don’t need it.


🔍  Get real-time updates: Gain live insights into everyone’s leave status in one place with the Microsoft Teams Overview and Calendar Tabs, along with daily notifications regarding upcoming absences.


🖥️  At your fingertips: Submitting leave requests, viewing leave balances, and leave approval notifications all happen right inside your workspace. As a result, you get crucial information exactly when and where you need it.


💡  Easy to use: Start a chat with the Vacation Tracker bot and follow the commands. Import both new and old users at the touch of a button. No more complicated onboarding or team training is needed, thanks to our intuitive & user-friendly tool.


🙌  Reduce communication silos: Employees can self-manage leave requests and leave balance tracking – without having to get in touch with management or their supervisor. This way, you spend less time answering questions, and your team is more informed and connected than ever.


These are just some of the reasons why Vacation Tracker is trusted by over 2,000 companies worldwide. Here’s what our customers say about us:


“Set it and forget it. New users come on, they get added to Vacation Tracker, and it just works.”

“The ease with which everyone transitioned across to using Vacation Tracker without asking a million questions was impressive!”

“Having easy updates on who’s taking time off, when, has helped our team be more connected than ever.”



But don't just take their word for it -- sign up for our free trial to get full access to all our features.



If you need help, feel free to get in touch with our [Helpdesk](https://vacationtracker.crisp.help/en/) to learn more or [schedule a live demo](https://vacationtracker.io/request-a-demo?utm_source=microsoft&utm_medium=appsource).

title: Vantage Rewards
shortDescription: Uplift your workplace morale with meaningful recognition
Description:
Vantage Rewards is a digital reward and recognition platform that allows you to deliver instant gratification to your employees. Integrating Vantage Rewards enables you to easily appreciate and nominate employees directly from Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, and Microsoft Office365.

All the rewards and recognition you bestow on your high-performing employees are also displayed in a real-time interactive social feed so that no one misses any updates within the organization.  

*Features and benefits*
- Acknowledge your employees with instant and quick appreciation.
- Appreciate or nominate multiple employees at one go.
- Add comments and digital badges to make appreciation more meaningful and attractive.
- Employees can reply to the recognition posts and motivate their peers.

To use the Vantage Rewards app for Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Outlook, and Microsoft Office365, you must be a registered user of Vantage Rewards. If you are interested in registering with us, please get in touch with us at support@vantagecircle.com or [visit our website](https://www.vantagecircle.com/contact-us)

shortDescription: Collaborate on whiteboards in Microsoft Teams channels and meetings
Description:
Simple collaboration directly from Microsoft Teams

With seamless integration into Microsoft Teams, you can collaborate in real time. Communicate directly from the application and work synchronised on your projects. Use the toolbar and develop concepts and ideas on the timeghost whiteboard that you can share and discuss with your team in real time.

Simple sharing

With AI features to success

Use the possibilities of OpenAI to automatically create flowcharts, texts and presentation slides with the help of text prompts, for example. The OpenAI API opens up countless possibilities.

Further advantages of the timeghost whiteboard

Save intermediate statuses of the whiteboard at any time

Save intermediate statuses of your whiteboard at any time with one click. You can return to your intermediate statuses at any time and

Conduct Teams meetings quickly and easily, create content and distribute it automatically

Create visual concepts and ideas directly in a Teams meeting from a template or right from the start. At the end of the meeting, the results are automatically shared and can be followed up.


🎉 Use the timeghost whiteboard for free! 🎉

Simply download it from the Teams Store and get started - 100% free.

You can login right here: https://app.whiteboard.timeghost-solutions.com/

If you have any questions or if AI-generated content is inappropriate you can reach out to support@timeghost.io

title: echo
shortDescription: Information where they are needed.
Description:
Tired of not knowing who is calling? With echo you get information on incoming calls and always know who is calling and what they want from you.



**App Features**

- **Clear.** - echo shows information on incoming calls directly in Microsoft Teams at a glance.

- **Clever.** - We use modern technologies and AI so that echo learns what is relevant. echo shows what is important and hides what is unimportant.

- **User-friendly.** - echo is there to support and provide quick and easy access to relevant information.

- **Swiss made.** - echo is developed with enthusiasm and love in the heart of Switzerland. You receive advice and support directly from the creators.

- **Secure by design.** - Data is a critical asset of any company. We are aware of this responsibility and rely on established security standards. We do not store anything that we do not need.



**Supported Integrations**

- **Microsoft 365:** E-mails, appointments and documents from your Microsoft 365 tenant.

- **Search.ch:** Directory with entries for people, companies and authorities from Switzerland.

- **Abacus:** People, companies, addresses and projects from your Abacus system.



Get started in seconds with a hassle-free integration. Just finish the onboarding wizard after you installed the app and you're ready to go.

A subscription is required to use echo. You can already increase your efficiency with the Basic Subscription Plan. Or try echo with the free trial. 



**Limitations**

The connection from incoming calls to echo currently only works on incoming PSTN calls. SIP calls are not supported by now. However, you can always use echo besides calls and start with a search within the app.



**Contact and more information**

For further information, visit [https://echoforteams.app](https://echoforteams.app) or [contact us](mailto:support@snapbean.ch).
